5. Place mixture in mold, pour over three and three-quarters deciliters good sweet sour cream mixed with three eggs and six dekagrams butter.
6. Top with pieces of butter and bake in the oven.
7. If fresh fruit is unavailable, cottage cheese or dried plums may be used instead of apples or pears.

title: Bábovka (Crown Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- one yeast cake (magic yeast)
- half pound fresh butter
- half pound good lard
- half pound sugar
- 6 yolks
- 2 whole eggs
- two small cups milk
- flour
- quarter pound or more raisins
- salt

## Directions

1. The evening before, make a starter from one yeast cake, which should be nicely soured by morning
2. Next day take half pound fresh butter, half pound good lard, half pound sugar, mix everything well together
3. Beat in 6 yolks one at a time with constant stirring and 2 whole eggs
4. Add two small cups milk
5. Pour in the yeast starter, mix well and add flour until it is like thick porridge
6. Pepper quarter pound or more raisins, mix them into the batter and let it rise
7. Grease the form and sprinkle with breadcrumbs
8. Put the batter into it, let it rise again and bake
9. When baked, sprinkle it well with ground sugar
10. Do not forget salt, as that is understood by itself

title: Báhovka (Babovka Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 9 decagrams rendered butter
- 9 decagrams fresh butter
- 10 egg yolks
- 3 tablespoons yeast
- 24 decagrams flour
- 5 tablespoons good sour cream
- a little vanilla
- salt
- sugar for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Rub 9 decagrams of rendered butter until foamy
2. Add 9 decagrams of fresh butter
3. Add 10 egg yolks, each well mixed
4. Add 3 tablespoons yeast, 24 decagrams flour, 5 tablespoons good sour cream, a little vanilla and salt
5. Bake the babovka
6. Sprinkle with sugar

title: Bílá cibulová omáčka (White Onion Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- several white onions, cut into thin slices
- butter
- white light roux
- meat broth
- sweet cream
- salt
- pepper
- spices

## Directions

1. Cut the white onions into thin slices
2. Fry them in butter until soft, without letting them turn yellow
3. Prepare a white light roux, which is cooked with meat broth and sweet cream
4. Add the prepared onions to the mixture
5. Season with salt, pepper and spices
6. Mix everything again and let it simmer
7. Strain the cooked sauce

title: Bílá cibulová omáčka (White Onion Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- butter
- flour
- beef broth
- vinegar (optional)

## Directions

1. Chop the onion into fine pieces
2. Stew it in butter until soft and white
3. Add a tablespoon of flour and mix well
4. Pour beef broth over it and let it cook for about half an hour
5. If you want the sauce sour, add a little vinegar before cooking

title: Bílá kmínová omáčka (White Caraway Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- two tablespoons flour
- butter
- a quarter liter of clear meat broth
- one tablespoon of crushed caraway
- salt
- two egg yolks
- butter

## Directions

1. Make a light roux from two tablespoons of flour and butter
2. Boil it with a quarter liter of clear meat broth
3. Add one tablespoon of crushed caraway
4. Season with salt
5. Mix in two beaten egg yolks and butter

title: Bílá Kmínová Omáčka (White Caraway Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons flour
- butter
- quarter liter clear meat broth
- 1 tablespoon caraway seeds, crushed
- salt
- 2 blanched egg yolks
- butter
- lemon juice or vinegar

## Directions

1. Make a light roux from flour and butter
2. Cook with quarter liter clear meat broth
3. Add a spoonful of crushed caraway seeds
4. Season with salt
5. Mix with two blanched egg yolks and butter
6. Add lemon juice or good vinegar to taste
7. This white caraway sauce is suitable both for savory meats and for fish

title: Bílá poleva (White Frosting)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 egg whites
- 3/4 small cup powdered sugar
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract or juice from 1/2 lemon

## Directions

1. Beat stiff snow from 2 egg whites
2. Gradually fold in 3/4 small cup of powdered sugar
3. If desired, you can add 1/2 teaspoon of vanilla extract
4. Or add juice from 1/2 lemon, but you must add more sugar at the same time
5. Mix a little longer and spread on cooled cake
6. The frosting must be white as snow and as thick as drop cake batter

title: Bílá polévka s rýží (Cream of Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- six ounces rice
- boiling water
- good beef soup
- piece of fresh butter
- four egg yolks
- boiling beef soup

## Directions

1. Cook six ounces of picked and thoroughly rinsed rice in good beef soup with boiling water.
2. Rub it with a piece of fresh butter and four egg yolks.
3. Pour boiling beef soup over it, mix well and pour into a dish.
4. You may add chopped gizzards and livers from poultry.
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Bílá račí polévka (White Crayfish Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- crayfish butter
- flour
- milk
- salt
- sugar
- asparagus
- roll
- other garnishes from other crayfish soups

## Directions

1. Make a roux from crayfish butter and several tablespoons of flour
2. Cook it in boiling milk, salt and sweeten
3. When serving, top with crayfish butter
4. Add the same garnishes as in other crayfish soups (asparagus, roll, etc.)

title: Bílá rybí polévka (Fish Soup, White)
body:
## Ingredients

- several pieces of various fish
- celery
- parsley
- leek or white onion
- several pieces of bread
- egg yolks from hard-boiled eggs
- clear fish soup
- four whole eggs and two egg yolks
- flowers (spice)
- crayfish butter (if available)

## Directions

1. Put several pieces of various fish in a pan
2. add celery, parsley, leek or white onion and let it stew
3. then fry several pieces of bread
4. crush it in a mortar with hard-boiled egg yolks
5. put this with the stewed mixture in a pot
6. pour fish bouillon on it and let it boil
7. meanwhile beat four whole eggs and two egg yolks into a small cup of cold clear fish soup
8. add a little flowers to it
9. beat well, cover with clean cloth, tie the cup with string
10. hang it in boiling water and let it boil for one hour
11. then take it out with a small spoon into a bowl like small dumplings
12. strain the soup, beat it with several egg yolks
13. add flowers to it, and if you have it, a little crayfish butter
14. pour it into a bowl over the dumplings
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Bílá Řepa neb Turín (Rutabaga)
body:
## Ingredients

- rutabaga
- weak meat broth
- lard
- sugar
- salt
- ground ginger
- pork meat

## Directions

1. Cut rutabaga into cubes and cook about an hour in weak meat broth
2. Place a heaping spoonful of lard and a teaspoon of sugar on a pan
3. Once the sugar dissolves, add the drained rutabaga, salt it, and braise until tender
4. Make a brown roux, mix with the drained broth, pour over the braised rutabaga, and season with ground ginger
5. Cook a piece of pork meat, cut into neat pieces, arrange rutabaga on a serving dish and top with the pork

title: Bílé fazole na kyselo (White Beans in Sour)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- white beans
- soft water
- onion
- wine vinegar
- salt and pepper
- anchovies or hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Cook beans like peas in soft water
2. Drain the water
3. Finely dice onion as needed and add to beans and mix
4. Pour in wine vinegar, pepper and add either anchovies or hard-boiled eggs
5. Usually served cold

title: Bílé Mandle Cukrové (White Sugared Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fine large almonds
- fine refined sugar

## Directions

1. Select fine large almonds and rub with cloth to remove all dust
2. Place in a pot or saucepan
3. Boil fine refined sugar
4. Continuously stir almonds in the container so they heat evenly over the heat
5. Add crushed sugar and continue stirring until each almond is coated
6. When dry, add new sugar and repeat several times until a complete sugar layer forms around the almonds
7. Finally, pour melted warm sugar to give the almonds shine
8. Remove almonds from container several times and place on a sieve to collect debris and fine sugar
9. Crush and melt this sugar again, then pour warm back onto the almonds

title: Bílé upálené mandle (White Roasted Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- almonds
- sugar
- orange water

## Directions

1. Peel the almonds and let them dry.
2. Cook sugar with orange water and add the almonds to it.
3. Stir and cook them until all the sugar has adhered to them, then let them dry.

title: Bělice s vinem (White Fish in Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- white fish
- salt
- stuffing
- butter
- flour
- red wine
- paprika
- lemon

## Directions

1. Clean the white fish, salt it and fill it with either ordinary stuffing or carp stuffing, place on a baking pan greased with butter, sprinkle with butter mixed with flour, pour with half a pint of red wine and let it bake for an hour with frequent basting.
2. Then remove the fish onto a dish, strain the sauce, add a little more red wine, a teaspoon of browned flour, a pinch of paprika, mix well, pour over the fish and garnish with sliced lemon.

title: Cabbage with Bacon French-Style (Zelí se špekem po francouzská)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Small firm heads of white cabbage
- Bacon cut into thin slices
- Good meat broth
- Parsley
- Chives
- Pepper
- Nutmeg
- Salt

## Directions

1. Remove the core from small firm heads of white cabbage and peel off the outer leaves
2. Cut the heads into quarters and blanch in boiling water
3. Drain and place on a baking sheet lined with bacon sliced thinly
4. Pour good meat broth over it, interlace with parsley, chives, pepper and nutmeg, and cook slowly without salt
5. Drain and serve with various meat dishes

title: Cacao (Cocoa)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- whole cocoa beans
- milk or water

## Directions

1. Instead of ground cocoa, buy whole cocoa beans
2. Roast them like coffee beans
3. Remove the shell
4. Grind in a mill or crush in a mortar
5. Boil in milk or water

title: Cacaový creme (Cocoa Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 4-6 deka ground good cocoa
- cold cream
- 3 deciliters cream
- sugar
- six egg yolks

## Directions

1. Mix 4-6 deka of ground good cocoa with cold cream
2. Add 3 deciliters of cream, a little sugar and six egg yolks

title: Cake from Potato Flour (Koláč z mouky zemákové)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 500 grams beaten sugar
- lemon peel, grated
- 8 eggs
- 500 grams (1 pound) potato flour
- 500 grams butter

## Directions

1. Beat sugar with grated lemon peel for half an hour
2. Add eggs
3. Gradually add potato flour and butter, one tablespoon at a time
4. Pour into round form
5. Bake for one hour
6. Glaze when done

title: Candied Figs, Dried (Zadělané fíky; sušené)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- figs
- sugar

## Directions

1. Prepare the figs as described in the previous section
2. Finally cook the sugar to the sixth degree
3. Remove the figs, dry them, dust with sugar and coat them thoroughly
4. Allow to dry
5. Store dried figs in boxes between papers

title: Carlsbad Tarts (Karlovarské koláče)
body:
## Ingredients

- six ounces fresh butter
- eight egg yolks
- two cups flour
- four heaping tablespoons powdered sugar
- fine zest from half a lemon
- one cup milk
- a piece of yeast mixed earlier with a little milk and a piece of sugar and allowed to rise
- salt
- egg white, stiffly beaten
- powdered sugar for sprinkling
- preserved cherries or sour cherries

## Directions

1. Cream six ounces of fresh butter with eight egg yolks until foamy
2. Add two cups flour, four heaping tablespoons powdered sugar, fine lemon zest from half a lemon, one cup milk, and a piece of yeast that has been mixed earlier with a little milk and a piece of sugar and allowed to rise
3. Add a little salt and let rise in a warm place
4. Line a baking sheet with clean paper and brush with melted butter
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto it in mounds about the size of a walnut
6. Spread them with a knife to about a finger's thickness
7. Brush generously with stiffly beaten egg white from a height
8. Sprinkle with powdered sugar
9. Place a preserved cherry or sour cherry in the center of each
10. Bake in the oven
11. Note: only sprinkle with sugar as many tarts as will fit in the oven at once, otherwise the snow will become watery

title: Cast Strudel Soufflé (Nákyp z Litých Strudlí)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- baked cast strudel
- raisins
- almonds cut lengthwise
- 2 whole eggs
- 10 egg yolks
- 7 deciliters (2 žejdlíky) sweet cream
- sugar rubbed with lemon

## Directions

1. Slice baked cast strudel into noodle-like pieces
2. Place in a mold alternately with raisins and lengthwise-cut almonds
3. Beat together 2 whole eggs, 10 egg yolks, 7 deciliters sweet cream and sugar rubbed with lemon
4. Pour this mixture over the almonds
5. Bake the soufflé

title: Cast Strudel Soufflé - Another Method (Nákyp z Litých Strudlí - Jiný Způsob)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cast strudel
- butter
- 12 egg yolks
- 3.5 deciliters (1 žejdlík) sweet cream
- sugar

## Directions

1. Slice cast strudel into noodle-like pieces
2. Fry in butter and place in a mold greased with butter
3. Beat together on the stove 12 egg yolks, 3.5 deciliters sweet cream and sufficient sugar, stirring until it thickens completely
4. Pour this mixture over the prepared noodles
5. Bake the soufflé

title: Cauliflower in Vinegar (Karfiol v octě)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cauliflower
- salt
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Clean the cauliflower and divide into small florets
2. Remove the skin from the stalks
3. Cook the cauliflower in salted water
4. Remove and place on a sieve to dry
5. Place on a dish
6. Pour with boiling vinegar
7. On the second day, boil the strained and water-diluted vinegar again and pour over the cauliflower
8. Place the cauliflower into jars
9. Cover with boiled vinegar
10. Tie well so air cannot enter inside

title: Celerová omáčka (Celery Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls beef broth
- butter roux
- 1/2 celery root

## Directions

1. Brown 2 cupfuls of beef broth with roux, cook well and strain
2. Grate half a celery root and add the grated amount to the sauce
3. Let it cook a while

title: Celerový salát s jablky (Celery Salad with Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- leaf celery stalks
- apples
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Chop finely on a wooden board equal amounts of leaf celery stalks and peeled apples, each separately
2. Mix well on the board and pour mayonnaise over it

title: Cezené nudle s cukrem (Strained Noodles with Sugar)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- several eggs
- milk
- sugar
- butter
- breadcrumbs
- sugar mixed with cinnamon

## Directions

1. Prepare dough from several eggs for noodles and cut into short, fairly wide pieces
2. Put sugar and milk in pot and cook
3. When boiling, add noodles
4. Serve either in milk or grease baking pan with butter, sprinkle with breadcrumbs and bake
5. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon when serving

title: Cherries in Vinegar (Třešně v octě)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cherries
- stems (cut in half)
- cloves (coarsely crushed)
- cinnamon (coarsely crushed)
- vinegar (previously cooked with sugar and cooled)

## Directions

1. Cut the stems in half, place cherries in jars for preserving
2. Sprinkle with coarsely crushed cloves and cinnamon
3. Pour over with cooled vinegar that was previously cooked with sugar
4. After eight days, pour off the vinegar, cook it again, skim off the foam, let the vinegar cool and pour it over the cherries again

title: Cherry Cake from Potato Flour (Třešňový koláč z mouky zemákové)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cherries, pitted
- breadcrumbs or ladyfinger crumbs
- 6 egg yolks
- 120 grams (8 lots) sugar
- lemon peel rubbed with sugar
- juice of 1 lemon
- 6 egg whites
- 90 grams (6 lots) potato flour

## Directions

1. Place pitted cherries on a buttered baking sheet sprinkled with bread crumbs or ladyfinger crumbs
2. Rub egg yolks with sugar
3. Add lemon peel rubbed with sugar and lemon juice
4. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites
5. Mix in potato flour
6. Spread over cherries
7. Bake for one hour

title: Cherry Ice Cream (Višňová zmrzlina)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Cherry juice
- Water
- Several bitter almonds

## Directions

1. Dilute cherry juice with water
2. Grind several bitter almonds finely with water and dilute
3. Strain through a cloth
4. Prepare into ice cream

title: Cherry Juice, Alternative Method
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cherries
- sugar
- cinnamon
- cloves

## Directions

1. From cherries previously crushed and stored in a container for several days, press out all the juice.
2. Pour into bottles, add plenty of sugar, crushed cinnamon and cloves.
3. Seal the bottle and shake the juice vigorously so the sugar dissolves more easily.
4. Let the bottles with juice stand quietly for at least eight days, then strain the juice through thick, clean cloth, pour again into clean bottles which are firmly sealed and wrapped, then store in a cool place.

title: Cherry Mousse with Potato Starch (Třešňové kyselo s moukou zemákovou)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 liter cherries
- cherry pits
- 1 1/2 liters water
- 18 dekagrams (12 lots) sugar
- cinnamon
- tablespoon of potato starch flour
- cold water
- fried bread, crumbled rusks, or whipped cream

## Directions

1. Pit 1/2 liter of cherries
2. Crush some pits and boil the kernels with the cherries, 1 1/2 liters of water, 18 dekagrams (12 lots) of sugar, and cinnamon until the cherries are completely soft
3. Mix a tablespoon of potato starch flour in cold water
4. Cook with the cherries
5. Strain and let cool
6. Before serving the dessert at table, add either fried bread, crumbled rusks, cherries stewed in wine and sugar, or whipped cream beaten with sugar

title: Cherry Soup with Potato Starch (Třešňová polévka s moukou zemákovou)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cherries not preserved in sugar
- water
- sugar
- cinnamon
- potato starch flour dissolved in wine
- fried bread (smaženou housku)

## Directions

1. Crush cherries that were not preserved in sugar
2. Thin with water
3. Boil several times
4. Strain
5. Add sugar, cinnamon, and potato starch flour mixed in wine
6. Pour over fried bread

title: Cherry Soup, Another Method (Jiný způsob)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 liter cherry juice
- 2 liters water
- 357 grams (25 lots) sugar
- cinnamon
- lemon zest
- 2 tablespoons potato starch flour
- fried bread (smaženou housku) or macaroni

## Directions

1. Mix 1 liter of cherry juice with 2 liters of water, 357 grams (25 lots) of sugar, cinnamon, lemon zest, and 2 tablespoons of potato starch flour
2. Bring to a boil
3. Remove foam
4. Strain over fried bread or macaroni

title: Chestnut Soufflé (Nákyp Kaštanový)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- raw chestnuts
- flour
- ground sugar
- 8-10 egg yolks
- egg whites

## Directions

1. Peel raw chestnuts and grate them on a grater, using as many as desired for the soufflé
2. Mix equal parts flour and ground sugar so that the flour and sugar together weigh half what the grated chestnuts weigh
3. Add 8-10 egg yolks and mix everything well
4. Make stiff snow from the reserved egg whites and fold slowly into the mixture
5. Place in a mold greased with butter and sprinkled with breadcrumbs
6. Bake in the oven

title: Chleb cukrový (Sugar Bread)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ kilogram crushed sugar
- 16 well-beaten egg yolks
- grated lemon zest
- stiff snow from 16 egg whites
- 375 grams fine flour
- optional: vanilla, anise, or similar spices

## Directions

1. Take the crushed sugar and beat in the well-beaten egg yolks
2. Add the grated lemon zest and stiff snow
3. Add the fine flour and mix everything together
4. Using a pastry syringe or funnel, press small loaves onto paper
5. Bake slowly until golden
6. Optional: add vanilla, anise, or similar spices for additional flavor

title: Chlebová omáčka (Bread Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- milk
- 1 cupful grated white bread
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Chop the onion finely and cook it in milk
2. Take a cupful of grated white bread and when the onion is cooked, strain it onto the bread and let it stand for half an hour
3. Put into a pot, add two tablespoons of butter, pepper and salt
4. Let it boil and thin as desired

title: Chlebová Polévka (Bread Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 slice black bread
- 1 slice white bread
- water
- lemon peel
- sugar
- raisins
- salt
- 1 egg yolk
- wine

## Directions

1. Cut a slice of black bread and a slice of white bread into a pot filled with water
2. Simmer completely and press through a sieve
3. Add lemon peel, sugar, and raisins
4. Season with salt
5. Simmer for a quarter hour
6. Add egg yolk whisked with wine

title: Chlebová Polévka z Podmásli (Bread Soup from Buttermilk)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 to 1 liter buttermilk
- 1 tablespoon flour
- milk
- water
- salt
- sugar
- grated bread

## Directions

1. To 1/2 to 1 liter of buttermilk, add 1 tablespoon flour that has been mixed with milk beforehand
2. Simmer everything while stirring constantly
3. Add water to desired consistency
4. Season with salt and sugar
5. Add grated bread and mix
6. Serve at table

title: Chlebové Hůlčičky (Bread Sticks)
body:
## Ingredients

- ordinary bread dough
- about 1 pound or 1 large quart of dough
- 1 tablespoon lard

## Directions

1. When making bread with liquid yeast, after the dough made from sourdough is rolled out and worked, take a piece of dough according to how many sticks you want.
2. For a piece of dough about 1 pound or 1 large quart in size, take 1 tablespoon of lard and work it in well and let it rise.
3. When risen, take it to the work surface, roll it a little and then cut into pieces which you roll into long sticks.
4. In the meantime, grease the grooves in the pan with lard, place the rolled sticks into them and let them rise for three quarters of an hour in a warm place.
5. Before putting them in the oven, make a nice hot fire so that the oven is nicely hot at the bottom, which is necessary for the iron pan to heat properly.
6. If needed, cover the top of the pan with paper.
7. Bake for about 25 minutes and when nicely baked golden, place on a plate.
8. They taste best when warm, like biscuits, but when they cool down, they are also eaten.

title: Chlebové lívance (Grunch Pancakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- one quart milk
- three beaten eggs
- one tablespoon melted butter
- one teaspoon salt
- one teaspoon baking powder mixed with one tablespoon flour (if milk is sweet), or one teaspoon baking soda dissolved in hot water (if milk is sour)
- two cups slices or remnants of dry white bread

## Directions

1. Add three beaten eggs to one quart of milk, one tablespoon of melted butter and one teaspoon of salt
2. If the milk is sweet, mix one teaspoon of baking powder mixed with one tablespoon of flour; if the milk is sour, add one teaspoon of baking soda dissolved in hot water
3. Then grate or roll slices or remnants of dry white bread so you have two cups, mix it with the milk, make a batter and bake pancakes

title: Chlebový dort (Bread Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- almonds
- sugar
- finely chopped orange and lemon zest
- abundant eggs
- roasted bread, finely grated

## Directions

1. Crush the almonds with their skins
2. Add abundant sugar, finely chopped orange and lemon zest, and abundant eggs
3. Mix for at least an hour with finely grated and roasted (to red) bread and beat together
4. Bake in molds in the usual way

title: Chlebový nákyp (French Puff Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- peeled and finely chopped apples
- hard bread, grated
- cinnamon
- sugar
- raisins
- almonds, chopped
- six eggs
- two cups of sweet cream

## Directions

1. Steam peeled and finely chopped apples
2. On a buttered baking pan, place a layer of grated hard bread and a layer of apples
3. Add a little cinnamon, sugar, raisins, and chopped almonds
4. Continue alternating bread and apples until the pan is full
5. Beat six eggs (set aside three whites) with two cups of sweet cream
6. Pour this mixture over the layers
7. Bake in a moderate oven for one hour
8. While baking, beat the three reserved whites into snow
9. When baked, pour this snow over it and put back in the oven for another minute

title: Chlebový nákyp s vínem (Bread Pudding with Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 houska or hard white bread
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 4 egg yolks
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- lemon zest
- 1-2 tablespoons grated almonds
- 4 egg whites
- 1 cup hot wine with sugar

## Directions

1. Grate the houska or hard white bread finely
2. Cream together 2 tablespoons butter and add 4 egg yolks one by one
3. Add 1 tablespoon sugar for each yolk
4. Add lemon zest and 1-2 tablespoons grated almonds
5. Mix in the grated bread, using about 4 tablespoons
6. Whip the 4 egg whites into stiff peaks, fold in three times using only a spoon, do not beat
7. Pour into a baking dish and bake
8. When baked, pour over 1 cup hot wine sweetened with sugar

title: Chlebíček k čaji (Tea Bread)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilogram flour
- 30 grams yeast (dissolved in 1/4 liter warm water)
- 125 grams butter
- 70 grams sugar
- salt
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Sift flour
2. Add yeast dissolved in warm water
3. Mix thoroughly
4. Let rise
5. Add butter, sugar, and salt
6. Beat in eggs
7. Work everything well
8. Let rise
9. Shape into oblong or round rolls
10. Let rise again
11. Brush with beaten egg
12. Bake slowly on buttered baking sheet

title: Chlebíček k čaji s medem (Tea Bread with Honey)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 250 grams butter
- 1 kilogram fine flour
- 4 eggs
- 125 grams sugar
- 125 grams washed and sorted sultanas and raisins
- 50 grams yeast dissolved in lukewarm water
- salt

## Directions

1. Beat the butter until it foams
2. Gradually add the fine flour, eggs, sugar, sultanas and raisins, yeast
3. Season with salt and work into dough
4. Allow to rise
5. Form into small round loaves
6. When risen again, brush with egg beaten with honey
7. Bake slowly in a moderately heated oven

title: Chléb pšeničný (Wheat Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- koflík řídkých bramborových kvasnic nebo jeden koláček suchých kvasnic
- koflík vlažné vody
- dobře prosátá mouka
- kvart vlažné vody
- trocha soli
- lžička cukru
- dva vařené studené brambory
- mouka

## Directions

1. Na kvásek vezměte koflík řídkých bramborových aneb jeden koláček suchých kvasnic
2. Dejte jej na 1/4 hodiny do koflíku vlažné vody močiti
3. Kvasnice rozmočené vlejte do galonové misky
4. Přilejtě k nim koflík vlažné vody a s dobře prosátou moukou udělejte řídké těstíčko, asi jako na lívance
5. Dobře vytlučte a dejte na vlažné místo kynouti
6. V zimě, když je chladno, udělejte kvásek hned odpoledne v den před pečením
7. V létě dostačí, když se kvásek udělá na noc
8. Když jsou horka, dejte až pozdě na noc
9. Je-li v létě kvásek rychle kynul, rozpusťte špetku kuchyňské sody v trošce horké vody a ke kvásku přimíchejte
10. Ráno přidejte ke kvásku kvart vlažné vody, trochu soli a lžičku cukru
11. Máte-li, dejte též dva na jemno ustrouhané vařené studené brambory
12. Přidejte mouky tolik co je třeba, aby bylo těsto prostředně tuhé
13. Na míse pomocí měchačky trochu vytlučte a pak na vál moukou posypaný vyklop
14. Dobře vyválíme a propracujte, přičemž se ovšem musí moukou poprašovati, tak až se přestane na ruce lepiti
15. Dejte těsto nazpět do mísy a nechte znovu kynouti, až vykyne tak, že je ho dvojnásob tolik, než bylo před kynutím
16. Když těsto vykynulo, dejte zpět na vál a trochu převálíme, asi 5 minut
17. Nechte ještě jednou zkynouti, což netrvá déle nežli 15 nebo 20 minut
18. Když je těsto zkynuté, vymastěte hluboké plechové pekáče na jednotlivé bochníky chleba

title: Chléb Pšeničný z Domácích Kvasnic (Wheat Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- domestic yeast, thinned as described in article 757
- flour as needed

## Directions

1. In the morning, make a thin starter (kvásek) using the thinned domestic yeast and let it rise in a warm place
2. It should be risen in about one hour
3. Add as much flour as needed so that the dough is moderately firm
4. Handle the dough as described in the preceding article

title: Chléb s Bramborami (Potato Sponge Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- six large potatoes
- approximately 1½ quarts lukewarm water
- flour, sifted, as needed
- one cup of thinned yeast

## Directions

1. Peel and cook six large potatoes
2. When cooked, drain the water and mash the potatoes into a pulp
3. Pour approximately 1½ quarts of lukewarm water over them and strain through a fine sieve
4. Mix in sifted flour until you have a thin dough and add one cup of thinned yeast
5. Let it stand and when risen, add more sifted flour to the starter and let it rise again
6. Then add more flour to make the dough firm and let it rise a third time
7. When risen, roll out small loaves, place on baking sheets, let them rise again, and when risen, bake

title: Chléb s máslem (Bread with Butter)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- thirteen dekagrams crushed sugar
- six raw egg yolks
- clove
- cinnamon
- sliced lemon
- flour
- sugar dissolved in water
- grated chocolate

## Directions

1. Mix thirteen dekagrams crushed sugar with six raw egg yolks for half an hour, add clove, cinnamon, sliced lemon, and enough flour to make a thick dough.
2. Shape into a round loaf, brush with sugar dissolved in water, sprinkle with grated chocolate.
3. When baked, slice the loaf, brush with lemon icing, and dry in the oven.

title: Chmelové výhonky (Hop Shoots)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- mladé chmelové výhonky (young hop shoots)
- voda (water)
- sůl (salt)
- strouhaná houska (breadcrumbs)
- máslo (butter)

## Directions

1. Mladé chmelové výhonky se očistí, na stejné díly nakrájejí, spaří se, voda se osolí
2. Chmelové výhonky se dají do slané vody a uvaří se, dají na mísu, posypou se strouhanou houskou a pomastí se

title: Chocolate Mousse with Potato Starch (Čokoládové kyselo s moukou zemákovou)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) chocolate
- 10 egg yolks
- several tablespoons of beaten sugar
- 1/4 liter potato starch flour
- 1/2 liter cold milk
- several tablespoons hot milk
- 1 1/2 liters boiling milk
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Grate 12 dekagrams (8 lots) of chocolate
2. Mix with 10 egg yolks and several tablespoons of beaten sugar
3. Gradually add 1/4 liter of potato starch flour
4. Add 1/2 liter of cold milk
5. Add several tablespoons of hot milk and stir
6. Mix over heat in 1 1/2 liters of boiling milk until a thick porridge forms
7. Let cool in a deep dish
8. Serve at table with whipped cream

title: Chocolate Soup (Čokoládová polévka)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 liter boiling milk
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) chocolate
- 2 egg yolks
- salt
- toasted bread (usmaženou housku)

## Directions

1. In 1 liter of boiling milk, dissolve 12 dekagrams (8 lots) of chocolate
2. Add 2 egg yolks
3. Salt to taste
4. Pour over toasted bread

title: Choux Rouges et Choux Blancs (Red and White Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- red cabbage
- white cabbage
- salt
- pepper
- vinegar
- oil

## Directions

1. Cut red and white cabbage, arrange on a dish alternately either in stripes, circles or star shapes, salt and pepper it and dress with vinegar and oil. Various other arrangements can create very nice effects
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Chow-Chow
body:
## Ingredients

- half peck of green tomatoes
- one large head of cabbage
- a dozen red bell pepper pods
- a dozen green bell pepper pods
- a dozen onions
- salt
- whole mustard
- ground mustard
- three tablespoons celery seed
- one tablespoon ground cloves
- three tablespoons allspice
- one quart grated horseradish
- vinegar
- one pound sugar

## Directions

1. Chop the green tomatoes, cabbage head, red pepper pods, green pepper pods, and onions separately, then mix them well together
2. Add a little salt, place in a cloth bag and let it drain overnight
3. In the morning, squeeze the mixture dry by hand
4. Place in a deep bowl, pour cold vinegar over it, let it stand for six hours and squeeze again
5. Add whole mustard, ground mustard, three tablespoons celery seed, one tablespoon ground cloves, three tablespoons allspice, and one quart grated horseradish, mix well
6. Place in glass jars or stone crocks, pour boiling vinegar sweetened with one pound sugar over it so the mixture is completely covered
7. When cooled, seal the containers well and store
8. The end of September or beginning of October is the most suitable time to make this mixture

title: Chow-Chow
body:
## Ingredients

- half peck of green tomatoes
- one large head of cabbage
- dozen red bell pepper pods
- dozen green bell pepper pods
- dozen onions
- salt
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop separately: half a peck of green tomatoes, one large head of cabbage, a dozen red and a dozen green bell pepper pods, and a dozen onions.
2. Mix everything together thoroughly and salt lightly.
3. Put into a cloth bag and hang overnight to drain.
4. In the morning, squeeze dry with your hands.
5. Place in a deep bowl and pour cold vinegar over it.
6. Let it sit for six hours and squeeze dry again.

title: Chřest (Asparagus)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Asparagus
- Water
- Salt
- Breadcrumbs
- Butter

## Directions

1. Cut the asparagus as far as it is tender
2. Scrape the skin from the top downward
3. Tie several pieces together with string
4. Salt the water and when it begins to boil, place the asparagus in it and cook until tender
5. Carefully remove from the water and untie the string
6. Sprinkle with grated breadcrumbs and pour over melted hot butter

title: Chřest (Asparagus)
body:
## Ingredients

- Asparagus
- Salt
- Water
- Breadcrumbs
- Fresh butter

## Directions

1. Clean the asparagus and trim the lower woody white ends so all spears are the same length
2. Wash thoroughly, arrange heads together and tie loosely
3. Cook in salted water, being careful not to overcook so the heads do not fall apart
4. Carefully drain the water and arrange on a platter in a circle with heads together
5. Sprinkle with breadcrumbs and pour hot melted fresh butter over top

title: Chřest s Omáčkou Máslovou (Asparagus with Butter Gravy)
body:
## Ingredients

- Asparagus
- Salt
- Water
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 4 egg yolks
- 1 tablespoon white flour
- Juice of 1 lemon
- 2 cups good broth or hot water

## Directions

1. Cook asparagus as in the previous recipe and arrange on a platter
2. For the gravy: cream together 2 tablespoons butter and beat in 4 egg yolks
3. Add 1 tablespoon white flour
4. Squeeze in juice from 1 lemon and salt to taste
5. Mix until it froths
6. Add 2 cups good broth or hot water and place over heat
7. Stir constantly until it thickens
8. Pour the gravy over the asparagus

title: Chřest se Smržemi (Asparagus with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- Asparagus of medium size
- Salt
- Water
- Butter
- White flour
- Good meat broth
- Fresh mushrooms

## Directions

1. Clean asparagus and cut into pieces about one inch long, removing all woody parts
2. Cook in salted water
3. Make a white butter roux with flour
4. Add good meat broth to make a thickened gravy
5. Add freshly cleaned mushrooms cut into small pieces to the gravy and simmer briefly
6. Arrange cooked asparagus on a platter and pour mushrooms and sauce over top

title: Chřestový salát (Asparagus Salad)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh asparagus
- salted water
- fresh water
- oil
- pepper
- salt
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Clean fresh asparagus well and wash it
2. Remove tough lower stalks completely
3. Cut into two-centimeter pieces
4. Cook in salted water until tender
5. Cool in fresh water
6. Place on a strainer to drain
7. When cooled, prepare with oil, pepper, salt, and vinegar

title: Cibulková omáčka teplá, kyselá (Warm Sour Onion Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- beef broth
- whole pepper
- spices
- bay leaf
- thyme
- salt
- sugar
- vinegar
- half a lemon
- roux
- sour cream (if for game)

## Directions

1. Cut the onion and place it in beef broth with whole pepper, spices, bay leaf, thyme and salt
2. Simmer for a while
3. Caramelize a piece of sugar and add it with vinegar to the sauce
4. If not sour enough, add juice from half a lemon
5. Add roux and strain
6. If it is intended for game, add sour cream and it can also be eaten cold

title: Cibulová omáčka (Onion Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- flour
- butter
- onion
- good hearty broth
- caraway

## Directions

1. Roast about two spoonfuls of flour in butter
2. Add onion cut into fine pieces
3. Let all brown together with constant stirring until red
4. Add good hearty broth
5. Boil all together with constant stirring
6. Caraway can be added if desired
7. Strain cooked sauce through a sieve

title: Cibulová omáčka (Onion Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- approximately two tablespoons flour
- butter
- onions, cut into small pieces
- good meaty broth
- caraway seeds (optional)

## Directions

1. Fry the flour in butter
2. Add the finely chopped onions and fry everything together until reddish, stirring constantly
3. Add good meaty broth and simmer everything together, stirring constantly
4. Optionally add caraway seeds to the sauce
5. Strain the cooked sauce through a sieve

title: Cibulová polévka s mlékem (Onion Soup with Milk)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- small white onions
- butter
- good milk
- salt
- pepper
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Peel small white onions, cut into small pieces, braise in butter until soft and completely pale
2. Place on a sieve to drain completely
3. Pour good milk into a pot, bring to boil, salt and pepper it, add the onions and cook everything together
4. After cooking, strain, beat in a few egg yolks and the soup is ready to serve

title: Cinnamon Ice Cream (Skořicová zmrzlina)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Four eggs
- One liter of sweet sour cream
- Quarter kilo of finely crushed sugar
- Two dekagrams of cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat four eggs into a bowl
2. Pour in one liter of sweet sour cream
3. Add a quarter kilo of finely crushed sugar
4. Add two dekagrams of cinnamon
5. Mix, beat and constantly heat
6. Heat several times and allow to cool repeatedly
7. Proceed as with other ice cream

title: Cinnamon Ice Cream (Skořicová zmrzlina)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Two deca of crushed cinnamon
- Quarter kilo of crushed sugar
- One liter of sweet sour cream

## Directions

1. Put two deca of crushed cinnamon and a quarter kilo of crushed sugar into one liter of sweet sour cream
2. Beat everything into foam
3. Transform into ice cream

title: Cinnamon Stars (Hvězdičky skořicové)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 eggs
- 625 grams finely ground sugar
- juice from one lemon

## Directions

1. Make stiff snow from 8 eggs
2. Add 625 grams finely ground sugar and lemon juice

title: Citrony cukrnaté (Candied Lemons)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe lemons
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cut ripe lemons into pieces and squeeze out the juice.
2. Place them in boiling water and cook until soft.
3. When cooled, remove them and prepare them in the same manner as described for candied lemon peel.

title: Citrónovky (Lemon Balls)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ kilogram butter
- ¼ kilogram crushed sugar
- grated zest from several lemons
- ½ kilogram flour
- several eggs

## Directions

1. Work the butter, crushed sugar, lemon zest, flour, and eggs into dough
2. Press through a fine funnel to form small balls
3. Brush with beaten egg white
4. Sprinkle with sugar
5. Bake on buttered paper on a baking sheet over moderate heat

title: Citrónová omáčka (Lemon Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- nine dekagrams (six lots) of butter
- one tablespoon flour
- broth
- lemon cut into slices
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Heat nine dekagrams of butter
2. Add one tablespoon of flour and brown to a rosy color
3. Add broth
4. Add lemon cut into slices and nutmeg
5. Boil for a short time and strain
6. Serve with veal, chicken, and fish

title: Citrónová omáčka sladká (Sweet Lemon Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 120 grams (8 lots) sugar
- lemon
- lemon juice
- water
- piece of butter
- spoon of flour
- salt
- half liter wine

## Directions

1. Rub the sugar on the lemon, squeeze out the lemon juice onto it
2. Boil in water with a piece of butter, a spoon of flour and salt
3. Add half a liter of wine and boil

title: Citrónová rosoliua čili krém (Lemon Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- Two large lemons
- Four cups water
- Six egg yolks
- Three cups sugar
- Half cup butter
- Five tablespoons cornstarch
- Cold water
- Six egg whites

## Directions

1. Custards must be cooked in a double boiler.
2. Cut up two large lemons, pour four cups of water over them and let them cook down.
3. Meanwhile, beat six egg yolks with three cups of sugar and half cup butter, strain the water from the cooked lemons into this mixture and return to heat.
4. Add five tablespoons of cornstarch mixed in cold water and let cook about one more minute.
5. Remove from heat and gently fold in the snow (beaten whites) from six egg whites.
6. Let cool and serve in small bowls as a dessert.

title: Citrónová Zmrzlina (Lemon Ice Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Lemons
- Sugar
- Water

## Directions

1. Press lemons as desired
2. Strain the juice
3. Sweeten it
4. Dilute with water
5. Make ice cream from it

title: Citrónová Zmrzlina - Jiný Způsob se Smetanou (Lemon Ice Cream - Another Method with Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Four eggs
- More than one liter cream
- Three-eighths kilogram crushed sugar
- Grated peel of two lemons

## Directions

1. Break four eggs
2. Add more than one liter cream, about three-eighths kilogram crushed sugar and grated peel of two lemons
3. Whip, cook and proceed as described for simple ice cream

title: Citrónové housky (Lemon Rolls)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- three egg yolks
- one hundred ninety-five grams sugar
- lemon zest from two lemons
- two egg whites
- chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Rub three egg yolks with one hundred ninety-five grams sugar; add lemon zest rubbed with sugar from two lemons and snow made from two egg whites.
2. Place small pieces on a greased or waxed baking sheet, flatten, sprinkle with chopped almonds, and bake.

title: Citrónové Mandle (Lemon Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- blanched almonds
- sugar
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Wash and dry blanched almonds
2. Sprinkle with sugar and pour melted sugar as described for white sugared almonds
3. On hot stove in a container, continuously stir
4. Finally, add lemon juice to the boiled sugar and proceed as with other kinds of sugared almonds

title: Citrónové Mandle - Druhý Způsob (Lemon Almonds - Second Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- almonds
- sugar
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Rub almonds thoroughly with cloth and split
2. Place in a container on hot stove
3. Pour with boiled sugar to which lemon juice has been added
4. Dry on hot stove until whitened

title: Citrónové Paštičky (Lemon Paste)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sugar
- lemons

## Directions

1. For one kilo of sugar, grate four fine lemons
2. Cook everything to the grain stage
3. Proceed as with the previous pastes

title: Citrónové pokroutky (Lemon Brittle)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fine pounded sugar
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Mix finely pounded sugar with lemon juice
2. Boil it until thickened and arrange everything as described for strawberry brittle

title: Citrónové pokroutky (Lemon Lozenges)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 egg whites
- 1/4 pound powdered sugar
- juice of 1 lemon
- zest of 1 lemon, finely chopped
- 2 tablespoons chopped almonds (optional)
- fine sugar for dusting

## Directions

1. Make snow from 2 egg whites
2. Gradually add 1/4 pound powdered sugar
3. Add juice from 1 lemon
4. Stir for half an hour
5. Then add zest from 1 lemon finely chopped and if desired 2 tablespoons chopped almonds
6. Mix in
7. Make small mounds on a wax-coated sheet
8. Sprinkle with fine sugar and bake quickly
9. If dough is too thin, add sugar and stir for a while longer
10. Instead of almonds you can add grated coconut; in that case omit the lemon juice and add a little vanilla extract

title: Citrónové pokroutky - Jiný způsob (Lemon Brittle - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sugar
- lemon zest from 3-4 lemons per kilo of sugar

## Directions

1. Scrape the zest from several lemons (about 3-4 lemons per kilo of sugar)
2. Boil everything until thickened and prepare as the previous brittle pieces

title: Citrónový dort (Lemon Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- citron peel
- wine
- almonds

## Directions

1. Cut citron peel into long thin slices
2. Boil in wine
3. Add some cut almonds
4. Strain everything
5. Make cake from the skins
6. Lay the prepared citron peel on top
7. Decorate with pastry strips laid crosswise
8. Bake slowly

title: Citrónový ježek (Lemon Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- one tablespoon potato starch
- water
- white wine
- juice of three lemons
- zest of two lemons, grated or thinly sliced and finely chopped
- 250 grams sugar
- 10 egg yolks
- 30 grams gelatin, melted

## Directions

1. Dissolve one tablespoon potato starch in water, add white wine, juice of three lemons, grated or thinly sliced and finely chopped zest of two lemons, 250 grams sugar mixed with 10 egg yolks
2. Stir constantly and cook, quickly remove from heat
3. Mix with 30 grams melted gelatin, pour into a mold greased with almond oil and put on ice to set

title: Citrónový ježek - jiný způsob (Lemon Hedgehog - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 375 grams butter
- four eggs
- 10 egg yolks
- 250 grams grated roll
- half liter sour cream
- a little salt
- 375 grams sugar
- zest of six lemons
- lemon juice
- grated nutmeg
- 50 grams finely chopped citron peel
- 10 egg whites for snow

## Directions

1. Beat 375 grams butter until foamy
2. Gradually add four eggs, ten egg yolks, 250 grams grated roll, half liter sour cream, a little salt, 375 grams sugar thoroughly rubbed with zest of six lemons, lemon juice, grated nutmeg, 50 grams finely chopped citron peel and snow from ten egg whites
3. Mix everything thoroughly, put in a well-greased mold and bake for two hours

title: Citrónový Nákyp (Lemon Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 raw egg yolks
- egg white snow from 8 egg whites
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) sugar
- zest and juice from 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Beat 8 raw egg yolks and snow made from 8 egg whites with 12 decagrams (8 lots) sugar, zest, and juice from 1 lemon for a quarter hour
2. Quickly bake the soufflé in a mold

title: Citrónový nákyp (Puffed Lemon Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 4 egg yolks
- 1 quart milk
- 2 cups grated bread
- 1 lemon
- 4 egg whites

## Directions

1. Cream together 1 tablespoon butter and 1 cup sugar
2. Add 4 egg yolks, 1 quart milk, and 2 cups grated bread
3. Grate the zest from 1 lemon and add it with the lemon juice
4. Mix well, butter a mold, put in the mixture, and bake for half an hour
5. Meanwhile whip 4 egg whites, add 1/2 cup sugar and juice from 1 lemon
6. When the pudding is baked, spread this meringue on top and put in the oven briefly to brown

title: Citrónový Paj (Lemon Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- one coffee cup of milk
- one teaspoon of starch
- milk
- two eggs
- four tablespoons of sugar
- zest of one lemon
- juice of one lemon
- dough
- butter

## Directions

1. Let one coffee cup of milk heat in a pot
2. Mix one teaspoon of starch with a little milk and add it to the hot milk
3. Let it heat through and cool
4. Add two beaten eggs with four tablespoons of sugar, grated lemon zest, and juice from one lemon
5. Mix well
6. Fill two dough-lined forms with this mixture and bake in a moderate oven for half an hour
7. Optional: add one teaspoon of butter and use only yolks; in that case make stiff snow from egg whites and sugar, spread it on the baked pies and let it set in a hotter oven
8. This amount is enough for two pies

title: Citrónový Paj Ještě na Jiný Způsob (Lemon Pie Yet Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- one coffee cup of water
- one large tablespoon of corn starch
- cold water
- one tablespoon of butter
- three yolks
- zest of one lemon
- juice of half a lemon
- half a coffee cup of sugar
- three egg whites
- one tablespoon of sugar or juice from the other half lemon

## Directions

1. Bring one coffee cup of water to a boil
2. Mix one large tablespoon of corn starch in cold water and add it to the hot water
3. Let it boil for about a minute
4. Remove from heat and add one tablespoon of butter and let it cool
5. Add three yolks, grated zest from one lemon, juice from half a lemon, and half a coffee cup of sugar
6. Meanwhile, bake the bottom crust of the pie and when baked, pour the prepared mixture onto it
7. Beat the three egg whites to stiff snow, add one tablespoon of sugar or juice from the other half of the lemon, mix well and spread over the pie
8. Place in the oven to brown

title: Citrónový Paj na Jiný Způsob (Lemon Pie Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- about three soda crackers or about three rolls
- one coffee cup of milk
- one lemon
- one teaspoon of butter
- one egg
- one yolk
- sugar to taste
- dough for pie plate

## Directions

1. Pour one coffee cup of milk over about three soda crackers or rolls and let them soak
2. Meanwhile, grate one lemon
3. Take one teaspoon of butter, one egg and one yolk, and sweeten to taste
4. Mix everything together
5. Pour this into a dough-lined pie plate and bake
6. When baked, beat the egg white from one egg and spread it on the surface
7. Place in the oven until the surface browns, then remove and serve

title: Citrónový Punč (Lemon Punch)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 liters water
- 0.5 kilogram sugar
- Zest and juice of 3 lemons
- 2 bottles white wine
- 0.75 liters arrack
- 0.5 liters tea

## Directions

1. Boil 0.5 kilogram of sugar with lemon zest and juice in 0.5 liters of water until thickened
2. When cooled, add 2 bottles of white wine and 0.75 liters of arrack
3. Add 0.5 liters of tea
4. Heat before serving

title: Citrónový skládaný dort (Lemon Layer Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 cup butter
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 teaspoon lemon extract
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup sugar
- 0.5 cup water
- 2 eggs
- grated zest of 1 lemon
- juice of 2 lemons
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 2 tablespoons flour

## Directions

1. Take 0.5 cup butter, 2 cups sugar, 1 teaspoon lemon extract, 3 whole eggs, 1 cup milk, 3 cups flour and 3 teaspoons baking powder and make batter
2. Bake into 4 layers
3. Put 1 cup sugar, 0.5 cup water, 2 beaten eggs, grated zest of 1 lemon, juice of 2 lemons, 1 teaspoon butter and 2 tablespoons flour in a pot
4. Set pot in a pan of boiling water and stir over heat until thick
5. When cooled, spread between layers and cover cake with lemon glaze
6. Orange cake is prepared the same way

title: Clam Chowder
body:
## Ingredients

- about 1 quart hard clams in shells
- 2 dozen soft clams
- 1 quart peeled potatoes
- 1/2 pound hardtack
- 2 large onions
- 2 ounces salt pork
- 6 peeled tomatoes
- 1 quart water
- 3 pints beef or chicken broth
- ground pepper
- thyme
- sage
- flowers
- 4 ounces butter
- parsley

## Directions

1. Open and remove hard clams from shells, reserving the juice and chopping the clams finely
2. Cut 2 dozen soft clams, from which you have previously removed the hard parts
3. Cut 1 quart of peeled potatoes into small cubes
4. Soak 1/2 pound of crumbled hardtack in cold water
5. Chop 2 large onions into fine cubes and fry them with 2 ounces of salt pork in a pot until golden
6. Add potatoes, 6 peeled and sliced tomatoes, 1 quart water, and 3 pints beef or chicken broth
7. Season with ground pepper, thyme, sage, and flowers
8. Let cook for 15 minutes
9. Add the chopped clams with their juice and the soaked hardtack
10. Let simmer for another half hour, carefully skimming the foam
11. Finally add 4 ounces butter and chopped fresh parsley, stir carefully and serve
12. This quantity is sufficient for about 8 people
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Clam Chowder
body:
## Ingredients

- asi kvart tvrdých mušlí
- dva tucty měkkých mušlí
- kvart brambor
- půl libry suchařů
- dvě velké cibule
- dvě unce slaniny

## Directions

1. Otevři a vyber ze skořápek asi kvart tvrdých mušlí
2. Šťávu zachovej a mušle na drobno usekej
3. Usekej dva tucty měkkých mušlí, z nichž jsi dříve tvrdé části odstranila
4. Rozkrájej na malé kostky kvart okrájených brambor
5. Nech močiti ve studené vodě půl libry rozdrobených sucharů
6. Rozkrájej dvě velké cibule na drobounké kostky
7. Nech je s dvěma uncemi slaniny na kastrolu do zlatová usmažiti
8. Přidej brambory
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Clove Ice Cream (Hřebíčková zmrzlina)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Four eggs
- One liter of sour cream
- Quarter kilo of sugar
- Several drops of clove oil

## Directions

1. Beat four eggs into a bowl
2. Pour in one liter of sour cream
3. Add a quarter kilo of sugar
4. While constantly stirring, heat several times and allow to cool each time
5. Add several drops of clove oil
6. Transform everything into ice cream

title: Coffee Glaze (Polévání kávové)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- coffee
- sugar

## Directions

1. Brew 3-4 dekgrams of coffee in a cup
2. Allow to cool
3. Mix with crushed, sifted sugar until well thickened
4. Heat and spread on pastry

title: Coffee Ice Cream (Kávová zmrzlina)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Ten to twelve deca of roasted coffee
- Boiling sour cream
- Six egg whites
- Sour cream
- Quarter kilo of sugar

## Directions

1. Scald the roasted coffee with boiling sour cream
2. Boil for several hours
3. Strain through a cloth
4. Beat the six egg whites perfectly
5. Pour in the sour cream gradually
6. Add a quarter kilo of sugar
7. Continue beating
8. Bring to a boil
9. Let it cool
10. Repeat this process several times
11. Then prepare ice cream from it

title: Consommé (Clear Broth)
body:
## Ingredients

- piece of butter
- two onions
- one celery root
- two parsley roots
- two carrots
- one cabbage
- one pound beef
- one pound veal
- various leftover poultry
- three quarts beef soup

## Directions

1. Put butter on a pan, add chopped onion, celery, parsley roots, carrots, and cabbage.
2. Cut the beef and veal into pieces, place with various poultry leftovers on the vegetables and let braise until brown, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
3. Transfer to a pot, pour three quarts of beef soup over it and let cook for about an hour.
4. Strain the soup through a damp cloth or fine sieve and pour onto fried bread cubes or various garnishes.
5. This soup must be very clear, and if it becomes cloudy during cooking, it must be clarified before serving.
6. Serves 6 to 8 persons.
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Corn Bread (American-style Corn Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 small cups sour milk
- 2 egg yolks
- salt to taste
- 1/2 tablespoon lard
- 2 small cups cornmeal
- 1 teaspoon baking soda dissolved in hot water
- 2 egg whites

## Directions

1. Put sour milk in a bowl, add egg yolks, salt, and lard and mix well
2. Add cornmeal and baking soda dissolved in hot water and mix
3. Beat the mixture well with a wooden spoon
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff and fold in gently
5. Grease a baking pan with lard, pour the batter into it and bake until nicely browned
6. Serve with syrup or butter

title: Corn Bread, Alternative Method (Corn Bread - Second Version)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons melted butter or lard
- 1/4 small cup wheat flour
- 1 1/2 small cups cornmeal
- 1 small cup sour milk
- 1 teaspoon baking soda beaten well until foamy

## Directions

1. Mix egg, sugar, salt and flour
2. Add the sour milk with baking soda beaten in
3. Mix well
4. Pour into a baking pan and bake in a hot oven for at least half an hour

title: Corn Bread, Yet Another Method (Corn Bread - Third Version)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon cooled lard
- salt to taste
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 small cup sour milk or buttermilk
- 1 teaspoon baking soda
- 1/4 small cup milk

## Directions

1. Beat the egg and mix in the cooled lard, salt and sugar, beating until smooth
2. Add the sour milk or buttermilk and mix well
3. Dissolve the baking soda in 1/4 small cup milk and mix thoroughly into the batter
4. Pour onto a heated baking pan in a well-heated oven and bake
5. The bread prepared this way is very tender and flavorful, especially with butter or fresh cracklings

title: Cornichons Doux (Sweet Pickles)
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet pickles, sliced into rounds
- onion, sliced

## Directions

1. Arrange sliced sweet pickles on a dish, intersperse with sliced onion and slice into rounds
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Cream Wafers (Smetanové oplatky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 6 tablespoons sugar
- pinch of cinnamon
- 1/2 liter sweet cream

## Directions

1. Rub together egg, flour, sugar, cinnamon, and sweet cream
2. Let rest
3. Oil wafer iron, fill with batter
4. Bake thin wafers golden brown on both sides
5. When removed from iron, wrap around rounded wooden stick

title: Creamed Potatoes (Dušené brambory)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- small onion
- flour
- milk
- cooked potatoes
- caraway
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Place a heaping spoon of butter in a skillet and dice a small onion very finely into it
2. Add half a spoon of flour and let it just barely brown, not to dark color
3. Pour in a cup of milk and when it begins to rise, add a full plate of cooked potatoes cut into slices
4. Add a little caraway, salt and pepper, cover and move to the back of the stove
5. When all the milk is absorbed by the potatoes, they are ready

title: Creme (Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 liter thick sour cream
- two spoons of rum, arrack, etc.
- 120 grams sugar

## Directions

1. Beat the thick sour cream until stiff snow forms
2. Mix it with two spoons of rum, arrack etc. and 120 grams sugar

title: Creme - Second Method
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2-3 spoons flour
- 8 egg yolks
- 1/2 liter cream
- sugar
- chopped lemon zest
- vanilla
- almonds

## Directions

1. Mix flour with 8 egg yolks, 1/2 liter of cream and boil until a thick porridge forms
2. Add sugar, chopped lemon zest, vanilla, almonds, etc.

title: Creme - Third Method
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 fresh egg yolks
- 1.5 liters wine
- 190 grams (16 lots) sugar
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat 12 fresh egg yolks, 1.5 liters wine, 190 grams sugar and cinnamon over fire
2. Serve in glasses on the table

title: Creme do pečivá (Cream for Pastries)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- three deciliters cream
- five egg yolks
- small spoon of flour
- ten deka sugar with good flavor
- 1.5 deka butter
- about five deka of chopped and roasted almonds

## Directions

1. Mix three deciliters of cream, five egg yolks, small spoon of flour, ten deka sugar with good flavor and 1.5 deka butter perfectly
2. At the end add about five deka of chopped and roasted almonds

title: Creme jahodový (Strawberry Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- completely ripe strawberries
- whipped cream foam
- finely ground sugar with vanilla and cinnamon

## Directions

1. Select completely ripe strawberries and press them through a fine sieve so that only the juice passes through and the skins are removed
2. Add stiff whipped cream foam, finely ground sugar with vanilla and cinnamon
3. Mix everything perfectly and pour as a pleasant cooling drink into glasses

title: Creme obyčejný (Common Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- several spoons of flour
- 10-12 egg yolks
- 20-30 grams sugar
- cream
- appropriate and optional spices
- egg whites

## Directions

1. Mix several spoons of flour with 10-12 egg yolks
2. Add 20-30 grams sugar, mix with cream and add suitable and optional spices
3. Cook in steam in a vessel surrounded by water until it thickens
4. When everything cools, add stiff snow from egg whites

title: Creme z jahod (Strawberry Cream) - Second Method
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- strawberries
- 375 grams (25 lots) sugar
- red wine
- spoon of fine flour
- snow from 6 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Press strawberries through a sieve
2. Boil 375 grams sugar with red wine
3. Boil everything with a spoon of fine flour
4. When it has cooled a little, add snow from 6 egg yolks

title: Creme z malin (Raspberry Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 egg yolks
- 195 grams (13 lots) sugar
- 45 grams (3 lots) flour
- 1/2 liter raspberry juice
- lemon zest rubbed on sugar

## Directions

1. Beat 10 egg yolks with 195 grams sugar and 45 grams flour
2. Mix with 1/2 liter of raspberry juice and lemon zest rubbed on sugar
3. Mix and beat with snow until it cools

title: Creme z malin (Raspberry Cream) - Second Method
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 liter ripe raspberries
- sugar
- 1 liter sour cream
- vanilla
- ripe raspberries for garnish

## Directions

1. Press 1 liter of ripe raspberries through a sieve
2. Mix with sugar
3. Beat 1 liter of sour cream with crushed vanilla on a cold place
4. Carefully add the raspberry juice
5. Garnish on a dish with ripe raspberries

title: Cremový Punč (Creamy Punch)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 liters water
- 2 kilograms sugar
- juice of 8 lemons
- 4 liters arak
- vanilla
- 3 pints milk

## Directions

1. Dissolve 2 kilograms sugar in 4 liters of water
2. Add the juice of 8 lemons
3. Add 4 liters of arak and a little vanilla
4. Mix everything together and heat on warm stove
5. When the liquid begins to thicken, slowly pour in 3 pints of milk while constantly stirring
6. Remove the pot from the stove, cover with a cloth and let it stand peacefully for 2 hours
7. Strain the mixture, pour into bottles and cork them
8. Serve cold only

title: Cremový Punč (Creamy Punch)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 liters water
- 2 kilograms sugar
- Juice of 8 lemons
- 4 liters arrack

## Directions

1. Dissolve 2 kilograms of sugar in 4 liters of water
2. Add juice from 8 lemons and 4 liters of arrack

title: Cucumber Salad
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Fresh cucumbers
- Oil
- Vinegar
- Pepper

## Directions

1. The main thing is that the cucumbers be fresh; it is best when picked the same day
2. When trimming the cucumbers, it is best to check that they are not bitter
3. The salad should be served immediately on the table; it is not good, as is commonly thought, to let the salad wilt and then press it out, as this makes it difficult to digest and it loses its refreshing taste
4. Finely grate the cucumbers on a grater, pour oil and vinegar over them, sprinkle with pepper, and serve immediately on the table

title: Cucumbers Pickled English-Style
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Mature green cucumbers
- Salt
- Vinegar
- Sieve
- Onion
- Garlic
- Pepper
- Grape leaves
- Cherry leaves
- Dill greens
- Mustard seeds

## Directions

1. Peel the mature green cucumbers and salt them heavily
2. Pour the strongly boiled hot vinegar over the cucumbers, straining through a sieve, and allow both cucumbers and vinegar to cool on the sieve
3. Layer the cold cucumbers in glass jars, interspersing with onion, garlic, pepper, grape leaves, cherry leaves and dill greens, with mustard seeds in small bags on top
4. Cover everything with cold vinegar and seal the jars

title: Cukernatý Creme (Caramelized Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- seven decagrams sugar
- water
- three and one-half deciliters cream
- six egg yolks

## Directions

1. Dissolve seven decagrams of sugar in water and boil until brown
2. Mix with three and one-half deciliters of cream into which six egg yolks have been beaten

title: Cukernatý suchar (Sugared Twice-Baked Cookie)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 200 grams very finely beaten sugar
- 4 egg yolks
- 125 grams melted butter
- 500 milliliters lukewarm milk
- 750 grams fine flour
- 50 grams dissolved yeast
- lemon zest, finely grated
- salt

## Directions

1. Beat 200 grams very finely beaten sugar with 4 egg yolks until foamy
2. Slowly add 125 grams melted butter and 500 milliliters lukewarm milk
3. Add 750 grams fine flour and 50 grams dissolved yeast
4. Season with salt and finely grated lemon zest
5. Work the mixture thoroughly into dough until bubbles burst
6. Cover and let rise in a warm place
7. After rising, knead thoroughly and form into small loaves
8. Place on a sheet and let rise again
9. Brush with butter or beaten egg yolk
10. Bake gently until light brown
11. When cool, cut into thin slices

title: Cukrovaná jablka (Sugared Apples)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- good apples
- sugar
- flour
- egg whites
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Scald and peel the good apples.
2. Cook one quarter pound in water until it stretches.
3. Place the apples in melted sugar and leave them for half an hour.
4. Remove them and add the remaining sugar to flour and coat the apples arranged on a baking sheet with it.
5. Finally, dust with snow from 3 egg whites, bake for a bit, sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon and serve on the baking sheet on which they were baked.

title: Cukrované mandle (Sugared Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound sweet almonds
- 1 pound sugar
- 1 cup water
- cinnamon
- flour

## Directions

1. Put 1 pound sorted sweet almonds in a new pot and let them sit on heat for a while until hardened
2. In another pot cook 1 pound sugar with 1 cup water until it draws in threads
3. Throw the almonds into it and stir until everything is coated in sugar
4. Then crush sugar with cinnamon, mix in a bit of nice flour, and put on a plate
5. Put the almonds into it, mix them so they coat nicely and separate from each other
6. Let them dry on a sieve under a cloth

title: Cukrované Ovoce (Candied Fruit)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet pears, plums or cherries
- sugar, amount equal to half the weight of fruit
- honey or caramelized sugar
- optional: almonds for plums

## Directions

1. Arrange fruit on a board covered with grape leaves
2. Dry in the sun, turning frequently
3. When fruit is sufficiently dried, dip several times in thick boiled sugar
4. Dry again after each dipping
5. Repeat dipping and drying until all sugar is used
6. If fruit has no stem, insert a stick
7. Before serving, dip in honey or caramelized sugar
8. For plums, optionally place an almond inside instead of the pit

title: Cukrovinky skořicové (Cinnamon Confections)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg whites
- 1/2 kilogram sugar
- 1/2 kilogram unpeeled almonds, ground or very finely chopped
- 32 grams cinnamon ground to fine powder

## Directions

1. Beat 6 egg whites into stiff snow
2. Add 1/2 kilogram of sugar, 1/2 kilogram of unpeeled ground or very finely chopped almonds, and 32 grams of cinnamon ground to fine powder
3. Mix thoroughly
4. Form into dough, roll out, and cut various confections in different shapes
5. Place on a baking sheet and bake slowly at gentle heat

title: Cukrová citrónová kůra (Candied Lemon Peel)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- green, small, unripe lemons
- water
- lemon juice
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cut green, small, unripe lemons into small strips.
2. Place them in water into which a bit of lemon juice has been dripped.
3. Work them in your hands until they soften, remove them and place them in a dish.
4. Pour cleaned cold sugar over them.
5. On the second day, pour off the sugar, add a bit more cleaned sugar to it, boil them together again, carefully skim the foam from the top, add the cleaned lemon peel to it and boil everything again strongly, leaving it to rest in the room until the second day.
6. On the third day, boil everything again more strongly; on the fourth day, boil until the sugar pearls, but also put the lemon peel into it several times and remove it again.
7. On the fifth day, cook the sugar completely, add the lemon peel to it and boil it together with it, then transfer everything together into containers, seal and place in a cool room.

title: Cukrová jiška (Sugar Roux)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons flour
- small piece of butter
- 2 ounces fine sugar

## Directions

1. Fry 4 tablespoons of flour with a small piece of butter on a small pot until light yellow
2. Then sprinkle 2 ounces of fine sugar
3. You can use this to sprinkle small cakes instead of chopped almonds
4. Or crush 3 tablespoons of butter on a roller and mix with 1 small cup of flour and 3 tablespoons of fine sugar, mix thoroughly and sprinkle on large cakes for coffee

title: Cukrová káva (Sugar Coffee)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- strong coffee
- tragacanth flour
- finely ground coffee
- sugar

## Directions

1. Moisten tragacanth flour in strong coffee
2. Press it through clean linen cloth
3. Add finely ground coffee with sugar
4. Make a dough from everything
5. Shape small coffee beans from the dough
6. When sufficiently hardened and dried, sugar as for almonds

title: Cukrová káva (Sugar Coffee)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- coffee, ground
- sugar
- tragacanth flour

## Directions

1. Grind coffee and mix with sugar and tragacanth flour
2. Shape coffee grains from the dough
3. Place on warm stoves to dry until they harden

title: Cukrová kůra pomerančová (Candied Orange Peel)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sugar
- orange peel, cleaned and preserved

## Directions

1. Cook out the cleaned, melted sugar.
2. Add the preserved cleaned orange peel to it.
3. Stir everything frequently and boil again until everything cooks down well and thickens.
4. Remove the orange peels, place them on a sieve and let them dry.

title: Cukrová omáčka (Sugar Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 20 dekagrams sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Dissolve the sugar in water
2. Boil until it browns
3. Pour into another vessel
4. Place in warm water, where it remains until used

title: Cukrové hrozničky (Sugar Fritters)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ¼ kilogram fine flour
- a little sugar
- egg whites from 8 eggs
- a little wine

## Directions

1. Mix the fine flour with a little sugar
2. Add egg whites from 8 eggs and a little wine
3. Mix only slightly so it does not foam
4. Press dough through a sieve or funnel into hot butter to form small fritters
5. Fry until golden red
6. Roll around a round stick
7. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon

title: Cukrové jaterničky (Sugar Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- several apples
- one tablespoon lard
- sugar to taste
- lemon zest
- citron zest
- a little pepper
- chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Peel several apples, cut into small slices or grate
2. Put in a saucepan with one tablespoon lard and when hot, add the apples
3. Add sugar to taste and cook over frequent stirring into a porridge
4. Add some lemon zest, citron zest and a little pepper
5. Add as many finely chopped almonds as needed to make it nicely thick
6. When cooled slightly, place on a surface dusted with sugar
7. Roll out small rolls and form into crescents so they look like real liver sausages

title: Cukrové mandle (Sugar Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/8 kilogram (quarter pound) almonds
- equal amount flour
- equal amount sugar
- a little cinnamon
- 4 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Scald and peel the almonds
2. Mix flour, sugar, and cinnamon with 4 egg yolks to make a thin batter
3. Coat each almond individually in the batter
4. Dust with flour
5. Dry one beside another on a baking sheet in an oven

title: Cukrové oblouky (Sugar Arches)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilogram pounded sugar
- 1/2 kilogram fine flour
- grated lemon and orange peel
- several eggs

## Directions

1. Mix 1/2 kilogram pounded sugar with 1/2 kilogram fine flour
2. Add grated lemon and orange peel
3. Mix in several eggs to form a stiff dough
4. Place on greased paper

title: Cukrové Placičky (Sugar Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1 cupful of butter
- 1 cupful of sweet milk or cream
- 3 eggs
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix butter with sugar
2. Add eggs and mix well
3. Add flour mixed with baking powder
4. Mix everything
5. Roll out thin and place on a clean baking sheet or baking pan
6. Bake in a properly heated oven
7. Vanilla may be added if available

title: Cukrové Placičky na Jiný Způsob (Sugar Cookies Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of butter
- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1½ cupfuls of sour cream
- 1 teaspoonful of baking soda
- vanilla to taste
- flour as needed

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cupful of butter and 2 cupfuls of sugar well
2. Add 3 eggs and mix well again
3. Add 1½ cupfuls of sour cream, 1 teaspoonful of baking soda, and vanilla to taste
4. Mix in flour until the dough is thick
5. Roll out thin, cut with a form, sprinkle with sugar and bake

title: Cukrové rohlíčky (Sugar Crescents)
body:
## Ingredients

- two egg whites
- six ounces sugar with vanilla
- lemon zest
- ground almonds with skins

## Directions

1. Make stiff snow from two egg whites
2. Slowly mix in six ounces of sugar beaten with vanilla and a little fine lemon zest
3. Using a teaspoon, place pieces of snow into ground almonds with skins
4. Arrange on a baking sheet coated with wax and bake slowly
5. Remove from sheet while hot

title: Cukrové Sustky z vajec (Sugar Custard Pieces with Eggs)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 liter milk
- 6 decagrams (4 lots) sugar
- cinnamon
- 12 eggs mixed with flour and butter

## Directions

1. Boil 1 liter of milk with 6 decagrams sugar and cinnamon
2. When it begins to boil, mix in 12 eggs beaten with flour and butter
3. Stir the mixture until it thickens
4. Drop small spoonfuls onto a dish and sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon

title: Cukrové Věnečky (Sugar Wreaths)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 120 grams almonds
- 60 grams crushed sugar
- 3 egg yolks
- 1 egg
- 4 teaspoons rose water
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Make dough from almonds, crushed sugar, egg yolks, egg, rose water, and cinnamon
2. Roll out dough and cut into strips
3. Form wreaths from the strips
4. Fry in butter
5. Sprinkle with sugar

title: Cukrový hřebíček (Sugar Clove)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- tragacanth flour
- water
- sugar
- finely crushed clove

## Directions

1. Prepare dough from tragacanth flour moistened with water
2. Next day press, dry, and grate it
3. Add sugar and finely crushed clove
4. Make a dough from everything
5. Shape a clove from the dough
6. Let dry on warm stoves
7. When sufficiently hardened, sugar as described for almonds

title: Cukrový marcipán anýzový (Sugar Anise Marzipan)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 1/4 kilogram sugar
- cleaned and dried anise
- fine flour

## Directions

1. Beat six eggs and add 1/4 kilogram sugar to them
2. Mix everything with fine flour
3. Knead the dough
4. Fill small molds with the dough
5. Bake slowly

title: Cukrátka Anglická (English Sugar Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 200 grams creamed butter
- Twelve egg yolks
- 70 grams finely minced lemon peel
- Candied orange peel
- 160 grams fine flour

## Directions

1. Mix 200 grams creamed butter with twelve egg yolks added slowly
2. Add 70 grams finely minced lemon peel, candied orange peel and 160 grams fine flour
3. Mix everything into dough and work it well
4. Roll out and cut with various desired small forms
5. Place on a flour-dusted baking sheet
6. Bake slowly until golden yellow

title: Currant Juice, Alternative Method
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe currant berries
- sugar

## Directions

1. Press ripe currant berries through a fine sieve.
2. Add sufficient crushed sugar to the strained juice.
3. Cook with it until thickened, place in small containers, and when cooled, wrap with paper and bladder.

title: Currant Mousse with Potato Starch (Revízové kyselo s moukou zemákovou)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilogram currants
- water
- 1 1/2 liters juice
- 24 dekagrams (16 lots) sugar
- cinnamon
- 1/4 liter potato starch flour
- cold water

## Directions

1. Cook 1/2 kilogram of currants in water
2. Strain
3. Cook 1 1/2 liters of juice with 24 dekagrams (16 lots) of sugar and cinnamon
4. Mix 1/4 liter of potato starch flour in cold water
5. Add to the juice
6. Stir the mixture over heat until a thick porridge forms
7. Serve warm at table

title: Císařské piškoty (Imperial Lady Fingers)
body:
## Ingredients

- four egg whites
- two bowls powdered sugar
- zest of one lemon
- four egg yolks
- two bowls flour
- vanilla extract

## Directions

1. Beat four egg whites into stiff meringue
2. Gradually fold in two bowls of powdered sugar and grated zest of one lemon
3. Then fold in four egg yolks and two bowls of flour
4. You may use vanilla extract instead of lemon
5. When well mixed, make on paper into finger-length pieces
6. Sprinkle with sugar powder and bake quickly in a warm oven
7. When they begin to turn yellow, cover with paper
8. When baked, the top should be pale yellow and the bottom pale brown
9. When baked, brush the paper underneath with a damp sponge; after several minutes remove the lady fingers from the paper, place on a large sieve, put in a warm place and let the lady fingers dry

title: Císařský chlebíček (Imperial Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 30 egg yolks
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 1/2 cup sultanas
- 1/4 pound almonds, cut into noodles
- 1/4 pound grated chocolate
- 1 teaspoon candied citron, chopped
- 10 egg whites

## Directions

1. Beat 30 egg yolks with 1/2 cup sugar for three-quarters of an hour
2. Add 1 cup flour, 1/2 cup sultanas, 1/4 pound almonds cut into noodles, 1/4 pound grated chocolate, and 1 teaspoon chopped candied citron
3. Mix everything well together
4. Slowly fold in stiff snow from 10 egg whites, mixing for a while
5. Pour into a buttered mold
6. Bake over moderate heat
7. When cooled, slice

title: Dandelion Wine (Fermented Dandelion Beverage)
body:
## Ingredients

- A full basket of dandelion leaves
- 5 gallons of cold water
- 7 pounds of white sugar
- 5 pounds of yellow sugar
- meat from half a dozen oranges, finely chopped, with all peel removed (both outer and white)
- meat from half a dozen lemons, finely chopped, with all peel removed (both outer and white)

## Directions

1. Fill a basket with dandelion leaves, place in a pot or kettle, pour 5 gallons of cold water over them, and boil for one hour.
2. Let stand for 12 hours or overnight, then strain.
