1. Carefully separate the breasts with the breastbone, remove the meat from the bone and chop finely
2. Add grated bread, onion browned in goose fat, goose fat, flour, spice, pepper, marjoram, and garlic
3. Mix everything well on a platter and add two eggs
4. Place the mixture on the breastbone, put this on a baking pan, add beef broth and bake the breasts
5. Either serve whole or cut into pieces
6. Cabbage is usually served with them

title: Hvězdičky skořicové (Cinnamon Stars)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 eggs
- 625 grams finely ground sugar
- juice of 1 lemon
- 16 grams ground cinnamon
- grated lemon zest
- 1/2 kilogram finely chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Beat the 8 eggs into stiff snow
2. Add the 625 grams of finely ground sugar and lemon juice, mix thoroughly
3. Add at least 16 grams of ground cinnamon
4. Set aside about 6 tablespoons of this mixture
5. To the remaining mixture add grated lemon zest and 1/2 kilogram of finely chopped almonds, mix and work well
6. Roll out and cut into star shapes with molds
7. Brush the stars with the reserved mixture
8. Bake slowly at gentle heat

title: Hvězdičky vanilkové (Vanilla Stars)
body:
## Ingredients

- half pound almonds
- egg white
- one pound powdered sugar
- one tablespoon vanilla extract
- vanilla sugar for glaze

## Directions

1. Prepare in exactly the same way as cinnamon stars
2. Instead of cinnamon, add one tablespoon vanilla extract
3. Brush baked stars with vanilla sugar

title: Hřebíčkové pokroutky (Clove Brittle)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sugar
- fine flawless fragrant clove ground to powder

## Directions

1. Prepare these brittle pieces the same as cinnamon brittle, but use only fine flawless fragrant clove ground to powder instead of cinnamon, added to the sugar for strong cooking

title: Hůlky kmínové (Caraway Sticks)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 250 grams heated and sifted flour
- 125 grams washed butter
- 16 grams yeast (dissolved in warm milk)
- salt
- 2 to 3 tablespoons finely crushed sugar

## Directions

1. Mix flour with butter, yeast dissolved in warm milk, salt, and sugar
2. Work everything thoroughly
3. Let rise
4. Roll into thin sticks about twelve centimeters long
5. Brush with beaten egg
6. Sprinkle with caraway
7. Let rise again
8. Bake at moderate heat until light brown

title: Hůlky skořicové (Cinnamon Sticks)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 liter cream
- 16 grams ground cinnamon
- lemon zest finely cut
- 125 grams butter
- 375 grams sifted flour
- 90 grams ground sugar
- salt
- good yeast

## Directions

1. Heat the cream with 16 grams of ground cinnamon and finely cut lemon zest
2. While warm, strain onto 125 grams of butter and stir until completely dissolved
3. Add 375 grams of sifted flour, 90 grams of ground sugar, a little salt
4. Mix with cream and dissolved good yeast
5. Cover the dough with a warm cloth and let it rise near the stove
6. Turn out the risen dough, roll out, and make thin sticks from it
7. Brush with beaten egg yolk
8. Bake slowly in a gently heated oven

title: Jablková huspenina (Apple Preserve)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- water
- sugar
- juice

## Directions

1. Quarter the apples, peel them, remove the cores
2. Cook strongly with a little water until completely broken down
3. Press through a fine sieve
4. Add juice and sugar
5. Cook again with constant stirring until completely thickened
6. Pour into containers, store in a cool room and seal well

title: Jablková jemná povidla (Fine Apple Preserves)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Apples, peeled and sliced
- Water - a small amount
- Sugar - finely crushed
- Sugar - equal measure to pulp

## Directions

1. Peel and slice apples into rounds
2. Cook in a small amount of water
3. Press through a fine sieve
4. Add finely crushed sugar
5. Cook strongly while constantly stirring
6. Allow to cool
7. Store in clean stone containers
8. Cover well with bladder
9. Keep in a cold, clean place

title: Jablková povidla (Apple Butter)
body:
## Ingredients

- one bushel apples
- one gallon cooked sweet must

## Directions

1. For one bushel of apples, use one gallon of cooked sweet must from the press.
2. Apples must be ripe so they cook easily; peel them nicely, remove any spoiled parts or simply cut them out.
3. Put enough apples in the must so they are submerged.
4. When soft, remove with a skimmer and add fresh ones, continuing until all apples are cooked.
5. Mash and return to the pot, cook over gentle heat with constant stirring.
6. A wooden spoon is best for this.
7. About one hour before it is done, add spices to taste—some cinnamon, clove, and allspice.
8. This butter takes considerable effort as it must be cooked until very thick, but it is then good and quite inexpensive.

title: Jablková povidla - Jiný způsob (Apple Preserves - Alternative Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Well-ripened, sweet apples
- Sugar - 250g per kilogram of apples
- Cinnamon - a little

## Directions

1. Slice well-ripened, sweet apples into quarters
2. Peel and remove seeds
3. Place on a baking pan
4. Add sugar and a little cinnamon
5. Stew until completely soft
6. Press through a sieve
7. If not sweet enough, add more sugar and stew until thickened
8. Place in containers
9. Cover with bladder or parchment paper so air cannot enter

title: Jablková povidla - Jiný způsob (Apple Preserves - Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Peeled apples, cut into small pieces
- Water
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Cook peeled apples cut into small pieces in water until soft
2. Press through a sieve
3. Mix with sugar
4. Boil strongly several more times
5. Store in containers

title: Jablková svařenina (Apple Jam)
body:
## Ingredients

- peeled and sliced apples
- water (one cup water per gallon of apples)
- sugar (half cup sugar per cup of pulp)
- finely chopped lemon zest

## Directions

1. Put peeled and sliced apples in a pot, add water (one cup per gallon of apples) and cook with frequent stirring for about 20 minutes until the apples are cooked into a pulp.
2. Press them through a sieve or thin cloth and put the pulp back in the pot to cook.
3. When the mixture has come to a boil several times, add sugar—half cup per cup of pulp—and a little finely chopped lemon zest.
4. Cook another half hour or three-quarters of an hour with frequent stirring, and when done, pour hot into jars.

title: Jablkové Smažeňky (Apple Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- several beautiful apples
- brandy
- powdered sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon melted butter
- pinch of salt
- flour

## Directions

1. Peel several beautiful apples, slice them into slices of the thickness of a knife back, remove the cores
2. Put the apples in a bowl, sprinkle them with a bit of brandy, dust them with powdered sugar and let them stand for half an hour
3. Pour 2 eggs into a cup, add 1 teaspoon melted butter, a pinch of salt and just enough flour to make a thin batter like for pancakes and mix well
4. Dip the apples piece by piece in this batter, fry them to golden color in heated rendered butter, arrange them on a dish and dust generously with sugar
5. You can also add a little sugar to the batter and use a few tablespoons of milk instead of butter

title: Jablkové Víno (Apple Wine)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Fine, ripe, juicy apples
- Several baked apples in their skins

## Directions

1. Peel the fine, ripe, juicy apples, grate them, press them through fine cloth into a container.
2. To the pressed apple juice add several baked apples in their skins and let everything ferment.
3. Skim off the scum that appears on the surface after several days.
4. Siphon the must into bottles, cork it well, and store in a cool place.

title: Jablkový Dort (Apple Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- good ripe apples
- wine
- sugar
- grated orange zest
- small raisins
- layered pastry dough

## Directions

1. Peel ripe apples, quarter them, and remove the cores
2. Cook them in a baking dish with a little wine and sugar with grated orange zest
3. Mix the cooked apples with small raisins
4. Spread on a layered pastry cake and bake together

title: Jablkový Dort, Jiný Způsob (Apple Cake, Alternative Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- layered pastry dough
- peeled apples cut into small pieces
- sugar
- small raisins
- finely chopped almonds
- ground cinnamon

## Directions

1. Line the pastry cake with peeled apples cut into small pieces
2. Sprinkle with sugar, small raisins, finely chopped almonds, and ground cinnamon
3. During baking, brush the cake with beaten egg yolk

title: Jablkový Ježek (Apple Hedgehog Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- good apples
- almonds

## Directions

1. Peel good apples, core them, dry with clean cloth and place on a deep plate
2. Scald almonds, peel them, cut into thin strips, dry in a warm place and stick into apples

title: Jablkový ježek (Apple Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- good apples
- almonds
- 8 egg whites
- 8 tablespoons ground sugar
- juice of one lemon
- sugar
- vanilla, cinnamon, or two crushed cloves mixed with sugar

## Directions

1. Peel, wash the apples, dry with a clean cloth and place on a deep plate
2. Blanch almonds, peel, cut into noodles, dry in a warm place and stick into the apples
3. Make stiff snow from 8 egg whites, mix with 8 tablespoons ground sugar and juice of one lemon; mix everything well and pour over apples
4. Bake slowly in an oven and sprinkle with sugar mixed with vanilla, cinnamon, or two crushed cloves
5. Serve on the plate on which it was baked

title: Jablkový kompot (Apple Compote)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- nice apples
- a little sugar
- water
- orange peel
- cinnamon
- apple puree

## Directions

1. Select nice apples and peel them
2. Cut out the cores and seeds
3. Place on a baking sheet
4. Add a little sugar, water, orange peel and cinnamon
5. Cover with a lid and braise
6. Place the braised apples on a bed of flour
7. Sprinkle with ground sugar
8. If desired, decorate around the edges with apple puree

title: Jablkový kompot (Apple Compote)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- nice apples
- sugar
- water
- orange peel
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Select nice apples and peel them
2. Remove the cores and seeds
3. Place on a baking sheet
4. Add a little sugar, water, orange peel and cinnamon
5. Cover with a lid and stew
6. Transfer the stewed apples to a dish
7. Sprinkle with crushed sugar

title: Jablkový kompot (Apple Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- sugar (half cup)
- water (two cups)
- lemon juice (from one lemon)
- twelve sour apples, halved, peeled, and cored

## Directions

1. Put half cup of sugar, two cups of water and juice from one lemon in a pot.
2. Add twelve halved, peeled, and cored sour apples, bring to fire and let cook slowly until soft, but do not let them fall apart.
3. Remove from heat, let cool, take the apples out on a dish, let the sauce cook down until thick and press through a sieve onto the apples.
4. You can also add a piece of whole cinnamon to the sugar and use equal parts water and white wine if desired.
5. You can also arrange preserved cherries or raisins in the middle of the apples on the dish, then pour the sauce over them.

title: Jablkový Paj (Apple Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- pie crust dough
- peeled tart apples
- sugar
- cinnamon or nutmeg
- butter
- water

## Directions

1. Line a pie pan thinly with rolled out pie dough
2. Fill with peeled tart apples sliced into thin slices
3. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon, or nutmeg
4. Dot with several small pieces of butter
5. Moisten the edges with water
6. Cover the pie again with dough
7. Press the edges together firmly
8. Cut off excess dough
9. Make several slits on top
10. Bake in a moderate oven for three quarters of an hour
11. Never use sweet apples for pies

title: Jablkový rosol (Apple Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- Ripe, juicy apples
- Water
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Take ripe, juicy apples, peel and cut them into quarters, placing them in water as you cut so they do not blacken in the air.
2. When all are cut, cook them in water until soft, then strain through thick cloth.
3. Then cook the juice with sugar, as described in the preceding recipe.

title: Jahelnik (Millet Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- millet
- milk

## Directions

1. Cook millet in milk according to the previous method, sweeten to taste

title: Jahelník (Barley Porridge Bake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- barley
- hot water
- milk
- salt
- 6 egg yolks
- sugar
- lemon zest
- 6 egg whites
- butter
- bread crumbs
- cinnamon
- parsley
- pork cracklings

## Directions

1. Pick through barley, wash and scald with hot water, drain water
2. Place barley on a baking sheet, pour sufficient milk over it, salt and make a thick porridge
3. When cooked, let cool, mix in 6 egg yolks, sugar as needed, a little chopped lemon zest and stiff snow from 6 egg whites
4. Mix everything together, grease baking sheet with butter, sprinkle with bread crumbs, place barley porridge in sheet and bake
5. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon
6. Green parsley and pork cracklings can be added and mixed into the barley porridge

title: Jahelník (Barley Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 liter barley
- 1 liter milk
- salt
- 6 egg yolks
- sugar as needed
- lemon zest, finely chopped
- 6 egg whites, stiffly beaten
- butter for greasing
- grated roll crumbs
- sugar and cinnamon for topping

## Directions

1. Pour the barley, spread it on a baking sheet, pour with sufficient milk, salt it and make a very thick paste
2. When cooked, let it cool, mix in 6 egg yolks, sugar as needed, a little finely chopped lemon zest and stiffly beaten snow from 6 egg whites, mix everything together
3. Grease the baking sheet with butter, sprinkle with grated roll crumbs, put the barley pudding in the baking sheet and bake
4. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon
5. Finely chopped parsley and cracklings can be added to the pudding

title: Jahelník (Millet Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- Millet
- Milk
- Sugar
- Lemon rind, finely chopped
- Eggs
- Butter
- Sour cream
- Apples (optional)
- Dried prunes, cooked and pitted (optional)

## Directions

1. Cook millet in milk according to the previous method
2. Sweeten to taste and season with finely chopped lemon rind
3. Place in a buttered mold or form
4. Pour over the top a mixture of beaten egg with a piece of butter and some sour cream
5. Bake in an oven for three quarters of an hour
6. You may also add chopped apples or cooked and pitted dried plums to the millet

title: Jahelník na jiný způsob (Millet Pudding, Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- Millet
- Sweet milk, 1 quart
- Eggs, 4 whole
- Salt
- Smoked pork meat, thinly sliced

## Directions

1. Rinse millet in clean lukewarm water
2. Cook in sweet milk until soft and thickened into a porridge
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly
4. Beat 4 whole eggs and mix into the porridge
5. Add a little salt
6. Slice smoked pork meat into thin slices and place on a baking pan
7. Pour the porridge mixture over the meat slices
8. Bake until the top is golden yellow
9. This prepared millet pudding is very tasty; if you do not have smoked meat, you can omit it

title: Jahlí - Jiný způsob (Barley - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- barley
- water
- salt
- gingerbread
- butter
- cinnamon
- sugar
- honey

## Directions

1. Pick through and rinse the barley, pour hot water over it to scald it, salt it and cook until tender
2. Drain it, then spread it on a platter, sprinkle with gingerbread and pour with butter
3. This way barley is also prepared in milk, except that it is sprinkled with cinnamon and sugar or brushed with honey

title: Jahodová chladivka (Strawberry Cooler)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- three-quarters kilo of ripe strawberries
- one quarter reau of water
- three-quarters liter of sugar syrup
- juice of two lemons
- champagne or burgundy wine

## Directions

1. Press three-quarters kilo of ripe strawberries through a fine sieve together with one quarter reau of water
2. Add three-quarters liter of sugar syrup to the obtained juice, add juice from two lemons, and strain everything again
3. Bring the juice to 18°, then place it in an ice cream maker to freeze
4. Before serving, pour champagne or burgundy wine into the frozen liquid, mix everything thoroughly, and serve in glasses

title: Jahodová chladivka (Strawberry Sorbet)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- tři čtvrti kila vyzrálých jahod
- čtvrt litru vody nebo medu
- tři čtvrti litru cukrového syrobu
- štáva ze dvou citronů
- šampaňské nebo burgundské víno

## Directions

1. Jemným řešetem se tři čtvrti kila vyzrálých jahod s jednou čtvrtí promačká
2. Docílené štávě se přidá tři čtvrti litru cukrového syrobu
3. Přidá se štáva ze dvou citronů
4. Vše se procedí
5. Štáva se přivede na 18°
6. Dá se do nádoby na zmrzlinu, by zmrzla
7. Před užitím se naleje šampaňské nebo burgundské víno do zmrzlé tekutiny
8. Vše se důkladně promíchá
9. Nápoj se v sklenicích na stůl nese

title: Jahodová omáčka (Strawberry Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilogram strawberries
- 1/2 liter red wine
- lemon peel
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- crushed rusk or 1 small teaspoon potato flour

## Directions

1. Press the strawberries through a sieve
2. Pour half a liter of red wine over them
3. Add lemon peel, sugar, and crushed rusk or potato flour
4. Boil for a quarter hour
5. Strain

title: Jahodová omáčka k hovězímu masu (Strawberry Sauce for Beef)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- three and one-half deciliters of strawberries
- sugar
- one and one-half deciliters of beef broth
- one and three-quarters deciliters of wine
- pale roux
- burnt sugar

## Directions

1. Strain three and one-half deciliters of strawberries through a sieve
2. Boil the juice with a piece of sugar
3. Add one and one-half deciliters of beef broth and one and three-quarters deciliters of wine
4. Strain a pale roux through a sieve into the mixture
5. Add a piece of burnt sugar

title: Jahodová omáčka k nákypům (Strawberry Sauce for Whipped Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe strawberries
- sugar
- good sweet cream

## Directions

1. Press the strawberries through a thick sieve so that the juice drips into a stone dish
2. To 3 1/2 deciliters (1 serving spoon) of juice add 9 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
3. Boil until it foams
4. Stir until it cools
5. Pour in 5 1/2 deciliters (1 1/2 serving spoons) of good sweet cream
6. Mix everything
7. Place on ice
8. Serve in small dishes with whipped cream

title: Jahodová Paštika (Strawberry Paste)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- strawberries
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Press strawberries through a fine sieve
2. For one part of strawberry mass, add one and a half parts of powdered sugar
3. Cook everything together several times
4. Pour into containers and seal when cooled

title: Jahodová povidla (Strawberry Preserves)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Strawberries
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Press strawberries through a fine sieve
2. Sweeten strongly and mix with sugar
3. Boil several times
4. Skim the foam
5. Pour into containers when cooled
6. Tie up the bladder

title: Jahodová Pěna (Strawberry Foam)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- one and one-half liters strawberries
- half liter sweet cream
- 24 grams crushed sugar
- lemon zest from half a lemon
- half a small teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Rub one and one-half liters of strawberries with half a liter of sweet cream
2. Strain
3. Mix 24 grams of crushed sugar with zest from half a lemon rubbed with sugar and half a small teaspoon of cinnamon
4. Pour into glasses

title: Jahodová pěna (Strawberry Foam)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 liters strawberries
- 0.5 liters sweet cream
- 24 grams (18 lots) crushed sugar
- zest of half a lemon, rubbed with sugar
- 0.5 small teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Rub the strawberries with the sweet cream
2. Strain the mixture
3. Mix in the crushed sugar
4. Add the lemon zest rubbed with sugar and cinnamon
5. Pour into glasses

title: Jahodová Voda (Strawberry Water)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half a kilogram of fresh strawberries
- 1 liter of cold water
- juice from 3 lemons

## Directions

1. Crush half a kilogram of fresh strawberries.
2. Add 1 liter of cold water and juice from 3 lemons.
3. Let stand for one hour, press through a sieve, strain and sweeten as needed.

title: Jahodová voda (Strawberry Water)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- dobře vyzrálé jahody
- voda

## Directions

1. Jako maliny je možno dobře vyzrálých jahod k úpravě vody užít

title: Jahodová Zmrzlina (Strawberry Ice Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Fully ripe strawberries
- Lemon juice
- Sugar
- Wine or water

## Directions

1. Press fully ripe strawberries through fine sieve
2. Add lemon juice to the juice
3. Sweeten generously
4. Dilute with wine or water
5. Freeze with regular treatment

title: Jahodová Zmrzlina - Jiný Způsob (Strawberry Ice Cream - Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Two liters fresh, well-ripened strawberries
- 375 grams dissolved sugar
- Juice of one lemon

## Directions

1. Press two liters fresh, well-ripened strawberries through sieve
2. Add 375 grams dissolved sugar to the juice
3. Add juice of one lemon
4. Place in ice cream machine, or if not available, in a dried metal container placed in ice
5. Whip the liquid with a whisk until it thickens
6. Place on table in small glass bowls

title: Jahodová Zmrzlina - Jiný Způsob (Strawberry Ice Cream - Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Strawberry marmalade
- Wine or water
- Lemon juice

## Directions

1. If fresh strawberries are not available, take strawberry marmalade
2. Dilute with wine or water
3. Add lemon juice
4. Proceed as with previous ice creams

title: Jahodová Zmrzlina se Smetanou (Strawberry Ice Cream with Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- One liter strawberries
- Sugar
- One liter sweet cream

## Directions

1. Press one liter strawberries through sieve
2. Add sugar and one liter sweet cream
3. Place in ice cream machine
4. Or crush 375 grams sugar and 16 egg yolks until foamy with one liter sweet cream over moderate heat
5. Strain it
6. Place in ice cream machine with one liter strained strawberries

title: Jahodová Zmrzlina se Smetanou - Jiný Způsob (Strawberry Ice Cream with Cream - Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- One and one-half liters ripe strawberries
- More than one liter good cream
- Fine crushed sugar

## Directions

1. Rub one and one-half liters ripe strawberries through sieve
2. Add more than one liter good cream to the juice
3. Sweeten with fine crushed sugar
4. Transform into ice cream by the already described method

title: Jahodová Šťáva (Strawberry Juice)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 liters of fresh strawberries
- 1 kilogram of boiled thick sugar

## Directions

1. Pour 4 liters of fresh strawberries into a glazed pot.
2. Pour 1 kilogram of boiled thick sugar over them.
3. Tie the pot and place in a cool place for 3 days.
4. Pour everything onto spread cloth and let the juice drip freely onto a dish.
5. Fill small bottles with the juice, seal well, place briefly in hot water in which they are allowed to cool, then seal well and store in a cool place.

title: Jahodové pokroutky (Strawberry Brittle)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe strawberries
- sugar
- linen cloth

## Directions

1. Place ripe strawberries in a closed pot on warm stove to slowly bake and stew
2. Press them out with linen cloth
3. Pour the juice onto pounded sugar, mix with it in a mash
4. Mix everything and warm on warm stove without boiling
5. When everything thickens, remove from heat, let cool and pour onto paper
6. When completely hardened, carefully peel off and cut into pieces

title: Jahodové topinky (Strawberry Toast)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- hard rolls
- sweetened wine
- sweetened strawberries
- hot butter
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cut hard rolls into slices, dip in sweetened wine, spread with sweetened strawberries, fry in hot butter, sprinkle with sugar, and serve warm.

title: Jahodový Dort (Strawberry Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- butter dough
- half liter picked strawberries
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 6 beaten eggs

## Directions

1. Cover a sheet form with butter dough
2. Place on the dough a mixture of half liter picked strawberries, 4 tablespoons sugar, and 6 beaten eggs
3. If fresh strawberries are not available, pickled ones may be used in winter

title: Jahodový ježek (Strawberry Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half kilogram (pound) of cleaned strawberries
- a piece of apricot preserve
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- snow from 24 egg whites

## Directions

1. Mix strawberries with a piece of apricot preserve and 12 dekagrams sugar
2. Stir everything for a whole hour
3. Gradually mix in snow from 24 egg whites while it cools
4. Put everything in a greased mold and bake slowly

title: Jahodový koláč (Strawberry Shortcake)
body:
## Ingredients

- four cupfuls of flour
- two teaspoons of baking powder
- a little salt
- half a cupful of butter
- milk
- two quarts of strawberries
- sugar

## Directions

1. Put four cupfuls of flour into a bowl, add to it two teaspoons of baking powder, a little salt and mix well.
2. Add half a cupful of butter, finely crumbled, and three, until all the flour is well mixed with the butter.
3. Then add as much milk as needed to make a not too stiff dough, similar to biscuit dough.
4. Dust the rolling pin with flour, turn the dough onto it, roll it out a little more, divide into two halves, grease the baking pan with butter, roll out one half of the dough about half a finger thick and line the pan with it, spread with butter and place the second half of the dough, also rolled out, on top and put into a nice hot oven to bake.
5. Let it bake well, which takes about half an hour, then turn out onto a board, split and let cool.
6. In the meantime, mash two quarts of strawberries with sugar.
7. When the cake has cooled, place one half on a plate, the broken (inner) side facing up, spread a nice thick layer of prepared strawberries over it, place the second half of the cake on top, again with the inner side facing up and spread a thick layer of strawberries over the top.
8. Cut then into square pieces, place each one in a deep plate, pour over good thick whipped cream and bring to the table.

title: Jahodový nákyp (Puffed Strawberry Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart fresh strawberries
- 1 cup sugar
- water
- 10 egg whites
- powdered sugar
- butter

## Directions

1. Mash the strawberries and strain them through a sieve
2. Dissolve less than 1 cup sugar in a little water on a saucepan, do not brown it
3. Pour onto a plate and add the strained strawberries
4. Mix well and then gradually fold in stiff peaks made from 10 egg whites until it becomes very thick and a spoon can stand in it
5. Butter a metal dish and fill it with the mixture, mounding it nicely
6. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and bake slowly in the oven
7. When the pudding begins to crack on top from inside, it is done
8. If baking in a ceramic dish, place it on a baking sheet heavily sprinkled with salt
9. The same method is used for raspberry and other fruit puddings

title: Jahodový Punč (Strawberry Punch)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 kilogram fresh strawberries
- rum
- 0.5 kilogram crushed sugar
- juice of 2 lemons
- 3-4 liters hot water

## Directions

1. Crush the fresh strawberries with a spoon and place them in a pot
2. Pour rum over them and let them stand for 2-3 days, stirring them once daily
3. Strain off the rum and press the strawberries through a sieve
4. Add 0.5 kilogram crushed sugar to the liquid
5. Add the juice of 2 lemons
6. Pour the previously strained rum and 3-4 liters of hot water over the mixture
7. Cover and let it cool completely before serving cold

title: Jahodový Snih (Strawberry Snow)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- two liters strawberries
- 24 decagrams crushed sugar
- crushed snow made from two and one-half liters cream

## Directions

1. Press two liters of strawberries through a sieve
2. Mix with 24 decagrams of crushed sugar and crushed snow made from two and one-half liters of cream
3. Arrange in snow-like mounds

title: Jahodový snih (Strawberry Snow)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 liters strawberries
- 24 dekagrams (18 lots) crushed sugar
- beaten snow from 2.5 liters cream

## Directions

1. Press the strawberries through a sieve
2. Mix in the crushed sugar and beaten snow from the cream
3. Arrange in snow-like mounds

title: Jahodový, malinový a ryvizový kompot (Strawberry, Raspberry and Gooseberry Compote)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- strawberries or raspberries or gooseberries
- sugar

## Directions

1. Take nice strawberries, raspberries or gooseberries
2. Wash them clean and place on a sieve to dry
3. Place the aforementioned fruit in sugar boiled to the sixth degree
4. Boil everything slowly but it must not fall apart
5. Remove and place on a dish and sprinkle with ground sugar

title: Jak se hrášek sušì (How to Dry Peas)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh peas
- soft boiling water

## Directions

1. Pour fresh peas into soft boiling water
2. Once it comes to a boil, strain through a sieve
3. Spread on cloth and let dry
4. Place on firm paper with turned-up edges on a baking sheet in the oven
5. Let dry slowly and store in jars
6. When ready to cook, soak the evening before in soft, cold water
7. Cook the next day like fresh peas

title: Jak se Marinuje Slaneček (How to Marinate Char)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- milt char
- wine vinegar
- onion
- capers
- pepper
- spices

## Directions

1. Peel the milt char, remove the milt and mash in 2 or 3 tablespoons of wine vinegar
2. Slice onion into thin rounds, add a few capers, peppers, and spices
3. Place the char in this mixture for about an hour

title: Jalovcová omáčka k divokému vepři (Juniper Sauce for Wild Boar)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- one hundred twenty grams of butter browned to redness
- rye bread, grated
- salt
- crushed juniper berries
- pepper
- sugar
- lemon peel, grated
- vinegar
- broth

## Directions

1. Take one hundred twenty grams of butter browned to redness
2. Add grated rye bread and salt
3. Add some crushed juniper berries, pepper, sugar with grated lemon peel, and vinegar
4. Boil everything with broth

title: Jalovcový Likér (Juniper Liqueur)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 liters fresh juniper berries
- Fine, pure spirits (kořalka)
- Sugar
- Water

## Directions

1. Take 0.5 liters of good, fresh juniper berries and crush them
2. Pour fine, pure spirits over them
3. Seal completely and leave in the sun for at least fourteen days
4. Strain and pour, then add sugar dissolved in water
5. Seal well and leave in the sun for several more days
6. Can then be transferred to special bottles

title: Jarní polévka (Spring Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Young turnips (brukve/kelrubny)
- Carrots
- Good broth
- Green beans
- Asparagus
- Cauliflower
- Fried bread
- Salt

## Directions

1. Slice young turnips and carrots and cook in good broth
2. Add diagonally sliced green beans, sliced asparagus, and cauliflower
3. Cook everything in the broth
4. Add fried bread and salt and pour into a bowl

title: Jasmínová chladivka (Jasmine Cooler)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sugar syrup
- jasmine water

## Directions

1. Prepare jasmine cooler exactly as rose cooler, only instead of rose water add jasmine water to it
2. To obtain jasmine water: pour hot sugary syrup over jasmine flowers and let them steep in a covered container for several hours, then strain

title: Jasmínová zmrzlina (Jasmine Ice Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- jasmínové lístky
- vaříící smetana
- čtyry rozkvedlané vejce
- tři čtvrti kila cukru

## Directions

1. Jasmínové lístky se dají do nádoby
2. Spaří se vařící smetanou
3. Přikryjí se a nechají docela vychladnout
4. Procedí se ubrouskem
5. Čtyry rozkvedlané vejce se smíchají s tří čtvrtí kila jemně utlučeným cukrem
6. Vše se zařídí jako u druhých zmrzlin

title: Jasmínové Mandle (Jasmine Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- almonds
- sugar
- jasmine juice

## Directions

1. Prepare almonds as described, coating them in sugar while constantly stirring
2. Add jasmine juice to the boiled sugar

title: Jaternice (Liver Smisage)
body:
## Ingredients

- pork head, sectioned
- pork liver (half cooked raw)
- pork lungs and other offal
- bread (2 parts for every 1 part meat)
- pepper
- allspice
- clove (very little)
- marjoram
- lemon zest
- garlic (a small piece)
- broth

## Directions

1. First, boil the sectioned head; if it is a large piece, cut away the fat from under the jaw, as liver smisage should not be too fatty
2. Cook half the liver raw; boil the lungs and remaining offal together with the head
3. Chop all the cooked meat finely with a knife, as meat chopped with a machine becomes like mud
4. For every one part of meat, use two parts of bread, preferably baked two days prior as the harder it is, the better
5. Season with pepper, allspice, very little clove, marjoram, lemon zest, and a small piece of garlic
6. Mix the chopped meat with squeezed bread and seasonings, along with a little broth
7. Fill one intestine and boil it immediately so you can taste it and add any missing seasonings
8. Do not boil liver smisage in a large vessel or boil many at once, as they often burst; instead boil them in two pots with only enough to allow them to move freely
9. Use broth from the cooked meat, skimmed of fat beforehand, filling the pots halfway
10. When it reaches a boil, add the intestines and when they rise to the surface, remove them and place in clean cold water
11. Lay them on a board covered with paper

title: Jaternice z okruží (Liver Sausage from Organ Meats)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- calf organ meats
- salted water
- 3 onions
- butter
- parsley
- 5 eggs
- 5 egg yolks
- sour cream
- grated bread roll
- pepper
- salt
- nutmeg
- grated lemon zest
- sausage casings

## Directions

1. Clean calf organ meats, blanch in salted water, cook, dry and finely chop
2. Mix with 3 onions fried in butter, parsley, 5 whole eggs, 5 egg yolks beaten with sour cream, grated bread roll, pepper, salt, nutmeg and grated lemon zest
3. Fill clean sausage casings with the mixture
4. Simmer for half an hour, then fry in butter

title: Jaterní knedlíky (Liver Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 spoonfuls of butter
- 6 whole eggs
- 3 cloves garlic
- butter
- lemon zest
- nutmeg
- white pepper
- marjoram leaves
- salt
- 2 pounds fresh calf's liver
- bread rolls, bread or crackers, grated

## Directions

1. Cream 4 spoonfuls of butter until fluffy
2. Beat in 6 whole eggs
3. Add 3 cloves of garlic rubbed with butter, finely chopped lemon zest from half a lemon, a little nutmeg, a little ground white pepper and a teaspoonful of picked marjoram leaves
4. Salt it and mix well
5. Grate 2 pounds of fresh calf's liver on a grater and add to the rest
6. Then add enough grated bread roll, bread or crackers to make a thick dough
7. Mix well and let rest for half an hour
8. Then form round dumplings about the size of an apple
9. Put them in boiling salted water and let simmer for half an hour
10. Remove them, cut in half, sprinkle with grated bread roll or crackers and pour hot melted butter over them

title: Jaterní Nádivka (Liver Stuffing)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- onion
- parsley
- mushrooms
- bread roll
- milk
- eggs or egg yolks
- cooked goose or turkey livers

## Directions

1. Braise finely chopped onion in butter
2. Add chopped parsley and mushrooms
3. Moisten bread roll in milk, squeeze out, and crumble
4. Mix everything with eggs or egg yolks to keep moist
5. Chop cooked goose or turkey livers finely
6. Mix with the stuffing

title: Jaterní Nádivka (Simple Liver Stuffing)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- livers
- stomachs
- grated bread roll

## Directions

1. Cook and clean livers and stomachs thoroughly
2. Chop finely
3. Mix with grated bread roll

title: Jaterní Paštika (Liver Pastry)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Several beautiful fatty livers
- Truffle
- Good oil
- Finely chopped truffles
- Mushrooms
- Lemon juice
- Fine spices
- Chicken breasts
- Onion
- Truffles
- Mushrooms
- Chives
- Bacon
- Carrot
- Two whole eggs
- Two egg yolks
- Salt
- Parmesan cheese
- Goose liver
- Bacon

## Directions

1. Lard beautiful fatty livers well with truffle
2. Oil them with good oil, finely chopped truffles, mushrooms, lemon juice and fine spices
3. Place over mild heat
4. Chop raw chicken breasts with onion, truffles, mushrooms, chives, bacon, carrot, two whole eggs and two egg yolks
5. Salt everything
6. Cover the pastry bottom with this mixture, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese
7. Place prepared goose liver on top as previously described
8. Line everything with bacon, cover the pastry and arrange everything as with the first pastry

title: Jazyk hovězí s aspikem (Beef Tongue with Aspic)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- beef tongue
- salt water
- 4 calf feet
- vegetables
- onion
- pepper
- spices
- thyme
- bay leaf
- vinegar
- salt
- calf bladder
- parsley
- carrot
- celeriac

## Directions

1. Boil tongue in salt water, peel, cut into slices, and let cool
2. Boil calf feet with all vegetables, especially chopped onion, pepper, spices, thyme, bay leaf, and vinegar, salt to taste
3. If thicker aspic is desired, add calf bladder
4. Strain
5. Line a mold with parsley, carrot cut into stars, parsley, and celeriac
6. Place tongue on this, add more vegetables
7. Pour a little aspic carefully; when set, gradually add more aspic
8. Finally set in ice

title: Jazyk hovězí s polskou omáčkou (Beef Tongue with Polish Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- beef tongue
- salt water
- wine vinegar
- lemon zest
- parsley root
- onion
- carrot
- celeriac
- thyme
- bay leaf
- pepper
- almonds or nuts
- brown roux
- burnt sugar
- white sugar
- raisins

## Directions

1. Clean and wash tongue, cook in salt water for half an hour
2. Change the water, add salt if needed, vinegar, lemon zest, parsley root, onion, carrot, celeriac, thyme, bay leaf, pepper, and almonds or nuts
3. Cook until tender, strain
4. Remove tongue, peel while warm, cut into slices
5. Mix brown roux with strained broth, add burnt and white sugar
6. Simmer and strain
7. Add sliced tongue with almonds or nuts and raisins to sauce

title: Jazyk s podpouštkou (Tongue with Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Fresh beef or veal tongues
- Salt
- Various spices
- Flour
- Butter
- Tongue cooking broth
- Lemon slices
- White pepper
- Nutmeg
- Wine

## Directions

1. Rinse fresh beef or veal tongues, clean them, salt them and cook them with various spices until tender, skimming foam from the surface as they cook
2. Remove the skin from the cooked tongues and slice them into thin rounds
3. Make a light roux from flour and butter, add only the broth from the cooked tongues
4. Add lemon slices, white pepper, nutmeg, and a little wine to the sauce
5. Place the sliced tongues in the sauce and cook everything together for about a quarter hour
6. Strain the sauce and beat in egg yolks, then pour over the tongues

title: Jazyk s podpouštkou (Tongue with Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh beef or calf tongue
- salt
- spices

## Directions

1. Wash and clean fresh tongue, salt it
2. Cook with various spices until tender, skimming foam from the surface constantly
3. The skin is removed from cooked tongue

title: Jazykové řízky (Fried Tongue Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- tongue
- one to two eggs
- water
- nutmeg
- lemon juice
- salt
- bread

## Directions

1. Cook the tongue until tender
2. Peel the tongue
3. Cut into finger-thick cutlets
4. Beat one to two eggs with a little water
5. Add a pinch of nutmeg, several drops of lemon juice, and salt
6. Coat the cutlets in bread on both sides
7. Dip into the egg mixture
8. Fry in butter on both sides

title: Jednoduché omeletky (Plain Omelette)
body:
## Ingredients

- Four eggs
- Four spoonfuls of cold water
- Salt
- Pepper
- Fresh parsley or chives
- Butter

## Directions

1. Beat four eggs with a fork on a deep plate
2. Add four spoonfuls of cold water (one spoonful per egg)
3. Salt and pepper to taste
4. Add finely chopped fresh parsley or chives if desired
5. Put a small teaspoon of butter in a saucepan and let it melt
6. When hot but not browning, pour the beaten eggs into the saucepan
7. Cook carefully, lifting the edge with a knife from time to time so the liquid reaches the bottom and the omelette cooks through
8. When sufficiently set, fold and turn onto a heated plate

title: Jednoduché omeletky na jiný způsob (Plain Omelette, Another Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- Two eggs
- One teaspoon of good cold sour cream or one spoonful of milk
- Salt
- Ground white pepper
- Butter or lard

## Directions

1. For one person, beat two eggs with one teaspoon of good cold sour cream or one spoonful of milk
2. Beat with a pinch of salt and ground white pepper
3. Heat a piece of butter or lard in a frying pan
4. Pour the beaten eggs into it and tilt the pan from one side and then the other so it spreads evenly
5. When the omelette is slightly set on top, fold it in half or roll it up
6. Turn onto a plate and serve immediately
7. Before folding you may sprinkle with sugar and lemon juice, and sprinkle with sugar on the plate as well
8. A good omelette should be soft inside and golden on the outside
9. The sour cream or milk may be omitted if desired

title: Jehně neb kůzle smažené (Fried Lamb or Kid)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb or kid meat
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter
- milk

## Directions

1. Take neck or kidney part from lamb, from kid any part.
2. Clean carefully, remove the skin, cut into neat pieces.
3. Wash in clean water, dry with a clean cloth.
4. Salt, pepper and dip in egg diluted with milk (or milk in place of one egg), roll in grated bread and fry in butter.

title: Jehněčí dušené se sardelemi (Stewed Lamb with Sardeles)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb brisket
- butter or lard (3-4 spoonfuls)
- parsley
- celery
- salt
- beef broth or hot water
- sardeles (5 nice ones)
- butter
- beef broth
- wine
- pickled salmon (optional)

## Directions

1. Cut lamb brisket into neat pieces
2. Place on a braising pan with butter or lard, chopped parsley and a piece of celery
3. Salt and let braise, occasionally adding a little beef broth or hot water
4. Wash five nice sardeles, remove the bones and mix the sardeles with butter
5. Make a light roux from 1 spoonful of butter, add the sardeles, pour in half beef broth and half wine and let it cook
6. You can also add a piece of pickled salmon
7. Then add the braised lamb and the strained juice from it
8. Let it cook a little more
9. Remove the meat to a platter and pour the sauce over it
10. Wine may be omitted

title: Jehněčí kotletky (Lamb Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb ribs
- salt
- veal meat (1 pound)
- loin fat (1 pound)
- nutmeg
- small onions
- butter
- egg
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Prepare cutlets from lamb ribs and trim them
2. Salt on both sides and cook in a small pan in fresh butter for two minutes
3. Remove and let cool
4. Clean veal meat and remove all glandular meat, cut into pieces
5. Mince with loin fat
6. Place in a bowl, salt it, add a little ground nutmeg and a spoonful of small onions chopped and fried in butter
7. Mix into a paste and add three eggs
8. Mix well and spread this mixture on both sides of the cooled cutlets about the thickness of a straw
9. Dip in beaten egg
10. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and set aside
11. Shortly before serving, place in hot clarified butter and fry for eight minutes until golden
12. Surround with young braised peas

title: Jehněčí kotletky na jiný způsob (Lamb Cutlets, Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb meat from ribs
- butter
- salt
- parsley butter or garlic

## Directions

1. Prepare cutlets from lamb meat from ribs in the manner of mutton cutlets
2. If they are very small, cut them diagonally
3. Dip in melted butter
4. Cook quickly on both sides in a pan or on a grill
5. Then sprinkle with salt
6. Arrange on a heated platter and garnish with green parsley
7. You can also intersperse with pieces of parsley butter or prepare a gravy from the cooked juices, to which a little grated garlic may be added

title: Jehněčí kýta s mátovou omáčkou (Leg of Lamb with Mint Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb leg
- salt
- butter or lard
- mint leaves (4 spoonfuls finely chopped)
- sugar (1 spoonful)
- paprika (pinch)
- wine vinegar (4-5 spoonfuls)
- broth or hot water

## Directions

1. Wash the lamb leg, scrape it, pound it and salt it
2. Place in a roasting pan greased with butter or lard
3. Dot with small pieces of butter
4. Roast with frequent basting with its own juices, adding a little broth or hot water during cooking
5. Meanwhile, mix four spoonfuls of finely chopped mint leaves with a spoonful of sugar and a pinch of paprika and mix well, pouring in a spoonful at a time of wine vinegar, four or five altogether
6. Place the roasted leg on a platter
7. Pour a little of the cooked and defatted meat juice over it
8. Serve the mint sauce separately in a bowl

title: Jehněčí Ledvinky (Lamb Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- several lamb kidneys
- butter or lard
- salt
- pepper
- shallot or small onion
- mushrooms
- fresh parsley
- lemon juice
- fresh butter
- potato croquettes

## Directions

1. Peel several lamb kidneys, split them in half lengthwise, clean them well
2. Brown them in hot butter or lard
3. Salt and pepper them
4. Add chopped shallot or small onion that has been browned in butter
5. Add a little chopped mushrooms that have been stewed in butter
6. Add a little chopped fresh parsley and finish with lemon juice
7. Mix in a piece of fresh butter
8. Arrange the kidneys on a plate, pour the sauce over them, and surround with potato croquettes

title: Jehněčí Osrdí (Lamb Pluck)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb heart and lungs
- onion
- carrot
- sprigs of thyme
- fresh parsley
- bay leaves
- salt
- pepper
- cloves
- vinegar
- oil
- butter
- flour
- broth
- wine

## Directions

1. Clean the lamb heart and lungs, cut into pieces
2. Place in an earthenware pot with sliced onion and carrot, sprigs of thyme and fresh parsley, several bay leaves, a little salt, pepper, cloves, vinegar and oil
3. Let stand for twelve hours, turning frequently
4. Melt a piece of butter in a pan, add the pluck, let stew for a while
5. Dust with flour
6. Add equal parts broth and wine
7. Let cook until tender
8. Remove the pluck onto a plate and pour the strained sauce over it
9. Can also be prepared like veal

title: Jehněčí s citrónovou omáčkou (Lamb with Lemon Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb shoulder and neck pieces
- fresh butter
- water
- salt
- carrot
- parsley
- celery
- herbs
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Clean shoulder and neck pieces.
2. Place new butter with 2 spoonfuls of water and salt, piece of carrot, parsley, celery and herbs on a baking sheet.
3. Braise until everything softens.
4. Press pale roux through it until it reaches the proper thickness.
5. Squeeze juice from the whole lemon into it.

title: Jehněčí s hříbky (Lamb with Mushrooms)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb shoulder or neck
- vegetables
- mushrooms
- butter
- parsley
- salt

## Directions

1. Braise lamb shoulder or neck pieces with vegetables.
2. Press pale roux through a sieve into it.
3. Clean mushrooms, cut them, braise them in butter.
4. Chop green parsley and add with mushrooms to the meat.

title: Jehněčí s karfiolcm (Lamb with Cauliflower)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb shoulder or neck
- butter
- parsley
- herbs
- cauliflower
- salt
- water

## Directions

1. Clean lamb shoulder or neck pieces and braise with butter, parsley and herbs.
2. When soft, strain pale roux over it.
3. Cook cleaned cauliflower in separate salted water.
4. Arrange one floret beside another around the meat.

title: Jehněčí s máslovou omáčkou (Stewed Lamb with Butter Gravy)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter (3 spoonfuls)
- onion
- carrot
- lamb brisket
- salt
- lemon peel
- butter (3 spoonfuls)
- flour (2 spoonfuls)
- hot water or beef broth
- pepper
- cloves (2)
- nutmeg
- green parsley
- white wine (1 glass)
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Place three spoonfuls of butter, diced onion and carrot on a braising pan
2. Put neatly cut lamb brisket on top
3. Salt it, add a piece of diced lemon peel and braise it halfway
4. On another braising pan, heat three spoonfuls of butter, add two spoonfuls of flour and make a light roux
5. Slowly add, while constantly stirring, enough hot water or beef broth to make a thickened sauce
6. Add several peppercorns, two cloves, a little nutmeg and a piece of chopped green parsley
7. Let it cook for a while
8. Pour over the lamb, add a glass of white wine and the juice of one lemon
9. Let the meat cook tender in this
10. Remove the meat to a hot platter
11. Remove the fat from the sauce, salt it, strain through a sieve onto the meat and serve

title: Jehněčí s Paprikou (Lamb with Paprika Gravy)
body:
## Ingredients

- front quarter of lamb
- four tablespoons fresh butter
- one onion
- one carrot
- a little leek
- celery
- flour
- beef broth
- one cup good sour cream
- paprika

## Directions

1. Take a front quarter of lamb, clean it well, and cut into neat pieces
2. Put four tablespoons fresh butter on a pan with one onion, one carrot, a little leek and celery, all cut into slices
3. Add the cut meat, salt properly, and let it stew until the meat is half tender
4. Dust with a spoonful of flour
5. Add good beef broth and one cup of good sour cream
6. Add paprika to taste and let the meat stew completely tender
7. Remove the meat pieces one by one with a fork onto a plate
8. Remove all the fat from the sauce, salt it, add more paprika if desired, and strain it over the lamb meat on the plate
9. Serve hot
10. The sauce should be thick, not thin

title: Jehněčí s podpoušfkou (Lamb with Caper Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb meat
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- bouillon
- onion
- herbs
- bay leaf
- clove
- capers
- lemon slices
- mushrooms
- sardines
- white wine
- flour

## Directions

1. Cut lamb meat into pieces, wash, salt and pepper it.
2. Brown in butter and pour with bouillon.
3. Add onion, herbs, bay leaf and clove, simmer until meat is completely tender.
4. Strain the sauce, strain it, add capers, lemon slices, sautéed mushrooms cut into small pieces and sardines.
5. Pour everything with white wine, brown with flour and pour over the meat.

title: Jehněčí s podpoušťkou (Lamb with Capers)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb meat
- butter
- bouillon
- onion
- aromatic vegetables
- bay leaf
- clove
- capers
- lemon slices
- mushrooms
- anchovies
- white wine
- flour

## Directions

1. Cut the lamb meat into pieces, wash, salt and pepper it.
2. Brown it in butter and add bouillon.
3. Add onion, aromatic vegetables, bay leaf, and clove, and cook together until the meat is completely tender.
4. Strain the sauce and add capers, lemon slices, finely chopped sautéed mushrooms, and anchovies.
5. Pour white wine over everything, thicken with flour, and pour the sauce over the meat.

title: Jehněčí se sardelemi (Lamb with Sardines)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb leg, shoulder or hindquarters
- salt
- bacon
- sardines
- butter
- beef broth
- capers
- lemon peel
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Remove all membranes from lamb leg, shoulder or hindquarters, salt it, lard with bacon.
2. Rub sardines with butter, smear the lamb with this mixture.
3. Add beef broth, several capers with chopped lemon peel.
4. Braise under a lid on butter, adding beef broth as needed.
5. Squeeze juice from one lemon, and when meat is tender, cut into neat pieces.

title: Jehněčí řízky (Lamb Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb leg
- salt
- clarified butter or lard
- parsley butter or fried onion

## Directions

1. Cut neat steaks from the lamb leg
2. Salt them and quickly fry in hot clarified butter or lard
3. You can also grill them
4. Arrange on a heated platter, place pieces of parsley butter on top or sprinkle with chopped fried onion
5. Leg meat can also be cut crosswise in the manner of beefsteak and prepared the same way

title: Jelen (Roasted Venison Haunch)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- venison haunch
- salt
- bacon
- 8 onions
- pepper
- new spices
- lemon zest
- capers
- beef broth
- bread, grated
- butter or beef fat
- cranberries

## Directions

1. Clean the venison haunch and salt it.
2. Cut bacon into long strips and lard the meat by threading the bacon through the entire piece.
3. Place on a baking pan with finely chopped onions, pepper, new spices, lemon zest cut into strips, a few capers, and cover with beef broth.
4. Baste frequently until the roast is completely tender.
5. Fry half a grated bread roll in butter or beef fat and sprinkle over the roast.
6. Braise briefly and pour the pan juices over.
7. Garnish with cranberries. This method can also be used for venison and roe deer.

title: Jelení hřbet s citrónovým křenem (Saddle of Venison with Horseradish)
body:
## Ingredients

- venison saddle
- wine
- vinegar
- water
- peppercorns
- spices
- cloves
- juniper berries
- sprigs of thyme
- bay leaves
- onion
- lemon zest from half a lemon
- sugar (1 spoon)
- lemon juice
- vinegar (half a small cup)
- grated horseradish

## Directions

1. Wash the venison saddle well, salt it and place in a large pot
2. Pour wine and vinegar over it with enough water to make it pleasantly sour
3. Add several peppercorns, some spices, several cloves, juniper berries, sprigs of thyme, two or three bay leaves, and one onion
4. Let the saddle cook until it becomes tender
5. Remove it from the sauce and add horseradish sauce to it
6. Prepare the horseradish sauce as follows: grate the zest from half a lemon into a small bowl, add one spoon of sugar, squeeze lemon juice into it, add half a small cup of vinegar and enough grated horseradish to make it thick

title: Jelita (Blood Sausage)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh pork blood
- fatty pork meat from under the neck
- internal pork fat
- milk-soaked white bread
- salt
- lemon zest, finely chopped
- ground pepper
- allspice
- ginger
- clove
- melted lard
- fried onion
- barley groats (boiled in water or milk)
- intestines

## Directions

1. Catch and stir the fresh pork blood when slaughtering
2. Take a piece of fatty meat from under the neck and a piece of internal fat, boil them both, and cut into small cubes; divide into two portions
3. Into one portion, add milk-soaked and squeezed white bread and half the blood; add salt, finely chopped lemon zest, ground pepper, allspice, ginger, clove, and a little melted lard and fried onion pieces if desired
4. Mix this well and fill into thick, well-cleaned intestines; pin shut and boil
5. Mix the second half of the cut meat and fat with small barley groats (boiled in water or milk), add the remaining blood, season, add fat, fill and cook as above
6. Serve fried or roasted potatoes with fried onion and cabbage alongside both types

title: Jemné koláčky kmínové (Fine Caraway Cookies)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 375 grams good butter
- about ten eggs
- 375 grams finely ground sugar
- 100 grams ground caraway
- 1/2 kilogram fine sifted flour

## Directions

1. Beat butter until foaming, slowly add eggs
2. Add finely ground sugar
3. Add ground caraway and flour
4. Knead thoroughly
5. Pour into greased torte form lined with grated bread
6. Bake quickly

title: Jemné krojené koláče (Fine Cut Cakes)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 18 decagrams (12 lots) butter
- 18 decagrams sugar
- 3 egg yolks
- Some sour cream
- Lemon zest rubbed with sugar
- 3 whole eggs
- Chopped almonds
- Sugar and vanilla for topping

## Directions

1. Mix together 18 decagrams butter, 18 decagrams sugar, 3 egg yolks, some sour cream, lemon zest rubbed with sugar and 3 whole eggs
2. Spread the dough evenly on a waxed baking sheet
3. Sprinkle with chopped almonds, sugar and vanilla
4. When dried in the oven for a while, cut into long pieces and bake

title: Jemně vařeni raci (Delicately Cooked Crayfish)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Onion
- Caraway
- Pepper
- Spice
- Water
- Wine
- Salt
- Melted butter
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Cut onion into small pieces, and simmer with caraway, pepper, and other spices in equal parts water and wine.
2. Strain the boiling salted liquid over the cleaned crayfish, cover the vessel tightly, and simmer vigorously for ten to twelve minutes.
3. Strain everything, pour melted butter over the crayfish, garnish with green parsley, arrange neatly on a platter, and serve.

title: Jeseter s Vínem (Sturgeon in Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sturgeon, a four-pound piece from the middle if possible
- Carrot, sliced into rounds
- Onion
- Parsley, a bunch
- Salt
- Pepper
- Cloves, two pieces
- Garlic, two cloves, minced
- Red wine
- Weak beef broth
- Butter and flour roux
- Anchovies, two, mashed
- Lemon, one, juice of
- Paprika

## Directions

1. Place a four-pound piece of sturgeon in a deep pot with carrot sliced into rounds, onion, a bunch of parsley, salt, pepper, two pieces of cloves and two minced garlic cloves
2. Pour equal parts red wine and weak beef broth over it
3. Cover and let simmer slowly for one hour
4. Remove the fish to a dish and place in a warm spot
5. Strain the sauce
6. Make a brown butter and flour roux and fry it
7. Let it simmer briefly
8. Strain again
9. Mix in a piece of butter, juice from one lemon and a pinch of paprika
10. Pour over the fish

title: Ježek (Hedgehog Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 dekagrams (16 lots) butter
- 20 egg yolks
- sugar
- 24 dekagrams almonds
- 8 grated rolls with crusts removed
- 20 egg whites

## Directions

1. Beat 24 dekagrams butter until it foams
2. Add 20 egg yolks one by one
3. Add sufficient sugar
4. Add 24 dekagrams almonds and 8 grated rolls with crusts removed
5. Finally fold in snow from 20 egg whites
6. Steam in boiling water before serving

title: Ježek z jahlí (Pearl Barley Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 dekagrams (16 lots) pearl barley
- one liter milk
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) butter
- cinnamon
- lemon zest
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) ground almonds
- 4 tablespoons grated roll
- salt
- 8 egg whites for snow
- grated rusks

## Directions

1. Blanch 24 dekagrams pearl barley several times in hot water, cook in one liter milk, pass through a sieve and let cool
2. Beat 12 dekagrams butter with cinnamon, lemon zest, 6 dekagrams ground almonds, 4 tablespoons grated roll and salt
3. Add the porridge with snow from 8 egg whites and everything into a greased mold sprinkled with grated rusks and cook for 1 1/2 hours

title: Ježek z krájené housky (Hedgehog of Sliced Roll)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 dekagrams (half pound) butter
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) almonds
- 8 egg yolks
- 8 whole eggs
- 8 egg whites for snow
- 8 rolls cut into cubes and sprinkled with sour cream
- a little lemon zest
- almonds cut into noodles
- sufficient amount of sugar

## Directions

1. Almonds cut into noodles are mixed with a sufficient amount of sugar
2. Bake either in a mold, or tie in a clean cloth and hang over steam above boiling water
3. Pour the hedgehog with a sauce

title: Ježek z Krájené Housky (Hedgehog Pudding from Sliced Roll)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 dekagrams (half pound) butter
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) almonds
- 8 egg yolks
- 8 whole eggs
- 8 egg whites
- 8 rolls cut into cubes and sprinkled with sour cream
- piece of lemon zest
- almonds cut into thin strips
- sugar

## Directions

1. Mix 24 dekagrams butter, 12 dekagrams almonds, 8 egg yolks, 8 whole eggs, snow from 8 egg whites, 8 rolls cut into cubes and sprinkled with sour cream, piece of lemon zest and almonds cut into strips with sufficient sugar
2. Bake in a form, or wrap in clean cloth, suspend in steam over boiling water
3. Pour sauce over it

title: Ježek z lískových ořechů (Hazelnut Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons rice
- 3/4 liter water
- half kilogram hazelnuts with shells
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- lemon zest
- 4 egg yolks
- 4 egg whites for snow
- butter

## Directions

1. Blanch 2 tablespoons rice and cook in 3/4 liter water, pass through a sieve
2. Weigh half kilogram hazelnuts with shells, crush, roast until the shell comes off
3. Crush the nuts, mix with rice, 12 dekagrams sugar, lemon zest, 4 egg yolks and snow from 4 egg whites
4. Grease a mold with butter dough and put the mixture in the mold

title: Ježek z Utlučených Mandlí (Hedgehog Pudding from Ground Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 18 dekagrams (12 lots) ground almonds
- 18 dekagrams sugar
- 18 dekagrams butter
- 9 egg yolks
- 3 whole eggs
- piece of lemon zest
- 7 egg whites
- salt
- grated roll
- sauce

## Directions

1. Mix 18 dekagrams ground almonds, 18 dekagrams sugar, 18 dekagrams butter, 9 egg yolks, 3 whole eggs, piece of lemon zest, snow from 7 egg whites and salt well
2. Grease a form and sprinkle with grated roll
3. Bake pudding in it and pour sauce over it

title: Ježek z vajec a smetany (Egg and Cream Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ liter milk or sour cream
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) ground almonds
- vanilla
- salt
- 5 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Boil half a liter of milk or sour cream with 3 tablespoons sugar, 12 decagrams ground almonds, vanilla and salt for a quarter hour
2. Strain it, mix in 5 beaten egg yolks
3. Place the container in boiling water and stir until it thickens
4. Pour the mixture into a greased mold, cover with buttered paper and let stand for one hour in boiling water

title: Ježek z vajec a smetany (Hedgehog of Eggs and Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Half liter milk or cream
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 12 decagrams ground almonds
- Vanilla
- Salt
- 5 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook half a liter of milk or cream with 3 tablespoons sugar, 12 decagrams of ground almonds, vanilla, and salt for fifteen minutes.
2. Strain and mix in 5 whisked egg yolks.
3. Place the container in boiling water and stir continuously.

title: Jiná bramborová polévka (Purée of Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- peeled potatoes
- water
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- marjoram
- carrot
- celery
- cabbage
- leek
- boiling water
- bread

## Directions

1. Cook peeled potatoes and strain the water from them
2. Mix them with a piece of butter, add salt, pepper, and marjoram, and pour the strained water back on them
3. Meanwhile braise carrot, celery, cabbage, and leek on butter
4. Add a little boiling water and strain the juice from that into the potato soup
5. Let cook for another half hour and pour into a tureen on fried bread slices
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Jiná hrachová polévka (Another Pea Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- half pint of dried peas
- beef broth
- yellow butter roux
- marjoram
- green parsley
- bread, cooked peas, cooked rice, or noodles cooked in beef broth

## Directions

1. Cook half a pint of dried peas until soft, drain the water, mix with a little beef broth and press through a sieve or strainer into a pot, gradually adding beef broth
2. Thicken with yellow butter roux, season with pepper, let simmer a while and pour into a bowl over fried bread, cooked peas, cooked rice, or noodles cooked in beef broth
3. If desired, add a little marjoram and chopped green parsley
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Jiná koprová omáčka (Another Dill Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons vinegar
- 1/2 teaspoon flour
- chopped dill
- 1 egg
- 1 cupful sweet cold cream
- salt
- sugar

## Directions

1. Mix vinegar, flour, and chopped dill together
2. Add one egg and mix again
3. Pour one cupful of sweet cold cream into it
4. Cook everything on high heat with constant stirring
5. When cooked, season with salt and add a little sugar to taste
6. If desired, the sugar can be omitted

title: Jiná nádivka z máku (Another Poppy Seed Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 tablespoons sugar
- 3 egg yolks
- 1 small cup cooked ground poppy seed, or poppy seed cooked in cream and well rubbed
- 3 tablespoons melted butter
- 3 or 4 tablespoons cream
- 1/2 small cup seedless raisins
- cinnamon, finely ground, to the point of a knife
- vanilla, to the point of a knife
- 3 egg whites

## Directions

1. Rub 6 tablespoons of sugar with three egg yolks in a bowl
2. Add to it a small cup of either cooked ground poppy seed, or poppy seed cooked in cream and well rubbed
3. Add 3 tablespoons melted butter, 3 or 4 tablespoons cream, and 1/2 small cup seedless raisins
4. Add cinnamon finely ground and vanilla to the point of a knife
5. Mix well
6. Fold in stiff snow (beaten egg whites) made from 3 egg whites

title: Jiná nádivka z máku (Another Poppyseed Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- six tablespoons sugar
- three egg yolks
- one small cup poppyseeds, cooked and finely ground or cooked in cream and well rubbed
- three tablespoons melted butter
- three or four tablespoons cream
- half a small cup seedless raisins
- cinnamon, finely ground
- vanilla
- three egg whites

## Directions

1. Rub six tablespoons of sugar with three egg yolks, add one small cup of poppyseeds (either cooked and finely ground, or cooked in cream and well rubbed), three tablespoons of melted butter, three or four tablespoons of cream, half a small cup of seedless raisins, a knife point of finely ground cinnamon and vanilla.
2. Mix well, then fold in stiff snow from three egg whites.

title: Jiné Švestkové Knedlíky (Prune Dumplings, Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- three tablespoons of butter
- three tablespoons of curd cheese
- three whole eggs
- a little salt
- one pound of flour
- milk or sour cream
- beautiful prunes
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cream three tablespoons of butter with three tablespoons of curd cheese in a bowl
2. Add three whole eggs, a little salt, one pound of flour, and as much milk or sour cream as needed for dough thicker than for small cakes
3. Work it well with a spoon, remove the dough onto a board sprinkled with flour
4. Sprinkle your fingers with flour, pinch off a piece of dough, wrap a beautiful prune in it, and continue until all dumplings are ready
5. Cook and serve as mentioned in the previous recipe
6. If the prunes are not sweet enough, serve fine sugar in a sugar bowl and a coffee spoon at the table so each person can sweeten the dumplings as they like
7. Before wrapping the prunes in dough, you can also remove the pits and put a piece of sugar in the prunes instead

title: Jiný Jablkový Paj (Apple Pie, Alternative Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- peeled tart apples
- cinnamon
- sugar
- sultanas
- wine
- lemon peel
- pie crust dough

## Directions

1. Slice the peeled tart apples into thin slices
2. Sprinkle them with cinnamon and sugar
3. Place a layer of apples in a pan lined with dough
4. Sprinkle with sultanas stewed with wine, sugar and finely chopped lemon peel
5. Then place another layer of apples
6. Cover the pie with dough and proceed as in the previous recipe

title: Jiný kokosový dort (Another Coconut Loaf Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- dough as for previous coconut cake
- red sugar
- coconut

## Directions

1. When the dough is ready as for the previous cake, take 5 tablespoons of it and place in a separate bowl.
2. Mix in red sugar to taste until the dough is evenly red.
3. Add 0.25 cup coconut and mix well.
4. Pour the white dough into a large lacy mold, then place the red dough by spoonfuls on top, about an inch apart.
5. The red dough will sink to the bottom but will leave stripes behind that give the cake a beautiful appearance when cut.
6. When the cake is done, spread frosting made from egg whites on the surface and sprinkle with coconut.

title: Jiný Smetanový Paj (Another Cream Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pastry crust
- 1 cup sweet cream
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 egg whites

## Directions

1. Make a bottom crust
2. Take 1 cup sweet cream and 1 cup sugar and mix well together
3. Take 3 egg whites, whip them well into stiff snow, and pour into the cream, mixing slightly
4. Spread onto the crust and bake
5. Pierce the crust with a fork so that small cracks do not form
6. Bake to golden color
7. No snow topping is necessary as it is rich enough on its own

title: Jiný Spůsob (Braised Truffles, Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- truffles, washed
- bacon
- bay leaf
- parsley
- thyme
- pepper
- clove
- beef broth with wine or wine alone

## Directions

1. Clean truffles with a brush and peel
2. Place in a baking dish with bacon, bay leaf, parsley, thyme, pepper, and clove on the bottom
3. Pour either strong beef broth with wine or wine alone over them
4. Cover with a lid
5. Braise for about fifteen minutes
6. Strain everything
7. Remove truffles to a plate
8. Pour over sauce that has been boiled again and is free of fat

title: Jiný Spůsob (Truffles, Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- selected truffles
- butter
- onion, finely chopped
- parsley
- pepper
- salt
- madeira
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Clean and peel the selected truffles
2. Slice into thin, small rounds
3. Place in a baking dish with butter
4. Add finely chopped onion, parsley, and pepper
5. Season with salt
6. Braise gently over moderate heat for about ten minutes
7. Add a little madeira
8. Add lemon juice
9. Season with salt and pepper
10. Serve hot with the sauce
11. Sprinkle with fried, finely broken bread roll

title: Jiný způsob (Almond Cake - Alternative Method 1)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- blanched and peeled almonds
- hard-boiled eggs
- finely ground sugar
- egg yolks
- egg whites
- lemon zest
- citron shavings cut into fine pieces

## Directions

1. Blanch and peel almonds and grate them with several hard-boiled eggs
2. Beat the sugar finely and mix with egg yolks from several eggs, keeping the whites separate
3. Beat the sugar and yolks together thoroughly
4. Add some citron zest shavings and finely cut almond pieces
5. Beat everything together for at least half an hour
6. If the paste seems thick, beat in a few more eggs
7. Make snow from the egg whites and mix into the cake dough
8. Pour into a baking form greased with butter and sprinkled with fine breadcrumbs
9. Bake slowly and very carefully, as the cake will fall with even a small shock

title: Jiný způsob (Almond Cake - Alternative Method 2)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 26 dekagrams (16 lots) ground almonds
- 28 dekagrams sugar
- 2 eggs
- 16 egg yolks
- 227 grams (13 lots) flour
- egg white snow from 10 whites
- piece of lemon zest

## Directions

1. Mix 26 dekagrams ground almonds, 28 dekagrams sugar, 2 eggs, 16 egg yolks, 227 grams flour, egg white snow from 10 whites, and a piece of lemon zest
2. Pour into a greased and flour-dusted baking form
3. Bake

title: Jiný způsob (Almond Cake - Alternative Method 3)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 14 dekagrams (8 lots) ground almonds
- 14 dekagrams sugar
- 7 dekagrams (4 lots) flour
- 8 egg yolks
- 1 egg
- egg white snow from 5 whites

## Directions

1. Mix 14 dekagrams ground almonds, 14 dekagrams sugar, 7 dekagrams flour, 8 egg yolks, 1 egg, and egg white snow from 5 whites
2. Grease a baking form with butter and dust with flour
3. Pour in the mixture
4. Bake

title: Jiný způsob (Almond Cake - Alternative Method 4)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half kilogram peeled almonds
- half kilogram finely ground sugar
- lemon zest shavings
- 16 to 20 eggs
- butter
- fine breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Peel the almonds, dry them, crush them, and sift through a fine sieve
2. Weigh half kilogram of almonds and mix with half kilogram of finely ground sugar
3. Add lemon zest shavings and mix together
4. Beat everything thoroughly
5. Slowly beat 16 to 20 eggs into the dough
6. Beat again for about an hour
7. Pour into baking forms greased with butter and dusted with fine breadcrumbs
8. Bake slowly and carefully

title: Jiný způsob (Almond Cake - Alternative Method 5)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half kilogram almonds
- sour cream
- half kilogram sugar
- 8 eggs
- 8 egg yolks
- lemon zest rubbed with sugar
- juice of one lemon
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) potato flour
- egg white snow from 8 whites

## Directions

1. Pound half kilogram almonds together with sour cream
2. Add half kilogram sugar, 8 eggs, 8 egg yolks, lemon zest rubbed with sugar, and lemon juice
3. Beat everything together for a whole hour
4. Finally add 12 dekagrams potato flour and egg white snow from 8 whites
5. Pour into a baking form greased with butter and dusted with fine breadcrumbs
6. Bake for over an hour

title: Jiný Způsob (Almond Soufflé, Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 decagrams (16 lots) almonds
- 24 decagrams butter
- 4 whole eggs
- 12 egg yolks
- egg white snow from 10 egg whites
- several handfuls grated roll
- lemon zest rubbed with sugar
- a little salt
- sugar

## Directions

1. Mix 24 decagrams (16 lots) almonds, 24 decagrams butter, 4 whole eggs, 12 egg yolks, snow made from 10 egg whites, several handfuls of grated roll, lemon zest rubbed with sugar, and a little salt
2. Bake the mixture in a mold buttered and sprinkled with grated roll
3. Sprinkle with sugar

title: Jiný způsob (Alternative Babovka II)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 500 grams flour
- 60 grams lukewarm milk
- yeast
- four eggs
- 125 grams dissolved butter
- two tablespoons crushed sugar
- small teaspoon salt
- 250 ml lukewarm milk
- 125 grams raisins

## Directions

1. Sift 500 grams of flour into a bowl
2. Make a depression in it
3. Pour 60 grams of lukewarm milk with dissolved yeast into the depression
4. Beat in four eggs, 125 grams dissolved butter, two tablespoons crushed sugar, small teaspoon salt, and 250 ml lukewarm milk
5. Mix in 125 grams of raisins
6. Work everything thoroughly
7. Place in mold
8. Let rise
9. Bake slowly at moderate heat

title: Jiný způsob (Alternative Babovka III)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- nine decagrams butter
- salt
- 4 egg yolks
- 4 decagrams 5 grams sugar
- lemon zest from one lemon
- 3 tablespoons diluted yeast
- flour
- milk
- chopped almonds
- raisins
- grated roll
- sugar and vanilla for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Rub nine decagrams of butter
2. Season with salt
3. Add 4 egg yolks, 4 decagrams 5 grams sugar, chopped lemon zest from one lemon, and 3 tablespoons diluted yeast
4. Add enough flour and milk to make a stiff dough
5. Let rise for half an hour
6. Mix in chopped almonds and raisins
7. Oil the babovka, sprinkle with grated roll, line with chopped almonds, add dough around
8. Oil it
9. When it has risen for a quarter hour, bake in oven
10. Turn out and sprinkle with sugar and vanilla

title: Jiný způsob (Alternative Babovka)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 125 grams butter
- six egg yolks
- sugar
- salt
- 500 grams fine flour
- 40 grams yeast
- finely chopped lemon zest
- raisins
- peeled and chopped almonds
- snow from six egg whites

## Directions

1. Rub 125 grams of butter until foamy
2. Mix with six egg yolks, sugar, and salt
3. Mix in 500 grams of fine flour and 40 grams of yeast
4. Slowly add finely chopped lemon zest, raisins, peeled and chopped almonds, and snow from six egg whites
5. Work the dough thoroughly
6. Let rise in babovka molds
7. Bake at moderate heat slowly for about three-quarters of an hour

title: Jiný způsob (Alternative Bublanina II)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 500 grams hard homemade bread
- one kilogram cherries
- 8 egg yolks
- 75 grams sugar

## Directions

1. Grate 500 grams of hard homemade bread
2. Place one kilogram of cherries in cold water
3. Rub 8 egg yolks with 75 grams of sugar

title: Jiný způsob (Alternative Bublanina)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 decagrams butter
- 24 decagrams beaten almonds
- 6 whole eggs
- 7 egg yolks
- snow from 7 egg whites
- cinnamon
- lemon zest
- clove
- grated roll
- sugar
- raw cherries

## Directions

1. Mix 24 decagrams of butter, 24 decagrams of beaten almonds, 6 whole eggs, 7 egg yolks, snow from 7 egg whites, cinnamon, lemon zest, clove, grated roll, and sugar to form a paste
2. Fill the mold alternately with the mixture and raw cherries
3. When baked, sprinkle with sugar

title: Jiný způsob (Alternative Currant Preserve)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe currants
- crushed sugar

## Directions

1. Pick the ripest currants, crush them and press to extract the juice
2. Add crushed sugar equal to the amount of juice
3. Mix both together until completely thickened
4. Pour into containers and seal
5. White currants make white preserve, while red currants make red preserve

title: Jiný způsob (Alternative Pike Preparation)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- pike
- beef broth
- wine
- salt
- vegetables
- pale roux
- fresh butter
- saffron
- garlic
- marjoram
- bread crumbs
- pepper
- egg

## Directions

1. Clean the pike thoroughly to remove all blood
2. Set aside one portion, place the rest on a baking dish
3. Pour beef broth mixed with wine over it, add salt and all vegetables
4. Cook until the pike becomes tender
5. Arrange on the final serving dish
6. To the cooking liquid, add pale roux, a piece of fresh butter, saffron, and let cook
7. Meanwhile, remove all bones from the remaining pike meat, chop finely, and add a bit of grated garlic, marjoram, grated bread crumbs, a piece of butter, pepper and one egg
8. Mix everything well
9. Form dumplings in hands moistened with cold water
10. Place the dumplings on a baking dish in the strained sauce and add to the pike on the serving dish

title: Jiný způsob (Alternative Raspberry Preserve)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe raspberries
- very little water
- a little currant juice
- sugar

## Directions

1. Select the ripest raspberries and crush them by hand
2. Add very little water and mix thoroughly with a whisk
3. Cook the mixture
4. Pour the cooked raspberries through a sieve, press the juice through well and strain it
5. Add a little currant juice to it
6. Cook a sufficient quantity of sugar to the sixth degree
7. Pour the juice into the sugar, cook together until completely thickened, constantly skimming off the foam
8. Pour into containers, and when cooled, seal and store in a cool room

title: Jiný způsob (Another Method - Fruit Vinegar)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- wine, vinegar or spirits barrel
- clean water
- fruit scraps and peelings
- rotten fruit

## Directions

1. Fill wine, vinegar or spirits barrels half-full with clean water and place the barrel in a warm location (in summer on the attic or storage room, in winter in a warm room or kitchen).
