7. Press one preserved sour cherry into the top of each mound
8. Brush the mounds with beaten egg yolks
9. Sprinkle with finely chopped almonds and ground sugar
10. Bake in the oven over moderate heat
11. Carefully slide onto a work surface or table when done

title: Nové brambory (New Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- young potatoes
- water
- salt
- caraway seeds
- fresh parsley

## Directions

1. Scrape the young potatoes, wash them well in cold water, place them in a pot and pour fresh water over them
2. Salt them, add caraway seeds and a piece of green parsley
3. When they are cooked, drain the water from them, remove the parsley and turn the potatoes out onto a plate
4. Let them stand uncovered for about five minutes in steam on the stove

title: Nudle cezené (Strained Noodles)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- flour
- eggs
- salt
- poppy seeds, cheese, gingerbread, or breadcrumbs for topping

## Directions

1. Place flour on board, make well in center
2. Add eggs and salt
3. Work into stiff dough that does not stick to rolling pin
4. Cut off piece, roll out, let dough dry
5. Cut into short, wide noodles
6. Throw into boiling salted water
7. Cook a short time and drain
8. Immediately butter noodles so they do not stick together
9. Sprinkle with poppy seeds, cheese, gingerbread or breadcrumbs

title: Nudle maštěné (Butter Noodles)
body:
## Ingredients

- Flour, 4 koflíky
- Eggs, 4 whole
- Salt
- Cheese, grated or breadcrumb crust
- Butter, hot

## Directions

1. Place flour on a board and make a well in the center
2. Add 4 whole eggs and mix in the flour with a knife
3. Then knead well by hand
4. Divide the kneaded dough into several pieces
5. Roll each piece thin with a roller, but not too thin
6. Place the rolled pieces on a clean cloth and let dry a little
7. Cut into thick noodles
8. Boil in salted boiling water, let cook for a while
9. Drain the water, place noodles on a dish
10. Sprinkle with grated cheese or breadcrumb crust from white bread
11. Pour hot melted butter over them

title: Nudle pečené s rajskými jablíčky, cibuli a sýrem (Baked Noodles with Tomatoes, Onions, and Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- Thick noodles
- Onions, plenty
- Butter or lard for frying
- Tomatoes
- Salt
- Garlic (optional)
- Cheese, grated or thinly sliced

## Directions

1. Make thick noodles and cook them
2. Meanwhile, fry plenty of onions in butter or lard
3. Add the drained noodles to the fried onions
4. Season with salt
5. Add tomatoes (and a little garlic if desired)
6. Mix everything well
7. Place in a clean dish
8. Top with cheese, either grated or sliced thin
9. Cover and bake in the oven for about three quarters of an hour
10. About ten minutes before it is done, uncover it in the oven so the top becomes slightly reddish
11. Serve hot at the table

title: Nudle s Cremem (Noodles with Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ordinary noodles
- one liter cream
- 14 decagrams sugar
- 10 egg yolks
- 2 tablespoons flour
- vanilla
- butter
- breadcrumbs
- sugar

## Directions

1. Make ordinary noodles, strain them, and pour cold water over them so they don't stick together
2. Mix one liter of cream, 14 decagrams of sugar, 10 egg yolks, 2 tablespoons of flour, and a little ground vanilla over heat until it thickens
3. Grease a mold with butter and sprinkle with grated breadcrumbs
4. Pour noodles into it, mix with cream, bake until golden, and sprinkle with sugar

title: Nudle s mandlemi (Noodles with Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- noodles
- fresh butter
- chopped zest from half a lemon
- 6 egg yolks
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of powdered sugar
- 3 dekagrams (2 lots) of chopped almonds
- cinnamon (optional)
- butter for pan
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Make and cook noodles
2. Let cool and drain
3. Rub fresh butter, add lemon zest and 6 egg yolks
4. Add sugar and chopped almonds
5. Optional: add cinnamon
6. Mix with noodles
7. Place on baking pan greased with butter and sprinkled with breadcrumbs
8. Bake

title: Nudle s račími ocásky (Noodles with Crayfish Tails)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- noodles
- crayfish
- butter
- eggs
- salt
- pepper
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Make and cook noodles in salted water
2. Cook crayfish and peel them
3. Carefully remove meat from tails and body
4. Crush shells in mortar, press through sieve and mix with butter to make crayfish butter
5. Beat eggs with butter, salt and pepper
6. Add to noodles
7. Put mixture in greased baking pan sprinkled with breadcrumbs in layers: noodles, crayfish tails, noodles (last layer)
8. Bake

title: Nudle s tvarohem (Noodles with Cottage Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs, 2 whole and 2 yolks
- Butter, a piece
- Sugar, 4 tablespoons
- Lemon rind, grated from half a lemon
- Cottage cheese, 1 pound good quality
- Almonds, peeled and crushed, 1 tablespoon
- Noodles, cooked from 1 whole egg and 1 yolk
- Butter for greasing
- Butter, new, in pieces
- Sugar mixed with grated almonds
- Sour cream, hot, 1/2 koflíčku
- Egg yolks, 3
- Sugar, crushed

## Directions

1. Rub 2 whole eggs and 2 yolks with a piece of butter in a bowl
2. Add 4 tablespoons sugar, grated lemon rind from half a lemon, 1 pound good cottage cheese, and 1 tablespoon of peeled and crushed almonds
3. Mix well together
4. Gently fold in cooked noodles made from 1 whole egg and 1 yolk
5. Fill a buttered mold with this mixture
6. Top with pieces of new butter
7. Sprinkle generously with sugar mixed with grated almonds
8. Bake until nicely golden
9. Beat 3 yolks with hot sour cream and a little crushed sugar
10. Pour this mixture over the noodles

title: Nudle tvarohové (Curd Cheese Noodles)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 kilogram (1/2 pound) of curd cheese
- flour or grated breadcrumbs (as much as curd will take)
- yeast (as needed)
- eggs (as needed)
- salt
- flour

## Directions

1. Mix curd cheese with flour or grated breadcrumbs
2. Add yeast, eggs as needed, salt and flour
3. Work into a stiff dough like ordinary noodles
4. Let rolled-out dough dry somewhat
5. Cut into short, wide noodles (slejžky)
6. Grease baking pan
7. Bake noodles on both sides

title: Nudle v mléce (Noodles in Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- Thick noodles
- Milk
- Salt
- Crushed nutmeg
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Make thick noodles according to the previous method
2. Boil them in boiling milk
3. Add salt and season with a little crushed nutmeg
4. Add a piece of sugar and let cook for a while
5. Pour the noodles with milk onto a dish and serve at the table

title: Nudlová polévka (Noodle Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 litres water
- a little flower
- a piece of cabbage
- a piece of celery
- a piece of butter
- a piece of pale meat broth
- mushrooms (if available)

## Directions

1. Put flower, cabbage, celery, butter, pale meat broth, and mushrooms if available into 2 litres of water
2. Bring to a boil and strain

title: Nudlová polévka (Noodle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- water
- flower (seasoning)
- cabbage
- celery
- butter
- butter (light)
- mushrooms
- noodles or flakes

## Directions

1. To two quarts of water add a little flower, a piece of cabbage, a piece of celery and a piece of butter
2. Brown with a bit of light butter if you have it, add a little mushrooms
3. Let simmer, strain and cook noodles in it
4. Let simmer a while longer, then pour the soup into a dish and serve
5. To make noodles: beat two whole eggs into half a pound of flour and make a stiff dough
6. Roll out on a board until nearly transparent and cut into noodles or flakes
7. Spread the cut noodles on the board so they do not stick together
8. Instead of noodles and flakes you can also cook grated breadcrumbs or pucks
9. For breadcrumbs make a somewhat stiffer dough, which you grate on a grater and cook in the soup
10. Pucks require moderately stiff dough, which you roll into long, finger-thick rolls by hand and then cut into small pieces (pucks)
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Nudlový Svítek (Noodle Roll)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fine noodles
- half liter milk
- 7 eggs
- 6 dekagrams sugar (4 lots)
- lemon peel rubbed with sugar

## Directions

1. Make fine noodles, cook them, then place on a sieve to dry
2. Mix half liter milk with 7 eggs, sugar, lemon peel rubbed with sugar and noodles
3. Bake the roll from this mixture and sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon

title: Nuky (Dumplings - Method 1)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- a piece of butter
- 75 grams (5 lots) of potato flour
- 1/4 liter of hot smetana (sour cream)
- 4 egg yolks
- salt
- egg whites from 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Rub butter with potato flour and hot smetana until it does not stick to the baking pan
2. Pour onto baking pan
3. Add beaten egg yolks and salt
4. Fold in snow from 4 eggs
5. Shape small dumplings
6. Cook in salted water
7. Serve in soup

title: Nuky (Dumplings - Method 2)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter
- flour
- 4 egg yolks
- 3 1/2 deciliters (1 žejdlík) of good smetana (sour cream)
- more flour as needed
- 7 1/2 deciliters (5 žejdlíků) of milk
- flour
- a piece of fresh butter
- a piece of sugar

## Directions

1. Mix butter with flour and 4 egg yolks
2. Rub together
3. Add smetana and enough flour to make a stiff dough that does not stick to the rolling pin
4. Put milk, flour, butter and sugar in a baking pan
5. When milk boils, dip a spoon in milk, take dough with it and throw into milk
6. Serve the cooked dumplings in milk

title: Nuky (Egg Dumplings)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Butter, softened and heated
- Egg yolks
- Whole eggs
- Flour

## Directions

1. To 15 decagrams of heated butter, add 6 egg yolks, one after another; after each yolk add 4 whole eggs, and after each egg add a tablespoon of flour

title: Nuky - Another Method
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- Broth, defatted
- Sour cream
- Flowers
- Salt

## Directions

1. Dilute 15 eggs in 3¾ deciliters of broth from which all fat has been removed, add a little sour cream, flowers and salt
2. Mix everything well and place the bowl in boiling water, then add the nuky to the broth

title: Nuky s crěmem (Dumplings with Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 1/2 deciliters of smetana (sour cream)
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) of powdered sugar
- a stick of vanilla
- 3 spoonfuls of flour
- 8 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Mix smetana with powdered sugar
2. Add vanilla stick
3. When smetana boils, add flour while stirring constantly
4. Mix in egg yolks
5. Stir until thickened
6. Chill
7. Shape dumplings with a spoon and add to cream

title: Nuky z krupice (Semolina Dumplings)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 deciliters (2 žejdlíků) of milk
- a piece of butter
- salt
- sugar
- semolina (amount as needed to make thick porridge)
- 7 1/2 deciliters (5 žejdlíků) of milk
- crushed nutmeg
- sugar
- 45 grams (5 lots) of butter
- salt

## Directions

1. Put milk, butter, salt and sugar on the stove
2. When it begins to boil, mix in semolina to make a thick porridge
3. Cook and let cool
4. Mix second portion of milk with crushed nutmeg, sugar, butter and salt
5. When milk boils, dip spoon in milk and cut dumplings
6. Let them heat through and serve warm in milk

title: Nuky z kyselé smetany (Sour Cream Dumplings)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1/4 liter of sour cream
- nutmeg
- 2 tablespoons of butter
- flour (as needed)

## Directions

1. Mix eggs with sour cream, nutmeg, butter and flour to make a dropping batter
2. Shape dumplings with a spoon
3. Cook in soup or water
4. Serve in soup or with cooked fruit

title: Nuky zemákové (Potato Dumplings)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 75 grams (5 lots) of butter
- 2 whole eggs
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 tablespoon of flour
- 8 tablespoons of cooled, mashed potatoes
- salt
- pepper
- nutmeg
- parsley

## Directions

1. Rub butter, add whole eggs and egg yolks, flour and mashed potatoes
2. Season with salt, pepper, nutmeg and parsley
3. Shape dumplings with a spoon
4. Cook in salted water
5. Serve in soup

title: Nut Candies (Ořechové cukrovinky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- walnut kernels
- sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Scald and peel walnut kernels
2. Grind finely
3. Add plenty of sugar and a little water
4. Prepare dough as described for spiced gingerbread candy

title: Nut Ice Cream (Oříšková zmrzlina)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Half a kilo of nut kernels
- Boiling water
- Six egg whites
- More than a liter of sour cream
- More than a kilo of finely crushed sugar

## Directions

1. Scald half a kilo of nut kernels in boiling water
2. Shell them and clean them
3. Grind with sour cream
4. Beat six egg whites
5. Cover with more than a liter of sour cream
6. Mix with the nuts and add more than a kilo of finely crushed sugar
7. Beat this mixture constantly
8. Heat several times and allow to cool
9. Strain and prepare as other ice cream

title: Nádivka (Butter and Herb Stuffing)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 48 grams butter
- salt
- flower
- one whole egg
- 2 egg yolks
- chives or parsley
- sugar
- sweet cream or milk
- grated or milk-soaked bread roll

## Directions

1. Beat butter with salt and flower
2. Add one whole egg with 2 egg yolks
3. Add chopped chives or parsley and sugar if desired
4. Add a little sweet cream or milk
5. Add enough grated or milk-soaked bread roll to form a thick paste
6. Use for stuffing veal breast or squabs

title: Nádivka (Simple Bread Stuffing)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- bread roll
- parsley
- milk
- eggs
- salt

## Directions

1. Grate the bread roll
2. Finely chop the parsley
3. Fry the grated bread roll with the chopped parsley
4. Mix with milk and eggs
5. Season with salt

title: Nádivka do Drůbeže (Poultry Stuffing)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 dekagrams mashed veal livers
- 2 sardines
- onion
- juniper berries
- pepper
- thyme
- blood
- wine

## Directions

1. Mash veal livers finely
2. Add sardines, onion, juniper berries, pepper, and thyme
3. Pound everything finely and mix
4. Add blood mixed with wine
5. Braise on warm stove
6. When fully prepared, use as stuffing for poultry

title: Nádivka do krocana (Stuffing for Turkey)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- roasted, peeled chestnuts
- cooked liver, chopped

## Directions

1. Mix roasted, peeled chestnuts with chopped cooked liver
2. Use to stuff the turkey

title: Nádivka do Krocana nebo Kapouna (Turkey or Capon Stuffing)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 bread rolls
- milk
- 2 braised onions
- 1 kilogram chopped pork
- 0.5 kilogram veal
- 6 to 8 sardines
- lemon zest
- pepper
- cloves
- nutmeg
- 2 whole eggs
- 1 egg yolk
- truffles
- red wine

## Directions

1. Remove crusts from bread rolls and soak in milk
2. Squeeze out and mix on a baking sheet until they no longer stick
3. When cooled, mix with 2 braised chopped onions
4. Add 1 kilogram chopped pork and 0.5 kilogram veal
5. Add 6 to 8 sardines, grated lemon zest, pepper, pounded cloves, and nutmeg
6. Mix with 2 whole eggs and 1 egg yolk
7. Pound everything in a mortar and press through a sieve
8. Add truffles cooked in red wine and cut into slices
9. Pour in a little red wine
10. For turkey or capon, use less meat
11. Alternatively, cook heart, stomach, and lungs of turkey with 0.5 kilogram pork or veal, add butter, 3 eggs, 6 grated bread rolls, fried mushrooms, garlic, salt, and nutmeg
12. Or chop 0.5 kilogram pork, 0.5 kilogram veal, 24 dekagrams bacon, 12 dekagrams sardines, 2 fried onions, several mushrooms, 2 bread rolls, 3 eggs, salt, nutmeg, grated Parmesan cheese, and several spoonfuls of wine, mix and press through a sieve
13. Finally add several cooked chopped chestnuts

title: Nádivka do ustřic (Oyster Stuffing)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters
- grated bread
- butter
- chopped parsley
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Remove oysters from their shells
2. Fry in grated bread with butter and chopped parsley
3. Season with pepper and salt
4. Mix well and use for stuffing oysters, capons and hens

title: Nádivka jablečná (Apple Sauce Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- water
- sugar
- vanilla, cinnamon, or lemon zest
- 1 or 2 egg whites

## Directions

1. Slice apples into small pieces
2. Put them in a pot, add a little water and a piece of sugar
3. Add either vanilla, cinnamon, or lemon zest
4. Let the apples stew until soft
5. Press them through a strainer
6. Fold in 1 or 2 egg whites beaten to stiff snow, so the filling does not run
7. You may also add raisins or chopped almonds as an addition

title: Nádivka z lískových oříšků (Hazelnut Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 egg yolks
- 6 tablespoons sugar
- piece of vanilla
- 1/2 small cup hazelnuts, coarsely ground
- a little white wine

## Directions

1. Rub 3 tablespoons of butter with 2 egg yolks in a bowl
2. Fold in 6 tablespoons of sugar pounded with a piece of vanilla
3. Add 1/2 small cup of coarsely pounded hazelnuts and a little white wine

title: Nádivka z máku (Poppyseed Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- poppyseeds
- cream
- honey or sugar to taste
- ground clove
- lemon zest
- vanilla
- finely ground almonds

## Directions

1. Pound or grind poppyseeds finely, place in a pot, pour cream over, and let cook until it becomes a thick paste, stirring frequently so the poppyseeds do not scorch.
2. Add honey or sugar to taste.
3. You can also add ground clove, lemon zest, vanilla, or finely ground almonds.

title: Nádivka z Ragoutu (Ragout Stuffing)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- poultry giblets ragout
- cooked peas
- mushrooms
- egg yolks
- bread roll
- butter
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Prepare ragout from poultry giblets - combs, stomachs, and livers
2. Mix strained cooked peas into the ragout
3. Add mushrooms and several egg yolks
4. Mix in grated bread roll browned in butter
5. Bind with sour cream and work together well

title: Nádivka z vlašských ořechů (Walnut Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 small cup sugar
- 1/2 small cup water
- 1 small cup finely pounded walnut kernels
- a little pounded vanilla or a little finely chopped lemon zest

## Directions

1. Cook 1/2 small cup of sugar with 1/2 small cup of water
2. Put it in a bowl
3. Add 1 small cup of finely pounded walnut kernels, a little pounded vanilla or a little finely chopped lemon zest
4. Mix well

title: Nádivka ze strouhaných housek (Breadcrumb Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 rolls (housky)
- good butter
- blanched almonds, chopped
- raisins
- sugar
- vanilla or cinnamon

## Directions

1. Grate 2 rolls
2. Fry the grated breadcrumbs in good butter and let them cool
3. Mix with chopped blanched almonds, raisins, and sugar either pounded with vanilla or mixed with cinnamon

title: Nákyp (Baked Custard Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 liter milk
- 3-4 spoonfuls flour
- 5 dekagrams butter
- 75 grams (5 lots) sugar
- 8 egg yolks
- lemon zest
- salt
- saffron
- 8 egg whites

## Directions

1. Mix 3-4 spoonfuls of flour and 5 dekagrams of butter into half a liter of milk
2. Mix the resulting dough on a warm place so long until it does not stick to the bowl, then place it on a platter
3. When it cools, add 75 grams (5 lots) of sugar, 8 egg yolks, lemon zest rubbed with sugar, a little salt, saffron and stiff snow from 8 egg whites
4. Pour the mixture into a greased form and bake at even heat for half an hour

title: Nákyp Chlebový (Bread Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilogram (1 pound) homemade bread, grated
- 1/4 kilogram (1/4 pound) ground sugar
- 7.5 grams (1/2 lot) new spice
- 7.5 grams cinnamon
- 7.5 grams clove
- 10 egg yolks
- wine as much as the bread absorbs
- egg white snow from 5 egg whites
- butter
- hard bread, grated
- sour cherries (optional)
- Château sauce

## Directions

1. Grate 1/2 kilogram (1 pound) homemade bread
2. Add 1/4 kilogram (1/4 pound) ground sugar, 7.5 grams (1/2 lot) new spice, 7.5 grams cinnamon, 7.5 grams clove; mix everything on a board
3. Beat 10 egg yolks with a whisk for a quarter hour
4. Slowly sprinkle the grated bread with spices into the beaten egg yolks
5. Add as much wine as the bread absorbs
6. Beat everything again for a quarter hour
7. Add snow made from 5 egg whites
8. Butter the mold and sprinkle with grated hard bread
9. Pour the mixture into the mold and bake
10. If sour cherries are ripe, the dough can be poured, then sprinkled with cherries until the mold is almost full
11. Château sauce suits this soufflé

title: Nákyp jablečný (Apple Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 peeled grated apples
- 15 grams (1 lot) butter
- 22.5 grams (1/8 lot) grated butter
- 4 egg yolks
- sugar
- lemon peel
- 45 grams (3 lots) crushed biscuit
- 4 egg whites

## Directions

1. Stew the 8 peeled grated apples with 15 grams (1 lot) of butter and let cool
2. Mix with 22.5 grams (1/8 lot) of grated butter, 4 egg yolks, a piece of sugar, lemon peel, 45 grams (3 lots) of crushed biscuit and snow from 4 egg whites
3. Grease a mold with butter, sprinkle with crushed biscuit and bake the soufflé in it or cook in steam

title: Nákyp jablečný - jiný způsob (Apple Soufflé - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- peeled apples
- water
- wine
- sugar
- cinnamon
- vanilla
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) butter
- 3 egg yolks
- 3 dekagrams (2 lots) crushed almonds
- 3 egg whites

## Directions

1. Peel and grate the apples, cook in water with wine until a mash forms, press through a sieve
2. Stew with sugar, cinnamon and vanilla; when cool, add 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter, 3 egg yolks, 3 dekagrams (2 lots) of crushed almonds and snow from 3 egg whites
3. Bake in a greased mold

title: Nákyp kroupový (Pearl Barley Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- pearl barley
- salt
- warm milk or water
- 1/2 kilogram (1 pound) smoked meat
- pepper
- nutmeg
- 4 or 5 egg yolks
- egg whites
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Rinse the middle-sized pearl barley, salt it, pour warm milk or water on it or cook it in water until soft and let it cool
2. Finely chop 1/2 kilogram (1 pound) of smoked meat and mix it in, salt and pepper it, add nutmeg, 4 or 5 egg yolks and stiff snow from egg whites, or leave the eggs whole and do not make snow
3. Mix everything, grease the form with butter or lard and bake the mixture, usually on an oblong baking sheet so it can be cut into pieces

title: Nákyp krupičkový (Farina Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 4 tablespoons farina
- salt
- 2 tablespoons fresh butter

## Directions

1. Heat 2 cups milk and when simmering, add 4 tablespoons farina
2. Let cook for about 2 minutes while stirring constantly
3. Season with salt, remove from heat, and let cool
4. Add 2 tablespoons fresh butter and beat well

title: Nákyp Krupičkový (Semolina Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- two cups milk
- four tablespoons semolina
- two tablespoons fresh butter
- three egg yolks
- two tablespoons sugar
- three egg whites
- salt
- sliced apples
- sugar and cinnamon for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Bring two cups milk to a boil and sprinkle four tablespoons semolina into it, stirring constantly for about two minutes.
2. Salt and set aside to cool.
3. Beat two tablespoons fresh butter until foamy, then rub it together with three egg yolks.
4. Add the cooled semolina mixture to this and mix in two tablespoons sugar and stiff snow made from three egg whites.
5. Grease a pudding mold with butter, line the bottom with sliced apples, sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon, and spread a layer of semolina mixture over it.
6. Add another layer of apples and cover with semolina mixture again.
7. Bake for half an hour.

title: Nákyp Lehký (Light Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- six egg yolks
- 6 tablespoons sugar
- lemon peel
- stiff snow from 6 egg whites

## Directions

1. Beat 6 egg yolks with 6 tablespoons sugar.
2. Add a piece of lemon peel and stiff snow from 6 egg whites.
3. Pour into a round bowl.
4. Bake in the oven, timing so the soufflé is ready when it is to be served at table, otherwise it will fall.
5. Place the bowl on a plate, wrap with a cloth, and bring to the table.
6. This is a very light and delicious dish, especially suitable for recovering persons.
7. Lemon juice can be added if desired.

title: Nákyp Na Způsob Chlebového Dortu (Bread Cake Style Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 18 decagrams (12 lots) almonds in shells, crushed
- 18 decagrams sugar
- 2 eggs
- 11 egg yolks
- egg white snow from 11 egg whites
- 2 tablets grated chocolate
- cinnamon
- clove
- a handful of flour
- lemon zest rubbed with sugar

## Directions

1. Mix 18 decagrams (12 lots) crushed almonds in shells, 18 decagrams sugar, 2 eggs, 11 egg yolks, snow made from 11 egg whites, 2 tablets grated chocolate, cinnamon, clove, a handful of flour, and lemon zest rubbed with sugar
2. Put everything in a buttered mold and bake the soufflé

title: Nákyp Nudlový (Noodle Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- thick, short noodles
- milk
- 3 egg yolks
- sugar
- lemon zest, chopped
- 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) sweet cream
- butter for greasing the mold
- grated bread roll for coating
- cinnamon and sugar for topping

## Directions

1. Make thick, short noodles and cook them in milk, then let them cool
2. Beat 3 egg yolks with sugar, chopped lemon zest, and mix in 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) of sweet cream
3. Grease a mold and coat it with grated bread roll
4. Mix the cream mixture with the noodles and bake in the prepared mold
5. Turn out onto a serving dish and sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar

title: Nákyp nudlový (Noodle Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- thick short noodles
- milk
- 3 egg yolks
- sugar
- lemon peel
- 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) sweet cream
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Make thick short noodles, cook them in milk and let cool
2. Beat 3 egg yolks with sugar and chopped lemon peel, fold in 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) of sweet cream
3. Mix the mixture with the noodles and bake in a mold that has been greased and sprinkled with bread crumbs
4. Turn out onto a platter

title: Nákyp rýžový (Rice Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/8 kilogram (1/4 pound) rice
- warm water
- milk
- 8-10 egg yolks
- butter
- lemon zest
- sugar
- salt
- 8-10 egg whites
- breadcrumbs
- jam

## Directions

1. Rinse 1/8 kilogram (1/4 pound) of rice, soak it in warm water, make soft porridge with milk, add 8-10 egg yolks rubbed with butter, a piece of lemon zest, sugar, snow from 8-10 egg whites, a little salt and mix everything
2. Pour into a greased form sprinkled with breadcrumbs, spread a layer of rice porridge, on it place several spoonfuls of jam as garnish, then another layer of rice porridge
3. Continue this way until the form is two fingers full; at the top there should be a layer of rice, place pieces of butter on it and bake
4. When served on the table, you can also separately add the jam that is in the rice
5. Rice pudding can be prepared in exactly the same way as millet pudding

title: Nákyp rýžový - Second Method (Rice Pudding - Second Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/8 kilogram (1/4 pound) rice
- cold water
- warm water
- milk
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) butter
- 4 or 6 egg yolks
- 6 dekagrams sugar
- vanilla
- 4 or 6 egg whites
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Pick over 1/8 kilogram (1/4 pound) of rice, pour cold water on it, which is poured off again
2. Soak in warm water for a quarter hour, pour off the water
3. Place the rice on the stove with milk to make soft porridge
4. When the porridge is thick, let it cool
5. Rub 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter with 4 or 6 egg yolks, add 6 dekagrams of sugar, a piece of vanilla and snow from 4 or 6 egg whites, mix everything and put into a form greased with butter and sprinkled with breadcrumbs, then bake it in the oven

title: Nákyp s Nakládaným Revízem (Soufflé with Pickled Currants)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) butter
- 3 egg yolks
- roll soaked in milk
- 9 dekagrams (6 lots) sugar
- cinnamon
- lemon peel rubbed with sugar
- 6-8 tablespoons preserved currants
- 1/4 liter sour cream
- snow from 5 egg whites

## Directions

1. Cream 12 dekagrams butter.
2. Add 3 egg yolks, a roll soaked in milk and wrung out, 9 dekagrams sugar, cinnamon, lemon peel rubbed with sugar, and 6-8 tablespoons preserved currants.
3. Finally add 1/4 liter sour cream and snow from 5 egg whites.
4. Bake for half an hour.

title: Nákyp se šodo (Soufflé with Chaudeau)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 25 dekagrams (1/8 pound) almonds
- 12 egg yolks
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) powdered sifted sugar
- lemon peel
- 6 egg whites
- crushed biscuit
- 0.5 liter wine
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- 6 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Grate 25 dekagrams (1/8 pound) of almonds, crush the remains in a mortar
2. Add to 12 egg yolks 12 dekagrams (8 lots) of powdered sifted sugar rubbed with lemon peel and beat until completely thick
3. Fold in the almonds with snow from 6 egg whites, beat everything and pour into a greased mold sprinkled with crushed biscuit
4. Bake the soufflé
5. Meanwhile, pour 0.5 liter of wine into a pot, place on the stove, add 12 dekagrams (8 lots) of sugar and 6 egg yolks, stir until thick
6. Turn out the soufflé and pour the chaudeau over it

title: Nákyp smetanový (Cold Cream Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 liters (3 tablespoons) very good cream
- 0.5 kilogram (1 pound) sugar
- lemon peel
- colorants: alkermes juice, violet juice, saffron
- cherry and violet leaves

## Directions

1. Mix 1.5 liters (3 tablespoons) of very good cream with 0.5 kilogram (1 pound) of sugar rubbed with lemon peel that has been grated
2. Place in a stone bowl and put on ice
3. Beat with a whisk as if making snow until completely thick
4. Decorate the tin molds in which the mixture will remain with various ornaments made with sugar colorants: red with alkermes juice, violet with juice from soaked, squeezed and sugared violets, yellow with saffron
5. Draw a pattern on the bottom of the mold with a stick or brush
6. Leave the mixture in the molds until the next day, then turn out and decorate with so-called sugar aspic or with green cherry, violet and other leaves

title: Nákyp smetanový - jiný způsob (Cream Soufflé - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 liter good cream
- 8 egg yolks
- flour
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- vanilla
- 8 egg whites

## Directions

1. Beat 1 liter of good cream until it foams
2. Fold in 8 egg yolks, flour, 12 dekagrams (8 lots) of sugar beaten with vanilla and stiff snow from 8 egg whites
3. Pour the mixture into a greased mold
4. Bake for three quarters of an hour

title: Nákyp smetanový - třetí způsob (Cream Soufflé - Third Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 9 dekagrams (6 lots) blanched crushed almonds
- 8 eggs
- 3 spoons flour
- 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) thick sour cream

## Directions

1. Mix 9 dekagrams (6 lots) of blanched crushed almonds with 8 eggs, adding one at a time, 3 spoons of flour and 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) of thick sour cream
2. Bake in a greased mold

title: Nákyp smetanový - čtvrtý způsob (Cream Soufflé - Fourth Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg yolks
- 9 dekagrams (6 lots) sugar
- lemon peel
- vanilla
- 10 spoons sour cream
- 4 spoons flour
- salt
- 6 egg whites

## Directions

1. Beat 6 egg yolks with 9 dekagrams (6 lots) of sugar, lemon peel rubbed with sugar and crushed vanilla until it foams
2. Gradually add 10 spoons of sour cream, add 4 spoons of flour and a little salt
3. Fold in snow from 6 egg whites
4. Bake the mixture in a greased mold

title: Nákyp Tapiokový (Tapioca Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- half cup tapioca
- two cups water
- one cup boiling water
- two tablespoons sugar
- butter
- apples or pineapple
- sour cream and sugar for serving

## Directions

1. Soak half a cup of tapioca overnight in two cups of water.
2. In the morning, add one cup of boiling water and let it cook for about an hour until it is cooked like cooked starch.
3. Add two tablespoons sugar.
4. Grease a pudding mold with butter, spread a layer of tapioca through the mold, place thin-sliced apples or pineapple on top, add another layer of tapioca, and continue until everything is used.
5. Bake for half an hour.
6. This pudding tastes best served cold with sour cream and sugar.

title: Nákyp Tvarohový (Curd Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) butter
- 8 egg yolks
- 9 dekagrams (6 lots) sugar
- 12 dekagrams peeled sweet almonds
- lemon peel rubbed with sugar
- a little salt
- 165 grams (11 lots) curd
- snow from 8 egg whites
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat 12 dekagrams butter.
2. Add 8 egg yolks, 9 dekagrams sugar, 12 dekagrams peeled sweet almonds, lemon peel rubbed with sugar, a little salt, and 165 grams curd.
3. Fold in snow from 8 egg whites.
4. Bake in a greased mold over moderate heat.
5. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon.

title: Nákyp Tvarohový - Second Method (Curd Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- quarter kilogram (half pound) butter
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) almonds
- 4 whole eggs
- 10 egg yolks
- grated curd
- grated roll
- sugar
- raisins
- snow from 10 egg whites
- a little salt

## Directions

1. Mix quarter kilogram butter with 12 dekagrams almonds.
2. Add 4 whole eggs and 10 egg yolks one by one.
3. After each yolk, sprinkle grated curd and grated roll, sugar.
4. Add raisins, snow from 10 egg whites, and a little salt.
5. Mix everything well and put into a mold greased with butter and sprinkled with grated roll.
6. Sprinkle the baked soufflé with sugar.

title: Nákyp z jablek (Puffed Apple Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- grated white flour
- sliced apples
- powdered sugar
- chopped almonds
- 2.5 cups flour
- 1 cup sugar
- 4 eggs
- lemon or vanilla flavoring

## Directions

1. Butter a mold and line it with grated white flour
2. Layer it with sliced apples
3. Sprinkle them with powdered sugar and finely chopped almonds
4. Continue layering apples and sprinkling until the mold is half full
5. Measure 2.5 cups flour and 1 cup sugar
6. Beat 4 eggs on a dish and beat them with the sugar for half an hour
7. Gently mix in the flour
8. Add lemon or vanilla flavoring
9. Pour over the apples and bake slowly for one hour

title: Nákyp z Kapání (Batter Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 1 tablespoon water
- 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) butter
- 8 egg yolks
- 4 whole eggs
- egg white snow from 8 egg whites
- lemon zest
- sugar

## Directions

1. Make thick batter from 6 eggs, 1 tablespoon water, and 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream
2. Add 12 decagrams (8 lots) butter and beat so long that all the butter is incorporated into the batter, then let it cool
3. Beat again with 8 egg yolks, 4 whole eggs, snow made from 8 egg whites, lemon zest, and sufficient sugar
4. Put a layer of batter in a buttered mold, alternating with stewed cherries, until the mold is almost full
5. Bake and sprinkle with sugar

title: Nákyp z krupice (Semolina Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 3.5 deciliters good children's semolina
- hot milk
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) butter
- 6 egg yolks
- ground sugar
- finely chopped lemon zest
- vanilla or cinnamon
- 6 egg whites
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Cook 3.5 deciliters of good children's semolina in hot milk to make a thick porridge and let it cool
2. On a separate platter, rub 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter, 6 egg yolks, a piece of ground sugar, a small piece of finely chopped lemon zest, a piece of ground vanilla or cinnamon, and make snow from 6 egg whites
3. Add the porridge, mix everything well, grease the form with butter, sprinkle with breadcrumbs and bake the mixture in the oven

title: Nákyp z kukuřičné škrobové mouky (Corn Starch Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup of milk
- two tablespoons of water
- one and a half tablespoons of corn starch flour
- salt
- one egg white
- one quart of milk for the sauce
- one tablespoon of cold milk
- one egg yolk
- three tablespoons of sugar
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Bring one cup of milk to a boil
2. Mix two tablespoons of water with one and a half tablespoons of corn starch flour
3. Add a little salt and mix well
4. Pour into the boiling milk
5. Stir well and when it thickens, remove from heat
6. While the milk is cooking, beat one egg white into stiff snow
7. When the pudding is removed from heat, fold in the snow
8. Pour into small cups to cool
9. For the sauce: bring one quart of milk to a boil
10. In a cup, mix one tablespoon of cold milk, one egg yolk, and three tablespoons of sugar
11. Pour this into the boiling milk and stir so it does not scorch
12. It will thicken immediately; remove from heat
13. Add a few drops of vanilla
14. Chill the sauce
15. When serving, turn the pudding out of the cups onto plates and pour the sauce over it

title: Nákyp z malin (Raspberry Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 dekagrams (16 lots) almonds
- 8 egg yolks
- 24 dekagrams powdered sugar
- lemon oil
- 1/5 kilogram grated cooked potatoes
- 8 egg whites
- 1 liter cream
- 9 dekagrams (6 lots) sugar
- 1/8 liter preserved raspberries
- 15 grams (1 lot) dissolved gelatin
- fresh raspberries

## Directions

1. Blanch and peel the almonds, dry them, crush them, and mix them with 8 egg yolks, 24 dekagrams of powdered sugar, lemon oil and 1/5 kilogram of grated cooked potatoes
2. Beat for 1.5 hours, slowly fold in snow from 8 egg whites
3. Bake two cakes of finger thickness
4. When cooled, place one cake in a soufflé mold, brush with raspberry juice and a mixture of 1 liter cream, 9 dekagrams (6 lots) sugar, 1/8 liter preserved raspberries and 15 grams (1 lot) dissolved gelatin
5. Place half the mixture on the bottom cake, brush the top with the other half and cover with the bottom cake
6. Place in a cold spot, decorate with fresh raspberries and a lattice of cream

title: Nákyp z malin - jiný způsob (Raspberry Soufflé - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 liters ripe raspberries
- 12 egg whites
- 375 grams (25 lots) powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Press the ripe raspberries through a sieve
2. Fold in snow from 12 egg whites and 375 grams (25 lots) of powdered sugar
3. Fill a mold with the mixture, sprinkle with sugar
4. Bake in moderate heat for half an hour

title: Nákyp z malin - třetí způsob (Raspberry Soufflé - Third Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 18 dekagrams (12 lots) sugar
- 9 egg yolks
- 9 dekagrams (6 lots) peeled crushed almonds
- 9 egg whites
- 6 dekagrams (5 lots) flour
- raspberries, sugared

## Directions

1. Mix sugar with 9 egg yolks and 9 dekagrams (6 lots) of peeled crushed almonds, snow from 9 egg whites, until it foams, and 6 dekagrams (5 lots) of flour
2. Pour half the mixture into a greased mold, add a layer of sugared raspberries, then the rest of the mixture
3. Bake for 2/3 hour

title: Nákyp z Mrkve (Carrot Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- several carrots
- salt
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) grated carrot
- 6 egg yolks
- 6 dekagrams beaten sugar
- 2 grated bread rolls
- a little new spice
- nutmeg
- a little fennel if desired
- 6 egg whites
- tallow for greasing
- grated bread roll for coating

## Directions

1. Scrape, wash, and grate several carrots, salt lightly
2. Add 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of grated carrot, 6 egg yolks, 6 dekagrams of beaten sugar, 2 grated bread rolls, a little new spice, nutmeg, and optionally a little fennel
3. Place the mixture in a bowl that sits in hot water, renewing the water as it cools
4. Stir the mixture for half an hour
5. Grease the mold with tallow and coat with grated bread roll
6. Pour the mixture into the mold and bake in the oven
7. Sprinkle with sugar when serving; since it usually turns out poorly, wrap the mold with a cloth and serve in the mold

title: Nákyp z míšeňských jablek (Meissen Apple Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Meissen apples
- 8 egg whites
- sugar
- vanilla
- egg yolk

## Directions

1. Peel the Meissen apples, remove the seeds and stems, arrange them on a platter in the shape of a pine cone
2. Make stiff snow from 8 egg whites, beat sugar with vanilla; for each egg yolk calculate one spoon of sugar, which is slowly folded into the snow
3. Brush the apples thickly with the snow, place them on a plate in the oven and bake
4. Sprinkle with sugar mixed with vanilla or sugar mixed with cinnamon

title: Nákyp z Pálené Kávy (Burned Coffee Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) coffee
- 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) cream
- 3 bread rolls, peeled and sliced
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) butter
- 7 egg yolks
- 1 whole egg
- 2 egg whites
- a little vanilla
- bread roll crust for coating
- puff pastry

## Directions

1. Cook 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of coffee in 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) of cream
2. When settled, pour onto 3 peeled, sliced bread rolls and cook until it becomes a thick paste, stirring continuously
3. Add 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter, 7 egg yolks, 1 whole egg, and a little vanilla
4. Beat 2 egg whites into stiff snow and fold in
5. Beat all together
6. Grease a mold and coat with bread roll crust
7. Place a puff pastry lattice in the mold
8. Pour the prepared paste into the mold
9. Bake the soufflé and sprinkle with sugar

title: Nákyp z vajec do polévky (Egg Dumpling for Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- sour cream or milk
- 2 tablespoons flour
- salt
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Mix two eggs with sour cream or milk, two tablespoons flour, salt and chopped parsley
2. Slowly pour the mixture into the soup and bring to a boil

title: Nákyp z vajec do polévky (Egg Puff for Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- Sour cream or milk
- 2 tablespoons flour
- Salt
- Parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Mix 2 eggs with sour cream or milk, 2 tablespoons of flour, salt, and chopped parsley.
2. Slowly pour the mixture into the soup and cook.
3. Use 2 eggs per liter of soup.

title: Nákyp z vařeného citronu (Cooked Lemon Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- large lemon
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- 8 egg yolks
- 8 egg whites
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Boil a large lemon for one hour, drain the water and boil again in fresh water for one hour
2. Divide the lemon into quarters, remove the seeds and crush it in a mortar
3. Mix the crushed lemon with 12 dekagrams (8 lots) of sugar and 8 egg yolks, beat for a quarter hour
4. Fold in snow from 8 egg whites
5. Pour the mixture into a greased mold sprinkled with bread crumbs
6. Cook in steam, sprinkle with sugar before serving

title: Nákyp Ze Smažených Housek (Fried Roll Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 rolls
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) butter
- 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream
- 4 eggs
- 8 egg yolks
- egg white snow from 8 egg whites
- chopped almonds
- raisins
- sugar
- cinnamon
- clove
- 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) hot wine

## Directions

1. Fry 5 rolls until brown and grate them
2. Fry in 12 decagrams (8 lots) butter, add 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream to make a thick porridge
3. When cooled, add 4 eggs, 8 egg yolks, snow made from 8 egg whites, chopped almonds, raisins, sugar, cinnamon, and clove
4. Mix everything and bake
5. Pour 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) hot wine over it and let it stay in the oven a while until the wine soaks in

title: Nákyp ze strouhanky (Noodle Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- milk
- noodles
- 75 grams (5 lots) butter
- 3 dekagrams (2 lots) sugar
- 5 egg yolks
- lemon zest
- 5 egg whites
- sugar for topping
- sauce or preserved fruit

## Directions

1. Make a stiff dough from 4 eggs, work it well, grate it on a grater
2. Place the noodles on the stove, and when they boil, add the grated noodles to them and let cool
3. Rub 75 grams (5 lots) of butter, 3 dekagrams (2 lots) of sugar and 5 egg yolks with lemon zest, make stiff snow from 5 egg whites, slowly add it to everything, grease the form with butter, put the mixture into it and bake slowly in the oven
4. Turn out the pudding and sprinkle with sugar, add sauce, crème or preserved fruit to it

title: Nákyp Ze Strouhané Housky (Grated Roll Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 decagrams (16 lots) butter
- 6 decagrams (4 lots) ground almonds
- 4 eggs
- 8 egg yolks
- egg white snow from 8 egg whites
- sugar
- lemon zest
- grated roll, sprinkled with cream
- 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream with vanilla and cinnamon

## Directions

1. Mix 24 decagrams (16 lots) butter, 6 decagrams (4 lots) ground almonds, 4 eggs, 8 egg yolks, snow made from 8 egg whites, sugar, and lemon zest
2. After each egg, add a handful of grated roll sprinkled with cream
3. Bake in a buttered mold
4. When the soufflé is done, pour 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream with vanilla and cinnamon over it

title: Nákyp Ze Strouhaného Těsta (Grated Dough Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 egg yolks and 2 whole eggs
- flour
- 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream
- 4 eggs
- 8 egg yolks
- egg white snow from egg whites
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) butter
- sugar
- lemon zest rubbed with sugar

## Directions

1. Make stiff dough from 2 egg yolks and 2 whole eggs with flour
2. Grate the dough
3. Boil the grated dough with 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream; when it cools, add 4 eggs, 8 egg yolks, snow made from egg whites, 12 decagrams (8 lots) butter, sugar, and lemon zest rubbed with sugar
4. Mix everything well and bake in a buttered mold
5. This soufflé can be filled with stewed cherries

title: Nákyp Ze Strouhaného Těsta (Grated Dough Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- flour
- 2 eggs
- milk
- piece of vanilla
- sugar as needed
- 45 grams (3 lots) almonds
- 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) sweet cream
- 4 or 5 egg yolks
- hard roll, grated

## Directions

1. Put some flour on a board, make a hollow in the middle, crack 2 eggs into it
2. Mix with a knife and work well to form stiff dough for grating
3. Grate on a grater
4. Meanwhile boil milk with a piece of vanilla and sugar as needed to make it very sweet
5. Cook the grated dough in this milk until a thick porridge forms; let it cool
6. Blanch 45 grams (3 lots) almonds, peel them, and chop not too finely
7. Add 3.5 deciliters (1 tablespoon) sweet cream and 4 or 5 egg yolks; mix everything
8. Put in a buttered mold sprinkled with grated hard roll
9. Bake in the oven

title: Nákyp ze strouhaného těsta (Pudding from Grated Dough)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 egg yolks
- 2 whole eggs
- flour
- 7 deciliters (2 quarts) sour cream
- 4 eggs
- 8 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Make a stiff dough from 2 egg yolks and 2 whole eggs with flour, grate it and cook with 7 deciliters (2 quarts) of sour cream
2. When it cools, add 4 eggs and 8 egg yolks

title: Nákyp Ze Sucharů (Rusk and Apple Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- about ten juicy apples
- sugar
- cinnamon, ground
- lemon zest, grated
- butter
- rusks
- cream
- 1 to 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Peel about ten juicy apples, cut them into fine slices
2. Sprinkle with sugar, ground cinnamon, and grated lemon zest
3. Put half of the prepared apples in a mold buttered and oiled
4. Cover with a layer of rusks arranged so tightly together that no apple is visible
5. Arrange the second half of the prepared apples on the rusks and cover with rusks again
6. Put sufficient butter between the rusks and apples
7. Pour cream sweetened with sugar into which 2 or 3 beaten eggs have been mixed over everything
8. Bake at moderate heat slowly for about three quarters of an hour until done and serve to the table

title: Nákyp ze Špenátu (Spinach Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- spinach
- salt
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) butter
- 3 whole eggs
- 3 raw egg yolks
- a little flour
- marjoram
- 2 cloves garlic, rubbed with salt
- half a chopped onion
- 4 grated hard egg yolks
- grated fried bread roll

## Directions

1. Wash spinach, salt it, and cook in a pot until soft
2. Strain the water, rinse spinach with cold water, and press through a sieve
3. Beat 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter and add 3 whole eggs and 3 raw egg yolks
4. Add a little flour, salt, marjoram, 2 cloves of garlic rubbed with salt, half a chopped onion, and 4 grated hard egg yolks
5. Mix everything with grated fried bread roll into the spinach and stir well
6. Put into a greased mold coated with grated bread roll
7. Bake for half an hour

title: Nákyp švestkový (Plum Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe plums
- wine
- sugar
- butter
- 5 egg yolks
- lemon peel
- cinnamon
- 3 egg whites
- 2 spoons crushed rusks

## Directions

1. Blanch and peel the ripe plums, halve them, remove the pits and stew them in wine with sugar until almost soft
2. Beat butter, add 5 egg yolks, sugar, lemon peel rubbed with sugar, a little cinnamon and snow from 3 egg whites
3. Add the plums with 2 spoons of crushed rusks to the mixture
4. Bake in a greased mold

title: Nápodobená želví polévka (Mock Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- malá telecí hlavička
- studená voda
- tři kvarty silné čisté hovězí polévky
- dvě sklenky madeirského vína
- paprika
- svazeček zelené petružele
- několik zrnek pepře
- nové koření
- dva hřebíčky
- kousek květu
- citron

## Directions

1. Z malé telecí hlavičky okrájej maso
2. Nech ho ve studené vodě hodinu močit
3. Pak uvař
4. Sceď a tuk odstraň
5. Maso do sucha vymačkej
6. Nech vychladnouti
7. Pak na kostky rozkrájej
8. Rozkrájené maso dej do hrnku s třemi kvarty silné čisté hovězí polévky
9. Přidej dvě sklenky madeirského vína
10. Přidej špetku papriky
11. Přidej svazeček zelené petružele
12. Přidej v plátěném pytlíčku několik zrnek pepře, nového koření, dva hřebíčky a kousek květu
13. Nech půl hodiny vařit
14. Petružel a koření vyndej
15. Polévku vlej na mísu na tenké řízky citronu
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Nápodobená želví polévka (Mock Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- small calf's head
- two tablespoons of butter
- one tablespoon of flour
- two quarts of broth from the head
- fresh or preserved mushrooms, cut
- cloves
- allspice
- paprika
- a bunch of green parsley
- two hard-boiled eggs
- half a lemon, cut into pieces

## Directions

1. Cook a small calf's head
2. When cooked, remove the head and take off the meat, cut it and strain the broth from it and strain it
3. Make a roux from two tablespoons of butter and one tablespoon of flour and when it browns, pour two quarts of the broth from the head into it
4. Cook for five minutes and then add the meat cut earlier and cut fresh or preserved mushrooms
5. Add a pinch of cloves and allspice, a pinch of paprika and a bunch of green parsley
6. Cook for another five minutes
7. Then add two hard-boiled eggs cut up and half a lemon cut into pieces

title: Nápoj oranžový (Orange Drink)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- čtyry hodné červené oranže
- víno
- šampaňské
- cukr

## Directions

1. Vezmou se čtyry hodné červené oranže
2. Oloupají se velmi tence
3. Poleji se dostatečně vínem
4. V kterém se aspoň půl dne přikryté nechávají ležeti
5. Vše se procedí
6. Přidají se dvě láhve dobrého vína
7. Přidá se trochu šampaňského
8. Dle chuti se osladí a promíchá
9. Do sklenic se nalévá

title: Nápoj z Rýže pro Nemocné (Rice Drink for the Ill)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- water
- salt
- sugar
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Pick through and wash the rice
2. Pour hot water over it
3. Boil in water for 2 hours
4. Strain the liquid
5. Season with salt
6. Sweeten with sugar
7. Add lemon juice for sourness

title: Nápoj ženců (Harvest Drink)
body:
## Ingredients

- cold water
- sifted ginger
- sugar
- vinegar

## Directions

1. To a quart of cold water, add one tablespoon of sifted ginger, three tablespoons of sugar and one cup of vinegar
2. This drink is very pleasant and healthy, especially for those who work in the fields in summer

title: Německé koláče (German Cakes)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 decagrams (16 lots) butter
- Flour (added by the spoonful)
- 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) sweet sour cream
- 8 egg yolks
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) ground sugar
- 5 tablespoons yeast (leavening)
- Lemon zest, finely chopped
- Salt
- A little flower essence

## Directions

1. Beat the butter, add flour by the spoonful
2. In sweet sour cream, beat 8 egg yolks with 12 decagrams ground sugar
3. Add this mixture bit by bit to the butter, finally add 5 tablespoons yeast (leavening)
4. Beat the dough until bubbles appear
5. Add finely chopped lemon zest, salt and a little flower essence
6. When risen, make large thin cakes, brush with something and bake

title: Obalené jahody (Coated Strawberries)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- best and largest strawberries
- egg white
- powdered sugar
- thick cooked sugar

## Directions

1. Select the best and largest strawberries and dry them.
2. Place them on a small baking pan, add egg white and coat them by constant stirring.
3. Sprinkle finely powdered sugar, pour with thick cooked sugar — roll them in this syrup, place them on sieves and let them dry.

title: Obalené maliny (Coated Raspberries)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fully ripe, selected raspberries
- egg white
- powdered sugar
- cooked sugar

## Directions

1. Fully ripe, selected raspberries must be dried a bit.
2. Place them on a small baking pan and pour beaten egg white over them, in which they coat completely.
3. Then roll them several times in powdered sugar, dip in cooked sugar and coat again several times in sugar powder until finally they are placed on sieves and left to dry.

title: Obalený revíz (Coated Currants)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- beautiful currant clusters
- egg white
- crushed almonds
- sugar

## Directions

1. Select the most beautiful currant clusters and dry them
2. Place them on a baking sheet and mix with beaten egg white
3. Coat them multiple times in crushed almonds
4. Then coat them multiple times in thick, well-cooked sugar
5. Place on a sieve on warm stove to dry thoroughly

title: Obalený revíz (Coated Gooseberries)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- most beautiful gooseberry clusters
- egg white
- powdered sugar
- thick cooked sugar

## Directions

1. Select the most beautiful gooseberry clusters and dry them.
2. Place them on a small baking pan and mix with beaten egg white, then coat them several times in powdered sugar — then place in thick cooked sugar, put them on a sieve on warm stove to dry well.

title: Obalované salsify (Breaded Salsify)
body:
## Ingredients

- salsify roots
- flour
- salt
- butter
- water
- two egg whites
- fried parsley

## Directions

1. Scrape the roots, cut lengthwise and cook as in the previous recipe
2. When cooked, dry with a cloth and coat each piece in batter prepared as follows: Take six spoons of flour, a little salt, one spoon of hot butter and water as needed to make the batter just thick enough for coating, but not too thin
3. Add two beaten egg whites to this
4. Dip the pieces in the batter, fry on both sides and serve with fried parsley

title: Obloučky (Almond Crescents)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons fresh butter
- 2 cups flour
- 1/2 cup sugar
- a pinch of salt
- zest of 1/2 lemon, finely grated
- a pinch of flower
- 4 egg yolks
- 1 glass rum
- 1 whole egg (if needed)
- 1/4 pound almonds, finely chopped and mixed with crushed sugar
- 1/4 pound crushed sugar for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Crumble 4 tablespoons fresh butter on a board with 2 cups flour
2. Add 1/2 cup sugar, a pinch of salt, finely grated zest from 1/2 lemon, and a pinch of flower
3. Make a well in the center
4. Mix in 4 egg yolks and 1 glass rum; if dough is too stiff, add 1 whole egg
5. Roll out thin, fold like puff pastry, roll out again and fold again
6. When rolled out for the third time, cut into strips two fingers wide and six fingers long
7. Brush with beaten snow from the 4 egg yolks
8. Sprinkle with finely chopped almonds mixed with crushed sugar
9. Place on crescent-shaped molds and bake until golden
10. Equal quantities of almonds and sugar for sprinkling should be 1/4 pound each
11. You can use good milk instead of rum

title: Obyčejná bramborová polévka (Potato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- water
- salt
- celery
- carrot
- parsley
- 1 onion
- rice or groats (1/4 pound for 6-8 people)
- butter
- pepper
- ginger
- fresh or dried mushrooms

## Directions

1. Peel and wash as many potatoes as needed for the soup
2. Pour on water so they are covered twice over
3. Add salt, a piece of celery, carrot, parsley, and 1 onion
4. Let cook; when potatoes are half cooked, add a little cleaned and rinsed rice or groats (1/4 pound for 6-8 people)
5. Let finish cooking
6. Make a roux with butter, season with pepper and ginger
7. Serve on the table
8. If desired, you may also let a little fresh or dried mushrooms cook in the soup
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Obyčejná hovězí pečené (Roast Beef, Bohemian Style)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef chuck
- salt
- ginger
- garlic cloves
- onions
- cloves
- bay leaves
- carrot
- water
- potatoes
- parsley

## Directions

1. Clean and salt a piece of beef chuck thoroughly
2. Pierce the entire piece with ginger and several cloves of garlic
3. Place on a roasting pan or baking sheet, add several smaller onions cut in half with a clove pierced through each, several bay leaves, and one small cut carrot
4. Pour in some water, using more than for other roasts
5. Roast for three to four hours, frequently turning and basting with the pan juices
6. If the gravy dries out, add more water or unsalted broth
7. When the meat is tender, place on a serving dish surrounded by boiled and peeled potatoes
8. Strain the gravy over the meat and serve

title: Obyčejná hovězí polévka (Ordinary Beef Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds beef
- three to four quarts water
- one tablespoon salt
- small parsley root
- small carrot
- piece of celery
- one onion
- piece of liver

## Directions

1. Clean everything well. Put bones in cold water, place over fire, and when water is hot, add the meat and piece of liver.
2. Let simmer slowly, skim the foam, salt the soup.
3. When meat is tender, strain the soup through fine sieve into a pot, in which you will thicken it.
4. The soup may also be thickened when the meat is half cooked by adding cleaned groats, torn groats, wheat groats, rice or sago, as preferred, and let them cook in the soup with the meat.
5. For 6 to 8 persons, one quarter pound of any thickening agent suffices, and half an hour is enough to cook it, except groats, which are cooked in fifteen minutes.
6. The weight of meat and quantity of water, vegetables and thickening agent should be adjusted according to the number of persons.
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Obyčejná krupová polévka (Barley Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a coffee cup of small pearl barley
- one coffee cup of hot water
- one spoon of butter
- salt
- fresh parsley
- chives
- hot beef broth

## Directions

1. Take half a coffee cup of small pearl barley, clean it well in twice-heated water, pour one coffee cup of hot water over it, add one spoon of butter and a little salt and cook for 1½ hours; be careful that it does not burn, and as needed, as it cooks down, add more hot water.
2. When cooked, put it in a soup bowl, add a little fresh parsley and chives and pour hot beef broth over it.

title: Obyčejná polévka z ústřic (Oyster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- water
- butter
- oyster juice
- salt
- pepper
- oysters
- crackers

## Directions

1. Let a quart of milk, half a cup of water, half a pound of butter and the juice from one pint of oysters boil, salt and pepper to taste
2. Add the oysters and a little finely rolled crackers to thicken and let it simmer several more minutes
3. With this soup serve small crackers on a separate dish (Serves 6 people)
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Obyčejná rybí polévka (Fish Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- carp innards
- parsley cut into thin strips
- carrot
- celery
- a small piece of ginger
- water
- salt
- white roux
- flowers (spice)
- fried bread cubes

## Directions

1. Take the innards from carp, carefully remove the bile so it does not break, also remove the fatty intestine
2. clean the innards thoroughly and keep aside until needed
3. put parsley cut into thin strips, carrot, celery and a small piece of ginger in a pot
4. pour water on it, salt it and let it boil
5. when the vegetables are sufficiently cooked, strain
6. thicken the soup with white roux
7. add the carp innards to it
8. season with a little flowers and let it simmer nicely
9. pour the soup into a bowl over finely chopped and fried bread cubes, or you can also use bread cut into cubes and fried
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Obyčejné moučné knedlíky (Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- two eggs
- one and one half cups of milk
- one small teaspoon of butter
- salt
- flour
- two slices of bread
- butter for frying

## Directions

1. Beat two eggs in a deep bowl; add one and one half cups of milk and one small teaspoon of butter, salt and enough flour to make a dough that can be beaten well with a spoon or beater
2. Beat for five minutes or longer until the dough is smooth and let stand half an hour
3. In the meantime, fry two slices of bread cut into small cubes in heated butter until golden, allow to cool and add to the dumpling dough
4. Dust your hands with flour, form dumplings the size of a small apple, shape with your hands, place in boiling water, cover well and allow to cook for 10 minutes
5. Remove them, split with a fork and serve with cabbage and pork

title: Ocet fialkový (Violet Vinegar)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- two handfuls of freshly picked violets
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Remove the calyxes from two handfuls of freshly picked violets, pour boiled and cooled vinegar over them and let stand for 24 hours, then strain the vinegar, pour into small bottles and serve with fish prepared in court-bouillon or with salad.
2. Alternatively, the violets can be exposed to the sun with fresh vinegar for 14 days.

title: Ocet třešňový (Cherry Vinegar)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 liters of ripe, sour cherries
- 1.5 liters of wine vinegar
- sugar equal in weight to the vinegar

## Directions

1. Crush 3 liters of ripe, sour cherries in a mortar and pour 1.5 liters of wine vinegar over them, let it stand in a cool place for 8 days, stirring daily, then push through cloth.
2. Add sugar equal in weight to the vinegar, boil the vinegar, removing the foam as it forms, and when it cools, pour into bottles and seal.
3. When mixed with water, it can be used for preparing lemonade.

title: Ocukrované oříšky (Sugared Nuts)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- tragacanth flour
- finely crushed and sifted nuts
- sufficient quantity of sugar

## Directions

1. Mix tragacanth flour with finely crushed nuts passed through a sieve
2. Add sufficient quantity of sugar
3. Work everything together
4. Shape small balls from the dough
5. Let them dry and coat with sugar as for almonds

title: Ocukrovatělá čokoláda (Sugared Chocolate)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- chocolate, grated
- finely crushed moist tragacanth flour
- fine sugar

## Directions

1. Grate chocolate and mix with finely crushed moistened tragacanth flour into a dough
2. Add fine sugar
3. Shape into any desired forms and molds
4. When completely dry, sugar as described for almonds

title: Ohnivé Víno (Fire Wine)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 4 egg yolks
- 2 liters of ordinary wine
- 20-26 dekagrams of sugar
- A little ground cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat 4 eggs and 4 egg yolks until frothy.
2. Add to them 2 liters of ordinary wine and 20-26 dekagrams of sugar, a little ground cinnamon, and heat everything with constant stirring on warm stoves until it rises.

title: Okoun pečený neb roštěný (Broiled Perch)
body:
## Ingredients

- perch
- salt
- pepper
- fresh butter

## Directions

1. Scale the perch, clean it and wash it, salt it, sprinkle with pepper and let it lie for a quarter hour.
2. Brush it with good fresh butter and bake on a grill or in a roasting pan on both sides until yellowish.
3. Arrange the perch on a dish and sprinkle with lemon juice.

title: Okruží (Organ Meats Stew)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- calf or sheep larynx, lungs, heart, spleen and liver
- salt
- cloves
- onion
- pepper
- new spices
- bay leaf
- root vegetables
- thyme
- flour
- butter for roux
- egg yolks
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Pour hot water over the organs several times and rinse in cold water
2. Season with salt and keep in water
3. Cut into pieces and cook with salt, cloves, onion, pepper, new spices, bay leaf, root vegetables and thyme, removing scum
4. After 3 hours add a roux, strain the sauce and mix in egg yolks beaten with sour cream

title: Okruží s omáčkou (Organ Meats with Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- organ meats
- salted water
- root vegetables
- flour
- butter
- parsley
- good broth
- wine
- lemon juice
- nutmeg
- sour cream
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook cleaned organ meats in salted water with root vegetables
2. Make a roux with flour and butter, add fried parsley, good broth and wine
3. Cut the organ meats, add lemon juice, nutmeg and egg yolks beaten with sour cream

title: Okurková Polévka (Cucumber Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- good beef broth
- salt
- nutmeg
- 2 egg yolks
- fried roll

## Directions

1. Peel and grate the cucumbers
2. Braise in butter
3. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons flour
4. Pour in good beef broth
5. Simmer for 2 hours
6. Strain
7. Season with salt and nutmeg
8. Add 2 egg yolks
9. Pour over fried roll

title: Olives (Olives)
body:
## Ingredients

- olives
- salted water
- ice

## Directions

1. Rinse the olives well in salted water and arrange on a dish on finely crushed ice. Besides ordinary olives, one can use olives with the pits removed, olives filled with anchovy paste, or black Italian olives
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Olivy (Olives)
body:
## Ingredients

- Olives
- Salt water
- Ice

## Directions

1. Rinse the olives well in salt water
2. Arrange on a dish on finely crushed ice
3. Can use olives with pits removed, olives filled with anchovy paste, or black Italian olives
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Oloupané broskve a meruňky (Peeled Peaches and Apricots)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Nearly ripe peaches or apricots
- Water
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Select nearly ripe peaches or apricots, halve them and peel them.
2. Boil them with a little water and cover them to let sit for a while until the water becomes only lukewarm.
3. Remove them and place in fresh water.
4. After about a quarter hour, remove them, place on a sieve to dry, spread on a dish, pour boiled sugar over them, cover with paper and let sit quietly.
5. On the second day, drain the sugar, boil it thick, add the peaches to it, boil everything gently.
6. On the third day, drain the sugar again and boil it until the sixth degree, add the peaches to it and boil everything again; skim off the foam that appears, and when everything cools, place in containers.

title: Oloupané meruňky (Peeled Apricots)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Yellow but still firm apricots
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Select yellow but still firm apricots, carefully remove the pit, peel completely, and proceed as described in the previous method.

title: Omeletka ještě na jiný způsob (Omelette, Yet Another Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- Several whole eggs
- Flour
- Salt
- Milk
- Clarified butter
- Powdered sugar
- Ground cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat several whole eggs
2. Add as many spoonfuls of flour as there are eggs
3. Salt lightly and thin with a little milk so it is like thick batter
4. Beat well
5. Heat a little clarified butter in a small pan and pour in some of the batter
6. Let it turn golden on the bottom then turn it over
7. Cover the pan and cook on the other side
8. Remove the omelette from the pan
9. Pour a little more melted butter in the pan and repeat until all batter is used
10. Sprinkle the omelettes with powdered sugar and ground cinnamon
11. Fold them up, sprinkle with sugar again and arrange on a plate

title: Omeletka s uzeuým špekem (Omelette with Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- bacon, cut into small cubes
- water
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Cut bacon into small cubes and parboil it first in boiling water
2. Then fry it in a pan and drain the fat
3. Prepare a simple omelette and when it is slightly dry on top, place the fried bacon in the middle
4. Fold the omelette in half and ensure the edges are well sealed
5. Turn it out onto a plate and garnish with green parsley

title: Omeletka s uzeuým špekem (Omelette with Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Bacon
- Water
- Butter

## Directions

1. Cut bacon into small pieces
2. Parboil in boiling water
3. Brown in a saucepan and drain off the fat

title: Omeletka se šunkou (Omelette with Ham)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- chopped or finely diced ham
- chopped and fried onion
- salt
- pepper
- smetana (sour cream), optional
- chopped fresh parsley or chives
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Beat eggs with a bit of chopped or finely diced ham, a bit of chopped and fried onion, salt, pepper, and if desired sour cream and a bit of chopped fresh parsley or chives
2. Cook the omelette in butter or lard in the usual way
3. Serve it alone, or arrange it around spinach or other vegetables

title: Omeletka se šunkou (Omelette with Ham)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- Chopped or finely sliced ham
- Sliced onion
- Salt
- Pepper
- Sour cream
- Fresh parsley or chives
- Butter or lard

## Directions

1. Beat eggs with some chopped or finely sliced ham
2. Add some sliced onion that has been cooked in fat
3. Add salt, pepper and sour cream if desired
4. Add some chopped fresh parsley or chives
5. Cook the omelette in butter or lard in the usual way
6. Serve alone or surround with spinach or other vegetables

title: Omeletky bramborové (Potato Omelette)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons butter
- 2 larger potatoes, previously boiled, peeled, cooled and grated
- 2 tablespoons peeled grated almonds
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 12 egg yolks
- salt
- 12 egg whites
- sugar for garnish

## Directions

1. Cream 4 tablespoons of butter, add to it two larger grated potatoes that have been previously boiled, peeled and cooled, 2 tablespoons of peeled grated almonds, 4 tablespoons of sugar, twelve egg yolks, a small amount of salt, and mix everything well
2. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites from twelve eggs
3. Bake three equally large omelettes in fresh butter on both sides until golden
4. Sprinkle them generously with sugar, stack them one on top of the other on a plate and serve warm to the table

title: Omeletky na jiný způsob (Omelettes, Another Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eight egg yolks
- Half a lemon
- One teaspoon of sugar
- Eight egg whites
- Butter
- Powdered sugar
- Ground cinnamon

## Directions

1. Beat eight egg yolks well in a deep bowl
2. Grate the zest of half a lemon on a grater and add it to the yolks with one teaspoon of sugar
3. Salt lightly
4. Beat eight egg whites until stiff
5. Mix with the yolks
6. Heat a little butter in a frying pan
7. Pour in a portion of the mixture and cook until golden
8. Continue this way until all the mixture is used
9. Sprinkle the omelettes with powdered sugar and ground cinnamon
10. Arrange on a plate and serve warm

title: Omeletky piškotové (Sponge Omelette)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg yolks
- 6 tablespoons sugar
- 6 egg whites
- fresh butter
- fresh cooked fruit preserves (raspberry or strawberry)
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Beat 6 egg yolks with 6 tablespoons of sugar
2. Make stiff snow from 6 egg whites and gently fold into the yolks
3. Melt a small spoonful of fresh butter in a shallow pan and pour one third of the mixture onto it
4. Bake it slightly from below on a hot griddle, then very carefully turn it out onto a plate
5. Do the same with the other two thirds of the mixture
6. Grease the pan in which you baked the omelettes with butter again, place one omelette in it, spread it with fresh cooked raspberry or strawberry preserves, cover with the second omelette and spread with preserves again, cover with the third omelette
7. Sprinkle the top omelette with sugar and pour lemon juice over it
8. Place in a not too hot oven and let bake very gently for about a quarter hour
9. Serve quickly to the table

title: Omeletky s jablky (Omelette with Apple Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sweet apple compote
- One egg white
- One spoonful of sugar
- Half an ounce of peeled almonds
- Lemon zest
- Butter

## Directions

1. Bake two omelettes by the previous method
2. Grease the pan with butter again
3. Place one omelette in it
4. Cover it with a layer of sweet apple compote about the thickness of a finger
5. Cover with the second omelette
6. Beat the white of one egg until stiff
7. Mix it with one spoonful of sugar and half an ounce of peeled almonds finely chopped and a piece of finely chopped lemon zest
8. Pour this onto the top omelette
9. Bake in the oven until golden

title: Omeletky se sýrem (Cheese Omelette)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- smetana (sour cream)
- salt
- pepper
- grated or diced cheese

## Directions

1. Prepare omelettes as in the previous recipe, but instead of vegetables add to the eggs either a bit of grated or diced cheese

title: Omeletky se zeleninou (Omelette with Vegetables)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- smetana (sour cream)
- salt
- pepper
- chopped fresh parsley, chives, or chervil

## Directions

1. Beat eggs with sour cream, salt and pepper
2. Add to them either chopped fresh parsley, chives, or chervil
3. Prepare the omelettes in the usual way
4. You can also add a small amount of the herbs to the eggs

title: Omelety (Omelette)
body:
## Ingredients

- Five or six eggs
- Half a small teaspoon of cornstarch
- Half a teaspoon of flour
- Two spoonfuls of good milk
- Sweet sour cream or additional milk

## Directions

1. Beat five or six eggs well
2. Mix smooth half a small teaspoon of cornstarch and half a teaspoon of flour in two spoonfuls of good milk
3. Add more milk to make nearly one cup
4. Pour this milk mixture into the beaten eggs and mix well
5. Salt lightly
6. Pour onto a heated and greased baking dish
7. Bake in the oven for fifteen minutes until it is high and nicely red on top

title: Omáčka Aromatická (Aromatic Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- several bread rolls soaked in vinegar
- three hard-boiled egg yolks
- a little thyme
- several bay leaves
- one teaspoon capers
- two sardines
- a piece of onion
- oil
- wine vinegar
- cold beef broth

## Directions

1. Pound in a mortar several bread rolls soaked in vinegar with three hard-boiled egg yolks, a little thyme, several bay leaves, one teaspoon capers, two sardines and a piece of onion
2. Add a little oil and wine vinegar
3. Strain it and thin with cold beef broth as needed
4. This sauce is suitable for beef and cold veal roast

title: Omáčka b podpoušce (Sauce for Game)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- pale roux
- good broth
- lemon peel
- white wine
- several chopped anchovies
- juice of half a lemon
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Make a pale roux and boil with good broth
2. Add lemon peel, white wine, and several chopped anchovies
3. Add juice from half a lemon
4. Mix in egg yolks
5. Serve typically with boiled pigeons or old hens

title: Omáčka celerová (Celery Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- celery
- beef broth
- roux
- salt
- pepper
- flower

## Directions

1. Clean the celery and cook it in another beef broth
2. When the celery has softened, place it in the broth in which it was cooked
3. Add roux
4. Grate the celery
5. Place it in the broth that has been browned
6. Add salt, pepper and flower

title: Omáčka cibulková (Onion Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- onion, finely chopped
- beef fat, butter or lard
- beef broth
- roux
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Chop the whole onion very finely
2. Fry it on a piece of beef fat, butter or lard until golden
3. Pour a little beef broth over it
4. Add a little roux and mix so the sauce is sufficiently thick
5. Finally strain through a sieve

title: Omáčka cibulková - variant 2 (Onion Sauce - variant 2)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- onion, cut into cubes
- beef broth
- pepper
- salt
- roux

## Directions

1. Cut the onion into cubes
2. Pour beef broth over it
3. Add pepper and salt
4. When it has cooked somewhat, add roux
5. Strain through a sieve

title: Omáčka cibulková - variant 3 (Onion Sauce - variant 3)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- beef broth
- roux
- pepper
- flower
- young onion greens, finely chopped

## Directions

1. Add roux, pepper and flower to beef broth
2. Simmer
3. Strain
4. Finely chop the green parts from young onions
5. Add and simmer

title: Omáčka cibulová - studená, sladká (Cold Sweet Onion Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- white fresh onion
- sugar
- butter
- pepper
- beef broth
- white wine
- white flour
- sweet sour cream

## Directions

1. Finely slice white fresh onion
2. Add sugar, butter and pepper
3. Braise until red
4. Pour in beef broth and half as much white wine
5. Sprinkle two spoonfuls of white flour
6. Strain
7. Add four spoonfuls of sweet sour cream
8. Mix well on a plate and serve with ice
9. Excellent with cold game

title: Omáčka citrónová (Lemon Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh butter
- white flour
- boiling beef broth
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 lemon
- lemon zest

## Directions

1. Rub a piece of fresh butter well with a little white flour
2. Pour boiling beef broth over it and mix well
3. Add two egg yolks
4. Squeeze the juice from one lemon into it and add finely chopped lemon zest
5. Stir until it thickens, but it must not boil

title: Omáčka hořčicová (Mustard Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef broth
- butter roux
- lemon juice
- 1 tablespoon mustard
- 1 egg yolk
- sweet cream

## Directions

1. Brown beef broth with butter roux
2. Add lemon juice and a tablespoon of good mustard
3. Mix one egg yolk in a little sweet cream and add it to the sauce

title: Omáčka k ježka z vajec a smetany (Sauce for Egg and Cream Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 liter cream
- 2 teaspoons sugar
- 2 egg yolks
- wine

## Directions

1. Boil 1/2 liter cream with 2 teaspoons sugar
2. Finish with 2 egg yolks and wine
3. Mix everything
4. Strain

title: Omáčka k rybám (Fish Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- pale roux
- broth
- lemon peel
- two anchovies, cleaned
- white wine
- one tablespoon mustard
- a small teaspoon of crushed sugar
- pepper
- four beaten egg yolks

## Directions

1. Make a pale roux and add broth
2. Add lemon peel and two cleaned anchovies
3. Boil for a short time and strain
