## Ingredients

- calf or pork brain
- salted water
- parsley
- salt
- ground pepper
- butter
- white bread
- milk
- one whole egg
- one egg yolk
- saffron
- lívětem

## Directions

1. Clean calf or pork brain thoroughly and cook it in salted water, remove the skin and chop it finely with parsley, add salt and a little ground pepper, then lightly fry everything in butter.
2. Put it in a mortar, add a slice of white bread soaked in milk and mash together finely, or rub well in a bowl with a spoon.
3. Further rub one spoon of butter, mix in the mashed brain, add one whole egg and one egg yolk, add a little grated bread, mix everything well and then make small dumplings from it, but cook one first as a test.
4. If it falls apart, add a little more grated bread. Then cook them in good broth, remove the cooked dumplings to a soup bowl and pour the broth over them. Season with saffron and lívětem.

title: Polévka s Knedlíčky z Vajec (Soup with Egg Quenelles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 egg whites
- equal amount of cream or milk
- 1 tablespoon fresh butter
- 3 egg yolks
- salt
- nutmeg
- pepper

## Directions

1. Put the egg whites in a cup and pour over them as much cream or milk as there is egg white
2. Put a tablespoon of good fresh butter on a saucepan and when hot, pour the egg whites with cream into it and scramble while stirring constantly
3. Remove from heat and when cooled, add three egg yolks, a little salt, nutmeg, and pepper
4. Mix well and spoon small quenelles into boiling strained broth with a small spoon
5. Let simmer two or three minutes, pour into a soup bowl and serve

title: Polévka s knedlíčky ze slaniny (Soup with Bacon Quenelles)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of nice fatty smoked meat
- one grated roll
- sweet cream
- two egg yolks
- two whole eggs
- salt
- chives
- a full spoon of nice flour
- beef broth

## Directions

1. Cook half a pound of nice fatty smoked meat, let it cool and then cut it into cubes
2. Cut one grated roll into cubes
3. Soak half of the roll cubes in sweet cream and fry the other half until golden
4. Let half of the meat cubes melt, then cool, crush them, add two egg yolks and two whole eggs
5. Add the roll cubes soaked in cream to the mixture, salt it lightly, add some chopped chives, then add a full spoon of nice flour and also the fried roll cubes
6. Test if the mixture is thick enough by putting a piece of dough from a spoon into the broth - if it is too thin, add more flour and cut-up smoked meat
7. Mix everything well and drop quenelles into the broth using a small spoon
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka s krapličkami (Consommé with Ravioles)
body:
## Ingredients

- a piece of cold capon or veal roast
- grated roll
- finely chopped green parsley
- cloves
- butter
- beef broth
- three egg yolks
- dough for noodles
- egg white
- fresh mushrooms
- fresh butter
- green parsley
- cloves
- pepper

## Directions

1. Chop a piece of cold capon or veal roast finely
2. Add grated roll, finely chopped green parsley, a bit of cloves, and stew everything on butter for a bit
3. Add about one or two spoonfuls of beef broth and three egg yolks, stew for a bit longer, then let it cool
4. Make dough as for noodles, roll it out, and cut it into small pieces for ravioles
5. Brush the edges with egg white, place a small heap of the filling on each piece, press the edges together, and seal the ravioles
6. Cook them in two quarts of good broth
7. If fresh mushrooms are available, chop them finely and fry them on a pan with a piece of fresh butter, add green parsley, a bit of cloves, and a bit of pepper, then add them to the broth
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka s Krapličkami (Soup with Dumplings)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- leftovers of poultry or veal
- 2 tablespoons of soup
- a piece of small onion
- fresh butter
- dough
- beef broth

## Directions

1. If there are leftovers of poultry or veal meat, chop them finely and place on a baking sheet, add 2 tablespoons of soup, a piece of small onion, fresh butter
2. While this is stewing, roll out dough like for noodles and cut into squares; place a bit of the mixture on each square, fold the corners and cook in beef broth
3. When the soup is boiling, pour it over the prepared dumplings

title: Polévka s mozečkem (Calf's Brain Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound of veal meat
- veal necks
- poultry pieces
- two onions
- several sprigs of parsley, celery, and carrot
- two cabbage leaves
- fresh butter
- beef broth
- white roux
- veal or lamb brain
- flour
- egg
- grated roll
- butter for frying

## Directions

1. Cut one pound of veal meat, necks, and various poultry pieces into chunks
2. Cut two onions and several sprigs of parsley, celery, and carrot
3. Stew everything with a piece of fresh butter, being careful that it does not brown
4. Pour beef broth over it and let it cook for one hour
5. Strain about two quarts of the broth and brown it with white roux
6. Clean the brain, boil it in cold water, dry it, dredge it in flour, dip it in beaten egg, coat it in grated roll, and fry it in hot butter
7. Pour the broth over the fried brain
8. Alternatively, if there is no time for frying, cook the cleaned brain in the strained broth and serve on fried grated roll cut into cubes
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka s Nokami (Soup with Potato Dumplings)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- tablespoon of chopped parsley
- butter
- flour
- 2 liters of beef broth
- 10-12 cooked potatoes
- 2 egg yolks
- 8 cooked potatoes
- chopped veal
- butter
- eggs
- several tablespoons of cream
- salt
- nutmeg
- grated cheese
- grated bread

## Directions

1. Stew chopped parsley in butter with flour; add to 2 liters of beef broth into which 10-12 cooked potatoes and 2 egg yolks have been pressed through a sieve
2. Make potato dumplings from 8 cooked grated potatoes, chopped veal, butter, eggs, several tablespoons of cream, salt, nutmeg and grated cheese, sprinkled with grated bread

title: Polévka s nudlemi (Noodle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of flour
- two whole eggs
- beef broth

## Directions

1. Put half a pound of flour on a board, make a well in it
2. Break two whole eggs into the well and mix with a knife into stiff dough
3. Then knead it with your hands, constantly dusting with flour
4. Finally roll it out thin with a rolling pin
5. Spread it on a cloth and let the dough dry, but not too much
6. Dust the board with flour and cut the dough in half with a sharp knife
7. Dust it lightly with flour, fold it again and then cut into strips three fingers wide
8. Stack these strips on top of each other and cut into thin noodles
9. Spread the cut noodles on the board so they don't stick together
10. Cook a proportionate amount of noodles in good beef broth
11. Stir them and let them pass through several boilings so they don't overcook
12. The noodle dough can also be cut into small pieces or various shapes can be cut out with cutters
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka s Nudlemi neb Flíčky (Noodle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 2 whole eggs
- salt

## Directions

1. Put 2 cups flour on a board, make a well in it, beat two whole eggs into it, divide with a knife, then work with hands until the dough is quite stiff
2. Divide the dough into three equal parts, dust the board with flour and roll each piece with a roller until very thin
3. Place the rolled dough on a white cloth and let it dry a little
4. Cut each rolled piece in half, place one on top of the other, cut into strips about two fingers wide, arrange several strips together one on top of the other and cut into thin noodles which you can cook in any meat broth. From the same dough you can instead of noodles cut fine small flakes.

title: Polévka s nuky (Soup with Noques)
body:
## Ingredients

- two ounces of butter
- four egg yolks
- nutmeg
- salt
- four egg whites
- eight tablespoons of flour

## Directions

1. Melt two ounces of butter and mix four egg yolks into it one by one
2. Season with nutmeg and salt
3. Make stiff snow from four egg whites and add to the yolks with eight tablespoons of flour, mixing so that always a tablespoon of flour and a piece of snow are well blended in, alternating
4. Then let the dough rest for a quarter hour
5. Then cook one noques in the broth as a test, and if it is too soft, add a little flour
6. Let them cook for ten minutes and then you must serve the broth immediately so the noques don't lose their best flavor
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka s puddingem (Consommé with Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a pound of pork
- half a pound of veal
- a piece of beef fat
- two beaten eggs
- half a roll soaked in water and squeezed out
- two whole eggs
- salt
- ground cloves
- clean cloth
- cold water
- mushroom broth with mushrooms, champignons, or porcini

## Directions

1. Chop half a pound of pork, half a pound of veal, and a piece of beef fat together
2. Add two beaten eggs and half a roll soaked in water and squeezed out, chop everything together finely
3. Place on a plate, add two whole eggs, salt it, season with a bit of ground cloves, and mix and beat everything well
4. Soak a clean cloth in cold water, squeeze it out, place the mixture in it, tie it loosely, and cook it in broth for one hour
5. Remove it to a board, cut it into small four-sided pieces
6. Pour mushroom broth with mushrooms, champignons, or porcini over the pieces in a serving bowl
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se Sekaninou (Soup with Ground Meat)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- meat scraps
- onion
- parsley
- butter
- flour
- broth
- 2 egg yolks
- toasted bread roll

## Directions

1. Chop the meat scraps with onion and parsley
2. Braise in butter and flour
3. Add broth
4. Cook quickly
5. Mix with 2 egg yolks
6. Pour over toasted bread roll

title: Polévka se Slaninou (Bacon Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- several clean washed potatoes
- water
- 14 dekagrams (8 lots) of bacon
- parsley
- salt

## Directions

1. Cook several clean washed potatoes, drain the water, add fresh water and mash the potatoes in it, season with salt
2. Stew 14 dekagrams (8 lots) of bacon with parsley; cook half the bacon in the soup and place the other half in the bowl in which the soup is served

title: Polévka se slepicí a nudlemi (Chicken Broth with Noodles)
body:
## Ingredients

- one old hen
- two quarts of cold water
- salt
- some vegetables: celery, cabbage, parsley root
- a small handful of peas
- a little nutmeg
- fine noodles

## Directions

1. Clean an old hen and put it in a pot
2. Pour two quarts of cold water over it, salt it and let it cook
3. Clean it well, then add some vegetables such as celery, cabbage, parsley root and a small handful of peas
4. Let it cook for about three hours
5. When the hen is tender, remove the pot from the heat
6. Skim the fat, remove the hen, cut it into neat pieces and place in a bowl
7. Strain the broth, add a little nutmeg and cook fine noodles in it
8. Let it cook about 5 minutes and then pour into a soup tureen over the cut hen
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se slepicí a nudlemi (Chicken Soup with Noodles)
body:
## Ingredients

- one older hen
- two quarts cold water
- salt
- celery
- cabbage
- parsley root
- a small handful of peas
- fine noodles

## Directions

1. Pluck an older hen and place it in a pot
2. Pour two quarts of cold water over it and salt it
3. Let it cook, skim it carefully
4. Add some vegetables: celery, cabbage, parsley root and a small handful of peas
5. Let it cook for about three hours
6. When the hen is tender, remove the pot from heat
7. Skim off the fat
8. Remove the hen, cut it into neat pieces and place in a bowl
9. Strain the broth from the hen
10. Add and pour fine noodles into it
11. Let it cook for about five minutes
12. Pour over the cut hen in a soup bowl

title: Polévka se Slepicí a Nudlemi (Chicken Soup with Noodles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 older chicken
- 2 quarts cold water
- salt
- celery
- cabbage
- parsley root
- peas, small handful

## Directions

1. Clean an older chicken, put in a pot, pour 2 quarts cold water over, salt and let simmer, skim cleanly, then add some vegetables such as celery, cabbage, parsley root and a small handful of peas

title: Polévka se smaženým neb sušeným bílým chlebem neb žemličkou (Crouton Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- white bread or bread roll
- one spoon of butter

## Directions

1. Cut white bread or bread roll into small squares, put one spoon of butter on a pan and when the butter melts, put the cut bread in it and stir until it is fried golden.
2. If the broth is strong and fatty, the cut bread can simply be dried in the oven.
3. Serve the clear broth and serve the fried or dried bread separately on a small plate so each person can serve themselves as desired.

title: Polévka se Smíškou (Soup with Ragout)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 chickens
- vegetables
- marjoram
- salt
- good butter
- fresh mushrooms
- fresh veal meat

## Directions

1. Cook the chickens with vegetables, marjoram and salt until tender
2. Strain the soup and make a fine white roux from good butter
3. Fry fresh mushrooms in butter and place them in the soup with chopped chicken and finely chopped veal meat

title: Polévka se strouhankou (Consommé with Grated Dough)
body:
## Ingredients

- flour
- eggs
- good broth
- chives

## Directions

1. Make dough as for noodles but make it as stiff as possible
2. When it is well kneaded, grate it on a grater
3. While grating, frequently spread out the grated dough so it dries
4. Cook as much grated dough in good broth as needed so it is neither too thin nor too thick
5. Let it cook nicely
6. Pour the broth into a dish and add finely chopped chives
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se strouháním (Soup with Grated Egg)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- a piece of fresh butter
- meat broth
- a little flower
- salt
- 1 egg
- parsley or parsnip, chopped

## Directions

1. Boil a piece of fresh butter, meat broth, a little flower and salt in 2 litres of water
2. Make a thick grating from one egg
3. Strain the soup and add the grating
4. Add chopped parsley or parsnip

title: Polévka se strouháukou (Grated Dough Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- dough (recipe 33, very stiff)
- beef broth

## Directions

1. Make dough according to recipe 33, but make it very stiff
2. Grate the dough on a grater
3. Let the grated dough dry a bit
4. If desired, sift it through a fine sieve
5. Pour into beef broth

title: Polévka se Strouháukou (Grated Dough Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- flour
- eggs
- salt

## Directions

1. Make dough according to recipe 33, but make it quite stiff
2. Grate on a grater, let the grated dough dry a little, sift through a fine sieve if desired and cook in beef broth

title: Polévka se svítečky kapustovými (Consommé with Colewort Colombines)
body:
## Ingredients

- one large cabbage
- butter or sliced beef fat
- pepper
- three whole eggs
- half a bread roll, grated and soaked in milk and wrung out
- salt
- bread for the small molds

## Directions

1. Cook one large cabbage with the beef meat, then chop it and let it stew a little with a piece of butter or sliced beef fat
2. Season it lightly with pepper and let it cool on a plate
3. Beat three whole eggs into it, add half a grated bread roll soaked in milk and wrung out, add a pinch of salt and mix everything well
4. Place a poulette pan with indentations on the stove, grease the indentations with butter, place a spoonful of the mixture in each, bake on both sides and continue until all the colombines are done
5. Cut each one into four pieces, place them in a bowl and pour either consommé or another clear soup over them
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se svítkem (Consommé with Colombines)
body:
## Ingredients

- a piece of butter
- four egg yolks
- a quarter pound of fine flour
- salt
- four egg whites
- good boiling broth
- green parsley

## Directions

1. Whip a piece of butter, add four egg yolks and a quarter pound of fine flour to it
2. Beat it well, salt it and gradually mix in the snow made from four egg whites
3. Then grease a baking dish with butter and pour the dough onto the heated butter
4. Put it quickly in the oven and let it bake until golden
5. Turn the colombine out onto a board, let it cool, cut it into squares or oblong pieces, put in a dish and pour good boiling broth over it
6. Alternatively, you can beat four egg yolks with a little warm broth, add a little chopped green parsley, mix it into strained boiling broth and pour it into the dish over the colombine
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se svítkem (Soup with Souffle)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- six egg whites
- 70 grams (4 lots) butter
- 6 egg yolks
- herbs
- ginger
- 2 spoonfuls flour

## Directions

1. Beat the egg whites for half an hour, add butter, egg yolks, herbs, ginger and flour
2. After beating for a quarter hour, place in a greased mold and steam for a quarter hour
3. Remove from mold, let cool and cut into cubes, add to soup

title: Polévka se svítkem krupicným (Consommé with Farina Colombines)
body:
## Ingredients

- four egg yolks
- half a pint of farina
- salt
- snow from four egg whites
- butter
- bread roll, grated

## Directions

1. Mix four egg yolks with half a pint of farina, salt it and mix in the snow from four egg whites
2. Grease a pan with butter, sprinkle with grated bread roll, pour the batter into it and bake in a hot oven until golden
3. Turn out onto a board, let cool, cut into square or oblong pieces and cook them in boiling good beef soup
4. This colombine gains substance only through cooking
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se svítkem krupičným (Soup with Farina Colomhines)
body:
## Ingredients

- two eggs
- a pinch of cloves
- salt
- ground pepper
- half a pot of wheat farina
- three spoons of lard, or half lard and half butter

## Directions

1. Beat two eggs for five minutes.
2. Add a pinch of cloves, salt and then ground pepper and half a pot of wheat farina and mix lightly.
3. Heat three spoons of lard, or half lard and half butter in a deep pot, and when the fat is very hot, pour the batter into it and let it fry.
4. When it is browned on the bottom, turn it like a pancake and when well cooked, take it out of the pot, cut into small cubes, place in boiling beef broth and let it cook for about five minutes.

title: Polévka se svítkem moučným (Soup with Flour Colomhines)
body:
## Ingredients

- two spoons of butter
- one egg
- two egg yolks
- flour
- snow from two egg whites

## Directions

1. Cream two spoons of butter, beat in one egg and two egg yolks, mix well together.
2. Add flour until it is as thick as batter, add the snow from two egg whites.
3. Butter a shallow pot, pour the batter into it and bake until golden, then turn it out onto a board and let it cool.
4. Cut into small cubes (or cut out with a small mold), place in a soup bowl and pour good beef broth over it.

title: Polévka se svítkem z hovězího masa (Soup with Beef Colomhines)
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked beef, preferably leftover
- salt
- a piece of onion
- parsley
- a piece of lard
- a piece of butter
- one egg
- some grated bread roll soaked in milk or white bread

## Directions

1. Chop cooked beef finely, add salt, a piece of onion and parsley and chop them finely as well.
2. Put a piece of lard on a pan, place all the chopped meat in it and let it stew.
3. Meanwhile, take a piece of butter and cream it well, add one whole egg, some grated bread roll soaked in milk or white bread, add the stewed cooled meat, salt and mix everything well.
4. Butter a small pot, put the chopped mixture in it and bake it.
5. Then cut as desired, place in a bowl and pour good beef broth over it.

title: Polévka se svítkem žemlovým neb chlebovým (Soup with Bread Colomhines)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread roll or stale white bread
- sour cream
- two whole eggs
- one egg yolk
- ground cloves
- salt
- butter
- grated bread roll, bread or crackers
- good beef broth

## Directions

1. Cut bread roll or stale white bread into small cubes, pour a little sour cream over it to soften it.
2. Beat two whole eggs and one egg yolk in a cup, add a pinch of ground cloves, add the soaked bread, salt and mix everything well.
3. Butter a small pot, sprinkle with grated bread roll, bread or crackers, pour the mixture in and let it bake well until golden; then take it out on a board, let it cool and cut into small cubes.
4. Make a little white roux, strain good beef broth through it, let it simmer a little, and serve it this way.
5. Serve the colomhines separately on a small plate.

title: Polévka se ságem (Sago Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- strong good bouillon
- sago
- eggs

## Directions

1. Boil strong good bouillon and add sago
2. Boil everything together for about half an hour and add beaten eggs to the soup

title: Polévka se ságem (Sago Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- beef soup or poultry soup
- sago
- eggs

## Directions

1. Add sago to the meat soup or poultry soup so it slowly absorbs and cooks through
2. Then add beaten eggs

title: Polévka se ságem (Sago Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- quarter pound sago
- two quarts clear strong beef soup
- four egg yolks
- lukewarm soup

## Directions

1. Rinse the sago, pour two quarts of clear strong beef soup over it and let cook until soft.
2. In a small cup, mix four egg yolks with a little lukewarm soup, add to the rest of the boiling soup and serve.
3. Soup with groats is prepared similarly.
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se Zeleninou (Vegetable Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- beef or meat broth
- potatoes
- cabbage
- carrots
- celery
- leek
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes with cabbage, carrot, celery and leek in beef or general meat broth; strain the soup and add 2 egg yolks

title: Polévka se zemčaty (Potato Purée Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- several boiled potatoes
- beef broth
- pepper
- a little grated garlic
- marjoram
- a thin beurre manié (butter and flour roux)
- chopped parsley
- boiled potatoes cut into cubes

## Directions

1. Peel and grate several boiled potatoes
2. Put them into strained beef broth
3. Season with pepper, add a little grated garlic and marjoram
4. Let it cook for a while
5. Press it through a sieve
6. Make a thin beurre manié and let it cook
7. Add a little chopped parsley
8. Pour onto a dish with boiled potatoes cut into cubes
9. Alternatively: scrape and cut into pieces as many raw potatoes as needed for the number of people
10. Clean them, place on the stove and cook them halfway
11. Drain the water, pour beef broth over them
12. If you have fresh mushrooms (either porcini or champignons), add them and let finish cooking
13. Season, add a little chopped parsley or chives
14. Pour into a dish and serve at table
15. You can also cook a little rice or torn groats in the soup
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se zemčaty (Purée of Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- several cooked potatoes
- beef broth
- pepper
- grated garlic
- marjoram

## Directions

1. Peel and grate several cooked potatoes, put them in strained beef broth, season with pepper, add a little grated garlic and marjoram and let simmer a while
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se žemlovým svítkem (Soup with Colombines of French Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- two whole eggs
- two egg yolks
- nutmeg
- green parsley
- salt
- one grated French roll
- good sweet cream
- butter
- beef broth
- white beurre manié

## Directions

1. Break two whole eggs and two egg yolks into a cup, beat them
2. Add a little nutmeg, a little green parsley, a little salt and one grated French roll
3. Then add a little good sweet cream and mix everything together well
4. Then grease a small baking dish with butter, dust with grated French roll
5. Pour the mixture into it and let the colombine bake
6. When it cools, cut it into pieces, pour beef broth over it and let it cook a little
7. Then make a white beurre manié for the broth and serve it at table
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka se žitným chlebem (Soup with Rye Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- rye bread
- beef broth
- salt
- pepper
- half a chopped fried onion
- a little caraway
- cloves
- green parsley
- chives
- saffron
- two whole eggs
- two or three spoons of good sweet sour cream

## Directions

1. Cut rye bread into thin slices and let them dry in a hot oven on a sheet until brown.
2. Put the bread in a pot, pour broth over it, salt, pepper, add half a chopped fried onion, a little caraway and cloves.
3. Let the broth cook for several minutes and when cooked, add chopped green parsley, chives and saffron, pour it into a soup bowl.
4. Beat two whole eggs with two or three spoons of good sweet sour cream and add it to the broth.

title: Polévka ságová z burgundského vína (Burgundy Wine Soup with Sago)
body:
## Ingredients

- one bottle burgundy wine
- two ounces white sago, well rinsed and scalded with hot water
- half pound sugar
- a piece of cinnamon
- a small piece of well-cut orange peel

## Directions

1. Put one bottle of burgundy wine in a pot
2. add two ounces of well-rinsed and scalded white sago, half pound of sugar, a piece of cinnamon and a small piece of well-cut orange peel
3. let it boil until the sago softens sufficiently
4. if the soup becomes too thick, add more hot wine
5. pour the soup into a bowl and serve
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka Vinní (Wine Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 liter wine
- sugar
- cinnamon
- 6 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Add sugar and cinnamon to half a liter of wine and bring to boil
2. When boiling, add 6 egg yolks and whisk together

title: Polévka z Bylin (Herb Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- handful of chervil
- two handfuls young spinach
- four lettuce heads
- bundle of parsley
- butter
- beef broth
- vegetable roots
- toasted bread roll

## Directions

1. Sort and coarsely chop the chervil, spinach, lettuce, and parsley
2. Braise in butter
3. Add to beef broth and cook with vegetable roots
4. Remove the fat
5. Pour over toasted bread roll

title: Polévka z Bylin (Vegetable Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- beef broth
- carrot
- asparagus
- celery
- beans
- green cabbage
- green parsley
- bread dumplings
- cauliflower
- water
- salt
- butter
- gravy
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cook various vegetables in beef broth such as carrot, asparagus, celery, beans, and green cabbage until all is tender
2. Add green parsley and bread dumplings cooked in salted water with cauliflower
3. Alternatively, cook the vegetables in salted water with butter, gravy, and several egg yolks
4. Pour over toasted bread roll

title: Polévka z chřestu (Asparagus Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 15-20 tender asparagus stalks
- two quarts of beef broth
- a spoonful of chopped green parsley
- fresh butter
- flour
- pepper
- saffron
- lamb or mushrooms

## Directions

1. Take 15-20 tender asparagus stalks, clean the upper part from the head downward, shell and cut into pieces the size of peas, then cook them in a pot in two quarts of beef broth
2. Meanwhile let a spoonful of chopped green parsley cook down on fresh butter and add enough flour to thicken the broth
3. When the flour begins to turn yellow, strain the asparagus broth through it, mix well, season with pepper and saffron, pour back over the asparagus and let simmer thoroughly
4. Serve with lamb cut into pieces and cooked with beef or several mushrooms stewed in butter
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z hovězího ohonu (Ox Tail Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- hovězí ohon
- studená voda
- dvě kvarty hovězí polévky
- dvě kvarty vody
- dvě mrkve
- cibule
- dva hřebíčky
- kořen celeru
- svazeček petružele
- sůl
- tři nebo čtyři lžíce hnědé jíšky
- dvě sklenky sherry
- sklenka portského vína
- pepř
- paprika
- tucet maličkých osmažených cibulek

## Directions

1. Rozřezej hovězí ohon na malé kousky
2. Nech jej ve studené vodě tři hodiny močit
3. Přistav jej ve studené vodě k ohni a nech pět minut povařit
4. Vyber jej, očisti a dej do hrnku s dvěma kvarty hovězí polévky a dvěma kvarty vody
5. Přidej dvě mrkve, cibuli se dvěma hřebíčky do ní zastrčenými, kořen celeru, svazeček petružele a trochu soli
6. Nech to pozvolna asi tři hodiny vařit
7. Kousky ohonu vyber a od tuku dobře očisti
8. Mrkev taktéž vyber a na koláčky nakrájej
9. Polévku proceď (pěna a tuk se musí opatrně sebrat)
10. Zapraž třemi neb čtyřmi lžicemi hnědé jíšky
11. Přidej dvě sklenky sherry a sklenku portského vína
12. Okořeň špetkou pepře a papriky
13. Nech ještě hodinu vařit
14. Proceď jemným sýtkem neb ubrouskem
15. Přidej ohon, mrkev a tucet maličkých osmažených cibulek
16. Nech ještě chvilku povařit a nes na stůl
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z hrachu (Purée of Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- one and a half pots of peas
- one quart of prepared stock (recipe 38)
- two cloves of garlic, grated
- marjoram leaves
- flower
- ginger
- butter roux
- fried bread roll cut thin or pearl barley cooked soft in salted water

## Directions

1. Cook one and a half pots of peas until soft
2. Mix well
3. Pour one quart of prepared stock (recipe 38) over it
4. Add two grated cloves of garlic
5. Let it cook a little longer
6. Press it through a sieve
7. Add a bit of marjoram leaves
8. Season with a bit of flower and ginger
9. Thicken with a light butter roux
10. Let it cook a little longer
11. Pour over fried bread roll cut into pieces or you can add beautiful pearl barley cooked soft in salted water to it

title: Polévka z hrášku (Pea Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- sugar
- butter
- beef soup
- flour (for roux)
- burnt sugar

## Directions

1. Sift the peas and stew them with sugar in butter
2. Make a light roux and add it to the beef soup, strain
3. Add the peas and a piece of burnt sugar

title: Polévka z hub (Mushroom Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Water
- All kinds of vegetables
- Roux (bledá jíška)
- Fresh mushrooms (hříbky)
- A piece of butter
- Caraway
- 4 eggs
- A little green parsley
- Bread

## Directions

1. Add all kinds of vegetables to water and let it cook for a while
2. Add roux and strain the soup
3. Slice fresh mushrooms thinly, add a piece of butter
4. Braise under a lid with caraway
5. Add 4 eggs and a little green parsley
6. Put everything into the strained soup
7. If too thin, bread can be added

title: Polévka z hub (Mushroom Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- sufficient quantity of fresh mushrooms
- fresh butter
- chopped green parsley
- 20-30 young asparagus heads
- half pint of young green peas
- piece of butter
- two tablespoons of flour
- two quarts of beef broth
- four egg yolks

## Directions

1. Clean a sufficient quantity of fresh mushrooms, chop them finely and let stew them on good fresh butter with chopped green parsley
2. In the same way let stew 20-30 young asparagus heads and half a pint of young green peas
3. When everything is sufficiently soft, put it in a soup bowl
4. Make a pale roux from a piece of butter and two tablespoons of flour, thicken two quarts of beef broth with it, let boil, bind with four egg yolks and pour into the bowl over the mushrooms, asparagus and peas
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z Husích Drobečků (Goose Giblet Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- goose giblets (wings, stomach, liver, heart, neck)
- fresh water, 2 quarts
- salt
- celery, 1/2
- cabbage, small piece
- carrot
- green parsley
- peas, handful
- pepper
- egg noodles, from 1 egg

## Directions

1. Clean the goose giblets and divide them into neat pieces
2. Put in a pot, pour 2 quarts of fresh water over, salt and let simmer
3. Skim foam and when it stops foaming, add vegetables: half celery, piece of cabbage and carrot, some green parsley and a handful of peas
4. When giblets are tender, remove them and slice the stomach into pieces
5. Strain the broth, season with pepper, cook noodles made from one egg in it and pour over the giblets in a bowl. The liver may also be fried instead of boiled, then sliced and added to the other giblets before pouring the broth over them, making them tastier.

title: Polévka z jarních bylinek (Soup of Spring Herbs)
body:
## Ingredients

- sorrel
- yarrow
- strawberry leaves
- violet leaves
- caraway leaves
- primrose
- chicory
- chervil
- green parsley
- young green onions
- watercress
- mache
- salt
- water
- butter
- flour
- egg yolks
- cold cream
- bread cubes

## Directions

1. In spring, various herbs are gathered from which a very tasty and healthy soup can be made
2. Take sorrel, yarrow, strawberry leaves, violet leaves, caraway leaves, primrose, chicory, chervil, green parsley, young green onions, watercress, mache, clean everything well and rinse in several waters
3. Then on a board chop it finely and let cook in salted water until soft
4. Then in a small pot mix a piece of butter, three spoonfuls of flour, three egg yolks and three spoonfuls of cold cream
5. Pour it into the soup, whisk well — but it must not cook any longer — and pour into a bowl on fried bread cubes
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z Jater (Liver Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 kilogram veal liver
- flour
- butter
- two hard bread rolls
- beef broth or vegetable water
- pepper
- cauliflower
- garlic
- ginger
- noodles

## Directions

1. Cut the liver, roll in flour, and fry in butter
2. Dry two bread rolls in the oven and pound in a mortar
3. Add either to beef broth or salted vegetable water
4. Add pepper, cauliflower, 2 minced garlic cloves, and a little ground ginger
5. Cook and cut the bread into noodles
6. Serve in the soup bowl

title: Polévka z ječných krup (Barley Groats Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 kilo beef
- all vegetables
- salt
- 0.25 liter barley groats
- 0.25 liter good sweet sour cream
- 4 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Boil the beef with all vegetables and salt
2. Cook the barley groats in the soup, adding them by the spoonful until completely soft
3. Strain the soup that remained on the meat and pour over the groats
4. Boil for a quarter hour, strain again, remove the groats and add 2 spoonfuls of good sweet sour cream
5. Mix 4 egg yolks and combine with the soup

title: Polévka z ječných krup (Barley Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 liters water
- Salt
- Vegetables
- A little flower (kvetu)
- Pepper
- Half a liter of barley groats
- A piece of butter
- Fresh pork cracklings (škvarky)

## Directions

1. Salt 3 liters of water, add vegetables, a little flower, and pepper
2. When cooked, select and rinse half a liter of groats
3. Add a piece of butter and cook
4. Strain
5. If fresh pork cracklings are available, add a handful
6. Pour the soup over the groats, cook briefly and serve

title: Polévka z jáhel (Millet Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- a little scalded millet porridge
- 2-3 litres milk
- salt
- sugar
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Boil a little scalded millet porridge in 2-3 litres of milk for half an hour
2. Salt it, add sugar and cinnamon

title: Polévka z jáhel (Millet Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- millet
- soup or salted water
- salt
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Boil millet in soup or salted water
2. Add fat and two egg yolks

title: Polévka z kapra (Carp Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- carp
- celery
- parsley
- leek
- water
- salt
- garlic
- majoram
- lemon peel
- clove
- ginger
- pepper
- bread roll

## Directions

1. Skin several pieces of carp and remove the bones, set the meat aside
2. Put the trimmings into a pot with half a celery, one parsley, a leek, pour water over it, salt it and let it cook
3. Meanwhile, chop the meat finely, add about four cloves of grated garlic, a little majoram, a little lemon peel, a little crushed clove, a little ginger and a little pepper
4. Put this into a clean pot, strain the broth in which the trimmings were cooked and let it simmer briefly
5. Thicken it with a brown roux and let it simmer a little more
6. Pour the broth over fried bread roll and serve it
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z karfiolu (Cauliflower Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- one head of nice white cauliflower
- strong beef broth
- one spoon of butter
- one spoon of flour
- a pinch of ground cloves
- two teaspoons of sour cream
- two egg yolks
- fried bread rolls
- goose liver (if possible), fried and finely chopped

## Directions

1. Clean a head of nice white cauliflower, break it into equal pieces and cook in strong beef broth.
2. Put one spoon of butter in a pot, let it melt and add one spoon of flour; let it foam slightly and add the broth in which you cooked the cauliflower.
3. Add a pinch of ground cloves, two teaspoons of sour cream and two egg yolks, mix well and let it simmer.
4. Pour everything into a soup bowl on fried bread rolls, and if possible, add the fried and finely chopped goose liver, and place the cooked cauliflower in it.

title: Polévka z karfiolu (Purée of Cauliflower)
body:
## Ingredients

- cauliflower
- salted water
- four ounces of butter
- pepper
- nutmeg
- four ounces of pale butter roux
- two quarts of beef broth
- pint or more of boiling sour cream
- two ounces of butter
- sugar

## Directions

1. Clean cauliflower, prepare it, divide into small florets and let boil ten minutes in salted water
2. Drain, put in a saucepan with four ounces of butter, salt, pepper, season with nutmeg, cover and let stew until completely soft
3. Press through a strainer, thicken with four ounces of very pale butter roux, add two quarts of beef broth, mix well, let boil ten more minutes and then press through a fine sieve
4. Put back in a pot, let come to a boil with constant stirring, add a pint or more of boiling sour cream, two ounces of butter and if desired a spoonful of sugar
5. Mix well and pour into a bowl over sliced bread fried pale in butter and small cauliflower florets that were saved for this purpose
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z Koroptví (Partridge Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- tougher partridges
- partridge breast
- partridge meat
- partridge bones
- toasted bread roll

## Directions

1. Roast the tougher partridges
2. Separate the breasts; chop and pound the remaining meat in a mortar
3. Cook the bones, strain, and cook again with toasted bread roll and pounded partridge meat
4. Strain the broth over separated breasts and toasted bread roll

title: Polévka z Koroptví pro Nemocné (Partridge Broth for the Sick)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- old partridge
- water
- cognac
- parsley
- celery
- potato
- salt
- butter
- sugar
- onion
- bread roll

## Directions

1. Prepare the partridge, setting aside the stomach, liver, and heart
2. Pour just enough water to cover the partridge and cook with cognac, parsley, celery, potato, and salt until about 2 cups of broth remain
3. Braise the reserved innards in fresh butter with sugar and onion
4. Push the innards into the broth
5. Serve plain or with bread roll to the patient

title: Polévka z krocaních křídel (Turkey Wings Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- křídla z krocana
- dvě unce másla
- kvart hovězí polévky
- pinta vody
- sůl
- pepř
- mrkev
- turín
- bílá část ze dvou celerových stonků
- dvanáct malých cibulek
- máslo
- svazeček zelené petružele

## Directions

1. Vezmi křídla z krocana, konečky usekni
2. Každé křídlo na pět neb šest kousků rozsekej
3. Nech na rendlíku na dvou uncích másla do zlatová osmažit
4. Dej křídla do hrnku
5. Nalej na ně kvart hovězí polévky a pintu vody
6. Osol a opepři
7. Přidej na koláčky nakrájenou mrkev
8. Přidej trochu na kostičky nakrájeného turínu
9. Přidej bílou část ze dvou celerových stonků ve způsobu malých nudliček
10. Přidej dvanáct malých cibulek na másle do bledá osmažených
11. Přidej svazeček zelené petružele
12. Nech asi tři čtvrtě hodiny vařit
13. Petruželku vyndej a tuk seber
14. Vlej polévku do mísy
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z kyselé smetany (Sour Cream Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 litre sour cream
- 4 egg yolks
- 15 grams (1 lot) butter
- fried roll

## Directions

1. Beat 4 egg yolks in 1 litre of sour cream
2. Add 15 grams (1 lot) of butter
3. Boil over moderate heat and pour over fried roll

title: Polévka z mandlového mléka (Cream of Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds sweet almonds
- six bitter almonds
- one glass milk
- one quart milk
- two teaspoons starch
- one teaspoon sugar
- a pinch of salt
- two tablespoons butter
- one glass cold milk
- almonds cut into thin strips

## Directions

1. Scald and peel two pounds of sweet almonds
2. place them in a mortar with six bitter almonds and one glass of milk and crush well
3. slowly add one quart of milk while stirring constantly
4. place this paste in a cloth and press out all the milk thoroughly
5. put the almond milk in a pot and add another quart of milk
6. heat well but do not let it boil
7. in a small pot, beat together two teaspoons of starch, one teaspoon of sugar, a pinch of salt, two tablespoons of butter and one glass of cold milk
8. mix this well with the almond milk
9. pour into a bowl over almonds cut into thin strips
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z mléka (Milk Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- salt
- noodles, flakes, breadcrumbs, or dropped dough
- bread cubes, fried
- rye bread, thinly sliced
- semolina
- torn semolina
- eggs

## Directions

1. Let the milk boil, salt it and cook into it either noodles, flakes, breadcrumbs or dropped dough
2. The boiled milk can also be poured into a dish with fried bread cubes or rye bread cut into thin slices
3. You can also cook semolina, torn semolina in the milk or poach as many eggs in it as there are people at the table
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z Mouky (Flour Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 heaping tablespoons flour
- cold water
- 1 liter boiling water
- salt
- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) butter
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Whisk 2 heaping tablespoons flour in a little cold water
2. While stirring, slowly pour in 1 liter of boiling water
3. Season with salt
4. Add 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter
5. Simmer for a while
6. Add 2 egg yolks

title: Polévka z Mouky (Flour Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 1 liter boiling water
- salt
- flower (or herb)
- lemon peel chopped
- 2 egg yolks
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Melt 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter and mix with 3 tablespoons flour until the roux begins to rise
2. Slowly pour in 1 liter of boiling water and simmer
3. Mix well
4. Season with salt
5. Add flower, chopped lemon peel, 2 egg yolks, and chopped parsley

title: Polévka z Mouky (Flour Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 dekagrams (4 lots) butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Heat 6 dekagrams (4 lots) of butter until brown
2. Brown several tablespoons of flour in it

title: Polévka z mouky (Flour Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 heaping tablespoons flour
- 1 litre boiling water
- 6 decagrams (4 lots) butter
- salt
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Mix the flour in a little cold water
2. Pour in 1 litre of boiling water while stirring
3. Salt it, add 6 decagrams (4 lots) of butter
4. Boil for a while and add 2 egg yolks

title: Polévka z mouky (Flour Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 decagrams (4 lots) butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 1 litre boiling water
- salt
- flower
- lemon peel, chopped
- 2 egg yolks
- parsley, chopped

## Directions

1. Melt 6 decagrams (4 lots) of butter and mix with 3 tablespoons of flour until the roux begins to rise
2. Slowly pour in 1 litre of boiling water and boil
3. Mix well, salt it, add flower, chopped lemon peel, two egg yolks and chopped parsley

title: Polévka z mouky (Flour Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 decagrams (4 lots) butter
- several tablespoons flour
- 1 litre boiling water
- salt
- bread or roll, diced and fried
- nutmeg or fried onions in butter (optional)

## Directions

1. Heat 6 decagrams (4 lots) of butter until brown
2. Roast several tablespoons of flour in it
3. Pour in 1 litre of boiling water while constantly stirring
4. Salt it, boil, pour over fried bread or roll cut into cubes
5. May be seasoned with nutmeg or topped with fried onions in butter

title: Polévka z Potápek (Crayfish Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- crayfish
- onion
- parsley root
- celery
- leek
- carrot
- cabbage
- potato
- 35 grams butter
- salt
- crayfish tails and claws
- 25 grams butter
- pale gravy
- bread roll
- chives or fried parsley

## Directions

1. Clean the crayfish, remove head and feet, and cut into small pieces; cook salted
2. Chop onion, parsley root, celery, leek, carrot, cabbage, and raw potato
3. Mix with 35 grams butter and braise; add to the crayfish when cooking
4. When crayfish is tender, strain the broth
5. Boil the tails and claws; shell them and add to the strained broth whole or chopped
6. Pound the shells in a mortar, push through a fine sieve, mix with 25 grams butter, and add to the broth with pale gravy
7. Cut bread into noodles and pour the broth over it; garnish with chopped chives or fried parsley

title: Polévka z rajských jablíček (Tomato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- a dozen smaller ripe tomatoes or a 3-pound can of preserved tomatoes
- a piece of onion
- 1 quart of water
- a knife point of baking soda
- 2 cups of milk
- a small teaspoon of flour
- 1 tablespoon of butter
- a small teaspoon of sugar
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Take a dozen smaller ripe tomatoes or a 3-pound can of preserved tomatoes, add a piece of onion and cook in a quart of water.
2. Let it cook for about half an hour and then strain through a sieve into another pot.
3. Add a knife point of baking soda, pour in 2 cups of milk in which a small teaspoon of flour has been dissolved, and cook again.
4. When it comes to a boil, add a tablespoon of butter, a small teaspoon of sugar, a little pepper and salt.
5. If it is too thick, thin it with milk or water.

title: Polévka z raků (Crayfish Soup from Tails)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- crayfish tails
- butter
- 2 hard egg yolks
- dried roll
- 14 deciliters soup
- cauliflower
- 20 crayfish

## Directions

1. Cut crayfish tails lengthwise into noodles, braise shells in butter for a while
2. Pound them in a mortar with 2 hard egg yolks and dried roll
3. Pour 14 deciliters of soup on them, boil, strain, add cut tails and a little cauliflower
4. Use about 20 crayfish per 14 deciliters of soup

title: Polévka z Telecího Masa (Veal Broth)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- veal from the neck
- 35 grams butter
- parsnip root
- parsley
- carrot
- cauliflower
- salt
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Place veal in a roasting pan or low pot
2. Add butter, parsnip root, parsley, carrot, and a little cauliflower
3. Season with salt
4. Braise until tender
5. Strain the broth
6. Beat the egg yolks and add to the broth (1 egg yolk per cup of broth)

title: Polévka z Testového Bráchu (Mock Peas Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 whole eggs
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 tablespoons milk
- salt
- pepper
- lard or clarified butter

## Directions

1. Put two whole eggs into a pint pot, add two tablespoons flour, two tablespoons milk, salt lightly, add pepper and beat well until the dough is smooth
2. Heat lard or clarified butter in a pan and pour the dough through an inverted grater into it
3. When fried golden, remove with a spoon, put in a soup bowl and pour good meat broth over it

title: Polévka z třených knedličků krupičných (Soup with Farina Quenelles)
body:
## Ingredients

- one spoon of butter
- one whole egg
- one egg yolk
- one teaspoon of chopped chives
- about four spoons of farina
- beef broth
- parsley
- saffron

## Directions

1. Rub one spoon of butter until it froths, mix in one whole egg and one egg yolk, one teaspoon of chopped chives and then add about four spoons of farina.
2. Let the dough stand for 10 minutes, then make small dumplings the size of small walnuts, cook them in beef broth covered for 10 minutes, add parsley, chives and saffron as usual.

title: Polévka z Vína (Wine Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint white wine
- 1 pint water
- A piece of sugar
- A piece of cinnamon stick
- A piece of lemon peel
- 4 egg yolks
- 2 spoons good sour cream
- 1 small spoon flour
- A little cold wine
- A little salt

## Directions

1. Boil white wine with water
2. Add a piece of sugar, cinnamon stick, and lemon peel
3. Boil together, then strain
4. Beat 4 egg yolks in a bowl
5. Mix with 2 spoons sour cream, 1 small spoon flour, a little cold wine, and a pinch of salt
6. Slowly pour the boiling wine over the mixture, stirring constantly
7. Keep over heat for a short time but do not let it boil
8. Serve in coffee cups

title: Polévka z úhoře (Eel Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- eel
- butter
- white wine
- salt
- pepper
- crayfish tails
- carrot
- onion
- parsley root
- celery root
- thyme
- bay leaf
- clove
- whole pepper
- dill
- lobster
- water
- cream
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Clean and skin the eel, trim the meat from the backbone and cut into pieces the size of oysters
2. Place in a pan with two tablespoons of butter, two glasses of white wine, salt and pepper and let it braise for a quarter hour
3. Remove the eel and place in a soup bowl with three dozen cooked and shelled crayfish tails
4. In a pot put two sliced carrots, two onions, parsley and celery root, a sprig of thyme, bay leaf, three cloves, a handful of whole pepper, two pieces of dill and four ounces of butter
5. Mix and let it steam
6. Add meat from crayfish, crushed meat from one small lobster, heads, bones and trimmings from the eels, a little salt, three quarts of water, a pint of white wine and eel sauce and let it all simmer slowly for about an hour
7. Skim the foam and fat, strain first through a sieve then through cloth
8. Thicken with a pale roux, let it simmer another quarter hour, skim the foam
9. Bind with four egg yolks mixed with a cup of cream and two tablespoons of butter and pour into the bowl over the pieces of eel and crayfish tails
10. If you do not have crayfish tails, you can use sliced lobster tail
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z ústřic po francouzsku (French Oyster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- leek
- onion
- butter
- bread roll
- oysters
- parsley water or lean broth
- salt
- pepper
- nutmeg
- parsley

## Directions

1. Chop the white part of a small leek finely and let it slowly fry with one finely sliced small onion in two ounces of butter
2. Add two ounces of grated bread roll to it, let it fry briefly with the onion and add about sixty medium oysters with their juice and two quarts of parsley water or lean broth
3. Let it boil over high heat and stir constantly so the oysters do not stick to the bottom
4. Skim the foam, salt and pepper the broth, season with nutmeg and before serving, stir in a little chopped green parsley
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z Čerstvých Hub (Mushroom Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- several mushrooms
- green parsley, finely chopped
- butter
- flour
- strong meat broth
- pepper
- good cream
- flour dumplings or croutons

## Directions

1. Clean and wash several mushrooms and slice them thinly
2. Add some finely chopped green parsley and braise in butter
3. Dust with a little flour and let braise a bit more
4. Pour in enough strong meat broth to make a thin sauce
5. Add pepper and several tablespoons of good cream
6. Let simmer and pour into a soup bowl over sliced flour dumplings or croutons fried until golden

title: Polévka z čerstvého hrášku (Purée of Green Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- about half a pint or more of fresh green peas
- three ounces of good fresh butter
- cold water
- chopped green parsley
- salt
- pepper
- two quarts of clear beef broth

## Directions

1. Shell about half a pint or more of fresh green peas, drain and put in a pot with three ounces of good fresh butter and a little cold water and stir by hand for a long time until the butter coats the peas
2. Drain the water clearly, add a spoon of chopped green parsley with a little salt and pepper and let stew under a lid until soft
3. Press through a fine sieve, dilute with two quarts of clear beef broth, let simmer a while and carefully skim off foam and fat
4. Pour into a bowl over fried bread rolls
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z čerstvých hub (Soup of Fresh Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh mushrooms
- butter
- green parsley
- salt
- water
- bread or bread cubes

## Directions

1. Slice several nice fresh mushrooms, clean them well
2. Put them on a shallow pan with a piece of butter, add a little chopped green parsley, a little salt and let stew under a lid
3. When the water begins to be lost from them, put them in a pot, pour good browned flour water on them as much as you need soup and let cook a lot more
4. Then pour the soup into a bowl over fried bread or bread cubes
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka z čerstvých hub (Soup of Fresh Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- several nice fresh mushrooms (porcini, button mushrooms, or other varieties)
- butter
- a little chopped fresh parsley
- salt
- good beef stock
- fried bread or roll cubes

## Directions

1. Cut several nice fresh mushrooms, clean them well, place them in a pan with a piece of butter, add a little chopped fresh parsley and salt, and let them stew covered.
2. When they begin to lose their water, transfer them to a pot, pour over them as much good beef stock as you need soup, and let it cook well.
3. Then pour the soup into a bowl over fried bread or roll cubes.

title: Polévka z čokolády (Chocolate Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- two quarts good milk
- half pound grated chocolate
- quarter pound sugar
- a piece of vanilla
- a few grains of salt
- six egg yolks or three whole eggs
- candied and dried bread cubes

## Directions

1. Put two quarts of good milk in a pot
2. add half pound grated chocolate, quarter pound sugar, a piece of vanilla and a few grains of salt
3. let it boil for half an hour, occasionally removing any scum that forms
4. beat six egg yolks or three whole eggs with a little milk
5. mix this into the remaining liquid
6. pour over candied bread cubes that have been dried in the oven
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka zapražená (Browned Roux Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- meat broth
- salt
- a handful of caraway seeds
- bread or roll, fried

## Directions

1. Make a well-browned meat broth
2. Add salt and a handful of caraway seeds to water
3. When the soup boils, add the broth so it becomes quite thick
4. Fry bread or roll and strain the soup over it

title: Polévka ze sekaných ústfic (Oyster Bisque)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of milk
- 1 pint of oysters
- 1 tablespoon of butter
- 0.5 tablespoon of flour
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Let a quart of milk cook in a double boiler.
2. Meanwhile, finely chop a pint of oysters in a wooden bowl.
3. Take a tablespoon of butter and half a tablespoon of flour, mix them well and stir into the boiling milk, then add the oysters.
4. Let it simmer, pour into a bowl, pepper and salt.
5. If they are allowed to cook longer, they will become tough.

title: Polévka ze sucharů (Rusk Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- rusks, crushed to fine powder
- several egg yolks

## Directions

1. Stir crushed rusks into boiling soup like semolina
2. Mix everything thoroughly and let it cook
3. Finally, beat in several egg yolks into the soup

title: Polévka ze suchých hub (Soup of Dried Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- dried mushrooms
- water
- grains
- butter
- green parsley
- salt
- flour

## Directions

1. Let two handfuls of dried mushrooms soak in water
2. Meanwhile sort and clean a quarter pint of torn grains, then let them cook with a piece of butter and the proper amount of water
3. Then pour off the black water from the mushrooms, clean them once more
4. Then pour a little clean water on them, add a little chopped green parsley, salt them and let them also cook
5. Then pour the water from them onto the grains, chop the mushrooms finely, add them also to the grains and add enough water so that the soup is neither thin nor too thick
6. Fry it a bit with white thin roux and let it cook a bit more
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka ze syrovátky (Whey Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 litres whey
- flour
- potatoes, sliced

## Directions

1. Mix 2 litres of whey with flour and boil
2. Boil potatoes, slice them into discs and pour the soup over them

title: Polévka ze syrovátky (Whey Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- whey
- caraway
- fresh butter
- egg yolks
- cold water
- salt
- bread, thinly sliced

## Directions

1. Take two quarts of whey, add a little caraway and let it boil
2. Meanwhile mix in a cup a piece of fresh butter with two egg yolks and a bit of cold water
3. When the caraway has boiled well in the whey, pour a little boiling whey onto the mixed egg yolks, stir well so it does not curdle, then mix it with the remaining whey
4. Season with salt as desired and pour into a dish with bread cut into thin slices
5. In city households whey can be prepared as follows: put about two quarts of raw milk on the stove, add a few drops of lemon juice to it so it curdles, then strain through a sieve
6. Set the curd aside and cook the soup from the whey as described above
7. This soup is very tasty and is especially recommended for the sick with chest ailments
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka ze Zajíce (Hare Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- hind quarters from two fresh hares
- one quarter pound diced bacon
- one quarter pound butter
- carrots sliced into rounds
- two onions
- celery root
- two ounces sifted flour
- two quarts veal or weak beef broth
- two quarts water
- one pint catawba wine
- a bundle of fresh parsley
- two ounces butter

## Directions

1. Remove bones from hare hind quarters and cut meat into small pieces
2. Place bacon, butter, carrots, onions, and celery root on a casserole and let brown to golden color
3. Add hare and let braise for a while, dust with two ounces of sifted flour and mix well
4. Add two quarts of veal or weak beef broth, two quarts of water, one pint of catawba wine, and a bundle of fresh parsley
5. Let cook for about one hour, then remove the meat and place the best pieces in a soup bowl
6. Strain the broth, pound the vegetables in a mortar, return them to the broth, mix well and strain through a sieve
7. Place near the fire (but it must not boil anymore), add two ounces of butter and pour into a serving bowl with the meat
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka ze Zbytků Masa (Soup from Meat Leftovers)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- leftover veal roast
- butter
- parsley
- 2 tablespoons flour
- broth
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Chop the veal roast leftovers
2. Sauté in butter with parsley
3. Add 2 tablespoons flour
4. Hold over heat
5. Add sufficient amount of broth
6. Thicken with 2 egg yolks

title: Polévka ze Zbytků Masa (Soup from Meat Scraps)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- veal roast scraps
- butter
- parsley
- flour
- broth
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Chop the veal roast scraps
2. Fry in butter with parsley
3. Add 2 tablespoons flour and heat over fire
4. Add sufficient broth
5. Beat 2 egg yolks and add to the soup

title: Polévka ze zeleniny (Vegetable Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- parsley roots
- carrot roots
- celery
- butter
- ginger
- water
- salt
- pea water
- green parsley
- chervil
- green peas

## Directions

1. Cut into slices two large onions, three parsley roots, three carrot roots, one large or two small celeries
2. Put on a saucepan, add a piece of butter, two pieces of whole ginger, one or two spoonfuls of water, a little salt and let stew until brown
3. Then pour pea water on it, in which green parsley was cooked, and if it is spring, also chervil, and let it cook at least half an hour
4. Then strain the soup through a sieve
5. Meanwhile cut into strips a piece of onion, carrot and celery, let it with a handful of green peas brown on butter
6. Put it into the soup, let simmer a bit more, add a little chopped green parsley and pour into a bowl
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Polévka ze zeleniny (Vegetable Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- three carrots
- four small onions
- four small potatoes
- two pots

## Directions

1. Take three carrots, four small onions, four small potatoes and two pots

title: Polévka ze Zeleniny (Vegetable Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 carrots
- 4 small onions
- 4 small potatoes
- 2 cups chopped cabbage
- 1 large tomato
- A handful of young green peas
- Water
- 2 cups milk
- 1 spoon butter
- 2 beaten eggs
- A little flour
- A pinch of baking soda

## Directions

1. Chop all vegetables finely on a wooden board
2. Place in a pot, add just enough water to cover
3. Stew until vegetables are soft
4. Add boiling water and cook for 15 minutes
5. Add 2 cups milk and 1 spoon of butter
6. Add 2 beaten eggs
7. Mix in a little flour and a pinch of baking soda
8. Allow to simmer for a few more minutes

title: Polévka ze švestek (Plum Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Fresh plums
- 2 fried bread slices (rozstrouhané housky)
- Half a liter milk
- A little flower (kvetu)
- 1 crushed clove
- Salt
- Bread
- Sugar (if plums are sour)

## Directions

1. Cook fresh plums with pits until they fall apart
2. Strain through a sieve and remove the pits
3. Add 2 grated bread slices, half a liter of milk (if the plums are sour, a piece of sugar), a little flower, 1 crushed clove, and salt
4. Cut bread into cubes and pour the soup over it

title: Polévka Zemáková (Potato Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- about 1 kilo of beef
- potatoes
- 3 cloves of garlic
- pepper
- marjoram
- fresh mushrooms
- pale roux

## Directions

1. Cook about 1 kilo of beef, strain the soup; peel potatoes, cut them into pieces and cook in water until half done, drain the water
2. Place the potatoes in beef broth; add 3 cloves of ground garlic, a little pepper, marjoram and several finely chopped mushrooms
3. Make a pale roux, mix it in and let the soup boil for a while longer

title: Polévka Zemáková (Potato Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- beef broth
- potatoes
- all spices
- fresh mushrooms
- fried bread roll or hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Strain the beef broth, peel potatoes and cook them until half done in the broth
2. Add all spices and cook until the potatoes are completely soft
3. Strain the soup through a sieve and add fresh mushrooms and pour over fried bread roll or hard-boiled eggs cut into quarters

title: Polévka ztracená (Lost Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes
- Water
- Caraway
- Pepper
- A clove of garlic
- Salt
- Butter or goose lard
- Fried bread
- Pork meat from the flank

## Directions

1. Scrape and wash peeled potatoes and cook with caraway, pepper, a clove of garlic rubbed with salt, and butter or goose lard
2. Carefully strain the soup so potatoes don't get into it
3. Pour over fried bread
4. A piece of pork meat from the flank can also be cooked in the strained soup, which gives the soup a particularly good flavor

title: Polévka čočková (Lentil Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lentils
- marjoram
- garlic
- 2 litres water
- meat broth
- fried roll or bread

## Directions

1. Boil lentils until completely soft
2. Add marjoram and garlic to them
3. Pour in 2 litres of water, add meat broth
4. Boil for a quarter hour, strain the soup and pour over fried roll or bread

title: Polévka čočková (Lentil Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Lentils
- Marjoram
- Garlic
- 2 liters water
- Roux (jíška)
- Fried bread or bread

## Directions

1. Cook the lentils until completely soft
2. Add marjoram and garlic to them
3. Pour in 2 liters of water and add roux
4. Cook for a quarter hour
5. Strain the soup and pour over fried bread or bread

title: Polévka čočková (Purée of Lentils)
body:
## Ingredients

- lentils
- allspice
- bread, sliced thin

## Directions

1. Lentil soup is cooked the same way, except add a bit of crushed allspice to it
2. Pour over fried bread sliced thin

title: Polévka Žemlová (Wheat Bread Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 or 6 slices white bread
- Salted water
- 3 eggs
- Sweet sour cream
- Fresh butter
- Flower garnish

## Directions

1. Cut white bread into slices
2. Cook in salted water for about a quarter hour
3. Beat 3 eggs in sweet sour cream
4. Add this mixture to the boiling soup with a piece of fresh butter
5. Season with a little flower garnish
6. Serve in a soup dish

title: Polévka žampionová (Mushroom Soup with Champignons)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Butter
- Flour
- Meat broth
- Finely sliced champignons (mushrooms)
- Lemon sauce
- 4 egg yolks
- Fried bread

## Directions

1. Make a roux from butter and flour and add to meat broth
2. Cook finely sliced mushrooms in butter, broth, and lemon sauce
3. Pour everything into the meat broth into which 4 egg yolks have been beaten and mixed
4. Serve with bread cubes cut and fried

title: Polévka žemlová (Wheat Bread Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 to 6 slices of white bread
- salted water
- 3 eggs
- sweet sour cream
- a piece of fresh butter
- a little nutmeg

## Directions

1. Cut 4 to 6 slices of white bread and let them cook in salted water for about a quarter hour.
2. Beat 3 eggs in sweet sour cream and stir this mixture into the boiling soup with a piece of fresh butter.
3. Season the soup with a little nutmeg and serve it in a soup tureen.

title: Polévkový křen (Horseradish Broth)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- one good horseradish of medium size
- flour
- salt
- flower
- two lots butter
- piece of sugar
- half liter good beef broth

## Directions

1. Clean a good horseradish of medium size
2. Grate it
3. Place on a baking pan
4. Dust with flour
5. Add salt and flower
6. Add two lots of butter and a piece of sugar
7. Pour over half liter of good beef broth
8. Stir constantly while cooking

title: Polévání Vinní (Wine Glaze)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 14 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- wine

## Directions

1. Mix 14 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar with wine instead of water
2. Apply and quickly dry on baked goods in oven

title: Polévání z Cukru (Sugar Glaze)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 14 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- egg white
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Mix 14 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar in egg white with lemon juice
2. Mix well for about quarter hour until completely white and thick
3. Apply evenly to baked goods and dry

title: Polévání z Vanilky (Vanilla Glaze)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half vanilla pod
- 14 dekagrams (8 lots) finely crushed sugar
- egg white

## Directions

1. Crush half vanilla pod
2. Mix with 14 dekagrams (8 lots) finely crushed sugar
3. Add egg white and mix until white and thick
4. Dry on baked goods in oven

title: Polévání z Vody (Water Glaze)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 14 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Mix 14 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar with water
2. Apply with back of knife
3. Quickly dry on baked goods in oven

title: Pomerančová omáčka (Orange Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 oranges
- 1 lemon
- 10 dekagrams sugar-water with orange flavor

## Directions

1. Squeeze the oranges and lemon
2. Pour in the sugared water with orange flavor
3. Boil everything
4. Use for pouring over flour dishes

title: Pomerančové a Jiné Smažeňky (Orange and Other Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- oranges
- sugar
- batter
- apricots
- peaches
- fresh plums
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Peel 2 or more oranges, divide them into quarters, remove the pits, dust the orange pieces with sugar, dip in batter and fry
2. Banana fritters are prepared the same way; sliced bananas are first dusted with sugar
3. Apricots and peaches are first pitted, dusted with sugar and allowed to stand for a while; then they are coated in batter and fried to golden color
4. Fresh plums are first stewed with sugar and cinnamon, then allowed to cool, candied almonds are stuffed in place of the pits, each plum is pierced on a thin skewer, dipped in batter or stroganoff and fried
5. All fritters must be served hot and generously dusted with powdered sugar

title: Pomerančové Mandle (Orange Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fine large almonds
- refined sugar
- orange blossom water

## Directions

1. Prepare almonds as described for vanilla almonds
2. Add orange blossom water to the boiled sugar instead of vanilla

title: Pomerančové Šodó (Orange Sabayon)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- two deciliters orange juice
- one deciliter lemon juice
- one deciliter water
- 18 decagrams sugar
- two deciliters beaten egg yolks

## Directions

1. Add one deciliter of lemon juice to two deciliters of orange juice
2. Add one deciliter of water
3. Add 18 decagrams of sugar dissolved and boiled in water
4. Add two deciliters of beaten egg yolks

title: Pomerančový creme (Orange Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 3.5 deciliters cream
- six egg yolks
- seven deka sugar
- spoon of orange sugar

## Directions

1. Add six egg yolks, seven deka sugar and a spoon of orange sugar to 3.5 deciliters of cream

title: Pomerančový nákyp (Orange Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 large oranges
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 quart milk
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 3 egg yolks
- 3 egg whites

## Directions

1. Peel and separate 4 large oranges, place on a pudding dish, sprinkle with 1 cup sugar, and let sit
2. Heat 1 quart milk and when simmering, mix 2 tablespoons cornstarch in cold milk and stir into the hot milk
3. Add 1/2 cup sugar, 3 egg yolks, mix well, and when thickened, remove from heat and let cool
4. When cooled, pour over the oranges
5. Whip 3 egg whites, add 1 tablespoon sugar, spread on top, and bake to brown

title: Pomerančový rosol (Orange Jelly)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 14 decilitres (4 tablespoons) white wine
- sugar
- zest of six oranges
- a little milk
- 9 decagrams (6 lots) of isinglass, dissolved in water and strained

## Directions

1. Mix white wine with sugar rubbed with orange zest from six oranges and a little milk
2. Place in a warm location without cooking
3. Strain the mixture through a cloth
4. Mix with isinglass that has been dissolved in water and strained
5. Place on ice to set

title: Postní bouillon (Fish Bouillon)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh butter
- about 1.5 celery roots
- 2 parsley roots
- 2 Spanish onions
- 1 carrot
- 2 garlic cloves
- 2 clean pike
- head of pike
- head of bream or carp
- 3 handfuls peas
- 2 quarts boiling water
- 4 bay leaves
- 5 cloves
- piece of ginger
- white pepper
- salt
- saffron
- flowers

## Directions

1. Grease an appropriate pot with fresh butter
2. Put in the pot 1.5 celery roots, 2 parsley roots, 2 Spanish onions, 1 carrot, and 2 garlic cloves, all cut up
3. Add 2 cleaned, gutted pike, the head of pike, and the head of bream or carp
4. Add 3 handfuls of peas
5. Let simmer slowly until the juices turn golden
6. Pour in 2 quarts of boiling water
7. Add 4 bay leaves, 5 cloves, a piece of ginger, several grains of white pepper, enough salt, a little saffron, and flowers
8. Cover the pot well and let boil for about 2 hours
9. Remove from heat and let stand quietly for about half an hour
10. Slowly strain through a cloth into an earthenware pot without clouding it
11. If using the bouillon for sauces and other fasting soups, keep it in a cool place, otherwise serve it hot in cups
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Postní polévka panádlová (Fasting Bread Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 litre salted water
- 4 rolls
- a piece of butter
- a little flower
- 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Boil 4 rolls in 1 litre of salted water, mash them with a whisk
2. Add a piece of butter and a little flower to them
3. After boiling for a while, add 4 beaten eggs
4. If the soup is too thick, add a little water

title: Postní polévka pražená (Fasting Roasted Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 litres water
- 2 pinches of caraway seeds
- a piece of butter
- salt
- meat broth, well browned
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Put 2 pinches of caraway seeds, a piece of butter and a little salt into 2 litres of water
2. After boiling for a quarter hour, add well-browned meat broth
3. Boil a little longer and pour over fried bread

title: Postní polévka z karfiolu (Cauliflower Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- salted water
- celery
- carrot
- parsley
- onion
- green parsley
- cauliflower
- butter
- flour

## Directions

1. In salted water put to cook a piece of celery, carrot, parsley and onion, mainly however green parsley
2. When the vegetables are cooked, add a head of cauliflower and let it cook until soft
3. Meanwhile make a light roux from butter, strain the soup on it, let it cook until it thickens
4. Gently place cauliflower heads into it and serve at table
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Postní polévka zemáková (Fasting Potato Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 litres water
- potatoes, sliced
- parsley
- pepper
- flower
- new spices
- garlic
- salt
- a small piece of onion
- a little mushroom
- caraway seeds
- meat broth

## Directions

1. Slice potatoes into 3 litres of water, add parsley, pepper, flower, new spices, garlic, salt, a small piece of onion, a little mushroom and caraway seeds
2. Make a meat broth, add it and bring to a boil

title: Postní špargiova polévka (Lean Soup of Asparagus)
body:
## Ingredients

- asparagus
- parsley water
- butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Cut asparagus into pieces and let cook in parsley water until soft
2. Then take out the asparagus and put into a bowl
3. Fry the soup with a light butter roux, let it thicken and pour into the bowl over the cooked asparagus
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Potage aux Escargots (Snail Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- two dozen large snails
- salted water
- three ounces butter
- three tablespoons chopped mushrooms
- one tablespoon chopped fresh parsley
- flour
- about four tablespoons sour cream
- two quarts lean broth or parsley water
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Let two dozen large snails boil for about half an hour in salted water, then remove them from their shells with a picker, break them in half, discard the tails and chop the front parts finely
2. Place three ounces of butter in a pan, add three tablespoons of chopped mushrooms and one tablespoon of chopped fresh parsley, add the chopped snails and let them fry for several minutes
3. Brown with a little flour, add about four tablespoons of sour cream, mix well, add two quarts of lean broth or parsley water and let it boil for about half an hour, then pour into a dish over fried bread
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Potage aux Écrevisses (Crawfish Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- two dozen small crawfish
- salted water
- two quarts lean broth or parsley water
- quarter pound crawfish butter
- half of the crawfish butter
- a little white flour
- salt
- a pinch of thyme
- fried bread

## Directions

1. Throw two dozen small crawfish into boiling salted water and let them boil until they turn red
2. Peel off the tails and claws
3. Make a quarter pound of crawfish butter from the shells
4. Put the shells into a pot, add two quarts of lean broth or parsley water, let it boil for about ten minutes and strain
5. Make a pale roux from half of the crawfish butter and a little white flour, brown the crawfish soup with it and let it boil for a quarter hour
6. Salt the soup sufficiently, season with a pinch of thyme, add the remaining crawfish butter and pour into a soup dish over cut crawfish tails, claws and fried bread
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Potage de Homards (Lobster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- two quarts parsley water or lean broth
- meat from two lobsters
- liquid from four dozen small cooked mussels
- three tablespoons pale butter roux
- a dozen small onions
- half a pint of sherry
- a pinch of ground paprika
- four ounces crawfish butter

## Directions

1. Put the meat from two lobsters into two quarts of parsley water or lean broth, add the liquid from four dozen small cooked mussels
2. Brown it with three tablespoons of pale butter roux, add a dozen small onions, half a pint of sherry, and a pinch of ground paprika
3. Let it boil for half an hour
4. Remove the lobster meat from the soup, cut it into cubes and place in a dish with the cooked mussels and onions
5. Skim the foam from the soup, add four ounces of crawfish butter, mix well and strain into the dish over the cut lobster
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Potato Crème (Zemákový créme)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 heaping tablespoon potato flour
- 3 egg yolks
- 75 grams (5 lots) sugar
- 1 cup cold milk
- 500 milliliters boiling milk
- 15 grams (1 lot) sweet almonds
- 4 bitter almonds
- lemon peel, grated

## Directions

1. Rub potato flour with egg yolks
2. Add sugar and cold milk
3. Mix in boiling milk
4. Add blanched and pounded sweet and bitter almonds and grated lemon peel
5. Stir constantly over heat
6. Pour onto a platter
7. Cool on ice or in a cellar

title: Potato Dumplings (Zemákové knedlíky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cooled potatoes, grated
- several rolls, cut into cubes and fried
- rolls soaked in milk
- onion
- parsley
- chives
- butter
- bacon
- flour
- several eggs
- nutmeg
- salt

## Directions

1. Mix grated cold potatoes with fried roll cubes
2. Soak part of the rolls in milk
3. Braise the milk-soaked rolls with onion, parsley, and chives in butter with bacon
4. Mix potatoes with flour, eggs, nutmeg, and salt
5. Add the braised mixture to the potatoes
6. Form dumplings
7. Cook in salted water

title: Potato Dumplings (Zemákové knedlíky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 250 milliliters milk
- 45 grams (3 lots) butter
- 60 grams (4 lots) potato flour mixed in cold milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon flour
