- 12 decagrams butter
- 8 egg yolks
- Veal breast
- Bread roll

## Directions

1. Mix melted butter with 8 egg yolks
2. Cook veal breast until half done, cut into cutlets
3. Dip the cutlets in the butter and egg yolks
4. Sprinkle with grated bread roll and fry in butter
5. Serve with vegetables

title: Smažené telecí nožičky (Fried Calf's Feet)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf's feet
- salt
- white flour
- egg
- breadcrumbs or crushed crackers
- clarified butter

## Directions

1. Cook the calf's feet until tender
2. Dry them
3. Cut into four parts
4. Remove the larger bones
5. Salt the pieces
6. Coat in white flour
7. Dip in beaten egg
8. Coat in breadcrumbs or crushed crackers
9. Fry in clarified butter until golden

title: Smažené vemeno (Fried Udder)
body:
## Ingredients

- udder
- salt water
- 2 eggs
- flour
- breadcrumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Boil the udder in salted water until tender, which usually takes 4 hours. When tender, remove and cut into thin slices.
2. Beat two eggs, season lightly with salt and pepper. Coat the slices in flour, dip in egg and then into grated breadcrumbs and fry until golden in melted butter. The same method can be used for tongue or tripe.

title: Smažené vepřové nožičky (Fried Pork Trotters)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- pork trotters
- flour
- egg
- breadcrumbs
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Cut the trotters in half, wash them, dry with a cloth, salt them, roll in flour, then in egg, and then in breadcrumbs.
2. Fry in butter or lard until golden.

title: Smažené vepřové nožičky (Fried Pork Trotters) - Alternate
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- pork trotters
- flour
- egg
- breadcrumbs
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Cut the trotters, wash them, dry with a cloth, salt them, roll in flour, then in egg, and then in breadcrumbs.
2. Fry in butter or lard.

title: Smažené ústřice (Fried Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- two dozen oysters, as large as possible
- salt
- pepper
- two whole eggs and one yolk
- flour
- finely crushed crackers or cornmeal
- half lard and half butter

## Directions

1. Dry the oysters with a cloth
2. Salt and pepper them
3. Beat two whole eggs and one yolk
4. Coat the oysters in flour, then dip them in eggs and coat them in finely crushed crackers or cornmeal
5. Put half lard and half butter in a pan and when it is hot, quickly fry the oysters in it

title: Smažené Řepachy (Fried Smelts)
body:
## Ingredients

- Smelts
- Milk
- Flour
- Clarified butter
- Eggs
- Salt
- Pepper
- Bread crumbs, grated
- Lemon, sliced into rounds

## Directions

1. Clean as many smelts as needed
2. Remove the fins
3. Wash the fish thoroughly
4. Dry with a cloth
5. Dip in milk
6. Coat in flour
7. Fry in hot clarified butter
8. Alternatively, dust with flour, dip in eggs beaten with a little salt and pepper, coat in grated bread crumbs, fry and serve garnished with lemon slices

title: Smažené řepachy (Fried Smelts)
body:
## Ingredients

- Smelts
- milk
- flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Clean the smelts by removing the fins and thoroughly washing them
2. Dry them with a cloth
3. Dip in milk and coat in flour
4. Fry on hot butter
5. Alternatively, dust with flour, dip in beaten eggs mixed with salt and pepper, coat in grated bread crumbs, fry, and serve garnished with sliced lemon on patties

title: Smažené švestky (Fried Plums)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- large, ripe plums
- sweet almonds, peeled
- 4 tablespoons flour
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 2 tablespoons rum
- 2 egg whites
- hot butter
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Scald and peel the large ripe plums
2. Remove the pits with a wooden stick and replace each with a peeled sweet almond
3. Mix flour, sugar, rum, and egg whites to make a batter
4. Dip each plum one by one in the batter
5. Fry in hot butter
6. Place on blotting paper
7. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon
8. Serve

title: Smažené Žemličky s Třešněmi (Fried Crusts with Cherries)
body:
## Ingredients

- small rolls or banduska
- cherries or sour cherries
- sugar
- thin lemon peel
- red wine

## Directions

1. From small rolls or banduska cut off the top, remove the interior and fry them in heated rendered butter
2. From cherries or sour cherries remove the pits and stew them with sugar and fine lemon peel
3. Fill the rolls with this stewed filling, cover them with the cut-off pieces, arrange them in a dish, pour red wine over them and let them bake in the oven
4. Then dust them with sugar and serve
5. Instead of cherries you can also use other fruit, or you can fill the rolls with various marmalade

title: Smažené žáby (Fried Frogs)
body:
## Ingredients

- frog hind legs
- oil
- lemon juice
- onion
- parsley
- salt
- flour
- egg
- breadcrumbs
- butter
- parsley

## Directions

1. Clean the frog legs, put them in a deeper bowl, salt them, pour a little oil and lemon juice over them, sprinkle with chopped onion and green parsley and let them marinate for about an hour
2. Remove them onto a clean cloth, dust with flour, dip in beaten egg and coat in grated breadcrumbs
3. Fry them in hot melted butter briefly before serving, arrange on a platter and garnish with green parsley

title: Smažení Pstruzi (Fried Brook Trout)
body:
## Ingredients

- Small brook trout
- Salt
- Flour
- Eggs, beaten
- Bread crumbs, grated
- Clarified butter
- Lemon, cut into quarters

## Directions

1. Scale the trout
2. Clean and gut them
3. Make a lengthwise cut on each side of each trout
4. Salt them and let them lie covered for half an hour
5. Dry them with a cloth
6. Coat in flour
7. Dip in beaten eggs
8. Coat generously with grated bread crumbs
9. Fry in hot clarified butter
10. Arrange on a dish
11. Surround with lemon quarters
12. Serve hot to the table

title: Smažení raci (Fried Crabs)
body:
## Ingredients

- crabs
- flour
- salt
- green parsley, finely chopped
- butter, clarified
- parsley, fried

## Directions

1. Boil the crabs in the usual way
2. Remove the meat from the shells
3. Dust with flour mixed with salt and finely chopped green parsley
4. Fry in clarified butter over high heat until golden
5. Arrange on a dish
6. Garnish with fried parsley

title: Smažený jazýček (Fried Tongue)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork tongue
- Salt
- Bay leaf
- Vegetables
- Spices
- White wine
- Vinegar
- Egg
- Bread roll, grated
- Butter

## Directions

1. Cook pork tongue in salted water to which various spices such as bay leaf, vegetables, spices, as well as white wine and a little good vinegar have been added.
2. Remove the skin from the cooked tongues, dip the tongues in beaten egg, coat in grated bread roll and fry in butter.
3. The fried tongue is served to the table garnished as desired with vegetables or other dishes.

title: Smažený kapr (Fried Carp)
body:
## Ingredients

- Carp
- Salt
- Pepper
- Flour
- Eggs
- Bread crumbs or crushed crackers
- Lard
- Butter

## Directions

1. Clean the carp, remove the entrails, scale it and cut into pieces
2. Quickly rinse in cold water and dry with cloth
3. Salt and sprinkle with ground pepper
4. Cover with cloth and let sit for half an hour
5. Coat in flour, dip in beaten eggs, coat in bread crumbs or crushed crackers
6. Fry in hot fat made of half lard and half butter until golden

title: Smažený losos (Fried Salmon)
body:
## Ingredients

- salmon
- salt
- pepper
- egg yolks
- butter
- grated roll or crackers
- lemon

## Directions

1. Cut salmon into slices two inches wide, rinse, salt and sprinkle with pepper
2. Let stand covered for about an hour
3. Dip in melted butter mixed with egg yolks, coat in grated roll or crackers
4. Place on a buttered baking sheet, pour melted butter over them and bake in the oven until golden
5. Arrange on a heated dish with the fallen breadcrumbs and either pour lemon juice over or surround with lemon cut into quarters so that each person can squeeze juice as they like

title: Smažený okoun (Fried Perch)
body:
## Ingredients

- perch
- salt
- ground pepper

## Directions

1. Sprinkle a well-cleaned perch with salt and ground pepper, let it lie for about a quarter hour and then fry it in the same manner as carp.

title: Smažený Slaneček (Fried Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- Herring
- Cold milk
- Cloth
- Eggs
- Wine
- Milk
- Flour
- Salt
- Clarified butter
- Pepper
- Bread crumbs, grated

## Directions

1. Skin the herring
2. Gut it and place it in cold milk for several hours
3. Dry it with a cloth
4. Split it lengthwise and remove the bones
5. Make a batter from eggs, wine, a little milk and flour, salt it lightly, dip the herring in it and fry in hot clarified butter
6. Alternatively, dust it with flour mixed with a little ground pepper, dip in beaten egg, coat in grated bread crumbs and fry in butter

title: Smažený telecí mozek (Fried Calf's Brain)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf brains
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter
- lemon

## Directions

1. Place the brains in lukewarm water for half an hour
2. Remove all membranes and place in cold water
3. Shortly before serving, remove from water and place on clean cloth
4. Cut each brain in half
5. Salt and pepper the pieces
6. Dust with flour
7. Dip in beaten egg
8. Coat with breadcrumbs
9. Fry in clarified butter until golden
10. Serve with lemon cut into quarters

title: Smažený Uzený Špek (Fried Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Smoked bacon
- Lard
- Eggs

## Directions

1. Slice smoked bacon into very thin slices
2. Remove the skin
3. Place slices on a hot griddle
4. When browned on one side, turn and fry until crispy
5. Remove to a plate
6. Fry eggs in the rendered lard and serve with the bacon

title: Smetanová omáčka (Cream Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lemon peel
- 1/2 liter sour cream
- flour
- egg yolks
- sugar

## Directions

1. Pour 1/2 liter of sour cream over lemon peel
2. Cover and set aside
3. Mix a spoonful of flour with four egg yolks and cold sour cream
4. Add prepared sour cream with lemon peel
5. Sweeten with 9 dekagrams of sugar
6. Stir sauce over fire until it begins to boil
7. Strain

title: Smetanová omáčka s čokoládou (Cream Chocolate Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 libry vanilkové čokolády
- 1 koflíček horkého mléka
- 2 kávové lžičky kukuřičného škrobu
- 4 lžíce cukru
- přibližně 1 a 1/2 koflíku horké smetany

## Directions

1. Dej do hrnku čtvrt libry vanilkové čokolády a přidej koflíček horkého mléka, přikrej to pokličkou a nech na teplém místě státi, až se čokoláda rozplyne.
2. Pak tím míchej, až je z toho jemná kasička.
3. Na to k tomu přidej dvě kávové lžičky kukuřičného škrobu, čtyry lžíce cukru a ještě to dobře rozmíchej.
4. Dej na plotnu a poznenáhlu přilévej asi koflík a půl horké smetany, musíš však neustále tím míchati.
5. Nech to několik minut povařit, pak to proceď skrze husté sejtko a poodstav nádobu s omáčkou do kuthanu s teplou vodou na tak dlouho, než ji neseš na stůl.

title: Smetanová Zmrzlina s Vanilkou (Cream Ice Cream with Vanilla)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Four eggs
- One liter sweet cream
- More than half kilogram fine crushed sugar
- Finely crushed vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat four eggs, whip them until foamy
2. Slowly add one liter sweet cream while adding more than half kilogram fine crushed sugar and finely crushed vanilla
3. Cook the mixture with constant stirring and whipping
4. Remove from heat and continue whipping until completely cooled
5. Strain through fine sieve
6. Place in ice cream machine and make as described for regular ice cream

title: Smetanové knedlíky (Cream Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- šest celých vajec
- kvart smetany
- kvart mouky
- trochu soli
- šest žemliček
- rozpálené máslo
- ustrouhaná žemelová kůrka
- povidla (volitelně)

## Directions

1. Rozšlehej šest celých vajec s kvartem smetany.
2. Přidej kvart mouky a trochu soli a dobře to vypracuj; těsto musí být asi jako na lívance.
3. Ostrouhej šest žemliček, rozkrájej je na kostiček a osmaž je v rozpáleném másle.
4. Když vystyly, zamíchej je do těsta.
5. Vybírej těsto velkou ve vodě namočenou lžící a zavař knedlíky spěšně do vařící slané vody, aby zůstaly celé a neroztekly se.
6. Nech je asi půl hodiny vařit.
7. Rozkrájej je na lístky, urovnej na mísu, posyp ustrouhanou žemelovou kůrkou a polej rozpáleným máslem.
8. Volitelně k nim dej povidla.

title: Smetanové koláčky (Sour Cream Cakes)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Ordinary dough for cakes
- Raisins
- Chopped almonds
- Sour cream with beaten eggs

## Directions

1. Make cakes from ordinary dough the thickness of a finger, form a sufficiently high edge, sprinkle with raisins and chopped almonds, pour sour cream in which eggs have been beaten

title: Smetanové koláčky (Sour Cream Tarts)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ordinary tart dough
- raisins
- blanched almonds
- sour cream
- egg yolks
- sugar

## Directions

1. From ordinary tart dough, make small tarts the thickness of a finger
2. Form a sufficiently high edge
3. Sprinkle with raisins and blanched almonds
4. Pour sour cream in which egg yolks and sugar have been beaten
5. Bake the tarts in moderate heat

title: Smetanové méchurinky (Cream Puffs)
body:
## Ingredients

- two small cups hot water
- one small cup butter
- two small cups flour
- six whole eggs
- flour for cream filling
- milk
- one egg (for filling)
- one small cup sweet milk
- one small cup sugar
- one teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Bring two small cups hot water and one small cup butter to a boil together
2. While boiling, stir in two small cups flour
3. Remove from heat and let cool
4. When cooled, add six whole eggs without beating them first
5. Mix for five minutes
6. Using a large spoon, drop portions onto well-buttered pans so they do not touch each other
7. Bake in a hot oven for 25 minutes without opening the door unless absolutely necessary
8. For the cream filling: mix three large tablespoons flour in a little milk until smooth
9. Add one small cup sweet milk, one egg, one small cup sugar, and one teaspoon vanilla
10. Mix well and cook
11. Cook the cream best over water so it does not scorch
12. When the puffs are cold, cut them open at the point and fill with the cream using a spoon
13. Can be served as a dessert at table or instead of pudding

title: Smetanové topinky (Cream Toast)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- six eggs
- three-eighths liter sour cream
- lemon zest
- fifteen dekagrams crushed sugar
- bread slices
- hot butter

## Directions

1. Beat six eggs with three-eighths liter sour cream, add lemon zest and fifteen dekagrams crushed sugar, and bake over heat.
2. When cooled, spread on bread slices, place in a skimmer, and fry in hot butter.

title: Smetanový ježek (Sour Cream Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 egg yolks
- 20 dekagrams sugar
- 12 tablespoons good sour cream
- lemon zest
- cinnamon
- salt
- half kilogram grated roll
- 12 egg whites for snow
- cleaned raisins

## Directions

1. Beat 12 egg yolks with 20 dekagrams sugar, 12 tablespoons good sour cream and lemon zest, cinnamon, salt, half kilogram grated roll
2. Add snow from 12 egg whites and cleaned raisins
3. Boil the hedgehog for 3/4 hour in boiling water

title: Smetanový nákyp (Puffed Cream Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1/4 pound blanched ground almonds
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 8 egg yolks
- 1 cup thick sour cream
- lemon zest

## Directions

1. Cream together 2 tablespoons butter
2. Add 1/4 pound ground blanched almonds and 1/2 cup sugar
3. Add 8 egg yolks, 1 cup thick sour cream, and lemon zest cut into pieces
4. Beat for at least 15 minutes
5. Fold in stiff peaks made from 8 egg whites
6. Put into a mold and bake in the oven
7. Sprinkle with sugar and serve

title: Smetanový Paj (Cream Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- pie plate dough
- two and a half coffee cups of sweet cream
- three tablespoons of sugar
- half a coffee cup of sweet cream
- two tablespoons of corn starch
- two egg whites
- two tablespoons of sugar
- coconut

## Directions

1. Line a pie plate with pie dough and bake
2. Before it is baked, take two and a half coffee cups of sweet cream and three tablespoons of sugar and bring to a boil
3. Meanwhile, take half a coffee cup of sweet cream and two tablespoons of corn starch, make a paste and add it to the boiling cream
4. When thickened, pour onto the baked pie
5. This is for two pies
6. Flour can be used instead of starch, but starch is better
7. On top, put well-beaten snow with sugar and sprinkle with coconut and place in the oven briefly to brown
8. Each pie requires snow from two egg whites and two tablespoons of sugar

title: Smrže (Morels)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh morels
- warm water
- melted butter
- onion, sliced
- fresh parsley, chopped
- salt
- nutmeg
- butter roux

## Directions

1. Only fresh morels are suitable for preparation; dried ones are indigestible and are added to dishes only for flavor.
2. Wash them several times in warm water so that no sand remains in them, slice them into round pieces, put them on a shallow pan on a piece of melted butter, add sliced onion and a piece of chopped fresh parsley, salt them, season with nutmeg and let them stew until soft.
3. Make a little butter roux.

title: Smrže (Morels)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh morels
- butter
- onion
- fresh parsley
- salt
- nutmeg
- butter roux
- beef broth
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Rinse the morels several times in lukewarm water to remove any sand
2. Slice them into rounds and place on a saucepan with a piece of melted butter, sliced onion, and a piece of chopped fresh parsley
3. Salt and season with nutmeg
4. Let them stew until tender
5. Make a small butter roux and thin it with beef broth
6. Add this to the morels and let them simmer a bit longer
7. Finally season with lemon juice and serve hot

title: Smrže s Citronem (Morels with Lemon)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- morels, washed
- butter
- salt
- lemon juice
- lemons, sliced

## Directions

1. Place washed morels whole in a baking dish with butter and salt
2. Braise until soft
3. Drizzle with lemon juice
4. Arrange with sliced lemons around them

title: Smržová Polévka (Morel Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- butter
- beef broth
- morels
- cauliflower
- pepper
- marjoram
- pale gravy
- green parsley
- salt
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Cut potatoes into small pieces and fry with butter until half done
2. Add potatoes and morels that have been cut and braised in butter with cauliflower, pepper, and marjoram to the beef broth
3. Simmer briefly
4. Add pale gravy and chopped green parsley
5. Season with salt
6. If desired to make the soup sour, add egg yolks beaten in sour cream

title: Smíšenina Masa a Zeleniny (Mixed Meat and Vegetables)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- firm lettuce heads
- broth
- carrots
- rutabaga
- asparagus
- green beans
- lard slices
- sausages or minced meat

## Directions

1. Clean firm lettuce heads and stew in broth without breaking them apart
2. Stew carrots, rutabaga, asparagus and green beans, cut into equal pieces
3. In a metal mold, layer lard slices, then lettuce, with cut vegetables on the sides
4. On the bottom layer of lettuce place sausages or minced meat, then another layer of lettuce
5. Cover the mold, place in hot water, turn out after an hour and remove the lard

title: Smíšenina z masa na způsob vlašského salátu (Mixed Meat Salad in Italian Style)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- leftover veal, venison, and beef (roasted and boiled)
- sardines
- capers
- sour cucumbers
- salt
- oil
- wine vinegar
- pepper
- hard-boiled eggs
- mushrooms in vinegar
- smoked tongue or sardines

## Directions

1. Remove bones and membranes from the leftover meat and cut into pieces
2. Add soaked sardines without bones, several tablespoons of capers, and sour cucumbers cut into cubes
3. Mix everything well
4. Season with salt, oil, wine vinegar, and pepper
5. Arrange on a platter and garnish with hard-boiled eggs, mushrooms in vinegar, and sliced smoked tongue or sardines

title: Smíšenina Zeleniny (Mixed Vegetables)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- asparagus heads
- young fresh peas
- young green bean pods
- cauliflower florets
- beef broth
- fresh butter
- salt
- vinegar
- wine
- pale roux

## Directions

1. Cut off asparagus heads, take several young fresh peas, several sliced young green bean pods and pieces of cauliflower florets, rinse everything, place on a baking sheet, pour good beef broth over it, add a piece of fresh butter, salt and stew
2. When the mixture is tender, add vinegar and wine, mix in pale roux, cook and place on a dish

title: Smíšený Zelný Salát (Mixed Cabbage Salad)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- white cabbage head
- red cabbage head
- salted boiling water
- salt
- pepper
- vinegar
- oil

## Directions

1. Select a nice head of white and a nice head of red cabbage
2. Remove leaves and ribs and cut leaves into very fine thin strips
3. Cook each type of cabbage separately in boiling salted water for about five minutes
4. Drain the water and let the salad cool
5. Season each type separately with salt and pepper
6. Dress with vinegar and oil
7. Arrange neatly side by side on a dish

title: Smíška (Ragout)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- veal roast sliced thin
- mushrooms pickled and chopped
- sour cucumbers cut up
- capers
- lemon sliced thin
- butter
- flour
- sardines
- lemon zest
- onion
- broth
- wine
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Grease a deep bowl and line it with thin slices of veal roast
2. Sprinkle with pickled mushrooms, chopped sour cucumbers, and capers
3. Layer thin slices of lemon and pieces of butter
4. Place the bowl over a pot of boiling water in the oven
5. Fry 2 tablespoons flour in butter, add several chopped sardines, lemon zest, and onion
6. Boil everything with broth, add some wine and lemon juice
7. Cook the sauce, pour it over the meat
8. Simmer briefly and serve

title: Smíška z Koroptví (Partridge Ragout)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- partridges
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) raw veal
- 6 decagrams (4 lots) fat smoked meat
- onion
- carrot
- celery
- parsley
- bay leaf
- pepper
- butter
- flour
- broth
- lemon
- vegetable bundle
- sardine butter
- lemon juice
- white wine

## Directions

1. Roast the partridges in the ordinary way.
2. Cut the raw veal and fat smoked meat into cubes.
3. Add onion, carrot, celery, and parsley cut into pieces, bay leaf, and several peppercorns.
4. Braise everything in butter.
5. Dust with 2 spoonfuls of flour and brown.
6. Pour in broth, cook with lemon and a bundle of vegetables.
7. Strain the sauce, mix with the juice from the partridges, add sardine butter, lemon juice, and white wine.
8. Add the roasted partridges to this sauce.

title: Smíška z koroptví (Partridge Ragout)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- partridges
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) raw veal
- 6 decagrams (4 lots) smoked meat
- onion
- carrot
- celery
- parsley cut into small pieces
- bay leaf
- several peppercorns
- butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- broth
- lemon
- bunch of herbs
- sardine butter
- lemon juice
- white wine
- rice

## Directions

1. Roast the partridges in the usual manner.
2. Cut the raw veal and smoked meat into cubes.
3. Braise everything together with onion, carrot, celery, parsley, bay leaf and peppercorns in butter.
4. Sprinkle flour over and brown it.
5. Add broth and simmer with lemon and a bunch of herbs.
6. Strain the sauce.
7. Mix the sauce with partridge juices and add sardine butter, lemon juice and white wine.
8. Place the partridges in the hot sauce and surround with rice.

title: Směs z jeleního masa (Venison Hash)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- venison meat
- hot water
- cold water
- bacon slices
- bay leaves
- onion
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- broth
- vinegar
- potatoes

## Directions

1. Bone the venison meat, rinse in hot water, then place in cold water.
2. Put on a baking pan with bacon slices, bay leaves, onion, salt and pepper.
3. Braise until the onion turns golden.
4. Remove the meat and make a roux with bacon using 2 tablespoons of flour.
5. Add 3/4 liter of broth and vinegar.
6. After half an hour, strain the sauce and braise the meat a little longer.
7. Add either mashed potatoes or roasted potatoes.

title: Snow Glaze (Polévání sněhové)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- egg whites
- sugar

## Directions

1. Whip 2-3 egg whites into a meringue
2. Spread on pastry
3. Sprinkle with finely crushed sugar

title: Snowy Arches (Sněhové obloučky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- approximately 1/2 kilo ground sugar
- 7 whole eggs
- grated lemon zest
- flour as needed

## Directions

1. Mix ground sugar with whole eggs
2. Add grated lemon zest and flour to form a thick dough
3. Spread onto a buttered baking sheet
4. Sprinkle with finely chopped almonds
5. Bake slowly
6. Cut into strips and curl around rounded wooden forms while hot

title: Snowy Mounds (Sněhové kopečky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 egg whites
- 6-8 chocolate tablets
- 4-6 tablespoons ground sugar
- 120 grams (8 lots) walnuts or hazelnuts, grated

## Directions

1. Make stiff snow from 8 egg whites
2. Grate 6-8 chocolate tablets and add to whites
3. Add 4-6 tablespoons ground sugar
4. Add 120 grams grated walnuts or hazelnuts
5. Place spoonfuls on waxed sheet
6. Sprinkle with grated chocolate
7. Dry in oven
8. Serve with tea or other candies

title: Sněhové Kopečky (Kisses)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 egg whites
- approximately 2 cupfuls of powdered sugar
- vanilla or lemon juice to taste

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites from 4 eggs into peaks
2. Add about 2 cupfuls of powdered sugar and vanilla or lemon juice to taste
3. Beat for a quarter to half hour until it stiffens

title: Sněhové kopečky (Meringue Kisses)
body:
## Ingredients

- egg whites from 4 eggs
- approximately two bowls of powdered sugar
- vanilla or lemon juice to taste
- butter
- stiff thick paper (preferably writing paper)

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites from 4 eggs into meringue
2. Add approximately two bowls of powdered sugar and vanilla or lemon juice to taste
3. Beat for a quarter to half hour until stiff
4. Butter stiff thick paper (preferably writing paper) and place on a baking sheet or wooden board
5. Drop heaps the size of approximately half an egg about an inch apart
6. Bake in the oven with the door open
7. Be careful that they do not turn red
8. When baked to golden color, remove and after about five minutes lift from the paper with a knife, pressing the side that was on the paper together

title: Sněhové Polévání (Snow Glaze)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2-3 egg whites
- finely crushed sugar
- cold water

## Directions

1. Beat 2-3 egg whites into stiff peaks
2. Spread on baked goods
3. Sprinkle with finely crushed sugar
4. Sprinkle with cold water
5. Bake in oven until golden

title: Sněhový dort (Snow Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- one coffee cup of sugar
- half coffee cup of butter
- half coffee cup of milk
- one and a half coffee cups of flour
- one teaspoon of baking powder
- snow from four egg whites

## Directions

1. Mix the sugar and butter well until it is like whipped cream
2. add the milk and flour with baking powder
3. finally add the snow from four egg whites
4. mix well and place in a pan to bake in the oven

title: Soup for the Sick
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 kilogram lean beef
- 1 kilogram veal
- 140 grams (8 lots) lean ham
- 3 liters water
- old hen or 3-4 old pigeons or partridge
- carrot, sliced
- bundle of vegetables
- celery

## Directions

1. Slice 1 kilogram of lean beef and 1 kilogram of veal
2. Add 140 grams of lean ham
3. Cook everything slowly in soup, then add 3 liters of water and old hen, old pigeons, or partridge
4. Cook for 6-7 hours over gentle heat with sliced carrot, bundle of vegetables, and celery
5. Remove fat
6. Strain
7. Can be kept for a long time

title: Soup with Calf's Brain Croquettes (Soup with Calf's Brain Colombines)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 calf brain
- salt
- 2 tablespoons butter
- fresh chopped parsley
- grated bread
- milk
- 1 tablespoon fresh butter
- 1 whole egg
- 2 egg yolks
- bread crumbs for coating

## Directions

1. Boil the calf brain in salted water, clean it thoroughly and place it in a pot
2. Add 2 tablespoons of butter with chopped fresh parsley and lightly fry the brain
3. Soak grated bread in milk and when it is well soaked, mash it and add it to the pot
4. Pour 1 cup of milk over it, place on heat and while constantly stirring, let it cook slightly, then remove and let cool
5. Cream 1 tablespoon of fresh butter until foamy, add the cooled cooked bread mixture, a little salt, 1 whole egg and 2 egg yolks and beat for about 30 minutes
6. Then fold in the beaten whites from 2 eggs and mix gently
7. Grease small molds with butter, fill them with this batter and bake

title: Soup with Groats Croquettes (Soup with Colombines)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups beef soup
- 0.5 cup groats
- 3 tablespoons fresh butter
- 3 whole eggs
- salt
- bread crumbs for coating

## Directions

1. In a pot, bring 2 cups of beef soup to a boil and stir in 0.5 cup of groats until it becomes a thick paste
2. Remove from heat and let cool
3. Cream 3 tablespoons of fresh butter until foamy and mix in 3 whole eggs alternately, always one egg at a time and one-third of the paste, and season with salt
4. Grease small molds with butter, sprinkle them generously with grated bread crumbs, fill them halfway with this mixture and bake slowly
5. When the croquettes are baked, turn them out and place in a soup bowl
6. Pour hot beef soup over them
7. The croquettes may also be cooked in a steamer

title: Soup with Ground Meat (Puree)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cooked or roasted beef or veal meat, leftover from previous day
- butter
- piece of onion
- 1 quart good beef soup
- 1 to 1.5 bread rolls or 2 slices of white bread or 3 crackers
- 2 to 3 hard-boiled egg yolks
- salt

## Directions

1. For 6 people, finely chop 1 cup of beef or veal meat, whether leftover roasted or cooked
2. Sauté it for about 15 minutes in butter into which you have sliced a piece of onion
3. Pound it in a mortar into a paste
4. In 1 quart of good beef soup, soften 1 to 1.5 bread rolls, or 2 slices of white bread, or 3 crackers
5. Add to this 2 to 3 hard-boiled, sifted egg yolks and the pounded meat
6. Mix everything well and pass through a sieve
7. Dilute as needed with beef soup and pour into a soup bowl with croutons made from toasted bread cut into cubes, or with a rolled accompaniment according to recipe 9

title: Soupe aux Huîtres au Vin (Oyster Soup with Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- three dozen oysters with their liquid
- one glass white wine
- two quarts water, parsley water, or lean broth
- four egg yolks
- one small cup cream
- a piece of butter

## Directions

1. Let three dozen oysters with their liquid and a glass of white wine boil until they become firm
2. Remove them and place on a folded napkin to dry
3. Strain the liquid back into the pot
4. Add either two quarts of water, parsley water, or lean broth, let it boil for a while and strain again
5. Beat four egg yolks with a small cup of cream and a piece of butter, thicken the soup well with this mixture and pour into a dish over the cooked oysters
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Soupe aux Huîtres à la Française (French Oyster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- white part of a small leek, finely chopped
- one small onion, finely chopped
- two ounces butter
- two ounces grated bread
- about sixty medium oysters with their liquid
- two quarts parsley water or lean broth
- salt
- pepper
- nutmeg
- fresh parsley, chopped
- four egg yolks or two whole eggs
- one small cup cream
- a piece of butter

## Directions

1. Chop the white part of the leek finely and slowly brown it with the finely chopped onion in two ounces of butter
2. Add two ounces of grated bread to it, let it brown a little with the onion and add about sixty medium oysters with their liquid and two quarts of parsley water or lean broth
3. Let it boil over high heat and stir constantly so the oysters do not stick to the bottom
4. Skim off the foam, salt and pepper the soup, season with nutmeg
5. Before serving, mix in a little chopped fresh parsley and thicken it with four egg yolks or two whole eggs beaten with a small cup of cream and a piece of butter
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Sour Potatoes (Kyselé brambory)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- flour
- onion
- beef broth
- vinegar
- lemon peel
- pepper
- salt
- cooked potatoes

## Directions

1. Place a heaping spoonful of butter in a pot and add two spoons of flour and let it froth
2. Add a spoon of finely diced onion and make a brown roux
3. Pour in good beef broth to make a thick sauce
4. Add a little vinegar, a piece of finely diced lemon peel, a little ground pepper and salt and let it simmer
5. Peel cooked potatoes, cut them into slices and place in the pot
6. Pour the sauce over them and let them simmer a little longer

title: Spanish Candies (Španělské cukrovinky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilogram almonds
- 8-10 egg whites
- 8-10 tablespoons grated sugar
- coarsely ground sugar for coating

## Directions

1. Peel almonds and cut into thin noodles
2. Leave in warm place to dry
3. Make stiff snow from 8-10 egg whites
4. Add 8-10 tablespoons of grated sugar mixed with almonds
5. Wax the baking sheet
6. Place small spoonfuls on sheet
7. Sprinkle with coarsely ground sugar
8. Dry in oven

title: Spanish Shavings (Španělské hoblovačky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilo peeled almonds
- egg white
- 1/4 kilo ground sugar
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Grate and rub 1/2 kilo peeled almonds with egg white
2. Add 1/4 kilo ground sugar with vanilla
3. Mix with egg white snow
4. Spread onto wafers
5. Bake on rounded wood forms

title: Spařené housky (Scalded Rolls)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- hard rolls
- boiling water
- butter
- gingerbread

## Directions

1. Cut hard rolls into several pieces or just split them, place on a plate, pour boiling water over them
2. After two minutes, drain the water, butter the rolls and sprinkle with gingerbread

title: Spěšné pečivo (Quick Pastry)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 24 dekagrams sugar
- 1 whole egg
- 5 egg yolks
- lemon peel rubbed with sugar
- 21 dekagrams white flour
- 8 egg whites beaten to stiff peaks
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Mix 24 dekagrams sugar with 1 whole egg and 5 egg yolks
2. Add sugar-rubbed lemon peel
3. Mix with 21 dekagrams white flour and the stiffly beaten 8 egg whites
4. Fill greased molds, sprinkle with breadcrumbs
5. Bake on a baking sheet

title: Spěšné preclíky (Quick Pretzels)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/8 kilogram butter
- 8 egg yolks
- salt
- 12 dekagrams sugar
- flour
- beaten egg for brushing
- sugar and vanilla for topping

## Directions

1. Cream 1/8 kilogram of butter with 8 egg yolks until fluffy
2. Season lightly with salt
3. Add 12 dekagrams of sugar and enough flour to form a firm dough
4. Fold six times in a cool place and rest 15 minutes, then fold again
5. Break off a piece each time, roll into a long shape, and make small pretzels
6. Place on a baking sheet, brush with beaten egg
7. When baked, sprinkle with sugar and vanilla
8. Store in a dry place

title: Srnčí játra (Venison Liver)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- venison liver
- flour
- pepper
- salt
- butter
- egg
- houska (bread roll)

## Directions

1. Remove membranes from venison liver and slice
2. Dust with flour, pepper, and salt
3. Fry on butter
4. Alternatively, pepper, dip in egg, and coat with grated houska

title: Srnčí kotletky (Venison Chops)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- aged venison
- bacon
- salt
- butter
- tomato or mushroom sauce

## Directions

1. Cut chops from aged venison
2. Pound them
3. Lard with bacon
4. Salt and fry on both sides in butter
5. Pour off the butter and serve with tomato or mushroom sauce

title: Srnčí kýta marinovaná (Marinated Venison Haunch)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- carrot
- parsley roots
- celery
- leek
- bay leaf
- lemon peel
- cloves
- peppercorns
- vinegar
- butter
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Slice 2 onions, 2 carrots, several parsley roots, half celery, and leek
2. Add bay leaf, lemon peel, several cloves, and peppercorns and cook in a liter of vinegar
3. Let cool completely and pour over the prepared haunch
4. Place in a cool location
5. After 4-5 days of marinating, roast on butter on both sides
6. Pour liquid and sour cream over it and serve with strained sauce
7. Lamb and beef haunches can be prepared the same way

title: Srnčí kýta s aspikem (Venison Haunch with Aspic)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- venison haunch
- salt
- pepper
- thyme
- bay leaf
- onion
- lemon peel
- capers
- broth or water
- aspic
- lemon slices

## Directions

1. Clean a marinated or properly aged venison haunch, lard it with bacon, salt and pepper it
2. Place on a baking sheet with thyme, bay leaf, 4-5 sliced onions, lemon peel, and capers
3. Add 3 tablespoons of broth or water
4. Turn it so it browns evenly
5. Slice it and arrange on a serving dish
6. Surround with aspic prepared as for boar, garnish with lemon slices
7. Sauce can be served separately

title: Srnčí neb jelení kotletky (Venison Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- venison cutlets
- salt
- melted butter
- wine
- pepper sauce

## Directions

1. Prepare venison cutlets in the manner of mutton cutlets, salt them
2. Dip in melted butter and roast either on a grill or in a roasting pan until nicely browned
3. Dilute the roasting juices with a little wine, add pepper sauce, boil until thick and dip the cutlets in it
4. You can also let them lie in marinade for several hours before roasting

title: Srnčí neb jelení řízky (Slices of Venison)
body:
## Ingredients

- venison thigh
- cooled cooked marinade
- salt
- clarified butter
- pepper sauce

## Directions

1. Slice nice pieces from venison thigh
2. Let them lie in cooled cooked marinade for about two hours
3. Salt them and quickly roast on hot clarified butter
4. Serve with pepper sauce or another piquant sauce in a separate dish

title: Srnčí s bílou omáčkou (Venison with White Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- venison
- butter or beef lard
- lemon peel
- vegetables
- flour
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Rinse the venison and place on a baking sheet with 3 decigrams (2 lots) of butter or beef lard, lemon peel, and all vegetables
2. Braise, then remove and clean
3. Make small dumplings from butter and flour and let them cook well in the sauce
4. Squeeze lemon juice into the sauce, boil, and pour over the meat

title: Srnčí s bílou omáčkou - Jiný způsob (Venison with White Sauce - Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- venison shoulder
- new spice
- onion
- pepper
- lemon peel
- celery
- parsley
- carrot
- vinegar
- water
- salt
- pale roux
- sour cream
- white sugar

## Directions

1. Rinse a marinated venison shoulder, add new spice, finely chopped onion, pepper, lemon peel, celery, parsley, carrot, equal parts vinegar and water, and salt
2. Roast in an oven until the meat becomes completely tender
3. Transfer the meat to another dish
4. Add pale roux to the sauce to thicken it well, add 3.5 deciliters (1 ladle) of sour cream and a piece of white sugar
5. During roasting, baste the meat and turn it
6. After a quarter hour, slice it and pour the sauce over it

title: Srnčí s hnědou omáčkou (Venison with Brown Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- venison
- vegetables
- spices
- brown roux
- burnt sugar
- potatoes

## Directions

1. Add all vegetables and spices to the venison as for braised venison with white sauce
2. When cooked, add brown roux and a piece of burnt sugar
3. Slice the venison into strips, place in the sauce
4. Arrange potatoes around it

title: Srnčí řízky (Venison Cutlets)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- venison from hindquarters
- butter
- egg yolks
- houska (bread roll)
- salt

## Directions

1. Remove membranes from venison from the hindquarters and cut into cutlets
2. Pound the cutlets
3. Salt them
4. Dip in butter mixed with 2 beaten egg yolks
5. Coat with grated houska
6. Fry on butter
7. Usually served with green beans or green peas

title: Srstkové Paštiky (Bilberry Paste)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- bilberries
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cook cleaned bilberries until soft
2. Pour onto a sieve so the water drains
3. Press through the sieve
4. For one part of pressed bilberry mass, add one and a half parts sugar
5. Cook together with constant stirring until very thick
6. Pour onto slate tablets and allow to dry completely

title: Srstkové Víno (Currant Wine)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half-ripe currants
- abundant sugar

## Directions

1. Only comb the half-ripe currants when dry
2. Select the most beautiful, crush and press them
3. Mix the juice with abundant sugar and pour into a barrel filled completely
4. Let the wine rest peacefully for four to six weeks
5. Then draw into other containers in which it remains for four to five months
6. Then draw the wine into bottles

title: Srstkové Víno - Jiný Způsob (Currant Wine - Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- unripe but fully developed currants of good flavorful varieties
- water
- finely ground sugar
- cognac

## Directions

1. Select, clean, and crush unripe but fully developed currants of good, flavorful varieties in containers
2. After 24 hours, pour off the juice, pour a little lukewarm water on the currants (about 1 liter of water to 4 liters of currants), mix everything thoroughly again
3. After twelve hours, strain everything and mix all the juices obtained
4. To about 20 liters of juice, add 6 kilograms of finely ground sugar
5. Let it ferment in a warm room
6. After two to three days, pour the juice into a barrel (preferably a wine barrel), adding 2 liters of cognac to every 20 liters of wine
7. Close the barrel and place it in a moderate, not too cold cellar
8. For the wine to be good, it must remain in the barrel for five years, transferring it from time to time
9. If it is to be drunk after a year, always draw it into bottles

title: Srstkový kompot (Medlar Compote)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- nice developed medlars that are not yet ripe
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Take nice developed but not yet ripe medlars
2. Clean them and remove the seeds
3. Boil the medlars once in soft water
4. Leave them covered to cool
5. When completely cooled, boil them again once but so they do not fall apart
6. Remove them and place in fresh water, and when cooled, let them dry on sieves
7. Place the medlars in well-boiled sugar
8. Boil together, skim the foam, cover the vessel and let it rest peacefully until the next day
9. The next day boil the medlars with the sugar several times, skim the foam
10. When cooled, place on a dish, pour over and sprinkle with sugar

title: Steamed Corn Bread (Corn Bread Prepared by Steaming)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 small cups cornmeal
- 1 small cup boiling water
- 1 small cup wheat flour
- 1 small cup milk
- 1 small cup dark molasses
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- salt as needed

## Directions

1. Pour boiling water over the cornmeal and mix well
2. When cooled, add wheat flour, milk, molasses, baking powder and salt, mixing everything well
3. Place in a deep bowl and steam in a well-closed pot for three hours
4. Serve while hot, sliced thin and with butter

title: Stewed Mutton with Biče (Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- mutton, preferably from ribs
- vegetables (as for beef)
- rice
- hot water
- butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Cut the mutton into larger pieces, preferably from the ribs, and cook it with vegetables as you would beef until tender.
2. For every two pounds of meat, take one bowl of rice, rinse it several times in hot water, pour the broth in which you cooked the meat over it, and cook the rice until tender.
3. Make a pale butter roux and use it to thicken the remaining broth.
4. Place the cooked meat on a serving dish, pour the thickened broth over it, add the cooked rice, season with cloves, and let it simmer a little longer.
5. Place the rice on the dish and arrange the cooked meat on top.

title: Stewed Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- flour
- fresh parsley (in summer) or dried parsley (in winter)
- onion, finely chopped
- beef broth
- vinegar
- lemon zest
- ground pepper
- caraway
- cooked potatoes
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Put a spoonful of butter in a pot and add a little flour to make a thin roux
2. Add a bit of fresh parsley in summer or dried parsley in winter
3. When the roux turns light golden in color, add finely chopped onion and let it foam
4. Pour in beef broth, a little vinegar, a piece of lemon zest, a little ground pepper and a piece of caraway
5. When the gravy is cooked to be neither too thick nor too thin, cut several cooked potatoes into it and add about a cupful of sour cream, but then it must not boil

title: Stewed Potatoes (Zadělané brambory)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- flour
- fresh parsley or dried parsley
- onion
- meat broth
- vinegar
- lemon peel
- ground pepper
- thyme
- cooked potatoes
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Place a spoon of butter in a pot and add a little flour to make a thin roux
2. Add a bit of green parsley in summer or dried parsley in winter
3. When the roux takes on a light golden color, add finely diced onion and let it froth
4. Pour in meat broth, a little vinegar, a piece of lemon peel, a little ground pepper and a piece of thyme
5. Let it simmer until the sauce is neither too thick nor too thin
6. Cut several cooked potatoes into it and add about a cup of sour cream, but then it must not boil

title: Strawberry Glaze (Polévání z jahod)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- strawberry juice
- sugar

## Directions

1. Mix strawberry juice with crushed sugar
2. Heat over moderate heat while stirring
3. Spread on pastry

title: Strawberry Ice Cream
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Half a liter and a third of ripe strawberries
- More than a liter of good sour cream
- Finely crushed sugar

## Directions

1. Pass the strawberries through a sieve
2. Add to the juice more than a liter of good sour cream
3. Sweeten everything with finely crushed sugar
4. Transform into ice cream using the method already described

title: Strawberry Paste (Jahodová paštika)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- strawberries
- sugar (at least half again as much as the fruit pulp)

## Directions

1. Press strawberries through a fine sieve
2. To one part of strawberry pulp add at least a half part of crushed sugar
3. Cook everything together several times
4. Place in vessels
5. When cooled, tie up
6. One can also add abundant sweetened apple pulp to the strawberry pulp and proceed as already described

title: Strawberry Shortcake (Jahodový koláč)
body:
## Ingredients

- four cups flour
- two teaspoons baking powder
- salt
- half a cup butter, finely crumbled
- milk

## Directions

1. Put four cups flour in a bowl
2. Mix in two teaspoons baking powder and a little salt
3. Mix well
4. Add half a cup finely crumbled butter and mix until all flour is well blended with butter
5. Add milk to achieve the desired consistency

title: Strong Soup
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- piece of veal
- beef soup
- carrot
- parsley
- celery
- white turnip
- salt
- cabbage

## Directions

1. Pound the chicken and piece of veal
2. Cook in beef soup with carrot, parsley, celery, white turnip, and salt
3. Strain
4. When ready to serve, add several pieces of cabbage

title: Strouhanková polévka (Bread Crumb Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2-3 eggs
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Make firm dough from eggs as for noodles and let it dry
2. Grate the dried dough and let the bread crumbs dry
3. Add the bread crumbs to the soup or fry them in butter first

title: Strouhánkové Knedlíky (Crumb Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grated hard rolls, bread rolls or bread
- ½ cup flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1 egg
- ½ cup milk
- salt

## Directions

1. Take 1 cup of grated hard rolls, bread rolls or bread and ½ cup flour
2. Mix in 1 teaspoon baking powder evenly
3. Beat 1 egg and add ½ cup milk to it
4. Pour it to the flour and add a little salt
5. Mix well, put the dough on a rolling pin, divide into 3 parts, round each one in flour, put to boil in salted water, cover and let boil ten minutes

title: Studená jahodová omáčka (Cold Strawberry Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 liter strawberries
- wine
- sugar
- lemon peel, grated
- lemon juice
- a little white flour
- cream

## Directions

1. Press the strawberries through a sieve
2. Dilute with wine, sugar, grated lemon peel, and lemon juice
3. Boil a little white flour with cream
4. Pour this into the sauce

title: Studená Omáčka k Zvěřiué (Cold Game Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- ten juniper berries
- a piece of sugar
- lemon peel, finely chopped
- three hard-boiled egg yolks
- half an onion, chopped
- two tablespoons good olive oil or fresh heated butter
- ten tablespoons wine vinegar
- juice of two lemons

## Directions

1. Pound in a mortar ten juniper berries with a piece of sugar and finely chopped lemon peel
2. Add three hard-boiled egg yolks and half a chopped onion and pound together thoroughly
3. Add two tablespoons of good olive oil or fresh heated butter, ten tablespoons of wine vinegar and the juice of two lemons
4. Mix well and then strain it
5. If the sauce is too thick, thin it further with vinegar as needed

title: Studená Omáčka z Bylin (Cold Herb Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cold egg yolks
- fine oil
- salt
- pepper
- 3 tablespoons vinegar
- 4 finely chopped onions
- chives
- parsley
- garlic

## Directions

1. Beat cold egg yolks with fine oil
2. Add salt, pepper, vinegar, finely chopped onions
3. Add chives, parsley, and garlic
4. Mix everything well and serve with fish, cold roasts, etc.

title: Studená sardelová omáčka (Cold Sardine Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- four sardines
- six hard-boiled egg yolks
- chopped fresh parsley
- wine vinegar
- fine olive oil or fresh melted butter

## Directions

1. Clean four sardines and remove all bones from them
2. Mash them in a cup with six hard-boiled egg yolks and chopped fresh parsley
3. Mix this with wine vinegar and fine olive oil or fresh melted butter
4. Pour into a serving dish

title: Studená Slanečková Omáčka (Cold Sprat Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sprat
- milk
- hard egg yolks
- chopped onion
- pepper
- 4-6 tablespoons oil
- 6 tablespoons vinegar

## Directions

1. Soak sprat in milk for several hours
2. Remove bones and skin and finely chop
3. Cook with hard egg yolks, chopped onion, pepper, oil, and vinegar until the sauce thickens

title: Studená želva (Cold Turtle)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- killed turtle
- water
- salt
- red wine
- broth
- bay leaves
- onion
- pepper
- cloves

## Directions

1. Soak the killed turtle in water for one hour
2. Boil in salted water for approximately fifteen minutes
3. Peel and eviscerate
4. Season with salt
5. Place on a baking pan
6. Pour over with red wine and broth
7. Add bay leaves, onion, pepper and cloves
8. Braise slowly until the meat is completely tender
9. Allow to cool with the broth
10. Slice into portions

title: Studená, žlutá rybí omáčka (Cold Yellow Fish Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- piece of carp or pike
- salt
- celery
- carrot
- flower
- ginger
- saffron
- pale roux
- wine
- four grated hard egg yolks

## Directions

1. Clean a piece of carp or pike and salt it
2. Place it in a dish with celery and carrot, flower, ginger and saffron
3. Braise it for a while, adding water so it does not burn
4. Add pale roux
5. Add a little wine and four grated hard egg yolks
6. Place on a cold place
7. This sauce is usually added to pike or trout

title: Studený křen s octem (Cold Horseradish Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- horseradish
- grated roll
- grated apple
- sugar
- salt
- beef broth
- white wine vinegar

## Directions

1. Grate a little horseradish and put in a bowl
2. Add a teaspoon of grated roll and a grated small apple
3. Add a small piece of sugar and salt appropriately
4. Pour a teaspoon of beef broth and pour good white vinegar over it

title: Studený nákyp (Cold Soufflé)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1.5 deciliters cream
- 6 raw egg yolks
- 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) cream
- 35 grams (2 lots) fresh gelatin
- biscuits

## Directions

1. Heat 1.5 deciliters of cream on the stove with 6 raw egg yolks, stirring until completely thick
2. Set aside to cool
3. Add 7 deciliters (2 tablespoons) of cream in which 35 grams (2 lots) of fresh gelatin has been mixed
4. Mix everything together and pour into a mold in which biscuits have been placed on the bottom
5. Place on ice

title: Studený Punč (Cold Punch)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 kilogram sugar
- Zest of several lemons
- Juice of 8-10 lemons
- 3 bottles good wine
- 1 bottle arrack
- 1.5 bottles rum

## Directions

1. Grate lemon zest over 1 kilogram of sugar
2. Chop the sugar and place on a plate
3. Pour juice from 8-10 lemons over it
4. Add 3 bottles of good wine, 1 bottle of arrack, and 1.5 bottles of rum
5. Mix everything together and let it rest for several hours
6. Serve on the table

title: Studený zajíc s omáčkou (Cold Hare with Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 2-3 whole onions
- Butter
- Flour
- Broth
- Lemon juice
- Salt
- Pepper
- Capers
- Cold hare, chopped

## Directions

1. Fry 2-3 whole onions in butter until browned
2. Remove the onions and make a roux with the butter in which they were fried and flour
3. Cook the roux with broth
4. Add lemon juice, salt, pepper and a spoonful of capers
5. Place the chopped cold hare in the sauce and heat it in the sauce

title: Studený Zelný Salát (Cold Red Cabbage Salad)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- red cabbage head
- hot water or vinegar
- vinegar
- oil
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Peel a nice head of red cabbage and remove the stem
2. Cut into fine thin strips
3. Either pour boiling water or vinegar over, or boil for a few minutes
4. Drain the water
5. Dress with vinegar and oil
6. Season with salt and pepper
7. When completely cooled, arrange nicely on dishes

title: Studený zemákový ježek (Cold Potato Starch Hedgehog)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- one liter milk
- cinnamon
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) lemon zest
- 12 dekagrams ground almonds
- 12 dekagrams potato starch mixed in milk
- salt
- 45 grams (3 lots) butter
- preserved fruit

## Directions

1. Cook one liter milk with cinnamon, mix with 12 dekagrams lemon zest and 12 dekagrams ground almonds, 12 dekagrams potato starch mixed in milk, salt and 45 grams butter
2. Cook slowly, pour into a mold moistened with water and place in a cold location to cool
3. Turn out onto a platter and decorate with preserved fruit

title: Studený zemákový ježek - jiný způsob (Cold Potato Starch Hedgehog - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half liter milk
- 195 grams (13 lots) butter
- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) sugar
- vanilla sliced
- potato starch
- sour cream
- salt
- 10 egg yolks
- egg whites for snow
- wine sauce

## Directions

1. Cook half liter milk with 195 grams butter, 12 dekagrams sugar and sliced vanilla
2. Add potato starch equal in amount to the butter, beaten with sour cream and cook until a thick porridge forms
3. While porridge cools, remove vanilla and stir the porridge again for a while, salt it, add 10 egg yolks and snow from egg whites
4. Place the mixture in a mold in hot water and boil for 1 1/2 hours
5. Serve with wine sauce

title: Stříbrný skládaný dort (Silver Layer Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- less than 1 cup butter
- 1.5 cups sugar
- 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
- 1 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 8 egg whites

## Directions

1. Make dough as described previously.
2. Mix in stiff snow from 8 egg whites.
3. Bake into 4 cakes.
4. When cooled, spread white frosting between them.
5. Cover the top of the cake with white frosting as well.
6. Alternatively, you may use a few drops of almond extract instead of vanilla.

title: Suchany Prešpurské (Pressburg Rusks)
body:
## Ingredients

- two cups warm milk
- one piece of compressed yeast
- fine flour
- eight egg yolks
- ten tablespoons sugar
- zest of half a lemon, grated
- a little nutmeg
- butter for greasing
- egg white icing (meringue)
- finely chopped almonds or peanuts
- grated bread
- sugar for topping

## Directions

1. Mix the warm milk with compressed yeast and add fine flour until the dough is about the consistency of dumpling dough; let it rise. If compressed yeast is not available and dried yeast is used instead, prepare the dough in the evening and let it rise overnight.
2. Once the dough has risen, mix in the eight egg yolks one by one, stirring well after each addition.
3. Add ten tablespoons sugar, the grated zest from half a lemon, and a little nutmeg; work everything together well.
4. Do not add much more flour, only dust the surface lightly with a bit of flour.
5. Grease a pan of ordinary size (about 8 by 14 inches), place the dough in it, and when the pan is three-quarters full, bake over moderate heat.
6. Once baked, let it cool and cut into slices about half an inch thick.
7. On both cut sides, spread with egg white icing (meringue made from egg whites and sugar).
8. Sprinkle well with finely chopped almonds or peanuts mixed with grated bread and sugar.
9. Place again on a pan and let dry in a not too hot oven until brown.
10. Store in a dry place. If well dried and stored in a dry place, they will keep for a year—if they are not eaten—but more likely they will be gone within a week.

title: Sucharový dort (Hardtack Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 15 egg yolks
- 375 grams fine sifted sugar
- 200 grams peeled and grated almonds
- grated zest of 1 lemon
- juice of 1 lemon
- 4 grams finely crushed cinnamon
- 1 small teaspoon clove powder
- stiff snow from 15 egg whites
- 250 grams ground hardtacks

## Directions

1. Mix 15 egg yolks with 375 grams fine sifted sugar, 200 grams peeled and grated almonds, grated lemon zest, lemon juice, 4 grams finely crushed cinnamon, 1 small teaspoon clove powder
2. Work everything together for about half an hour
3. Add the stiff snow from 15 egg whites and 250 grams ground hardtacks
4. Pour into buttered cake molds and bake slowly

title: Sucharový Dort (Rusks Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 15 egg yolks
- 375 grams fine sifted sugar
- 200 grams peeled and grated almonds
- 8 grated lemon zests
- juice of one lemon
- 4 grams finely ground cinnamon
- 1 small teaspoon ground clove powder
- firm snow from approximately 15 egg whites
- 250 grams ground rusks

## Directions

1. Mix 15 egg yolks with 375 grams fine sifted sugar, 200 grams peeled and grated almonds, 8 grated lemon zests, and juice of one lemon
2. Add 4 grams finely ground cinnamon and 1 small teaspoon ground clove powder
3. Work everything together for about half an hour
4. Slowly add firm snow from approximately 15 egg whites and 250 grams ground rusks
5. Pour into greased cake forms and bake slowly

title: Suchary (Twice-Baked Cookies)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- best wheat flour
- milk
- yeast
- salt
- eggs (to taste)
- sugar (to taste)
- vanilla (to taste)

## Directions

1. Make a loaf from best wheat flour, milk, yeast, salt, and add eggs, sugar, and vanilla to taste
2. Bake well until done
3. Let cool and slice
4. Place the sliced pieces on both sides on a buttered sheet
5. Toast until golden, then sprinkle with sugar

title: Suchary s Lískovými Ořechy (Hazelnuts Rusk)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 egg yolks
- sugar
- 240 grams peeled hazelnuts
- 4 eggs
- lemon zest
- egg white from 6 eggs
- 75 grams flour

## Directions

1. Beat 8 egg yolks with sugar, crush 240 grams peeled hazelnuts with 4 eggs until it rises
2. Add lemon zest rubbed with sugar, stiff snow from 6 egg whites, and 75 grams flour
3. Pour everything into a greased mold and bake the rusks over moderate heat

title: Suchá cukrová citrónová kůra (Dry Candied Lemon Peel)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- lemon peel, peeled
- sugar
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Dry the peeled lemon slices.
2. The cleaned sugar, to which powdered sugar has been added, should be well boiled.
3. Add the lemon peel to it, boil with it several times, stirring constantly.
4. When the lemon peel is well sugared, let everything cool, remove the peel, place it on a sieve and dry it well on warm stove.
5. Then it is packed into boxes, interspersed with fine paper and stored in a dry place.

title: Suché kvasnice (Dry Yeast)
body:
## Ingredients

- kousek kvasnic
- 2 kvarty vody
- 3 brambory
- 5 centů chmele
- lžice soli
- kukuřičná mouka
- koflík cukru

## Directions

1. Odpoledne namočte kousek kvasnic a udělejte kvásek, jakého se obyčejně používá na chleba
2. Ráno vezměte 2 kvarty vody a do té rozkrájejte 3 brambory
3. Nechte je chvíli vařit
4. Přidejte za 5 centů chmele a lžíci soli a opět nechte povařit
5. Sceďte to na připravenou kukuřičnou mouku
6. Přidejte koflík cukru a vše dohromady smíchejte, až je z toho hustá kaše
7. Když to vychladne, přimíchejte do toho onen skynutý kvásek
8. Nechte ještě hodinu kysat
9. Když to skyne, přidejte tolik kukuřičné mouky, až je to tak husté, jako na chléb
10. Nechte se to ještě jednou vykysät
11. Dělejte z toho malé koláčky, které nechte poblíže kamen aneb na slunci za tepla usušit
12. Na šest bochníčků chleba berte vždy jeden kousek vásnic

title: Sugar Arches (Cukrové obloučky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilo ground sugar
- 1/2 kilo fine flour
- grated lemon zest
- grated orange zest

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together to form a stiff dough
2. Spread thickly on oiled paper
3. Bake slowly until golden
4. Cut into strips while hot and curl around rounded wooden forms

title: Sugar Cuffs and Sausages (Cukrové rukávníčky a uzenky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 chocolate tablets
- 15 grams cinnamon
- 15 grams allspice
- 15 grams cloves
- ground sugar grated with lemon zest equal in weight to the chocolate
- flour as needed
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix chocolate, spices, and sugar together
2. Add flour as needed
3. Mix with 3 eggs to make a well-worked, stiff dough
4. For cuffs: shape into oblong pieces thickness of ordinary sausages, press indentation in center with fingers, form knots at both ends like sausages, place two halves parallel next to each other
5. For sausages: form short thick pieces, pierce hole through center from both sides to make small cuffs
6. Brush with beaten egg
7. Dry on waxed sheet
8. When done, may be decorated with small ribbons glued with icing on both sides of cuffs
9. These candies keep a long time

title: Sugar Hare (Cukrový zajíc)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 chocolate tablets
- ground sugar equal in weight to chocolate
- flour as needed
- 15 grams cinnamon
- 15 grams allspice
- 15 grams cloves
- clove flower
- ginger
- grated lemon zest from one lemon
- 120 grams grated peeled almonds
- eggs

## Directions

1. Grate 10 chocolate tablets
2. Add sugar equal to weight of chocolate, flour as needed
3. Add spices: cinnamon, allspice, cloves, clove flower, ginger
4. Add grated lemon zest
5. Add 120 grams grated almonds
6. Add eggs as much as dough will absorb and knead well
7. Roll out dough
8. Line baking sheet with wafer
9. Shape into rabbit hindquarters
10. Brush with beaten egg
11. Pierce all over with sliced, peeled almonds
12. Bake
13. Cut into portions like ordinary rabbit

title: Sugar Potatoes (Cukrové zemáky)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 kilogram grated almonds
- 1/4 kilo sugar
- egg yolks as needed for stiff dough

## Directions

1. Mix grated almonds, sugar, and egg yolks to form stiff dough
2. Form into balls
3. Prick to resemble actual potatoes
4. Roll in ground coffee
5. Dry on baking sheet

title: Sušené hovězí se smetanou (Chipped Beef in Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- dried beef
- butter
- flour
- cream or milk
- 1 egg
- pepper

## Directions

1. Cut the dried beef into thin slices with a sharp knife. Place on a skillet with a piece of butter and stir over heat for a moment.
2. Dust with flour, then add enough good cream or milk to make a thickened gravy. Let it cook together and at the end stir in one beaten egg. Season with pepper and serve in a covered dish.

title: Sušené kvasnice na jiný způsob (Dried Yeast Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 velké brambory
- kvart studené vody
- 2 unce chmele
- kornová mouka
- lžička cukru
- 1 kvasničku
- trochu mouky

## Directions

1. Očistěte 2 velké brambory, oloupejte a dejte vařit do kvartu studené vody se dvěma uncemi chmele
2. Nechte vařit půl hodiny
3. Dejte prochladnout a procedějte skrz čistý šat
4. Prosejte kornovou mouku, přidejte do ní lžičku cukru a tou chmelovou vodou zadělte husté těsto
5. Rozmočte v koflíku teplé vody jednu kvasničku, přidejte trochu mouky a udělejte kvásek
6. Nechte kvásek skynouto a pak to přidejte do těsta z té chmelové vody
7. Nechte to skynouto
8. Prosejte na stůl kornové mouky, těsto v tom vyválíme až je tuhé
9. Rozválíme ho na prst tlouštky a vykrájíte malou formou
10. Dejte sušit do stínu na papír moukou posypaný a denně obracejte
11. Když dobře proschly, uschovejte si je do vypraného moučného pytlíku a pověste do suchého místa

title: Svatební dort (Wedding Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds powdered sugar
- 1 pound butter
- 1 cup sweet cream
- 2 pounds fine sifted flour
- 1 teaspoon strong lemon extract
- 24 fresh egg whites

## Directions

1. Cream together the powdered sugar and butter until light.
2. Add 1 cup sweet cream, 2 pounds sifted flour, 1 teaspoon strong lemon extract, and beat well.
3. Beat very stiff snow from 24 fresh egg whites and gradually fold into the dough.
4. Line a deep mold with well-buttered paper.
5. Fill it three-quarters full with dough and bake at moderate and steady heat for about an hour.
6. Test with a wire or straw to see if it is baked.
7. When done, turn out onto a large plate.
8. When cooled, place on a cake stand, spread white frosting over the entire surface, and decorate with candy, figures, or sugar flowers.

title: Svařenina rajských jablíček (Tomato Jam)
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe tomatoes
- water
- sugar (half cup per cup of pulp)
- lemon (one per gallon), sliced
- whole ginger root

## Directions

1. Dip ripe tomatoes into hot water and peel off the skins.
2. Put them in a pot, set on fire, crush and let cook (without adding any water) for about three-quarters of an hour.
3. Add half cup of sugar per cup of pulp, one lemon per gallon sliced into rounds, whole ginger root, and cook about an hour.

title: Svařenina rajských jablíček a jablek (Tomato and Apple Jam)
body:
## Ingredients

- five quarts peeled ripe tomatoes
- six quarts trimmed and cored apples
- sugar (6 pounds)
- ground cloves (two tablespoons)
- ground cinnamon (three tablespoons)

## Directions

1. Cook five quarts of peeled ripe tomatoes and six quarts of trimmed and cored apples separately into a thick pulp.
2. Mix them together and add 6 pounds of sugar, two tablespoons of ground cloves and three tablespoons of ground cinnamon.
3. Cook for about another hour.

title: Svařenina ze zelenin k postním polévkám (Vegetable Stock)
body:
## Ingredients

- two carrots
- three onions
- leek
- head of celery
- all cut into slices
- piece of fresh butter
- half pot of peas
- piece of green parsley
- turnip
- fresh water

## Directions

1. Place two carrots, three onions, leek and a head of celery, all cut into slices, in a deep pot
2. Add a piece of fresh butter and let it fry until golden
3. Add half a pot of peas, a piece of green parsley and turnip
4. Pour fresh water over it and let it cook slowly for several hours, carefully skimming the foam
5. Remove from heat and let it rest quietly for half an hour
6. Slowly strain through a thick cloth into an earthenware pot without clouding the vegetable
7. Store in a cold place
8. This stock is suitable for every fast soup and for fast sauces

title: Svensk Salát (Swedish Salad)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- marinated herring, cut into small cubes
- roasted beef, cut into small pieces
- cooked potatoes
- red beets, cut into cubes
- apples, cut into cubes
- cleaned and rinsed sardines
- a little capers
- pickled and peppered cucumbers
- hard-boiled eggs, cut into pieces
- a little finely chopped onion
- Siberian wormwood
- salt
- pepper
- vinegar
- oil

## Directions

1. Cut the marinated herring into small cubes
2. Mix with roasted beef cut into small pieces
3. Add cooked potatoes, red beets cut into cubes, apples cut into cubes, cleaned and rinsed sardines, a little capers, pickled and peppered cucumbers, and hard-boiled eggs cut into pieces
4. Mix in a little finely chopped onion and Siberian wormwood
5. Season with salt and pepper
6. Drizzle with vinegar and oil and mix well

title: Svinuté hovězí (Roulade of Beef)
body:
## Ingredients

- round steak or flank steak
- salt
- pepper
- white bread or bread rolls
- milk
- eggs
- onion
- butter
- green parsley
- allspice
- breadcrumbs or bread roll crumbs
- water

## Directions

1. Take a round steak or flank steak and pound it well, especially if it is round steak; salt and pepper it lightly
2. Make a filling: take three slices of white bread or two bread rolls, soak in milk, and when soft, press out and add two eggs, one small finely chopped onion browned in butter until golden, a little chopped green parsley, a piece of butter, a pinch of allspice, salt, and pepper; mix well
3. Spread this filling over the entire steak, roll it up, tie with strong thread, and place in an oblong baking dish
4. Pour in a cup of warm water, place pieces of butter on top, and let roast slowly for two hours, basting with the rendered juice every 10 minutes
5. Half an hour before serving, sprinkle with grated bread or bread roll crumbs
6. When roasted, slice into cutlets and serve

title: Svitek - Another Method (Semolina Roll - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 dekagrams butter (8 lots)
- 4 eggs
- 24 dekagrams semolina (16 lots)
- 4 tablespoons sour cream

## Directions

1. Beat butter with 4 eggs, semolina and 4 tablespoons of sour cream
2. Place the mixture in a greased pan and bake in moderate heat
3. Cut the baked roll into cubes and cook in salted water or broth

title: Svitek - Another Method (Semolina Roll - Another Way)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- semolina, not too fine
- milk
- piece of butter
- salt
- sugar
- 9 dekagrams sugar (6 lots)
- 5-6 eggs

## Directions

1. Put semolina into milk with a piece of butter
2. Stir diligently until a thick porridge forms
3. Let it cool, salt it, sweeten it and add 9 dekagrams sugar
4. Add 5-6 eggs and mix in
5. Bake the rolls in the usual way

title: Svitek Krupičný (Semolina Soufflé Roll)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 75 grams butter (5 lots)
- salt
- flower
- 6 egg yolks
- semolina, as much as it can take
- 6 egg whites

## Directions

1. Beat butter with salt, flower and 6 egg yolks
2. Add as much semolina as it can take
3. Make a stiff snow from 6 egg whites and mix in
4. Grease a baking pan with butter, pour the batter in and bake
5. Turn out the baked roll and let it cool
6. Meanwhile, boil milk with sugar and butter
7. Cut the roll into large cubes and pour the milk over it

title: Svitek s Droždím (Roll with Yeast)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half kilogram flour
- 5 eggs
- 12 dekagrams butter
- 6 dekagrams sugar
- 12 dekagrams picked currants (8 lots)
- salt
- cinnamon

## Directions

1. Form a dough from flour, eggs, butter, sugar, currants, salt and cinnamon
2. When well worked, let it rise
3. Grease a pan and bake the rolls on both sides
4. Serve with fruit sauce

title: Svitek se Masem (Roll with Meat)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- leftovers of roast
- bread roll
- warm milk
- salt
- chopped lemon peel
- tablespoon flour
- 5 eggs

## Directions

1. Chop the roast
2. Cut bread roll and soak in warm milk, stir to form a paste
3. Mix in the meat, salt it, add chopped lemon peel, tablespoon flour and 5 eggs
4. Mix everything well, pour onto a greased pan and bake on both sides

title: Svitek se Sardelemi (Roll with Sardines)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half liter milk
- quarter liter flour
- 8 eggs
- 12 dekagrams sardines, deboned (8 lots)
- 2 tablespoons chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Mix flour into half liter of milk, add 8 eggs, chopped sardines, 2 tablespoons chopped parsley and bake
2. This roll is ready very quickly

title: Svitek se Slaninou (Roll with Bacon)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- regular roll dough
- chopped onion or chives
- bacon, cut into cubes

## Directions

1. Add chopped onion or chives to the regular roll dough
2. Heat bacon cut into cubes on a pan
3. Pour a tablespoon of dough on it and repeat until all dough is used
4. In this case, do not add sugar to the dough

title: Svitek se Zeleninou (Roll with Vegetables)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- parsley
- chives
- spinach
- marjoram
- butter
- tablespoon flour
- nutmeg
- 6 eggs

## Directions

1. Chop parsley, chives, spinach, marjoram and similar herbs
2. Fry with a tablespoon of flour in butter, season with nutmeg
3. Add 6 eggs and bake the roll

title: Svítek (Rolled Pancake with Eggs and Herbs)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 25 decagrams butter
- 10 whole eggs
- 6 handfuls grated bread roll
- 12 cooked eggs halved and cut into cubes
- parsley
- chives
- a little flower
- cream
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Mix 25 decagrams of butter, 10 whole eggs, 6 handfuls of grated bread roll, 12 cooked halved eggs cut into cubes, a little parsley, chives, a little flower, cream, pepper and salt.
2. Grease a mold with butter and sprinkle with grated bread roll.
3. Bake the rolled pancake.

title: Svítek Krupičný (Semolina Rolled Pancake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 75 grams butter
- salt
- flower
- 6 egg yolks
- semolina
- 6 egg whites

## Directions

1. Cream 75 grams of butter with salt, flower and 6 egg yolks.
2. Add as much semolina as it will take.
3. Make stiff snow from 6 egg whites and fold it in.
4. Grease a baking sheet with butter, pour the batter onto it and bake.
5. Remove the baked rolled pancake and let it cool.

title: Svítek na Jiný Způsob (Puff Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- salt
- 1 full cup wheat semolina
- butter
- sour sauce or sweet milk

## Directions

1. Take 6 eggs, whip well, salt slightly and sprinkle in 1 full cup wheat semolina, pour into a greased baking pan and bake in a hot oven
2. Sometimes serve the puff with sour sauce, sometimes preserve it in sweet milk

title: Svítek s Houbami (Roll with Mushrooms)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- mushrooms (porcini, truffles, or champignons)
- butter
- salt
- good broth
- 10 eggs
- good sour cream
- flour

## Directions

1. Clean the mushrooms, stew them briefly in butter with salt
2. Then stew them in good broth until completely soft
3. Prepare dough from 10 eggs, good sour cream, salt and flour
4. Bake thin rolls and always put prepared mushrooms between two rolls

title: Svítek s Houskou (Roll with Bread)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- bread roll, cut into cubes
- milk
- egg yolks
- 2 tablespoons flour
- salt
- lemon peel rubbed
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 9 dekagrams raisins (6 lots)
- 6 egg whites

## Directions

1. Soak bread roll cut into cubes in milk
2. Mix well with egg yolks, 2 tablespoons flour, salt, lemon peel, 3 tablespoons sugar, raisins and snow from 6 eggs
3. Make rolls from this mixture

title: Svítek s Kyselou Smetanou (Roll with Sour Cream)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half liter sour cream
- 75 grams sugar (5 lots)
- 15 egg yolks
- flour mixed with sour cream
- salt
- 10 egg whites

## Directions

1. Beat sour cream with sugar and 15 egg yolks until foamy
2. Mix with flour that was beaten with sour cream, salt and snow from 10 egg whites
3. Bake the roll, sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon and serve with sauce

title: Svítek s Třešněmi (Roll with Cherries)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe cherries
- rum
- quarter liter milk
- 10 tablespoons flour
- 8 egg yolks
- 6 dekagrams sugar (4 lots)
- 8 egg whites
- salt

## Directions

1. Pit ripe cherries, pour rum over them and let stand a while
2. Prepare dough from quarter liter milk, 10 tablespoons flour, 8 egg yolks, sugar, snow from 8 egg whites and salt
3. Mix everything well and pour dough onto a greased pan
4. After a short time, add cherries to the soft dough, pour dough over them and bake the roll

title: Svítek z Jiker (Fish Roe Roll)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Fish roe, finely chopped
- Butter
- Egg yolks
- Egg white foam (from several whites)
- Marjoram
- Garlic
- Grated bread roll
- Greased baking form
- Red bread roll

## Directions

1. Mix finely chopped fish roe with butter, egg yolks, foam from several egg whites, marjoram, garlic and grated bread roll.
2. Fill the greased baking form sprinkled with red bread roll with the mixture.
3. Bake the roll.
4. Slice and add to soup.

title: Svítek z masa (Bread and Meat Loaf)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- bread rolls
- milk
- 3 eggs
- salt
- calf kidneys
- butter

## Directions

1. Slice bread rolls and soak in a mixture of milk, 3 eggs and salt
2. Mix in finely chopped calf kidneys
3. Bake in butter, stirring frequently, tear into larger pieces with a fork and serve with salad

title: Svítek z Mouky (Flour Rolled Pancake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg yolks
- 3 decagrams butter
- flower
- flour
- salt
- 5 egg whites
- butter
- grated bread roll
- cream sauce or horseradish with sour cream

## Directions

1. Cream 6 egg yolks with 3 decagrams of butter, flower and salt.
2. Add as many tablespoons of flour as there are egg yolks.
3. Make stiff snow from 5 egg whites and mix everything.
4. Grease a mold with butter and sprinkle with grated bread roll.
5. Pour the batter into it so it is only two fingers from full.
6. Bake it, carefully remove it and serve with prepared cream sauce or sour cream horseradish.

title: Svítek z plic (Lung Roll)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal lungs
- Salt
- Water
- Parsley
- Butter
- Flour
- Broth
- 3 egg yolks
- Lemon sauce

## Directions

1. Cook veal lungs in salted water
2. Chop them finely and add finely chopped parsley that has been braised in butter
3. Add a little flour and broth and cook until thickened
4. Allow the mixture to cool, then add 3 egg yolks
5. Grease a mold and bake the roll in it
6. Serve as a separate dish with lemon sauce or slice into soup

title: Svítek z Telecích Jater (Calf's Liver Puff)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound calf's liver
- 3 or 4 tablespoons beef marrow
- 3 egg yolks
- 10 tablespoons breadcrumbs or white bread soaked in good milk
- grated lemon rind
- ground pepper
- salt
- 3 egg whites
- butter for greasing
- grated roll for coating

## Directions
