1. Rinse 1/2 pound of fine calf's liver, grate it on a grater and press it through a sieve
2. Heat 3 or 4 tablespoons of beef marrow, strain it and heat until it foams
3. Mix in 3 egg yolks one by one
4. Add 10 tablespoons of breadcrumbs or white bread soaked in good milk and well squeezed out
5. Add the grated liver and beat well
6. Mix in finely chopped lemon rind, ground pepper, and salt
7. Gently fold in stiff snow made from 3 egg whites
8. Grease a form with butter, coat with grated roll, fill with the mixture and bake in a not too hot oven for one hour

title: Svítek z Telecího Masa (Veal Puff)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound veal
- a piece of fatted lard
- lemon rind
- 1 roll or slice of white bread soaked in milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 4 whole eggs
- 2 tablespoons sour cream
- salt
- ground pepper
- 2 tablespoons grated roll

## Directions

1. Take 1 pound of veal, a piece of fatted lard, lemon rind, 1 roll or slice of white bread soaked in milk and squeezed out, and chop everything together
2. Beat 2 tablespoons of butter, mix into it 4 whole eggs
3. Add the chopped mixture to this, pour in 2 tablespoons sour cream, season with salt and ground pepper, add 2 tablespoons grated roll and mix well
4. Grease a pan with butter, fill with the mixture, place in the oven and let it bake
5. Cut the baked puff into pieces and serve

title: Svítek z Vajec (Egg Puff)
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 eggs
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 5 egg yolks
- 1 roll soaked in milk
- butter
- flowers
- several tablespoons sour cream
- salt
- 3 egg whites

## Directions

1. Cook 10 eggs hard, shell and chop them finely
2. Beat 3 tablespoons of butter until it foams, add 5 egg yolks to it and mix well
3. Add 1 roll soaked in milk and beaten with a piece of butter, a little flowers, several tablespoons sour cream, and salt
4. Add the chopped eggs and mix well
5. Gently fold in stiff snow made from 3 egg whites
6. Grease a form with butter, pour the mixture into it and bake in the oven, turn out onto a platter and serve

title: Svítek ze Sušených Hub (Dried Mushroom Puff)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups dried mushrooms
- salt water
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 4 whole eggs
- 2 rolls or 2 slices of bread soaked in milk
- lemon rind
- caraway seeds
- seasonings
- salt
- butter for greasing
- grated roll crust

## Directions

1. Soak 2 cups of dried mushrooms in cold water and cook them in salted water until soft
2. Strain the water, finely chop the mushrooms
3. Beat 2 tablespoons of butter on a platter, crack 4 whole eggs into it and mix
4. Add the chopped mushrooms, 2 rolls or 2 slices of bread soaked in milk and squeezed out, finely chopped lemon rind, a pinch of caraway seeds, season lightly, and salt and mix well
5. Grease a small pan with butter, coat with grated roll crust, pour the mixture into it and bake in the oven
6. Turn out onto a platter and serve whole, or cut it and use it to border spinach, lentils, or other vegetables

title: Svítek Švestkový (Plum Roll)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe plums
- sugar
- cinnamon
- rum or wine
- half liter milk
- 2 eggs
- 6 egg yolks
- salt
- 6 tablespoons flour

## Directions

1. Cut ripe plums in half, sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon
2. Pour rum or wine over them, cover and let stand a while
3. Prepare dough from half liter milk, 2 eggs, 6 egg yolks, salt, 6 tablespoons flour and snow from egg whites
4. When it begins to harden from the bottom, place plums on the roll and pour dough over them
5. When baked, sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon

title: Svítek Žemličkový (Bread Puff)
body:
## Ingredients

- crust from 4 rolls
- 3 cups sour cream
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 3 egg yolks
- salt
- 3 egg whites
- butter for greasing the form
- grated roll crust

## Directions

1. Grate the crust from 4 rolls and soak the interior in about 3 cups sour cream
2. Beat 4 tablespoons butter with 3 egg yolks
3. Mix in the soaked rolls, season with salt
4. Gently fold in snow made from 3 egg whites and the grated roll crust
5. Grease a shallow form with butter and coat with grated roll
6. Pour the mixture into it to about the height of a finger and bake the puff

title: Svítečky z Jater (Colombines of Calves Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- half a calf's liver
- milk
- 2 ounces of beef fat
- 4 whole eggs
- 1 grated roll soaked in milk

## Directions

1. Remove the skin from half a calf's liver and let it soak in milk for about two hours, then rinse it and scrape it on a board, removing the blood vessels and sinews; chop the liver with two ounces of beef fat, add four whole eggs to it, mix well, add one grated roll soaked in milk
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Svítečky z Telecích Ledvinek (Colombines of Veal Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 roasted veal kidney
- 5 whole eggs
- salt
- 3 heaping tablespoons of breadcrumbs
- a little finely chopped lemon zest
- a little chopped fresh parsley
- butter

## Directions

1. Chop the roasted veal kidney finely, place it in a bowl, add five whole eggs to it, salt it, add three heaping tablespoons of breadcrumbs, a little finely chopped lemon zest, a little chopped fresh parsley and mix well.
2. Butter the indentations on a muffin pan, sprinkle with breadcrumbs, put a spoonful of the mixture into each indentation and bake until golden.
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Svítky (Thin Pancakes)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half liter fresh milk
- 6 to 8 eggs
- quarter liter flour
- salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- lemon zest
- 1 tablespoon rum
- butter

## Directions

1. Make a thin batter from half liter of fresh milk, 6 to 8 eggs, quarter liter of flour, salt and 1 tablespoon sugar; lemon zest and 1 tablespoon of rum may also be added.
2. Mix the egg yolks in milk and fold in the egg white snow from the whites.
3. Heat 3 decagrams of butter on a pan, and when hot, pour 1 tablespoon of batter into it.
4. Shake the pan occasionally and check with a knife if the pancake sticks to the pan.
5. When the pancake is done on the bottom side, turn it onto a greased pan.
6. Sprinkle the finished pancake with sugar and cinnamon, place on a platter and put in the oven to keep warm; pile the rest one on top of the other.
7. Serve with compote, salad and sauces.

title: Svíčková pečené (Beef Tenderloin)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef tenderloin
- salt
- bacon strips
- onion
- whole ginger
- peppercorns
- allspice berries
- thyme
- bay leaf
- wine vinegar
- water
- butter
- sour cream

## Directions

1. If you have purchased the beef, remove the skin, salt it, and pierce densely with bacon cut into small strips
2. Place on a roasting pan one onion cut into slices, a piece of whole ginger, several peppercorns and allspice berries, some thyme, and one bay leaf
3. Pour over 2 spoonfuls of wine vinegar and the same amount of water, and let it simmer for half an hour
4. Then pour the boiling vinegar mixture over the prepared meat and let it marinate for about two days, turning it every day
5. Place the meat on a baking sheet, put a piece of butter under it, roast slowly, basting with sour cream, and roast until brown

title: Svíčková pečeně (Sirloin Roast)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sirloin
- bacon
- onion (sliced)
- pepper (6 grains)
- lard or butter
- well water
- breadcrumbs (grated)
- lemon (sliced into pieces)

## Directions

1. Clean the sirloin, remove all membranes and bones, pound it
2. Salt it and lard with bacon like hare
3. Place sliced onion, 6 grains of pepper, a piece of lard, bacon or butter on baking sheet
4. Baste with well water, place roast in it, cover
5. Slowly braise in oven until tender on all sides
6. Cut into equal portions and place on platter
7. Strain sauce from baking sheet over it, sprinkle with grated breadcrumbs
8. Border with lemon sliced into pieces before serving

title: Svíčková pečeně s kyselou omáčkou (Sirloin Roast with Sour Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sirloin
- pepper (several grains)
- new spices
- bay leaf
- thyme
- 2 onions (chopped)
- celery
- carrot
- parsley
- lemon peel
- water (0.5 liter)
- vinegar (0.5 liter)
- sugar
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Remove sinews and fat from sirloin, lard with bacon or leave unlarded
2. Place several grains of pepper, new spices, bay leaf, thyme, 2 chopped onions, celery, carrot, parsley, and a piece of lemon peel on baking sheet
3. Baste with water and vinegar, equal amounts of each (0.5 liter each)
4. Place roast in this and let lie for at least 12 hours
5. Place in oven and braise slowly until nearly all sauce is absorbed into the roast
6. Cut roast into pieces, squeeze juice from one lemon into remaining sauce
7. Add a piece of caramelized sugar
8. Create a wreath of pastry around the roast and strain sauce over it

title: Svíčková s bílou omáčkou (Sirloin with White Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sirloin
- flour (2 tablespoons)
- sour cream (3.5 deciliters)
- cranberries or preserves
- other vegetables as desired

## Directions

1. Clean and prepare the sirloin
2. After it has lain for 12 hours, roast it
3. Cut into pieces
4. Add 2 tablespoons flour to the sauce and braise for a quarter hour
5. Strain, add 3.5 deciliters of good sour cream
6. Stir for 5 minutes and pour over the roast
7. Arrange cranberries or preserves and other vegetables around the roast

title: Svíčková se sardelemi (Sirloin with Sardines)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sirloin
- salt
- 30 grams butter (2 lots)
- water
- 5 sardines
- 60 grams butter (4 lots)
- marjoram
- pepper
- ginger (grated)
- beef broth or water

## Directions

1. Remove all membranes from sirloin, salt it well, pound it
2. Baste with water on baking sheet, add 30 grams butter
3. Braise until half-cooked
4. Clean sardines, scrape and wipe the meat
5. Mix sardine meat with 60 grams butter, add a little marjoram, pepper and finely grated ginger
6. Spread this mixture on the roast
7. Baste with beef broth or water and braise until tender
8. Cut into slices, place on platter, pour sauce over it and border with anything desired

title: Sweet Cabbage (Sladké zelí)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Cabbage head
- Beef broth or water
- Onion
- Sugar
- Raw bacon or butter
- Salt
- Roux made from flour mixed with butter
- Rose-hip paste
- Burnt sugar
- Pork or mutton meat

## Directions

1. Break off the upper leaves from the head, cut the head into equal pieces and remove the core
2. Rinse the cabbage, clean it and pour boiling water over it, letting it stand for ten minutes
3. Place on a baking sheet, add beef broth or water, add finely chopped onion, a good piece of sugar, bacon cut into cubes or butter, and salt
4. Braise until completely soft
5. Press rose-hip paste through it and mix in a piece of burnt sugar
6. Place pork or mutton meat on a dish and surround with cabbage

title: Syrob z javorového cukru (Maple Syrup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 libry javorového cukru
- 1 libra kouskového cukru
- 3 pinty vody

## Directions

1. Rozsekej půl libry javorového cukru na drobné kousky a dej do hrnku.
2. Přidej k němu libru kouskového cukru a nalej na to tři pinty vody.
3. Nech vařit pět minut, seber pěnu a odstav.

title: Syrobová omáčka (Molasses Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 koflík syrobu
- 1 koflík vody
- 1 lžíce másla
- trocha skořice
- 1 čajová lžička kukuřičné škrobové mouky
- sůl
- šťáva z 1 citronu (nebo ocet)

## Directions

1. Jeden koflík syrobu, jeden koflík vody, jednu lžíci másla, trochů skořice, rovnou čajovou lžičku kukuřičné škrobové mouky, trochu osolím.
2. Přidám šťávu z jednoho citronu (když by nebyl citron, ocet se může přidat).
3. Nechám to povařit asi 20 minut.

title: Ságo Soup (Sago Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- quarter pound of sago
- two quarts of clear strong beef broth
- four egg yolks
- a little warm broth

## Directions

1. Rinse a quarter pound of sago and pour two quarts of clear strong beef broth over it and let cook until soft
2. In a small cup, beat together four egg yolks with a little warm broth, mix this into the remaining boiling broth and serve
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Sázená vejce v kyselé smetané (Baked Eggs in Sour Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- sour cream (one cup)
- eggs (six whole)
- butter (finely chopped)

## Directions

1. Grease a baking dish with butter
2. Pour one cup of sour cream into it
3. Break six whole eggs into it
4. Sprinkle with a little finely chopped butter on top
5. Bake in the oven until they set somewhat
6. Serve immediately at the table

title: Sýr z kyselého mléka (Sour Milk Cheese)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- milk or buttermilk
- caraway
- dye

## Directions

1. Take milk collected or buttermilk; heat it to +30-40° R. and let it curdle.
2. Place the cheese in clean cloth, press it, mix with caraway, dye it, and place into molds, then either dry it completely or pickle it.
3. Slightly dried cheese is placed in vessels, covered with clean linen cloth soaked in beer.
4. Completely dry cheese is suitable for grating, pickled cheese then for eating.

title: Tašky (Pockets)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- dough for noodles
- spinach
- clove of garlic
- marjoram
- flowers
- butter
- onion
- grated bread crumbs
- egg white

## Directions

1. Make dough like for noodles and roll out
2. Cut square pieces with a cutter
3. Clean and sort spinach, salt only the leaves and scald
4. Drain with cold water
5. Chop or press through sieve
6. Add minced garlic clove, marjoram, and flowers
7. Fry butter with onion until half done
8. Add spoon of grated bread crumbs
9. Mix in spinach and cool
10. Place on dough squares
11. Brush edges with egg white
12. Cover with another square
13. Boil in salted water
14. Drain
15. Sprinkle with grated bread and pour melted butter over
16. Instead of spinach, brain, chopped meat, etc. may be used

title: Tašky s mandlovou nádivkou (Almond-Filled Pastry Pockets)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 dekagrams (8 lots) ground almonds
- 12 dekagrams sugar
- grated lemon zest
- 6 egg yolks
- snow from 4 egg whites
- butter dough
- egg for brushing
- flour for dusting

## Directions

1. Make the filling by mixing the ground almonds, sugar, grated lemon zest, egg yolks, and egg white snow, stirring for a quarter hour
2. Roll out the butter dough and cut into square pieces
3. Place the prepared filling on each piece
4. Moisten the edges with water, fold and press together
5. Brush the pastry pockets with egg
6. Bake on a floured baking sheet

title: Tašky s mandlovou nádivkou (Envelopes with Almond Filling)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 dekagrams ground almonds
- 12 dekagrams sugar
- grated lemon zest
- 6 egg yolks
- 4 egg whites beaten stiff
- butter dough
- egg for brushing

## Directions

1. Prepare filling by mixing 12 dekagrams of ground almonds, 12 dekagrams of sugar, grated lemon zest, 6 egg yolks, and stiff snow from 4 egg whites
2. Mix everything for a quarter hour
3. Roll out butter dough and cut into square pieces
4. Place the prepared filling on them
5. Fold, moisten edges with water, seal, and press
6. Brush the envelopes with egg
7. Bake on a floured baking sheet

title: Tažená nudle s tvarohem (Cottage Cheese Roll)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons butter
- 1 pound cottage cheese
- 4 egg yolks
- 1 whole egg
- sugar
- vanilla
- raisins
- finely chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Make dough as for apple strudel
2. Rub together 4 tablespoons butter with 1 pound cottage cheese
3. Add to it four egg yolks and one whole egg and enough sugar with vanilla so that the cottage cheese is sufficiently sweet
4. Mix everything well
5. Roll out the dough for strudel
6. Spread it with beaten egg and coat with the prepared filling
7. Sprinkle with raisins and finely chopped almonds
8. Roll up the strudel
9. Place in a pan greased with butter
10. Coat the surface with butter and let it bake

title: Tažená Smetanová Štrudle (Cream Roll)
body:
## Ingredients

- dough (as for apple strudel)
- three tablespoons butter
- four egg yolks
- one cup good sweet cream
- four egg whites
- flour
- raisins, picked through
- almonds, chopped
- sugar
- butter
- two cups cream
- six egg yolks
- a little wine
- sugar

## Directions

1. Make dough as for apple strudel and cover with a warm baking dish
2. Beat three tablespoons of butter with four egg yolks, add one cup of good sweet cream, beat snow from four egg whites and fold into the cream
3. Dust a cloth with flour, stretch the dough thin, spread with the cream and egg mixture, sprinkle generously with picked-through raisins, chopped almonds and pounded sugar
4. Lift one side of the cloth and roll up the strudel
5. Grease a baking dish with butter, place the strudel in it and let bake slowly
6. Boil two cups of cream, beat six egg yolks with a little wine and pounded sugar, add to the boiling cream and stir until it thickens
7. Bring to the table with the strudel

title: Tažená Štrudle na Jiný Způsob (Stretched Strudel, Alternative Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- three quarters cup warm water
- one tablespoon butter
- one whole egg
- one cup flour
- salt (as needed)
- apples, sliced
- ground cinnamon
- almonds, finely chopped
- raisins without seeds (sultanas)
- fresh butter
- sugar

## Directions

1. Take three quarters cup of warm water, add one tablespoon butter and one whole egg
2. Put one cup flour on a pastry board, make a well in it, pour the water into it and work into a nice loose dough
3. Knead well, adding flour as needed, beat thoroughly with a rolling pin and place in a clean cloth
4. Let rest under a warm bowl for about fifteen minutes
5. Meanwhile, prepare sliced apples, ground cinnamon, finely chopped almonds, raisins without seeds (sultanas), butter and sugar
6. Spread the cloth on the table, roll out a little dough and then stretch it
7. When the dough is stretched thin enough, lay apples on it, sprinkle with almonds, cinnamon and sugar
8. Take fresh butter and cut thin slices from it, lay them thickly on the apples
9. Roll up the strudel and bake

title: Tažená Štrudle s Jablky (Apple Roll)
body:
## Ingredients

- one cup clear warm water
- a piece of butter about half an egg in size
- one whole egg
- about one quarter cup sugar
- a pinch of salt
- about one quart flour
- good apples
- butter
- bread, grated and fried
- one half pound raisins
- sugar
- ground cinnamon
- melted butter
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Pour one cup of clear warm water into a cup and dissolve in it a piece of butter about half an egg in size
2. Add one whole egg, about one quarter cup sugar, and a pinch of salt
3. Put about one quart of flour on a pastry board, make a large well in it, pour the water mixture into it, and work into a stiff dough like for buns
4. Knead well, beat with a rolling pin, cover with a bowl and let rest for one hour
5. Meanwhile, peel good apples and cut into thin slices
6. Fry grated bread in butter and pick through and clean one half pound of raisins
7. Spread a cloth, dust lightly with flour, and stretch the dough very thin on it
8. Lay apples in a line next to the cloth edge, sprinkle with the fried bread and raisins, then with sugar, dust with ground cinnamon and sprinkle with melted butter
9. Gradually lift one side of the cloth, rolling the strudel into a roll
10. Grease a baking pan well with butter, roll the strudel into it in a circle, brush the surface with butter and let it bake slowly for one hour
11. While baking, brush with butter; when half-baked, pour over a cup of milk and finish baking
12. When done, turn out onto a long platter (platter), cut into slices and sprinkle generously with powdered sugar

title: Tažená Štrudle s Rýží (Rice Roll)
body:
## Ingredients

- dough (as for apple strudel)
- one cup nice cleaned rice
- one quart milk
- two tablespoons butter
- salt
- five egg yolks
- sugar
- vanilla
- three egg whites
- melted butter
- sugar

## Directions

1. Make dough as for the apple strudel
2. Cook one cup of nice cleaned rice in one quart of milk until soft and let it cool
3. Beat two tablespoons of butter, add to the cooled rice, salt it, add five egg yolks, a little sugar with vanilla and mix well
4. Slowly fold in stiff snow from three egg whites
5. Stretch the dough on a cloth, spread with the rice filling, lift one side of the cloth and roll up the strudel
6. Grease a baking dish with butter, place the strudel in it, brush the surface with melted butter and bake
7. Turn out onto a dish, cut and sprinkle with sugar

title: Tažená Štrudle s Čokoládou (Chocolate Roll)
body:
## Ingredients

- six egg yolks
- six tablespoons sugar
- one quarter pound pounded almonds
- two tablespoons grated chocolate
- three egg whites
- dough (as for apple strudel)
- flour
- butter
- good cream
- sugar
- grated chocolate

## Directions

1. Beat six egg yolks with six tablespoons sugar, add to it one quarter pound pounded almonds and two tablespoons grated chocolate and mix well
2. Slowly fold in snow from three egg whites
3. Make dough as for apple strudel, stretch it thin on a cloth dusted with flour
4. Brush the stretched dough with butter and spread the filling about as thick as a stalk, lift one side of the cloth and slowly roll up the strudel
5. Grease a baking dish with butter, place the strudel in it, pour a little good cream over it, sprinkle with sugar and powdered grated chocolate
6. Bake properly, turn out onto a dish, cut into pieces and bring to the table

title: Tažená štrudle s višněmi (Cherry Roll)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts fresh cherries
- 1 pound almonds
- half a small pot of sugar
- zest of half a lemon
- hard roll
- butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Make dough as for apple strudel
2. Pit 2 quarts of fine cherries
3. Place them in a small pan and let them cook a little
4. Strain the juice and let them cool
5. Roughly pound 1 pound of almonds
6. Add half a small pot of sugar and grated zest of half a lemon
7. Grate hard roll and mix everything together
8. Spread a cloth and sprinkle with a little flour
9. Roll out the dough thinly
10. Brush with melted butter
11. Place the cherries on it
12. Sprinkle with the nut mixture
13. Lift the cloth and roll up the strudel
14. Place in a pan or baking dish greased with butter
15. Brush the strudel on top with butter
16. Let it bake for a good half hour
17. Remove to a platter and sprinkle with sugar
18. You can also use fresh whole cherries

title: Telecí Frikando (Fricandeau of Veal)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds veal leg
- bacon slices
- bacon and ham, chopped
- onion, finely chopped
- parsley
- celery
- beef broth
- lemon, cut into quarters

## Directions

1. Cut slices from two pounds of nice raw veal leg, pound them and remove the skin
2. Lard them generously with bacon
3. Place chopped bacon and ham in a pan, add finely chopped onion, parsley and celery
4. Add the slices and let stew, gradually adding beef broth in small amounts
5. When the slices are sufficiently tender, remove to a platter
6. Pour the strained liquid over them and garnish with lemon cut into quarters
7. May also be garnished around the platter with spinach, lettuce, or dumplings cut into slices for the meat

title: Telecí Hlava Sekaná (Hashed Calf's Head)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 calf's head, cleaned
- veal meat, chopped
- piece of veal fat from kidney
- piece of onion, chopped
- lemon rind, chopped
- 1 roll soaked in milk and squeezed, or 2 slices white bread with crust removed
- 3 eggs mixed with butter
- 4 anchovies, cleaned and rubbed with butter
- 6 egg yolks
- 6 tablespoons sour cream
- salt
- fresh butter
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Boil the cleaned calf's head in salted water until tender
2. Remove the bones and cut the head into square pieces
3. Chop together a piece of veal meat and a piece of veal fat from the kidney with a piece of chopped onion and chopped lemon rind
4. Add one roll soaked in milk and squeezed, or two slices of white bread with crust removed
5. Chop everything together, remove sinews and rub the mixture in a bowl
6. Add three eggs mixed with butter, four anchovies cleaned and rubbed with butter, six egg yolks, and six tablespoons of sour cream
7. Season with salt and mix well
8. Grease a baking dish with fresh butter and spread half of the mixture on it
9. Arrange the cut calf's head on top
10. Pour lemon juice over it
11. Add the remaining half of the mixture on top
12. Pour melted fresh butter over it
13. Sprinkle with grated bread crumbs and finely chopped anchovies
14. Bake slowly in the oven and serve in the same dish

title: Telecí hlavička s podpouštkou (Veal Head with Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal head
- Salt
- Water
- Wine
- Vinegar
- White sugar
- Burnt sugar
- Pepper
- Onion
- Roux
- 30 grams butter

## Directions

1. Rinse the veal head and cook in salted water until tender
2. Carefully cut into equal pieces
3. Make sauce from wine, vinegar, white sugar, burnt sugar, pepper and onion
4. Cook everything in the broth from the head, add roux and 30 grams of butter
5. Cook and strain the sauce over the head

title: Telecí hrudí nadívané (Stuffed Veal Breast)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal breast
- 45 grams fresh butter
- 2 whole eggs
- 1 egg yolk
- Spices
- Salt
- 2 bread rolls
- Milk

## Directions

1. Cut open the veal breast, break the ribs
2. Rinse and salt it
3. Mix 45 grams of fresh butter, 2 whole eggs, 1 egg yolk, a little spice, salt and 2 grated bread rolls, thin with milk
4. Mix everything together and place in the cut breast
5. Sew it shut, grease and bake

title: Telecí Hrudí Nadívané (Stuffed Veal Brisket)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 whole eggs
- salt
- 1 small onion, finely chopped
- 1/2 cup milk
- parsley, chopped
- lemon zest, chopped
- a pinch of ground clove
- pepper
- grated bread roll or white bread
- veal brisket
- water

## Directions

1. Ask the butcher to make a pocket in the brisket for stuffing, or use a knife to carefully cut a deep pocket between the ribs and skin
2. Beat 2 tablespoons of butter and mix in 2 whole eggs, salt, the finely chopped small onion, 1/2 cup milk, chopped parsley, chopped lemon zest, a pinch of ground clove and pepper
3. Add grated bread roll or white bread until the mixture is thinner than dumpling dough
4. Mix well and fill the brisket pocket with this mixture, then sew shut with white thread
5. Salt both sides of the brisket
6. Place on a baking pan with ribs on top, add water, place pieces of fresh butter on top, and roast at frequent intervals until beautifully browned

title: Telecí játra (Calf's Liver)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- calf's liver
- bacon
- onion
- white pepper
- diced bacon
- beef broth or water
- 3½ deciliters (žejdlík) sour cream

## Directions

1. Clean the liver, remove all membranes, lard with bacon
2. Season with pepper, add sliced onion, white pepper and a piece of chopped bacon
3. Pour over with beef broth or water and braise until tender
4. Strain the sauce, add 3½ deciliters of sour cream, place the liver in it and simmer for a while

title: Telecí játra (Veal Liver)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal liver
- Bacon
- Onion
- Butter or bacon
- Salt
- Pepper
- Cloves

## Directions

1. Wash the liver, remove the membrane; salt it, pierce with bacon, chop onion and braise with butter or bacon for a while; then place the liver on a baking pan with the onion, add pepper and 4 cloves, braise until softened, strain the sauce over it, and the liver may be sliced or left whole.

title: Telecí játra s kyselou omáčkou (Calf's Liver with Sour Cream Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf's liver
- bacon sliced thin and peppered
- fresh lard
- onion
- carrot
- leek
- celery
- parsley roots
- bay leaf
- thyme
- wine vinegar
- sour cream
- bread rolls grated
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Choose nice calf's liver, remove all skin and thread it with bacon sliced thin and peppered
2. Grease a small pan with fresh lard
3. Put on it sliced onion, sliced carrot, leek, celery, parsley roots, bay leaf and a little thyme
4. Place the liver on top and let it brown slightly in the oven
5. Then add half a wine glass of good vinegar and a cup of sour cream
6. Sprinkle with two spoonfuls of grated bread roll and let the liver stew slowly in its juices, basting it constantly with this liquid
7. When bringing the liver to the table, salt it and place on a dish
8. Remove all fat from the sauce, salt it and strain it through a sieve over the liver

title: Telecí játra se špekem (Calf's Liver and Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 to 8 thin slices of bacon
- calf's liver
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- caraway seeds

## Directions

1. Fry 6 to 8 thin slices of bacon
2. When done, remove to a plate and keep warm
3. In the rendered bacon fat, fry liver sliced into cutlets, which you have salted, peppered, dusted with flour and sprinkled with caraway seeds
4. When fried brown, remove it and arrange with the bacon
5. Serve hot on the table

title: Telecí Karbanátky (Veal Croquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- approximately 2 pounds veal meat from the leg
- 2 heaping tablespoons butter, or 2 tablespoons marrow
- 2 eggs
- 2 rolls, or 4 slices bread
- rind of half a lemon, grated
- salt
- pepper
- pinch of flowers (spice)
- butter for frying

## Directions

1. Chop the veal meat finely
2. Rub two heaping tablespoons of butter or two tablespoons of marrow and beat in two eggs, then rub again
3. Add to the meat
4. Grate two rolls or 4 slices of bread and the rind of half a lemon
5. Season with salt, pepper, and a pinch of flowers
6. Form the meat into small patties the size of a palm
7. Sprinkle with grated bread
8. Fry in butter until golden
9. Serve with lemon cut into quarters

title: Telecí kotletky (Breaded Veal Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal meat from the ribs
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- egg
- breadcrumbs
- clarified butter or lard
- tomatoes (optional, for sauce)

## Directions

1. Take a piece of veal meat from the ribs
2. Remove all sinews and tendons and cut so that each piece has one rib bone attached
3. Clean the bone at the end for the length of one inch with a knife
4. Beat the cutlets well
5. Salt and pepper them
6. Dust with flour
7. Dip in beaten egg
8. Sprinkle with breadcrumbs
9. Fry in hot clarified butter until golden
10. You may serve them like cutlets, or you may serve with a sauce made from tomatoes in a separate dish

title: Telecí kýta (Roasted Veal Leg)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal leg
- Salt
- Fresh butter
- Water
- Bread roll
- Caraway or sage

## Directions

1. Remove all membranes from the veal leg, bones may be removed, rinse it thoroughly, preferably in soft water
2. If from an older calf, pound it, salt it, grease with fresh butter, add water and roast in the oven on a baking sheet until golden
3. Or bake the nearly cooked leg, grease with butter and sprinkle with grated bread roll, then finish baking
4. Or grease with butter and sprinkle with caraway, or grease with butter and lay four sprigs of sage underneath

title: Telecí kýta (Veal Leg)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal leg
- Salt
- Fresh butter
- Water
- Bread crumbs
- Caraway seeds
- Sage sprigs
- Anchovies
- Vinegar
- Water
- Onion
- New spices
- Pepper
- Lemon peel
- Carrot
- Parsley root
- Thyme
- Bay leaf
- Austrian wine
- Burnt sugar

## Directions

1. Remove all membranes from the veal leg; bones may be removed, meat is cleaned, preferably in soft water.
2. If from an older calf, pound it, salt it, coat with fresh butter, add water and roast in the oven on a baking pan until golden.
3. Alternatively, after partial roasting, coat with butter and sprinkle with bread crumbs, then finish roasting.
4. Alternatively, coat with butter and sprinkle with caraway seeds, or coat with butter and place four sage sprigs underneath.
5. Alternatively, blend anchovies with butter, coat the leg with this and roast.
6. Alternatively, salt the leg and place on a baking pan with vinegar mixed with water, onion, new spices, pepper, piece of lemon peel, carrot, parsley root, larger onion, thyme, bay leaf and butter. Let it rest for 12 hours, turning occasionally so it marinates evenly on both sides. Roast the next day. To the sauce left after roasting, add three-quarters deciliter of Austrian wine, a piece of burnt sugar and boil. Strain the sauce over the leg, which has been sliced, and surround it with either butter dough or potatoes.
7. Alternatively, take the leg, pierce it with bacon, salt it, place bacon underneath on a baking pan and roast until golden.

title: Telecí kýta s vepřovým masem (Veal Leg with Pork)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal leg or kidney
- Pork meat with caraway, one and a half kilograms
- Pork feet

## Directions

1. When roasting veal leg or kidney, it acquires a special flavor when one and a half kilograms of caraway-spiced pork meat or pork feet are added to it and roasted together with the veal.
2. Strain the sauce so the caraway remains on the strainer.
3. Slice each meat separately.

title: Telecí Kýta s Vinnou Omáčkou (Leg of Veal with Wine Gravy)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 to 6 pound veal leg
- bacon (lardons), cut into thin strips
- salt
- 2 onions, chopped
- carrot
- parsley
- celery
- butter
- water, 2 cups warm
- white sour wine, 1/2 cup
- butter, 1/2 tablespoon
- flour, 1 teaspoon
- sour cream, 1/2 cup
- lemon zest
- wine, 1/2 cup
- sour cream, additional

## Directions

1. Tenderize a 5 to 6 pound leg by pounding and trim all skin
2. Cut bacon into thin strips and lard the leg with them
3. Salt the leg
4. Chop 2 onions, carrot, parsley and celery and place on a baking pan with a piece of butter
5. Place the leg on top
6. Top with pieces of butter and add 2 cups of warm water
7. Place in the oven to roast
8. When half cooked, baste with 1/2 cup of white sour wine and finish roasting
9. In a small pot, melt 1/2 tablespoon of butter and mix in 1 teaspoon of flour
10. Mix well and add 1/2 cup of sour cream
11. The sour cream may be sweet but must be cooked and cooled
12. Turn the leg so the side that will be presented is facing up and baste with the sour cream mixture
13. Let it roast and continue basting until the sour cream is used up
14. When cooked, brush with butter and let it brown well
15. Pour a little sauce from the leg into a pot, add 1/2 cup of wine, a piece of lemon zest and bring to a boil
16. In 1/2 cup of sour cream, mix 1 teaspoon of flour, stir to avoid lumps and gradually add this to the boiling sauce, stirring constantly to prevent curdling

title: Telecí Kýta se Sardelemi (Leg of Veal with Sardeles)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal leg
- 4 sardeles
- 2 cloves garlic
- salt
- sardele butter

## Directions

1. Remove the skin from a fine veal leg and tenderize it well by pounding
2. Clean and cut 4 sardeles and 2 cloves of garlic into thin strips
3. Using a thin sharp knife, make holes in the leg and insert a piece of sardele and garlic in each hole
4. Cover the leg with a clean cloth and let it rest for half an hour
5. Prepare and roast according to the previous method, using sardele butter instead of ordinary butter if desired
6. Half an hour before serving, baste with half a cup of good sour cream, let it roast a bit longer
7. Place whole or sliced on a platter, pour a little sauce over it and serve the remaining sauce in a gravy boat

title: Telecí kýta se sardelemi (Veal Leg with Anchovies)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal leg
- Anchovies, one-quarter kilogram
- Butter
- Salt
- Lemon, optional

## Directions

1. Remove all membranes from the veal leg and cut into pieces.
2. Remove bones from the anchovies, blend with butter and strain over the meat placed on a baking pan.
3. Braise the meat, basting occasionally so it does not dry out, braise for at most one and a half hours and serve either in the baking pan or on a dish lined with bread; if desired, add lemon cut into quarters.

title: Telecí ledvina (Veal Kidney)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal kidney
- Salt
- Butter
- Water
- Bread roll

## Directions

1. Rinse the kidney and salt it
2. Wrap in butter, pour water over it and bake
3. May be sprinkled with grated bread roll

title: Telecí ledvinky na kyselo (Veal Kidneys with Sour Gravy)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal kidneys
- butter
- flour
- beef or chicken broth
- onion
- carrot
- leek
- celery
- parsley roots
- bay leaf
- thyme
- wine vinegar
- sour cream
- bread rolls grated
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Prepare these kidneys in exactly the same way as calf's liver with sour cream (recipe 212)
2. Slice the kidneys into thin slices first

title: Telecí Maso s Citrónovou Omáčkou (Veal with Lemon Gravy)
body:
## Ingredients

- twenty-five veal shoulder slices, about a finger thick
- beef broth
- one tablespoon fresh butter
- two tablespoons flour
- juice of half a lemon
- lemon rind, finely chopped
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Cut veal shoulder into slices about a finger thick and place in a pan
2. Pour beef broth over them and let simmer for a good half hour
3. Heat one tablespoon of fresh butter in a pan, add two tablespoons of flour and make a pale roux
4. Thin the roux with the beef broth in which you cooked the slices
5. Place the cooked slices in this gravy
6. Squeeze the juice of half a lemon into it, add finely chopped lemon rind and a little nutmeg
7. Let the slices cook until tender and serve

title: Telecí Maso s Karfiolem (Veal with Cauliflower)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds veal leg or shoulder
- beef broth
- fresh butter
- flour
- one large cauliflower head or two small ones
- salt
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Cut slices from two pounds of veal leg or shoulder and let simmer for about half an hour
2. Clean one large or two small cauliflower heads and cook them in beef broth until tender
3. Make a pale roux from fresh butter and flour, thin it with the beef broth in which you cooked the cauliflower
4. Season with salt and let the gravy simmer a little, season with nutmeg
5. Add the veal slices to the gravy
6. Cut the cooked cauliflower into quarters and add to the slices in the gravy
7. Let simmer a little longer and serve

title: Telecí maso s kmínem (Veal with Caraway)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal shoulder or breast
- Salt
- Caraway
- Water
- 30 grams butter

## Directions

1. Rinse the veal, salt it and season with caraway
2. Place on a baking sheet, add water, 30 grams of butter and braise quickly
3. When tender, place on a platter and pour the strained sauce over it

title: Telecí Maso s Paprikou (Veal with Paprica)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds veal
- two onions, finely chopped
- three tablespoons butter
- salt
- beef broth
- flour
- paprika
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Wash two pounds of veal and cut into neat pieces
2. Place two finely chopped onions and three tablespoons of butter in a pan and let it foam
3. Add the cut veal, salt it, cover and let it stew until tender
4. Add several tablespoons of beef broth to the meat
5. Dust with a little flour and sprinkle with paprika
6. Let it stew a while longer, then add a small cup of sour cream
7. Let it come to a boil, place on a platter, strain the gravy over it and serve

title: Telecí Maso s Vínem (Veal with Wine Gravy)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal breast, cut into pieces
- beef broth
- salt
- one glass white wine
- several cloves
- ground pepper
- two or three lemon cakes
- butter
- flour
- two egg yolks

## Directions

1. Cut veal breast into pieces, wash them clean and let simmer a little in beef broth, salt it
2. When the meat foams, add one glass of white wine
3. Add several cloves and a pinch of ground pepper
4. Add two or three lemon cakes from which you have removed the rind
5. Let simmer for a good half hour
6. Strain the liquid into a pan and make a pale roux, add the cooked veal to this gravy
7. Let simmer a little longer, then whisk in two egg yolks
8. Pour into a deep platter and serve

title: Telecí Maso se Smetanovou Omáčkou (Veal with Cream Gravy)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds veal
- butter
- one large onion, finely chopped
- two tablespoons vinegar
- one lemon cake
- one teaspoon flour
- one pint sour cream
- pepper
- salt
- fried potatoes for serving

## Directions

1. Cut two pounds of veal into square pieces about two fingers thick and salt them
2. Place a piece of butter in a pan, add one large finely chopped onion, and put the meat in to roast until red
3. Add two tablespoons of vinegar and a lemon cake to the meat
4. Mix one teaspoon of flour with one pint of sour cream and add to the meat
5. Season with a little pepper and let it simmer for a while longer
6. Remove the meat to a platter, strain the gravy over it, and surround with fried potatoes

title: Telecí mozek s vejci (Calf's Brain with Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 calf's brains
- water
- onion
- butter
- thyme
- salt
- pepper
- 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Place 2 brains in lukewarm water for half an hour
2. Remove all marrow and clean them in cold water
3. Let a finely chopped onion of medium size with 1½ spoonfuls of butter disperse on the stove
4. Salt the brains, season with a little thyme, place on the onion, mix well
5. Before serving mix 4 eggs into it

title: Telecí mozek s vejci (Calf's Brain with Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- two calf brains
- one medium onion
- one tablespoon butter
- salt
- parsley
- four eggs

## Directions

1. Place two brains in lukewarm water for half an hour
2. Remove all membranes from the brains and boil them in cold water
3. On a small pan, steam finely chopped medium onion with one tablespoon butter
4. Salt the brains and season with a pinch of parsley
5. Place the brains on the onion, mix well
6. Before serving, mix four beaten eggs into the mixture

title: Telecí mozek smažený (Fried Veal Brain)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal brain
- Flour
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Salt
- Soup broth

## Directions

1. Remove all membranes and blood from the brain, wash, dry, salt, coat in flour, egg and bread crumbs, fry, place in a soup bowl and pour soup over it.

title: Telecí mozeček (Veal Brain)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal brain
- Butter
- Onion
- Salt
- Flour
- Egg

## Directions

1. Remove membranes and blood from the brain and wash it; chop onion and soften with butter, salt the brain, add flour, place on the onion, mix well, beat an egg into it just before serving.

title: Telecí nožičky (rosolované) (Jellied Veal Feet)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal feet
- Salt water
- Vinegar
- Onion
- Pepper
- New spices
- Ginger
- Thyme
- Bay leaves
- Lemon peel
- Cooked vegetables
- Crushed pepper
- Vinegar
- Olive oil

## Directions

1. Remove all bones from the feet, clean and boil in salted water to which vinegar, onion, pepper, new spices, ginger, thyme, bay leaves and lemon peel are added.
2. Remove the feet carefully and place in a dish, which can be decorated with various cooked vegetables; strain the liquid in which the feet were boiled over them and place them in cold storage.
3. Serve crushed pepper, vinegar and olive oil on the side.

title: Telecí nožičky smažené (Fried Veal Feet)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal feet
- Flour
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Salt

## Directions

1. Split the feet and remove the larger bones, then clean and wash them, place in a pot, salt and boil until softened, place in cold water, dry, and remove remaining bones; salt, coat in flour, egg and bread crumbs and fry.

title: Telecí plíce (Veal Lungs)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal lungs
- Salt water
- Vinegar
- Pepper
- New spices
- Ginger
- Pale sauce
- Lemon juice
- Burnt sugar, optional

## Directions

1. Clean the lungs and boil in salted water with vinegar, pepper, new spices and ginger until softened; then cut into strips, strain the liquid in which they were boiled, make pale sauce and prepare the sauce, add the lungs, let them simmer a while and season with lemon juice; if it is to be darker, burn a piece of sugar.

title: Telecí s Kmínem (Veal with Caraway Seed)
body:
## Ingredients

- two pounds veal
- two heaping tablespoons butter
- salt
- caraway seed
- water
- flour

## Directions

1. Cut two pounds of veal into pieces and place in a pan
2. Add two heaping tablespoons of butter, a little salt, a little caraway seed
3. Add a little water and let it stew quickly
4. When it becomes tender, dust with flour
5. Add a little boiling water and let it come to a boil
6. Place on a platter and pour the gravy over it

title: Telecí s Rajskými Jablky (Veal with Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- one onion, chopped
- two tablespoons butter
- eight tomatoes
- three tablespoons flour
- two cups beef broth
- several tablespoons vinegar or one glass wine
- half a lemon rind, finely chopped
- piece of sugar
- salt
- one and a half pounds veal from the leg, in neat pieces

## Directions

1. Place chopped onion, two tablespoons butter, and eight tomatoes in a pan and let stew
2. Sprinkle with three tablespoons of flour and mix well
3. Add two cups of beef broth and several tablespoons of vinegar or one glass of wine if desired
4. Add half a finely chopped lemon rind and a piece of sugar, season with salt
5. Let simmer for half an hour and strain
6. Cut one and a half pounds of veal from the leg into neat pieces and add to the strained sauce
7. Let simmer for about three-quarters of an hour until the meat is tender
8. Remove meat to a platter and pour the gravy over it

title: Telecí Závitky (Stuffed Veal Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- piece of beef ham or various forcemeat
- bacon, chopped
- onion or chives, finely chopped
- mushrooms, stewed and finely chopped
- pepper
- two whole eggs
- beef broth
- veal leg
- salt
- thread
- lemon slices

## Directions

1. Finely chop a piece of beef ham or various forcemeat, add chopped bacon, finely chopped onion or chives
2. Let this mixture fry on a pan for a while; you may also add stewed and finely chopped mushrooms
3. Season with pepper, add two whole eggs, mix well and thin with beef broth as needed
4. Cut thin slices from veal leg, flatten with the back of a knife, season with pepper and salt
5. Spread the forcemeat on the slices, roll them up and tie with clean thread
6. Place in a pan, add finely chopped bacon and onion, cover with a lid and let stew slowly for about an hour, adding beef broth by spoonfuls
7. Make a gravy from the liquid and leftover forcemeat
8. Remove the thread from the rolls, arrange on a platter, strain the gravy over them and garnish with lemon slices
9. Wine may also be added to the gravy if desired

title: Telecí závitky se sardelkami (Rolls of Veal with Anchovies)
body:
## Ingredients

- Studená telecí kýta
- Čtvrt libry másla
- Čtvrt libra očištěných sardelí
- Cibule
- Hovězí polévka
- Víno
- Strouhaná žemle
- Vlaské makarony
- Sůl

## Directions

1. Ze studené telecí kýty nakrájej tenké řízky
2. Utři čtvrt libry másla se čtvrt librou očištěných sardelí
3. Přidej drobnince rozkrájenou cibulku
4. Pomaž každý řízek tímto sardelovým máslem
5. Zaviň každý řízek a obvaz čistou nití
6. Na kastrol dej kus čerstvého másla s drobně nakrájenou cibulí
7. Polož na to zavinuté řízky
8. Přikrej pokličkou a nech dusit
9. Jakmile se šťáva ztráceti počíná, podlévej hovězí polévkou, aby se nepripálily
10. Když mají přijíti na stůl, podlej je troškou vína
11. Přisyp kávovou lžičku strouhané žemličky
12. Narovnej závitky do prostřed mísy
13. Udělej kolem nich věnec z vlaských makaronek uvařených v slané vodě
14. Polej vše šťávou ze řízků
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Telecí Řízky s Žampiony (Veal Cutlets with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal cutlets
- salt
- bacon slices
- 1/2 onion, sliced into rounds
- green parsley, chopped
- lemon zest, chopped
- butter, melted
- wine
- beef broth
- mushrooms, 1 small plate
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1 lemon, juiced
- 1 small white onion, finely chopped
- salt

## Directions

1. Cut veal into wide pieces, pound them gently to flatten and salt both sides
2. Place several slices of good bacon on a roasting pan
3. Lay the veal cutlets on the bacon
4. Slice half an onion into rounds and place on the cutlets
5. Sprinkle with chopped green parsley and chopped lemon zest
6. Pour over some melted butter, cover and let stew gently over heat
7. Frequently add a little wine and beef broth while cooking
8. Clean fresh mushrooms well, trim the stems, rinse in clean water and slice thinly
9. In a small roasting pan, melt 3 tablespoons of butter and add the mushrooms
10. Pour the juice of 1 lemon over them, add 1 small finely chopped white onion, salt and let stew for a while
11. When ready to serve, pour the stewed mushrooms onto a platter and top with the stewed cutlets and their juices

title: Telecí řízky (přirozené) (Natural Veal Cutlets)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal leg meat
- Flour
- Onion
- Salt
- Water or beef broth
- Lemon

## Directions

1. Cut meat from the leg to a thickness of two fingers, pound it, clean it, salt it, coat in flour and place on a baking pan in which onion has been half-fried.
2. Braise on both sides for 10 minutes each. If there is little sauce, add water or beef broth.
3. Strain the sauce over the cutlets and add lemon.

title: Telecí řízky se žampiony (Cutlets with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal leg cutlets
- bacon
- onion
- green parsley
- lemon zest
- butter
- wine
- beef broth
- fresh mushrooms
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cut pieces from the veal leg, one finger thick and three fingers wide
2. Beat them slightly in width
3. Salt both sides properly
4. Place several slices of good bacon on a pan
5. Lay the veal cutlets on them
6. Cut half an onion into slices and place around the cutlets
7. Sprinkle with green parsley and some chopped lemon zest
8. Pour a little melted butter over it
9. Cover and let braise until tender, occasionally adding a little wine and beef broth
10. Clean beautiful fresh mushrooms, take a small plateful
11. Cut the roots slightly, rinse them in clean water and cut into thin slices
12. Place three spoonfuls of butter on a pan, add the mushrooms to it
13. Strain the juice of one lemon over them
14. Add one small

title: Telecí řízky smažené (Fried Veal Cutlets)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Veal leg meat
- Flour
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Salt
- Onion
- Butter
- Cauliflower, optional
- Anchovies
- Lemon, optional

## Directions

1. Cut meat from the veal leg to a thickness of two fingers, pound it, clean it, salt it, coat in flour, egg and bread crumbs, then fry until golden.
2. Alternatively, chop onion, let it soften in butter and place the cutlets in it for about two minutes. To both preparations, cooked cauliflower may be added; or prepare anchovy butter, coat the cutlets with it and let them brown, or add only lemon.

title: Tenké koláčky (Thin Cookies)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 kilogram butter
- 1/2 kilogram flour
- 1/2 kilogram sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoons sour cream

## Directions

1. Mix butter, flour, sugar, eggs, and sour cream to form dough
2. Knead the dough well and roll it out
3. Cut cookies with a small form or glass
4. Bake on waxed sheet and sprinkle with sugar

title: Tentýž Jemný (Herring Salad - Delicate Version)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- herring fillets
- milk
- cooked potatoes
- cold veal roast
- pepper
- pickled cucumbers
- red beets, cooked
- cooked ham
- hard-boiled eggs
- capers
- 4 hard-boiled egg yolks, ground
- 1/8 liter of oil
- 2 tablespoons mustard
- vinegar
- salt
- beef broth

## Directions

1. Soak herring in milk for a day
2. Remove skin and bones and cut the herring
3. Add cooked and cut potatoes, cold veal roast, pepper, pickled cucumbers, cooked red beets, cooked ham, hard-boiled eggs and several tablespoons of capers
4. Mix everything together
5. Pour sauce made from 4 ground hard-boiled egg yolks, 1/8 liter of oil, 2 tablespoons mustard, vinegar, pepper, salt and beef broth
6. Decorate with small cucumbers, capers, hard-boiled eggs and similar

title: Teplý Zelný Salát (Warm Cabbage Salad)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- white cabbage
- salt
- hot water
- butter or bacon, cut into small pieces
- pepper
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Select white cabbage
2. Remove the core from cleaned and peeled heads
3. Remove thick ribs from leaves
4. Cut prepared leaves very finely
5. Either pour boiling water over or salt and let sit for two to three hours
6. Pour warm bacon or butter cut into small pieces over the salad on a dish
7. Season with salt and pepper
8. Drizzle with vinegar

title: Tetřev dušený (Braised Black Grouse)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- black grouse
- red wine
- vinegar
- lemon juice
- bread crust
- 3 small onions
- juniper berries
- bay leaves
- thyme
- broth

## Directions

1. Marinate the older black grouse and let it lie for several days.
2. Place on a baking pan and pour red wine, vinegar and lemon juice over it.
3. Add bread crust, three small onions, a tablespoon of juniper berries, several bay leaves and several sprigs of thyme.
4. Cover the pan well and braise the grouse for three hours.
5. When tender, pour over it the juice that was simmered with broth.

title: Tišnova chladivka (Almond Cooler)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half liter of soft clean water
- crushed almond kernels
- three-quarters liter of sugar syrup
- cherry liqueur

## Directions

1. Let crushed almond kernels soak in half liter of soft clean water in a bottle in a warm place for four hours
2. Strain the liquid, mix it with three-quarters liter of sugar syrup, and heat everything to 17°
3. Let it cool and freeze
4. Add cherry liqueur, mix everything, pour into glasses, and serve

title: Topinky (Plain Toast)
body:
## Ingredients

- white bread, two or three days old
- butter

## Directions

1. White bread that is hardened, two or three days old, is sliced and dried to a light brown on both sides in the oven, spread with butter and stacked one on top of the other.
2. It is also good alone with coffee.

title: Topinky Máčené (Dipped Toast)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- milk
- sugar
- cinnamon or orange or lemon peel

## Directions

1. Slice bread into slices, which I lightly dip on one side in milk, then place one next to the other on a baking sheet.
2. Mix sugar with cinnamon or grated orange or lemon peel and sprinkle the bread with this.
3. In a moderately heated oven, dry it and you have good rusks for coffee.

title: Topinky v Mléce (Milk Toast)
body:
## Ingredients

- toast
- one quart of milk
- flour
- butter
- salt

## Directions

1. Dry the toast as described previously.
2. Then boil one quart of milk, mix one spoonful of flour with a little cold milk, add it to the boiling milk and also add one spoonful of butter and a little salt.
3. Let it boil through; then place the dried toast on a deep plate and pour this milk over it and serve immediately at the table, before it softens.

title: Treska (Dried Cod)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- dried cod
- salt
- flour
- egg
- bread, grated
- butter
- cabbage or mustard or horseradish

## Directions

1. Soak the dried cod in fresh water for several days, changing the water daily
2. Cut into equal pieces, wipe, salt, coat with flour, dip in beaten egg, and coat with grated bread
3. Fry in butter
4. Serve with cabbage, mustard, or horseradish

title: Treska (Soaked Cod)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- well-soaked cod
- salted water
- butter
- onion

## Directions

1. Cut the well-soaked cod into pieces and place in boiling salted water
2. When completely soft, pour over a roux made from butter
3. Serve with mashed potatoes and onion

title: Treska - Another Method (Cod Braised with Herbs)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- well-soaked cod
- butter
- water
- parsley
- pepper
- bay leaf
- light roux (pale jíška)
- lemon

## Directions

1. Place well-soaked cod on a baking dish with butter, water, chopped parsley, pepper, and bay leaf
2. Braise until cod is soft
3. Arrange cod on a platter
4. Make a light roux, strain over the cod, add a piece of butter and simmer briefly
5. Serve with sauce, usually with lemon cut into quarters

title: Treska - Third Method (Cod with Cream Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- well-soaked cod
- celery
- parsley
- lemon zest
- 45 grams (3 lots) butter
- marjoram flowers
- half an onion
- water
- light roux (pale jíška)
- 3½ deciliters (žejdlík) good sweet cream
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Rinse well-soaked cod and place on a baking dish with celery, parsley, lemon zest, butter, marjoram flowers, and half an onion
2. Pour water to about 2 finger-widths height
3. Braise until cod is soft
4. Arrange cod on a platter
5. Add light roux, cream, and lemon juice to the braising liquid, simmer, then strain over the cod

title: Treska s mlékem (Creamed Codfish)
body:
## Ingredients

- Codfish
- water
- milk
- butter
- flour
- eggs
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Soak a pound of codfish in a shallow gallon-sized dish of water for 3 to 4 hours or overnight if preparing for breakfast
2. Once soaked, transfer to another vessel, pour fresh cold water over it and bring to boil
3. When the fish boils, drain the water and let it cool
4. Remove the skin and bones carefully and flake the meat
5. Place the fish in another vessel, pour milk over it until covered, and bring to boil
6. Mix a heaping spoonful of butter with a heaping spoonful of flour and add this to the boiling milk while stirring constantly
7. Beat one or two eggs and add to the sauce, mix well and season with pepper to taste
8. If the fish was too much soaked, salt to taste

title: Trubičky se smetanou (Cream Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter dough
- egg for brushing
- whipped snow with sugar or whipped cream with vanilla sugar

## Directions

1. Roll out butter dough to the thickness of straw
2. Cut into long strips
3. Place on a tube mold, put on baking sheet
4. Brush surface with beaten egg and bake quickly in a hot oven
5. When cooled, fill with either whipped snow mixed with sugar or whipped cream with vanilla sugar

title: Trubičky skořicové (Cinnamon Tubes)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 250 grams butter
- 7 egg yolks
- 1/2 kilogram ground sugar
- 6 grams cinnamon
- grated lemon zest
- 1/2 kilogram fine sifted flour

## Directions

1. Spread out 250 grams of butter
2. Gradually beat in 7 egg yolks, 1/2 kilogram of ground sugar, 6 grams of cinnamon, a little grated lemon zest, and 1/2 kilogram of fine sifted flour
3. Mix and knead thoroughly
4. Let the dough rest for about an hour
5. Fill buttered metal tubes with the dough
6. Bake slowly until golden
7. Remove and roll onto wooden sticks while still warm

title: Tuhá omáčka (Hard Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 koflíku práškového cukru
- 1 koflík másla
- pár kapek vanilkového nebo citrónového extraktu

## Directions

1. Utři tři čtvrtě koflíku práškového cukru s koflíkem másla, až je to lehké.
2. Přidej pár kapek vanilkového neb citrónového extraktu a drž v studenu, aby to bylo tuhé, když to podáš na stůl.

title: Turky čili tykve (Pumpkin)
body:
## Ingredients

- tykev - vyloupané
- sůl
- mouka
- omastí - rozpálené

## Directions

1. Vyber jádra z vyloupané tykve
2. Maso rozkrájej na malé tenké řízky nebo proužky
3. Popraš je solí a nech čtvrt hodiny státi
4. Sceď je, otři čistým šatem
5. Obal v mouce a usmaž v rozpáleném omastku
6. Narovnej je na horkou mísu
7. Popraš trochu solí a předlož

title: Tvaroh (Sweet Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- one tablespoon butter
- one pound fresh sweet tvaroh
- four egg yolks
- six tablespoons sugar
- zest of half a lemon
- pinch of salt
- half a small cup currants or almonds cut into strips

## Directions

1. Rub one tablespoon of butter in a bowl, mix in one pound of fresh sweet tvaroh, then stir in four egg yolks, six tablespoons of sugar, grated zest of half a lemon, a pinch of salt, and half a small cup of picked currants or almonds cut into strips.

title: Tvarohem nadívané omeletky (Omelette with Milk Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 teaspoons melted butter
- 3 teaspoons sugar
- 5 egg yolks
- salt
- flour
- 5 egg whites
- milk cheese (tvaroh), apple, or grated bread filling
- milk

## Directions

1. Put 3 teaspoons of melted butter, 3 teaspoons of sugar and 5 egg yolks in a bowl, salt it, and add enough flour to make a batter like for dripping
2. Gradually fold in stiffly beaten egg whites from 5 eggs
3. Heat a piece of butter in a pan, pour some of the batter onto it and bake an omelette on both sides
4. Spread each one with filling of either milk cheese, apple, or grated bread, fold the omelettes and place them in a buttered baking dish
5. Put the dish in a hot oven and let the omelettes bake, pour a bit of milk in which you have beaten an egg yolk over them, and let everything bake for about 10 more minutes
6. Be careful that they do not dry out too much

title: Tvarohová nádivka (Curd Cheese Filling)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 egg yolks
- 15 dek sugar
- 30 dek shredded curd cheese
- 14 dek sweet almonds, finely grated
- 2 dek bitter almonds, finely grated
- lemon zest

## Directions

1. Mix and rub the egg yolks with sugar
2. Add the shredded curd cheese
3. Add the finely grated sweet and bitter almonds to which lemon zest has been added

title: Tvarohová nádivka - Fifth Method (Curd Cheese Filling)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 dek butter
- 4 egg yolks
- 7 dek sugar
- 4 dek chopped sultanas
- almonds
- approximately 28 dek shredded curd cheese

## Directions

1. Rub the butter with egg yolks and sugar
2. Add chopped sultanas and almonds
3. Mix with shredded curd cheese

title: Tvarohová nádivka - Fourth Method (Curd Cheese Filling)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- finely shredded and rubbed curd cheese
- egg yolks
- sugar
- salt
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Mix and rub the finely shredded curd cheese
2. Add egg yolks and sugar
3. Salt it
4. Pour sour cream over it
5. The filling must be quite thick yet juicy

title: Tvarohová nádivka - Second Method (Curd Cheese Filling)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh curd cheese
- egg yolks
- sugar
- sultanas

## Directions

1. Mix and rub the fresh curd cheese, egg yolks, sugar, and sultanas together

title: Tvarohová nádivka - Third Method (Curd Cheese Filling)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 dek butter
- 3 egg yolks
- sugar
- 14 dek curd cheese
- raisins
- sultanas

## Directions

1. Melt the butter
2. Rub with egg yolks and sugar
3. Add curd cheese
4. Mix with raisins and sultanas

title: Tvarohové Knedlíky (Cottage Cheese Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons fresh butter
- 3 eggs
- 1 quart fresh cottage cheese, well pressed
- salt
- as much groats (krupička) as possible

## Directions

1. Take 2 tablespoons of fresh butter and beat it well on a plate
2. Add 3 eggs to it and mix well
3. Then add about 1 quart of well-pressed fresh cottage cheese, salt it appropriately and mix well with the eggs and butter so that no lumps remain
4. Then add as much groats as possible so that you can make little dumplings from it
5. Make the little dumplings medium-sized so that they cook through sooner
6. Before putting them to boil, coat each one in flour and then put them in salted water to boil
7. The water must not stop boiling, otherwise they would become soggy
8. When the little dumplings start to 'dance' on the surface, take one out and with two forks tear it apart
9. If there is no raw dough in the middle, take the little dumplings out onto a plate and pour melted butter over them

title: Tvarohové Knedlíky (Curd Cheese Dumplings)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half kilogram curd cheese
- 3 to 4 eggs
- grated bread roll
- salt

## Directions

1. Mix half kilogram curd cheese with 3 to 4 eggs and enough grated bread roll so the dough does not stick.
2. Knead everything, salt and make a test dumpling to see if the dough is sufficiently stiff.
3. Then boil the rest of the dumplings.
4. To determine if the dumplings are sufficiently cooked, pierce them with a stick; if the dough does not stick to it, place on a platter.
5. Pour hot butter over them and sprinkle with grated bread roll.

title: Tvarohové Knedlíky na Jiný Způsob (Cottage Cheese Dumplings Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh butter
- 3 whole eggs
- 3 egg yolks
- 1 pound good cottage cheese
- salt
- grated bread roll
- flour

## Directions

1. Beat a piece of fresh butter, beat 3 whole eggs and 3 egg yolks into it
2. Add 1 pound of good cottage cheese, salt and mix well
3. Then add as much grated bread roll and a little flour so that dumplings can be made from it, mix well again
4. Make round dumplings with your hands, boil them in salted boiling water

title: Tvarohové Knedlíky na Jiný Způsob (Curd Cheese Dumplings, Alternative Method)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh butter
- three whole eggs
- three egg yolks
- one pound of good curd cheese
- salt
- grated bread roll
- flour

## Directions

1. Cream a piece of fresh butter, beat three whole eggs and three egg yolks into it
2. Add one pound of good curd cheese, salt, and mix well
3. Add enough grated bread roll and a little flour so that dumplings can be made from it, and mix thoroughly again
4. Shape round dumplings with your hands
5. Boil them in salted boiling water and let them cook for a quarter hour
6. Remove them with a strainer and arrange halved on a dish
7. Sprinkle with grated bread roll or bread crust and generously pour melted fresh butter over them

title: Tvarohové koláče (Curd Cheese Cakes)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 15 grams (1 lot) pressed yeast
- Sugar
- Flour
- 45 grams (3 lots) butter
- 3 egg yolks
- 3/4 liter warmed flour
- Salt
- 3 egg whites beaten stiff
- Butter for the filling
- Egg yolks for the filling
- Sugar for the filling
- Curd cheese for the filling
- Several tablespoons raisins
- 3 egg whites beaten stiff for the filling
- Sugar for topping

## Directions

1. Mix 15 grams pressed yeast with a little sugar and flour and let rise in a warm place
2. Beat 45 grams butter with 3 egg yolks, mix in 3/4 liter warmed flour, a little salt and yeast, work the dough, finally add stiff egg white foam from 3 egg whites
3. Cover the dough
4. When risen, roll out, cut out cakes, press down in the middle with your hand and brush with a mixture of beaten butter, egg yolks, sugar, curd cheese, several tablespoons raisins and stiff egg white foam from 3 egg whites
5. Sprinkle with sugar and when risen for a while, bake over gentle heat

title: Tvarohové tašky (Cottage Cheese Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- Egg, 1 whole
- Water, 1 koflíčku
- Flour, sufficient amount
- Salt
- Cottage cheese, about 3/4 pound
- Sugar to taste
- Eggs, 2
- Raisins, small, a little
- Bitter almonds, a few, grated
- Breadcrumb crust or white bread crust
- Butter, hot

## Directions

1. Make a nice thick dough from 1 egg, 1 koflíčku water, sufficient flour, and salt
2. Let it rest for a while
3. Meanwhile, prepare the filling: sweeten about 3/4 pound cottage cheese well
4. Add 2 eggs, a little small raisins, and a few grated bitter almonds
5. Mix well
6. Roll out the dough thin as for noodles
7. Spread the cheese filling evenly over it
8. Roll it up like a roller and cut into pieces about four fingers wide, pressing well at both ends with a spoon handle
9. Drop into plenty of boiling salted water
10. When cooked, sprinkle with breadcrumb crust or white bread crust and pour hot butter over them

title: Tvarohový Paj (Cottage Cheese Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- pie plate dough
- one coffee cup of fresh good cottage cheese
- a piece of butter about the size of a walnut
- half a coffee cup of small raisins
- two eggs
- one coffee cup of sweet milk
- two tablespoons of sugar
- one teaspoon of lemon extract

## Directions

1. Cover a pie plate with good crisp dough
2. Take one coffee cup of fresh good cottage cheese and crumble it onto the dough
3. Take a piece of butter about the size of a walnut and scatter it over the cheese
4. Take half a coffee cup of small raisins that are well picked and washed and sprinkle over the cheese
5. Make custard: beat two eggs, add one coffee cup of sweet milk, two tablespoons of sugar, and one teaspoon of lemon extract
6. Mix everything well and pour over the cheese and bake
7. Raisins can be omitted and it is also good

title: Tvarohový Pudding (Sweet Cheese Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- one pound cottage cheese
- four whole eggs
- two ounces butter
- one good cup semolina
- salt
- grated rolls

## Directions

1. Beat one pound of cottage cheese well, add four whole eggs, two ounces of butter, one good cup of semolina, and salt very lightly.
2. Stir this for half an hour.
3. Grease a clean cloth with butter and sprinkle it with grated rolls.
4. Place the prepared cottage cheese into it, tie it loosely, place it in boiling water and let it cook for one hour.
5. Then remove the pudding onto a dish, sprinkle it with grated roll crust, and pour melted fresh butter over it.

title: Tvarůstiú cibule (Stewed Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- drobné bílé nové cibulky
- voda
- mléko
- máslo - lžíce
- mouka - lžíce
- sůl
- pepř

## Directions

1. Oloupej cibulky a nech ležeti ve studené vodě půl hodiny
2. Vyndej je a dej vařiti do studené vody
3. Když se asi tři minuty povařily, vodu sceď a nalej jinou vodu čerstvou
4. Po třech minutách varu opět sceď
5. Nalij na ně znovu horké vody a nech uvařit do měkka
6. Když jsou měkké, sceď vodu
7. Nalij na cibulky mléka, aby byly potopeny
8. Osol a opepři
9. Rozmíchej lžíci másla se lžící mouky a k cibulkám přimíchej

title: Tvrdá vejce krájená (Sliced Hard Eggs)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Butter
- Bread crumbs
- Parsley, chopped
- Hard eggs, sliced
- Sour cream, quarter liter
- Salt

## Directions

1. Fry grated bread crumbs in butter and add chopped parsley.
2. Cook in quarter liter of sour cream until a sauce forms.
3. Season with salt and mix with the sliced eggs.

title: Tvrdé piškoty vídenské (Vienna Lady Fingers)
body:
## Ingredients

- one bowl fine granulated sugar
- five egg yolks
- one egg white
- four egg whites
- one spoon cold sugar cooked to thick with water
- two bowls sifted flour

## Directions

1. Put one bowl of fine granulated sugar in a bowl
2. Add five egg yolks and beat so long until quite foamy
3. Gradually fold in one egg white
4. Beat the other four egg whites into meringue and fold in
5. Then fold in one spoon of cold sugar cooked to thick with water
6. Finally fold in two bowls of sifted flour
7. Put this mixture into molds or make on paper into finger-length pieces
8. Sprinkle with sugar powder and bake in a not too hot oven

title: Tykvový Paj (Pumpkin Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- pumpkin flesh
- water
- one quart of pumpkin puree
- four whole eggs
- two coffee cups of sugar
- one tablespoon of syrup
- one teaspoon of grated ginger
- one teaspoon of ground cinnamon
- half a teaspoon of nutmeg
- half a coffee cup of melted butter
- one and a half quarts of milk
- dough

## Directions

1. Chop pumpkin flesh into small cubes
2. Place in a pot with a little water and cook over high heat until soft
3. Drain the water and push the flesh through a sieve
4. Put one quart of this puree in a bowl
5. Add four whole eggs, two coffee cups of sugar, one tablespoon of syrup, one teaspoon of grated ginger, one teaspoon of ground cinnamon, half a teaspoon of nutmeg, half a coffee cup of melted butter, and one and a half quarts of milk
6. Mix everything together well
7. Fill dough-lined forms for two pies and bake the pie for three-quarters of an hour

title: Tyrolský chlebíček k čaji (Tyrolean Tea Bread)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 250 grams finely ground almonds
- 250 grams butter
- 125 grams sugar
- ground anise
- grated lemon zest
- 4 egg yolks
- good wine
- 250 grams flour
- egg yolk for brushing
- sugar and cinnamon for topping

## Directions

1. Beat the finely ground almonds
2. Mix with butter, sugar, ground anise, grated lemon zest, egg yolks, good wine, and flour
3. Work into dough
4. Knead well and work thoroughly
5. Cut into triangular pieces
6. Brush with beaten egg yolk
7. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon
8. Bake slowly

title: Tyrolský dort (Tyrolean Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 375 grams well-beaten butter
- 375 grams finely crushed sugar
- finely grated lemon zest
- 375 grams fine flour

## Directions

1. Mix butter with 375 grams finely crushed sugar
2. Add finely grated lemon zest and 375 grams fine flour
3. Work everything into dough and shape into cakes
4. Bake slowly on a cake sheet until golden
5. Turn cakes out onto a sieve when baked golden yellow, and when cool
6. Coat with optional preserves, layering them together
7. Brush everything with beaten egg
8. Bake again and coat with glaze

title: Tytéž na kyselo (Potatoes Sour)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked potatoes
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- chopped parsley
- onion
- garlic
- 4 egg yolks
- 3 tablespoons vinegar

## Directions

1. Peel cooked potatoes and slice into thin slices
2. Stew for quarter hour in butter with salt, pepper, chopped parsley and onion
3. Rub a plate with garlic
4. Place potatoes on it
5. Pour over a sauce made from 4 egg yolks and 3 tablespoons vinegar

title: Tytéž s cibulí (Potatoes with Onion)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- small potatoes
- small onions
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- water
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Trim small even potatoes and wash them
2. Prepare small onions, about one quarter the amount of potatoes
3. Layer potatoes and onions with butter
4. Season with salt and pepper
5. Pour a little water with vinegar over them
6. Stew for three quarters of an hour
7. Serve with roasted meat of all kinds

title: Tésto k Pajům (Pie Crust)
body:
## Ingredients

- quart of sifted flour
- coffee cup of lard
- pinch of salt
- cold water
- half teaspoon of baking powder (optional)
- quart of flour
- coffee cup of butter
- coffee cup of lard
- two egg yolks
- pinch of salt
- cold water
- two coffee cups of flour
- level teaspoon of baking powder
- sweet cream

## Directions

1. To a quart of sifted flour, add a coffee cup of lard and a pinch of salt, mix well with a spoon
2. Add a little cold water and knead the dough firmly together
3. Place on a flour-dusted board and roll out in one direction with a roller
4. If you add half a teaspoon of baking powder to the flour, the dough will be fluffy and crisp
5. This amount is sufficient for two covered or four uncovered pies
6. For better dough, mix a quart of flour with a coffee cup of butter and a coffee cup of lard, add two egg yolks, a pinch of salt and a little cold water, and proceed as above; this is sufficient for four pies
7. Another dough for two pies can be made from 2 coffee cups of flour, a level teaspoon of baking powder and enough sweet cream to moisten the flour
8. The best pies however are made from butter dough

title: Těsto perníkové – Marcipán (Marzipan Dough)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet almonds
- bitter almonds
- sugar
- lemon peel

## Directions

1. Blanch and peel sweet almonds, adding some bitter almonds
2. Grind or pound them finely
3. Add an equal amount of sugar that has been rubbed with lemon peel
4. Roast everything on moderately heated baking sheets until it separates from the pan
5. Remove and tear into pieces and let cool
6. Knead together again, shape into desired forms, and bake slowly

title: Třešně bez pecek (Cherries Without Pits)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Ripe cherries
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Remove the pits from ripe cherries using a straw.
2. Boil the sugar thoroughly.
3. Add the cherries to the sugar and proceed as in the previous method.

title: Třešně zavařené (Preserved Sweet Cherries)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Beautiful, large sweet cherries
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Select beautiful, large sweet cherries and remove the stems.
2. Remove the pits carefully with a pointed straw.
3. Boil the sugar until it reaches the sixth degree.
4. Add the cherries to it.
5. Proceed with everything else as has been described for other preserved cherries.

title: Třešně zavařené - Jiný způsob (Preserved Sweet Cherries - Another Method)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- Sweet cherries
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Add cleaned cherries that are scored on both sides to boiled sugar.
2. Let them cook slowly with the sugar.
3. Spread them on a dish, cover with paper and let sit undisturbed.
4. On the second day, drain the sugar, boil it to make it thicker, add the cherries back to it, and cook everything slowly together, repeating this for two more days.
5. Always skim off the foam; when the preserve cools, place in containers, bind them, and store in a cold place.

title: Třešňová omáčka (Cherry Sauce) - Second Method
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cherries
- water
- cinnamon
- lemon zest
- sugar
- potato flour mixed in wine

## Directions

1. Crush the cherries together with the pits
2. Boil in water with cinnamon, lemon zest and sugar
3. Strain
4. When the sauce begins to boil again, add a small spoon of potato flour that has been mixed in wine

title: Třešňová omáčka z mouky zemákové (Cherry Sauce with Potato Flour)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- half kilogram ripe cherries
- water
- whole cinnamon stick
- lemon zest
- cherry pits
- red wine
- sugar
- potato flour mixed in wine

## Directions

1. Stew the ripe cherries in a little water with whole cinnamon and lemon zest
2. Strain everything
3. Crush the cherry pits, boil them in water and strain into the cherry juice
4. Thin the cherry juice with red wine, sweeten with sugar and mix with potato flour dissolved in wine
5. Boil until the sauce thickens properly

title: Třešňová Šťáva (Cherry Juice)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- cherries
- sugar

## Directions

1. Clean the cherries, remove the pits, crush them and let them lie for three to four days in an open place, then press out the juice and pour it into strong, clean bottles, cork and tie them.
2. Wrap the bottles in hay, place them in a container filled with water and put on warm stove so that not only the water but also the juice in the bottle is preserved, then allow to cool gradually, clean the bottles and store in a dry, cool room.
3. This juice can also be used to make ice cream, to which sugar is added as desired.

title: Třešňový koláč z mouky zemákové (Cherry Cake with Potato Flour)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- pitted cherries
- 6 egg yolks
- 12 decagrams (8 lots) sugar
- zest of lemon, rubbed with sugar
- juice of one lemon
- snow from 6 egg whites
- 9 decagrams (6 lots) potato flour
- breadcrumbs or rusks for dusting the pan
- fat for greasing the pan

## Directions

1. Place pitted cherries on a greased baking pan dusted with either grated breadcrumbs or rusks.
2. Beat 6 egg yolks with 12 decagrams (8 lots) sugar until combined.
3. Add the lemon zest that has been rubbed with sugar, lemon juice, snow from 6 egg whites, and 9 decagrams (6 lots) potato flour.
4. Spread everything over the cherries.
5. Bake the cake for one hour.

title: Třešňový kompot (Cherry Compote)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ kilogram ripe cherries
- 9 decagrams (6 lots) sugar dissolved in water
- lemon juice
- cinnamon
- lemon peel

## Directions

1. Pour the dissolved sugar (or a mixture of sugar with lemon juice, cinnamon, and lemon peel) over the ripe cherries
2. Shake the mixture several times
