8. When the pudding is baked, turn it out, sprinkle with sugar, and sprinkle with rum

title: Švestky s mandlemi (Plums with Almonds)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe plums
- almonds

## Directions

1. Remove the pits from the ripe plums
2. Insert a whole almond in place of each pit
3. Dry them in an oven or drying room
4. To use them, soak in milk
5. Roll them in flour mixed with sugar
6. Fry them in butter

title: Švábská polévka (Suabian Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- good homemade bread, sliced thin
- beef soup
- salt
- pepper
- roasted sausages
- chives, chopped finely

## Directions

1. Slice good homemade bread thinly and dry the slices either on a clean sheet or in a pan until yellow or light brown
2. About half an hour before serving, place them in a pot, pour clear beef soup over them, salt it, pepper it lightly and let it cook for a while
3. Meanwhile cut roasted sausages into pieces, place them in a bowl, pour the soup over them and add a little finely chopped chives
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Švédský salát (Swedish Salad)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- marinated bacon
- roasted beef
- cooked potatoes
- red beetroot
- apples
- sardines
- capers
- pickled cucumbers
- hard-boiled eggs
- onion
- mugwort

## Directions

1. Cut marinated bacon into small cubes
2. Mix with roasted beef cut into small pieces
3. Add cooked potatoes, red beetroot, diced apples
4. Wash and clean sardines and add them
5. Add a little capers, pickled and peppered cucumbers
6. Add hard-boiled eggs cut into pieces
7. Add a little chopped onion and Siberian mugwort
8. Mix everything together

title: Švýcarský dort (Swiss Cake)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- cake dough
- preserved fruit (apricots, peaches, berries, and similar)
- almonds
- sugar
- egg whites (at least 6)

## Directions

1. Butter a cake mold
2. Line the bottom with thinly made cake dough
3. Top with preserved fruit (apricots, peaches, berries, and similar)
4. Sprinkle with almonds, sugar, and stiff snow beaten from at least 6 eggs
5. Bake

title: Švýcarský Salát Cibulový (Swiss Onion Salad)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- large onions
- butter
- salt
- vinegar
- pepper

## Directions

1. Peel large onions and cut into thin slices
2. Braise in hot butter until white and soft
3. Season pleasantly with salt, vinegar and pepper

title: Švýcarský sýr smetanový (Swiss Cream Cheese)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- freshly milked milk
- rennet
- oleander or saffron (optional)
- salt

## Directions

1. Swiss cream cheese is prepared from freshly milked milk.
2. The milk is heated to +30° R., set aside, curdled, and colored with oleander or saffron; unccolored cheese has a buttery color.
3. The cheese is slowly broken and crumbled, the whey is poured off, and the cheese is placed into molds, into which it is firmly pressed.
4. In a few hours it is turned out, left to dry, salted, turned, and dried with cloth, which is repeated for about fourteen days, and then placed into boxes on edges so it becomes sweaty.
5. After sweating, a fatty layer appears, which is scraped away with knives and brushes, which is repeated for several more weeks; the cheese ripens more quickly if it is brushed with warm whey, then dried and stored in boxes.

title: Švýcarský sýr tvrdý (Swiss Hard Cheese)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- warm freshly milked milk
- cream (abundant)
- rennet
- salt

## Directions

1. This cheese is also called Emmental or Gruyère.
2. Emmental is prepared at +28-30° R., whereas Gruyère is made at +24-26° R. and curdled.
3. Crumbled Gruyère cheese is heated to +55° R., Emmental cheese then to +45° R.
4. Both cheeses are prepared from warm, freshly milked milk, to which plenty of cream is added, which is heated together and left to curdle; the curdled cheese is broken and crumbled and everything is heated again to +45-48° R., with constant stirring.
5. The cheese is removed, placed in cloth, arranged into a hoop mold, covered with a board, and pressed; every two hours the cheese is turned, wrapped in fresh cloth, and pressed again more firmly.
6. The pressed loaf is salted on all sides in a warm room; in three weeks the cheese ferments, which lasts about two months; the cheese is flipped, turned, washed with water, and dried.
7. After fermentation the cheese gets holes; the cheese is ripe only in 6 to 9 months.
8. From the remaining whey, dry cheese can be obtained.

title: Šípkové Paštičky (Rose Hip Paste)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe rose hips
- apple mass
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cut ripe rose hips in half
2. Remove the seeds and clean the hips
3. Place in a container and let soften completely, stirring several times daily
4. When completely soft, press through a fine sieve
5. Mix the mass with one third apple mass
6. For the same amount of mass, cook the same amount of sugar
7. Mix together and cook thoroughly until completely thick
8. Spread onto slate tablets and when dry, cut and peel
9. Store in containers between paper

title: Šťáva z Brusnic (Cranberry Juice)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- ripe washed cranberries
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cook well-ripened, washed cranberries over a gentle fire, or place them in a wider container with boiling water until the juice bursts out, then strain.
2. Add sugar (for 3 liters, half a kilogram), cook and remove the foam; then fill bottles and seal well. The juice can later be used for sauces and similar purposes.

title: Žabí Stehna s Podpouštkou (Frog Legs with Piquant Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- frog legs
- salt
- vinegar
- good broth
- white wine
- sardine butter
- lemon juice
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Rub the frog legs with salt and vinegar, wash in water.
2. Braise them in good broth, then remove and keep covered.
3. Pour white wine into the sauce, add sardine butter and lemon juice.
4. Mix in 2 egg yolks to finish the sauce.

title: Želva (Turtle)
body:
## Ingredients

- turtle
- butter
- onion
- flour
- beef broth
- wine
- pepper
- lemon juice
- parsley
- breadcrumbs
- truffles
- small mushroom heads

## Directions

1. Butcher the turtle as indicated in the recipe for turtle soup
2. Remove the upper shell, take out the meat, remove the bile and entrails, and cut the meat into pieces
3. Let finely grated onion foam in butter
4. Add a tablespoon of flour to it, make a pale roux, pour a little beef broth over it, add a glass of wine, a little ground pepper, juice of two lemons, a piece of green parsley and juice of one lemon and let it simmer into a smooth sauce
5. Place the cut turtle meat in this sauce and stew it, then remove it to a platter, pour the strained sauce over it and garnish with fried breadcrumbs cut into noodles
6. You can also let truffles soaked in wine and small mushroom heads simmer in the sauce, with which the turtle is then garnished

title: Želva se zeleným hráškem (Turtle with Green Peas)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- small river turtles
- hot iron
- boiling water
- salt
- flour
- meat broth
- peas

## Directions

1. Kill small river turtles by placing hot iron on their rear end
2. Withdraw the turtles, throw them into boiling water
3. Wash and cook in salted water until they completely peel
4. Cut the meat into quarters, place on a baking pan
5. Prepare the peas in meat broth with browned flour
6. Add the peas to the turtle

title: Želví Polévka (Turtle Soup)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- turtle
- butter
- onion
- carrot
- parsley roots
- meat broth
- wine
- pepper
- eggs or bread

## Directions

1. Clean the killed turtle in lukewarm water
2. Simmer slowly for at least three hours
3. Strain and salt
4. Melt butter in a baking pan and sauté onion, carrot, and parsley roots
5. Place the turtle on top of everything
6. Pour meat broth over it
7. Braise, repeatedly pouring broth over it and allowing it to simmer further
8. Cut the cooked turtle into pieces
9. Salt it, pour wine over it, and pepper it
10. Add eggs or bread to the soup thus prepared

title: Želví polévka (Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- želva
- horké železo
- hovězí maso
- šest kvartů vody
- mrkev
- cibule
- pór
- celerová nať
- zelená petrželka
- bobkový list
- dymián
- šalvěj
- celý pepř
- nové koření
- několik hřebíčků
- květu
- čtyři unce máslové jíšky
- půl pinty sherry
- gill portského vína
- paprika
- citron

## Directions

1. Polož želvě horké železo na záda
2. Hlavu uřízni
3. Želvu pověs za zadní nohy a nech přes noc vykrvácet
4. Ráno odděl ostrým nožem skořepiny a vyndej vnitřnosti opatrně, aby se žluč nerozlila
5. Nohy usekej, ponoř na okamžik do vařící vody a stáhni
6. Vlož nohy i s masem do studené vody
7. Ve velkém hrnku nech vařiti kus hovězího masa v šesti kvartech vody
8. Seber pěnu
9. Osol a přidej mrkev, cibuli, pór, celerovou nať, zelenou petrželku, bobkový list, dymián a šalvěj
10. Přidej v plátěném pytlíčku zavázaný celý pepř, nové koření, několik hřebíčků a kousek celého květu
11. Nech tři hodiny vařit a cedníkem proceď
12. Do polévky vlož přiměřené množství želvího masa
13. Nech hodinu vařit a pak ho vyndej
14. Rozkrájej maso na kostky a vlož do mísy
15. Polévku zapraž asi čtyřmi uncemi máslové jíšky
16. Přidej půl pinty sherry a gill portského vína
17. Okořeň špetkou papriky
18. Nech ještě asi deset minut vařit
19. Vlej na mísu na rozkrájené maso a nes na stůl
20. Na zvláštním talíři předkládá se rozkrájený citron
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Želví polévka (Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- turtle
- ham slices
- butter
- rice
- flour
- onion
- celery stalks
- green parsley
- bay leaf
- thyme
- sage
- cloves
- allspice
- paprika
- water

## Directions

1. The turtle must be killed and hung overnight to bleed out
2. To make the turtle extend its head, place heated iron on its back
3. When it extends its head, cut off both the head and extremities
4. Hang the turtle and scald the legs so the black skin can be removed
5. Place in a cold location
6. Separate the shell pieces carefully so the gall bladder does not spill
7. Put the eggs, legs and meat into cold water
8. Cook everything in twice the amount of water as you want soup to be and cook for two hours, skimming carefully
9. Add several slices of ham about a quarter pound of butter and cook further for two hours
10. Add one wine glass of rice, one wine glass of flour mixed with a generous tablespoon of butter, one finely chopped onion, two celery stalks, green parsley, bay leaf, thyme and sage, half a teaspoon of cloves and allspice and a pinch of paprika
11. Cook for another hour

title: Želví polévka postní (Turtle Soup for Fasting)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- turtle
- water
- salted peas
- onion
- pepper
- wine
- roux

## Directions

1. Place killed turtle in cold water and cook slowly
2. Carefully scrape the meat from it, pull off the skin and remove the intestines
3. Meanwhile cook salted peas with onion and pepper; brown and pour with soup and wine; mix everything and cook again until soup forms

title: Želví vejce (Turtle Eggs)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- turtle eggs
- salted boiling water

## Directions

1. Boil turtle eggs hard in salted boiling water
2. Peel them
3. Add to broth

title: Žemličky (Tea Rusks)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 small cups milk
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- dried yeast cake or ordinary piece of softened compressed yeast or 1/2 small cup liquid yeast
- flour as needed
- 1/2 small cup fresh butter
- 1 egg yolk
- 2 egg whites
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Heat the milk in the evening, add sugar and yeast and mix in enough flour to make a batter as thin as for pancakes
2. Dust with flour and let stand in a warm place overnight
3. In the morning add fresh butter, egg yolk and beaten egg white snow, salt and add enough flour to make a stiff dough that does not stick to hands or rolling pin
4. Let rise
5. When risen, roll out to a thickness of three quarters of an inch and cut rounds with a round cutter
6. Brush with egg wash, fold one half over, place on a baking sheet greased with lard or butter and let rise
7. When risen, bake in a moderately hot oven for about 25 minutes

title: Žemlová Bába (Brown Betty)
body:
## Ingredients

- six hard rolls or slices of white bread
- three eggs
- one quart of milk
- salt
- apples
- raisins
- powdered sugar
- powdered cinnamon
- sour cream
- two yolks
- fresh butter

## Directions

1. Slice six hard rolls or slices of white bread thinly.
2. Beat three eggs in one quart of milk, salt it and pour over the sliced bread.
3. Grease a pan with butter, place a layer of soaked bread in it, cover with a layer of peeled and thinly sliced apples, sprinkle with raisins, powdered sugar and powdered cinnamon, and now continue alternating these two types of layers for as long as everything is used.
4. Beat a little sour cream with two yolks, pour over the bread pudding, place pieces of fresh butter on it and bake in the oven.

title: Žemlové řízky (Fancy Toasts)
body:
## Ingredients

- Bread rolls or white bread
- Butter

## Directions

1. Cut bread rolls or white bread into quarter-inch thick slices of the same size
2. Cut pieces from them either oblong, half a quarter inch long and two inches wide, or round about three inches in diameter
3. Fry them in butter until golden
4. When cooled, pipe a piece of crab or other butter around the edge with a piping cone or funnel
5. Fill the middle and arrange on a plate covered with a napkin, one beside the other
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlové řízky s humrou (Fancy Toasts with Lobster)
body:
## Ingredients

- Lobster meat
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice
- Round fried bread slices
- Crab butter
- Egg yolks
- Egg whites
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Cut lobster meat into small dice
2. Season with salt and pepper
3. Dress with lemon juice
4. Place on round fried bread slices with a border of crab butter
5. Lobster can also be cut into thin slices and garnished with chopped yolks, whites, and parsley
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlové řízky s husími játry (Canapés of Geese Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- Husí játra
- Játra z jiné drůbeže
- Šunka
- Máslo
- Cibule
- Pepř
- Sůl
- Citrón
- Žemlichkové lístky osmažené

## Directions

1. Rozkrájej na drobno husí játra a dle potřeby i játra z jiné drůbeže
2. Usekej na drobounko kousek šunky
3. Nech zpěniti na másle jednu rozstrouhanou cibulku
4. Přidej sekaninu
5. Opepři a osol
6. Nech dusit půl hodiny
7. Pomaž osmažené žemlichkové lístky touto směsí
8. Pokrop precezenou citrónovou šťávou
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlové řízky s jazykem (Fancy Toasts with Tongue)
body:
## Ingredients

- Fried bread rounds
- Tongue
- Aspic
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Prepare round fried bread slices about half a third inch in diameter
2. Cover with thin tongue slices of the same size and shape
3. Place a small ball of chopped tongue in the middle
4. Coat with aspic
5. Sprinkle with chopped green parsley
6. Similar preparation can be made with ham
7. Other meat and poultry can also be used
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlové řízky s játry (Canapés of Calves Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- Telecí játra
- Dvě cibule
- Čtvrt libry slaniny
- Máslo
- Tučná polévka
- Pepř
- Sůl
- Zelená petruška
- Strouhaná žemle

## Directions

1. Ustrouhej pěkná telecí játra
2. Usekej na drobno dvě cibule a čtvrt libry slaniny
3. Nech to s kouskem másla na rendlíčku spejchnout
4. Vlož do toho játra
5. Nech dusit, často dohlížej na to
6. Po lžíci tučné polévky přilévej, aby se nepripálily
7. Osol a okořeň tlučeným pepřem
8. Přidej trochu drobně usekané zelené petružele
9. Nakrájej strouhanou žemli na řízky
10. Nech je na másle do zlatová usmažiti
11. Polej je horkou polévkou, aby zvláčněly
12. Vyndej je a pomaž každý řízek připravenými játry
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlové řízky s kaviárem (Fancy Toasts with Caviar)
body:
## Ingredients

- Round fried bread slices
- Fresh butter
- Caviar
- Lemon juice
- Oil
- Onion

## Directions

1. Take round fried bread slices
2. Make a border of fresh butter
3. Spread the middle with caviar mixed with lemon juice and a few drops of oil
4. Sprinkle the caviar with finely chopped onion
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlové řízky s lososem (Fancy Toasts with Salmon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Oblong fried bread slices
- Anchovy butter
- Salmon slices
- Parsley
- Hard-boiled egg white
- Hard-boiled egg yolk

## Directions

1. Take oblong fried bread slices
2. Make a border of anchovy butter around the edge
3. Place several narrow thin salmon slices across
4. Garnish with chopped parsley, chopped egg white, and chopped egg yolk
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlové řízky s vejci (Fancy Toasts with Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- Oblong fried bread slices
- Green butter
- Sardines
- Hard-boiled egg yolk
- Hard-boiled egg white

## Directions

1. Around oblong fried bread slices, make a border of green butter
2. Divide the middle with sardines placed across into several compartments
3. Fill these compartments alternately with hard-boiled chopped yolks and whites
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlové řízky se sardelemi (Fancy Toasts with Anchovies)
body:
## Ingredients

- Round fried bread slices
- Fresh butter
- Anchovies
- Hard-boiled egg yolk
- Hard-boiled egg white
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Around round fried bread slices, make a border of fresh butter
2. In the middle, arrange anchovies in a rose shape
3. Garnish between the anchovies with hard-boiled rubbed egg yolk, hard-boiled chopped egg white, and chopped green parsley
source_title: Nová domácí kuchařka pro česko-americké hospodyně

title: Žemlový nákyp (Puffed French Roll Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- four bread rolls, crusts removed
- milk
- half a cup of sugar
- quarter pound of ground blanched almonds
- a piece of lemon rind, finely chopped
- eight egg yolks
- a little salt
- eight egg whites

## Directions

1. Remove crusts from four bread rolls
2. Soak in milk and mix to form a thick paste
3. Add half a cup of sugar
4. Add quarter pound of ground blanched almonds
5. Add finely chopped lemon rind
6. Add eight egg yolks
7. Add a little salt
8. Mix well
9. Gradually fold in the stiff snow made from eight egg whites
10. Pour into a buttered and sprinkled mold
11. Bake in the oven for half an hour
12. If you use potato porridge instead of bread rolls, you will have potato pudding

title: Žitný Chléb (Rye Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- rye dough saved from previous baking, or two cups lukewarm water
- dried yeast or compressed yeast or one cup liquid yeast
- rye flour as needed
- baking soda
- salt to taste
- fennel or caraway seeds, optional

## Directions

1. For the rye bread starter, it is best to keep a piece of dough from one baking to the next, about two tablespoons
2. The day before baking, pour about two cups of lukewarm water over the dough to soften it
3. In the evening, mix it well, add flour to make a thin starter like for pancakes and let it rise in a warm place overnight
4. If you do not have dough from the previous baking, take two cups of lukewarm water in the evening before baking, in which you have soaked one square of dry yeast or a piece of compressed yeast, or pour in one cup of liquid yeast
5. Add enough rye flour so that the dough is slightly thicker than for pancakes, mix it well into a smooth starter
6. If desired, add fennel or caraway seeds or both and let it rise well in a warm place until morning
7. In the morning, add one quart of lukewarm water to the starter, in which you have mixed one quarter teaspoon of baking soda, season with salt, add as much flour as needed and work the dough thoroughly with a wooden spoon so that it does not stick to the bowl or hands
8. Dust again with flour, cover with a warm cloth and let it rise again for about one and one-half hours
9. Then roll out the dough on a floured board, shape into a loaf, place on a sheet, let it rise again, place it in a well-heated oven and bake for at least two hours
10. For one loaf, one usually counts one quart of water and four pounds of flour; however, each cook must learn the exact amount of flour from her own experience

title: Žloutkové Placičky (Yolk Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 1 cupful of butter
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 3 egg yolks
- 1 whole egg
- lemon rind
- a pinch of ground cloves
- 3 spoonfuls of milk
- flour as needed
- finely chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Boil 6 eggs hard for about 20 minutes and cool in cold water
2. Rub 1 cupful of butter with 1 cupful of sugar, 3 egg yolks and 1 whole egg
3. Add lemon rind and a pinch of ground cloves
4. Remove only the yolks from the cooled eggs and crush them with the rest
5. Add 3 spoonfuls of milk and enough flour so the dough rolls well
6. Roll out to the thickness of a straw and cut out circles
7. Brush with egg yolk, sprinkle with finely chopped almonds and bake in a moderate oven

title: Žloutkový Ježek (Egg Yolk Hedgehog Pudding)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- 16 hard egg yolks
- 24 dekagrams (16 lots) butter
- 24 dekagrams almonds
- 24 dekagrams sugar
- zest from 2 lemons
- 4 whole eggs
- 8 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Beat 16 hard egg yolks with 24 dekagrams butter, 24 dekagrams almonds, 24 dekagrams sugar and zest from 2 lemons for half an hour
2. Add 4 whole eggs and 8 egg yolks
3. Steam in boiling water or bake in a form

title: Žáby s Cibulkou (Frogs with Onion)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- frog legs, cleaned and rinsed
- onion, browned
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Place cleaned and rinsed frog legs on a baking sheet with browned onion.
2. Salt and pepper them.
3. Turn them so they are braised equally on both sides.
4. Serve on a plate.

title: Žáby s vejci (Frogs with Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- frog hind legs
- salt
- butter
- onion
- parsley
- herbs
- eggs

## Directions

1. Salt the cleaned legs and let them lie in salt for a while, then remove the meat from the bones and chop it finely
2. Put a piece of butter in a saucepan, one finely chopped onion, a tablespoon of chopped green parsley and a little herbs, put the legs into this and let them stew uncovered until the juice they release is reabsorbed
3. Then add another piece of butter, mix it with several eggs and put on a heated platter

title: Žáby Smažené (Fried Frogs)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- frog legs
- salt
- flour
- eggs
- grated roll
- butter
- parsley, green and fried

## Directions

1. Remove the skin from frog legs, wash and dry them.
2. Salt them, roll in flour, egg and grated roll.
3. Fry on butter.
4. Place on a serving dish and garnish with green fried parsley.

title: Žáby Zadělávané s Citrónovou Omáčkou (Frogs with Lemon Sauce)
author: Marie Dumková
body:
## Ingredients

- frog legs
- butter
- onion, chopped
- salt
- juice of one lemon

## Directions

1. Clean the frog legs, place on a baking sheet, salt them, add butter and chopped onion.
2. Braise the frogs.
3. Place the frogs on a serving dish.
4. Squeeze the juice from one lemon into the sauce.
5. Add the frogs to the sauce and serve shortly after.
